1Chronicles4:31 Bet-Markabot, Hazar-Susim, Bet-Biri ban Sa'ara'im." 
Matthew1:1 Areya' dhaftarra bangatowana Isa Almasih, toronanna Daud, toronanna Ibrahim. Dhari Ibrahim sampe' ka Daud, asmana bangatowana Isa akantha e baba reya:" 
Matthew1:2 Ibrahim Ishak, Yakub, Yehuda ban tan-taretanna, Peres ban Zerah (ebuna anyama Tamar), Hezron, Ram, Aminadab, Nahason, Salmon, Bowas (ebuna iya areya Rahab), Obed (ebuna iya areya Errut), Isay, ban Rato Daud." 
Matthew1:3 Dhari Daud sampe' jamanna bangsa Isra'il ebuwang ka Babil, se badha e dhalem catheddan ma-nyama e baba areya: Sulaiman (ebuna bekkas rajina Uriya), Rehabeyam, Abiya, Asa, Yosafat, Yoram, Uziya, Yotam, Ahas, Hizkiya, Manasye, Amon, Yosiya, Yekhonya ban tan-taretanna." 
Matthew1:4 Dhari jamanna bangsa Isra'il ebuwang ka Babil sampe' kalahiranna Isa, se badha e dhalem catheddan ma-nyama e baba areya:" 
Matthew1:5 Yekhonya, Seyaltiel, Zerubabil, Abihud, Elyakim, Azur, Zadok, Akhim, Eliyud, Eleyazar, Matan, Yakub, Yusup rakana Miriyam." 
Matthew1:6 Ban dhari Miriyam jareya lahir Isa se esebbut Almasih. 
Matthew1:7 Daddi dhari Ibrahim sampe' ka Daud badha pa' bellas toronan. Dhari Daud sampe' ka jamanna bangsa Isra'il ebuwang ka Babil badha pa' bellas toronan keya. Dhari jamanna bangsa Isra'il ebuwang ka Babil sampe' ka lahirra Almasih bannya'na padha pa' bellas toronan. 
Matthew1:8 Kantha reya caretana kalahiranna Isa Almasih. Ebuna iya areya Miriyam, abakalan ban Yusup. Tape sabellunna se kadhuwa jareya akabin, Miriyam etemmo la bubut. Yusup ta' ngagali ja' Miriyam jareya bubut lantaran kobasana Errohna Allah." 
Matthew1:9 Yusup, bakalla Miriyam jareya, kaetong oreng se ta'at ka hokomma agama. Daddi Yusup maburunga se abakalan, tape ta' asa'-kasa'a sopaja Miriyam ta' malo e adha'na oreng bannya'." 
Matthew1:10 Sabatara Yusup gi' ker-mekker parkara jareya, salerana asopenna. E dhalem sopennana jareya pangrasana salerana ngoladi malaekadda Pangeran se adhabu kantha reya ka salerana, “Yusup, toronanna Daud, ba'na ta' osa tako' abineya Miriyam, sabab ana' se egandhu' jareya dhari kobasana Errohna Allah." 
Matthew1:11 Miriyam bakal rembi'a lalake'. Kana' jareya bi' ba'na kodu enyamae Isa, sabab kana' jareya bakal masalamedda ommadda dhari dusana.”" 
Matthew1:12 Jareya kabbi kalakon kantha jareya sopaja kalakon apa se edhabuwagi Pangeran kalaban parantara'anna nabbina, iya areya," 
Matthew1:13 “Badha paraban se bakal ngandhunga ban rembi'a lalake'. Kana' jareya bakal enyama'ana Immanuwil.” (Immanuwil reya oca' Ibrani se artena “Allah asarengnge sengko' ban ba'na”.) 
Matthew1:14 Saellana Yusup abungo pas alampa'agi apa se edhabuwagi malaekadda Pangeran jarowa ka salerana. Miriyam ekaraji. 
Matthew1:15 Tape saabidda Miriyam gi' ta' babar, Yusup ta' asare apolong ban Miriyam. Ban saellana kana' jareya lahir, bi' Yusup enyamae Isa." 
Matthew2:1 Isa lahir e kottha Betlehem e nagara Yudea e jaman pamarenta'anna Rato Herodes. E bakto jareya badha li-ahli elmo bintang dhari Temor entar ka Yerusalim. 
Matthew2:2 Reng-oreng jareya e man-dhimman anya-tanya, “E ka'imma kalenggiyanna na'-kana' se gi' buru lahir se bakal jumennengnga ratona oreng Yahudi ka'issa'? Kaula padha nengale bintangnga kalowar e temor, daddi kaula padha entar ka'anja asojuda ka Salerana.”" 
Matthew2:3 E bakto Rato Herodes meyarsa parkara jareya, ce' takerjada, bariya keya sakabbiyanna oreng e Yerusalim." 
Matthew2:4 Daddi rato jareya pas makon makompol sakabbiyanna imam kapala ban ru-guru agamana bangsa Yahudi. Rato jareya pas mareksa ka reng-oreng gella', “Rato se ejanjiyagi Allah lahira e ka'imma?”" 
Matthew2:5 Reng-oreng jareya nyaot, “E kottha Betlehem e nagara Yudea. Sabab badha nabbi se nyerrat kadi ka'dhinto'," 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ba'na Betlehem, e nagara Yehuda, ba'na banne se paleng kene' e antarana tha-kottha se otama e Yehuda. Sabab dhari ba'na bakal rabuwa settong pamimpin se bakal mimpina Tang ommat Isra'il.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Saellana narema katerrangan jareya, Herodes ta' asa'-kasa' adikane li-ahli bintang dhari Temor jareya. Rato jareya pas mareksa ka reng-oreng gella' bila se teppa' bintang jareya etangale'e." 
Matthew2:8 Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya pas epakon mangkat ka Betlehem sambi epessen kantha reya, “Kassa' ba'na mangkat, sare patete kana' jareya. Mon etemmo, sengko' balai, sopaja sengko' bisa'a entar asojud ka kana' jareya.”" 
Matthew2:9 Li-ahli bintang jareya pas mangkat. Bintang se sabellunna jareya etangale'e e temor, sateya etangale'e pole. Reng-oreng jareya ce' peragga polana nangale'e bintang jareya! Bintang jareya ajangadha'i reng-oreng buru, pas ambu teppa' e attasanna kennengnganna kana' jareya." 
Matthew2:10  
Matthew2:11 Li-ahli bintang jareya maso' ka dhalem bengko jareya pas nangale'e kana' jareya ban Miriyam, ebuna. Reng-oreng jareya asojud nyemba ka kana' jareya, pas mokka' baddhana dhi'-andhi'na, sarta pas ngatorragi emmas, mennyan ban emmor." 
Matthew2:12 Allah maemot reng-oreng jareya e dhalem mempena sopaja ja' abali ka Herodes. Daddi reng-oreng jareya pas mole lebat jalan laen. 
Matthew2:13 Saellana li-ahli bintang jareya mangkat, malaekadda Pangeran ngaton ka Yusup e dhalem sopennana. Malaekat jareya adhabu, “Herodes andhi' maksod nyareya kana' jareya epateyana. Daddi mara ba'na jaga, giba kana' jareya ban ebuna ngongse ka Messer. Ba'na terros neng e dhissa' gallu sampe' sengko' aberri' kabar pole ka ba'na.”" 
Matthew2:14 Yusup abungo, ban e malem jareya keya terros abakta kana' jareya ban ebuna ngongse ka Messer." 
Matthew2:15 Se katello jareya terros alenggi e jadhiya sampe' Herodes seda. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya la kalakon apa se edhabuwagi Pangeran kalaban parantara'anna nabbina, se bariya monyena, “Sengko' ngolok Tang Ana' dhari Messer.”" 
Matthew2:16 E bakto Herodes ngagali ja' salerana etepo li-ahli bintang gella', panggaliyanna ce' peggella. Daddi salerana pas makon mate'e sakabbiyanna na'-kana' lalake' se aomor dhu taon ka baba e Betlehem ban e sabingkerra. Jareya cocok ban katerrangan se etarema dhari li-ahli bintang rowa parkara sa'adda bintang jarowa se etangale'e." 
Matthew2:17 Daddi la kalakon apa se tao edhabuwagi Nabbi Yeremiya, iya areya," 
Matthew2:18 “E Rama ekaedhing sowarana oreng nanges, sowarana oreng aserrowan. Rahel nangese na'-ana'na; ban ta' endha' elepor sabab na'-ana'na la tadha' karena.”" 
Matthew2:19 Saellana Herodes seda, e bakto Yusup gi' badha e Messer malaekadda Pangeran ngaton pole ka Yusup e dhalem sopennana." 
Matthew2:20 Malaekat jareya adhabu, “Reng-oreng se terro mateyana kana' jareya la padha mate. Daddi mara ba'na jaga, kana' jareya ban ebuna giba abali ka Isra'il.”" 
Matthew2:21 Yusup pas abungo, saellana jareya kana' jareya sarta Miriyam ebakta abali ka Isra'il." 
Matthew2:22 Tape saellana jareya Yusup meyarsa ja' Arkelaus, pottrana Herodes la jumenneng rato e nagara Yudea agante ramana. Daddi Yusup tako' se meyosa ka jadhiya. Saellana narema petodu pole dhari Pangeran e dhalem sopennana, Yusup pas meyos ka dhaera Galilea." 
Matthew2:23 E jadhiya salerana enneng e kottha se anyama Nazaret. Kalaban cara jareya kalakon apa se edhabuwagi bi-nabbi parkara kana' jareya: “Oreng jareya bakal esebbuda Oreng Nazaret.” 
Matthew3:1 E bakto jareya Yahya Pambaptis rabu ka sagara beddhi e Yudea ban molae akotbah. 
Matthew3:2 “Mara padha atobat dhari sa-dusana,” dhabuna, “sabab Allah bakal duliya marenta menangka Rato!”" 
Matthew3:3 Yahya jareya se ekamaksod bi' Nabbi Yesaya kalaban dhabuna se amonye kantha reya, “Badha oreng ra'-era'an e sagara beddhi, ‘Sadhiya'agi jalan kaangguy Pangeran; parampa'agi rong-lorong se elebadana Salerana.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Yahya ngagem rasogan dhari buluna onta. Panyengsedda dhari kole', se edha'ar balang ban maddu alas." 
Matthew3:5 Bannya' oreng dhari Yerusalim, dhari saantero nagara Yudea ban dhari ra-dhaera e sabingkerra Songay Yordan padha nyabis ka Yahya." 
Matthew3:6 Reng-oreng jareya ngakone sa-dusana, ban Yahya abaptis reng-oreng jareya e Songay Yordan." 
Matthew3:7 Bannya' keya oreng Farisi ban Saduki se nyabis ka Yahya nyo'on ebaptis. Tape e bakto Yahya ngoladi reng-oreng jareya dhateng, pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na reya jahat! Sapa se ngoca' ja' ba'na bisa lopot dhari okomanna Allah se bakal rabuwa?" 
Matthew3:8 Duduwagi bi' tengka gulina ba'na ja' ba'na la atobat dhari sa-dusana. 
Matthew3:9 Ba'na ja' nyangka bisa'a lopot dhari okoman kalaban ngoca' ja' Ibrahim bangatowana ba'na. Kaenga'e ya, dhari to-bato reya Allah sanggup keya abadhi toronan kaangguy Ibrahim!" 
Matthew3:10 Kapak la esadhiya'agi se epamogerra kajuwan sampe' ka mo'-ramo'na. Bungka se ta' ngasellagi buwa se becce' bakal epogerra ban ebuwanga ka dhalem apoy. 
Matthew3:11 Sengko' abaptis ba'na ngangguy aeng kaangguy noduwagi ja' ba'na la atobat dhari sa-dusana; tape se bakal rabuwa saellana sengko' reya, bakal abaptisa ba'na bi' Errohna Allah ban apoy. Salerana araja'an dhari sengko'. Mokka'agi sapatuna bai sengko' ta' pantes." 
Matthew3:12 Salerana ngastane gaddhang epanampeya sakabbiyanna gandumma sampe' berse. Gandum jareya bi' salerana epakompola e dhalem lombung, tape sekkemma kabbi bakal eobbara e dhalem apoy se ta' bisa mate.”" 
Matthew3:13 E bakto jareya Isa meyos dhari Galilea ka Songay Yordan. E jadhiya Salerana manggi'i Yahya sarta nyo'on ebaptis. 
Matthew3:14 Tape Yahya ngoddi nolak parnyo'onanna jareya. Dhabuna Yahya, “Abdina se kodu ebaptis sareng Panjennengngan. Me' samangken la'-mala' Panjennengngan se manggi'i abdina.”" 
Matthew3:15 Tape Isa adhabu, “La dina, ra. Sabab kalaban cara jareya Sengko' ban ba'na ajalannagi pa-apa se daddi kasokanna Allah.” Daddi Yahya abaptis Isa." 
Matthew3:16 Saellana ebaptis, Isa duli ongga dhari songay jareya. O-tao langnge' maroka ban Isa ngoladi Erroh Allah toron akantha dara ka attasanna Salerana." 
Matthew3:17 Saellana jareya pas ekaedhing sowarana Allah adhabu, “Areya' Tang Pottra kakase, se masenneng Tang ate.”" 
Matthew4:1 Saellana jareya Isa etonton Errohna Allah ka sagara beddhi epagudha'a ka Iblis. 
Matthew4:2 Pa' polo are pa' polo malem Isa ta' adha'ar. Saellana jareya pas arassa lapar. 
Matthew4:3 Iblis jareya nyander pas mator, “Junandalem Pottrana Allah, ta' enggi? Daddi, ngereng to-bato paneka pakon daddi roti.”" 
Matthew4:4 Isa adhabu, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi: Manossa ta' bisa odhi' pera' dhari roti malolo, tape laen dhari jareya dhari pa-apa se edhabuwagi Allah.”" 
Matthew4:5 Saellana jareya Isa ebakta Iblis gella' ka Yerusalim, kottha socce, pas esaba' e attas konco'na Padalemman Socce." 
Matthew4:6 Iblis jareya pas mator ka Isa, “Junandalem Pottrana Allah, ta' enggi? Daddi, ngereng alonca' ka baba; sabab e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi sapaneka, ‘Allah bakal makona kat-malaekadda ajaga kasalameddanna Ba'na, Ba'na bakal etampanana kat-malaekat jareya bi' tanangnga, sopaja sokona Ba'na ta' sampe'a tatagguk ka bato.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Isa adhabu, “Tape e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi keya, ‘Ba'na ja' nyoba' Guste Allahna.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Saellana jareya bi' Iblis Isa ebakta pole ka gunong se ce' tenggina pas epangoladi sakabbiyanna karaja'an e dunnya ban kamolja'anna. 
Matthew4:9 Iblis jareya pas mator ka Isa, “Ka'dhinto' sadaja sareng abdidalem eatorragiya ka Junandalem, manabi Junandalem asojud ka abdidalem.”" 
Matthew4:10 Dhabuna Isa, “Ondur ba'na, he Panggudha! E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Ba'na kodu nyemba ka Pangeran, Allahna, ban kodu abakte ka Salerana malolo!’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Dhi-budhina Iblis jareya ondur adina'agi Isa, ban kat-malaekat padha rabu aladine Salerana." 
Matthew4:12 E bakto meyarsa ja' Yahya epamaso' ka penjara, Isa pas nyengga ka Galilea." 
Matthew4:13 Salerana ngalle dhari Nazaret, pas alenggi e Kapernaum e penggirra Talaga Galilea e dhaera Zebulon ban Naftali." 
Matthew4:14 Sarrena Isa alampa'agi se kantha jareya, daddi kalakon apa se edhabuwagi Nabbi Yesaya:" 
Matthew4:15 “Tana Zebulon ban tana Naftali, e jalan se nojju ka talaga, e bara' lao'na Songay Yordan, Galilea tanana oreng se banne Yahudi!" 
Matthew4:16 Bangsa se odhi' e pettengnga la nangale'e tera' se mancorong! Kaangguy ka se enneng e nagara pettengnga maot la moncar sonar se tera'!” 
Matthew4:17 Molae dhari bakto jareya Isa aberta'agi, “Mara atobat dhari sa-dusana, sabab Allah bakal duliya marenta menangka Rato!”" 
Matthew4:18 Parappa'na alomampa e paseserra Talaga Galilea, Isa ngoladi oreng majang kadhuwa, iya areya Simon (se ejulugi Petrus) ban ale'na se anyama Andreyas. Se kadhuwa jareya teppa'na ajala juko' e talaga." 
Matthew4:19 Isa adhabu ka se kadhuwa jareya, “Mara noro' Sengko'. Bi' Sengko' ba'na eajarana ajala oreng.”" 
Matthew4:20 Se kadhuwa jareya terros adina'agi jalana pas ngereng Isa. 
Matthew4:21 Isa alomampa terros, pas ngoladi badha oreng sataretan kadhuwa laenna, iya areya Yakobus ban Yahya, na'-ana'na Zebedeyus. Se kadhuwa jareya ban eppa'na parappa'na mateppa' jala e paraona. Bi' Isa se kadhuwa jareya etembali keya," 
Matthew4:22 ban se kadhuwa jareya terros adina'agi paraona ban eppa'na, pas ngereng Isa." 
Matthew4:23 E Galilea, Isa alengleng e saantero nagara sarta molang e kennengnganna kabakteyan e man-dhimman. Salerana ngabarragi Kabar Bagus ja' Allah bakal marenta'a. Laen dhari jareya Salerana mabaras oreng se sake' ban se ena." 
Matthew4:24 Kabar parkara Isa jareya ekaedhing balattra sanagara Siria, sampe' bannya' oreng se nyabis ka Salerana. Reng-oreng jareya ngeba reng-oreng se nyandhang acem-macem panyaket ban kasossa'an. Reng-oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat, se jan-ajanen, ban se empon, kabbi epabaras bi' Isa." 
Matthew4:25 Ce' bannya'na oreng se ngereng Isa e bakto jareya. Badha se dhari Galilea, badha se dhari Sapolo Kottha, dhari Yerusalim, dhari Yudea, ban badha pole se dhari nagara e temorra Yordan." 
Matthew5:1 E bakto ngoladi bannya' oreng jareya, Isa laju ongga ka attas gumo'. Saellana alenggi, red-moredda pas nyander." 
Matthew5:2 Salerana pas molae morok reng-oreng jareya: 
Matthew5:3 “Pojur oreng se apangrasa ta' bisa apa-rapa ban pera' agantong ka Pangeran malolo; oreng jareya anggotana ommadda Allah! 
Matthew5:4 Pojur oreng se sossa atena; oreng jareya bakal elepora bi' Allah! 
Matthew5:5 Pojur oreng se andhap asor; oreng jareya bakal narema'a apa se ejanjiyagi Allah! 
Matthew5:6 Pojur oreng se ce' terrona ajalannagiya kasokanna Allah; oreng jareya bakal epacokoba bi' Allah! 
Matthew5:7 Pojur oreng se bellas ka oreng laen; oreng jareya bakal ekabellasana keya bi' Allah! 
Matthew5:8 Pojur oreng se morne atena; oreng jareya bakal kennala ka Allah. 
Matthew5:9 Pojur oreng se ngeba kataremtemman e antarana manossa; Allah bakal ngakone oreng jareya menangka pottrana! 
Matthew5:10 Pojur oreng se ekaneyaja polana ajalannagi kasokanna Allah; oreng jareya daddi anggotana ommadda Allah! 
Matthew5:11 Pojur ba'na mon ba'na ecale, ekaneyaja ban epetenna polana Sengko'." 
Matthew5:12 Bi-nabbi se odhi' sabellunna ba'na la ekaneyaja kantha jareya keya. Mara paperak ban pagumbira, sabab raja opa se esadhiya'agi Pangeran ka ba'na.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Ba'na reya bujana dunnya. Mon buja tabar, ba' ekennenga epaaccen pole? Tadha' gunana pole, kajabana ebuwang ban enyek-enyek oreng." 
Matthew5:14 Ba'na reya tera'na dunnya. Kottha se badha e attassa gumo' ta' ekenneng errep. 
Matthew5:15 Tadha' oreng se ngodhi'i damar, pas ngodhunge damarra jareya bi' pennay. La'-mala' damar jareya tanto esaba' e kennengnganna damar, sopaja nera'e sakabbiyanna oreng se badha e dhalem bengkona." 
Matthew5:16 Bariya keya tera'na ba'na kodu nyonar e adha'na oreng, sopaja reng-oreng jareya nangale'e lalakonna ba'na se becce', pas amolja'agi Ramana ba'na e sowarga.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Ba'na ja' nyangka Sengko' reya dhateng matadha'a hokomma Mosa ban pangajaranna para nabbi. Sengko' dhateng banne matadha'a, tape noduwagiya artena se sabendherra." 
Matthew5:18 Kaenga'e, ya! Saabidda langnge' ban bume gi' badha, maske pera' settong aksara otabana titi' se paleng kene' sakale dhari hokom jareya ta' kera epaelang, mon gi' ta' kalakon kabbi!" 
Matthew5:19 Daddi, sapa se nerrak sala settong dhari ta-parenta jareya, maske se paleng kene' sakale, sarta ngajari sopaja oreng laen alako kantha jareya keya, oreng jareya bakal daddiya se paleng kene' e antarana ommadda Allah. Sabaligga, sapa se ajalannagi ta-parenta jareya sarta ngajarragi sopaja oreng laen alako kantha jareya keya, oreng jareya bakal raja'a e antarana ommadda Allah." 
Matthew5:20 Daddi, kaenga'e, ya: Ba'na ta' kera daddi ommadda Allah mon ba'na ta' ngalebbi'i ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi e dhalem parkara ajalannagi kasokanna Allah!”" 
Matthew5:21 “Ba'na tao ja' bangatowana Sengko' ban ba'na andhi' pangajaran kantha reya: Ja' mate'e oreng; sapa se mate'e oreng, kodu eadili." 
Matthew5:22 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na, sapa se peggel ka oreng laen, bakal eadilana; ban sapa se apesowan ka oreng laen, bakal eadilana e adha'na Mahkamah Agama. Ban sapa se ngoca' ka oreng laen ‘Gendheng!’, patot ebuwang ka dhalem apoy naraka." 
Matthew5:23 Daddi, mon e antarana ba'na badha se teppa'na ngeba tor-ator ka Allah, pas enga' ja' badha oreng se sake' ate ka aba'na," 
Matthew5:24 saba' gallu tor-atorra jareya neng e mezba pas dina'agi, terros entar nyapa gallu ka oreng jareya. Saellana jareya, buru ba'na bisa abali ngatorragi tor-atorra ka Allah." 
Matthew5:25 Mon badha oreng agugat ba'na ka mahkamah, nyapa gallu bi' oreng jareya mon gi' sempat sabellunna napa' ka mahkamah. Mon ta' kantha jareya, bi' oreng jareya ba'na tanto epassra'agi ka hakim, ban hakim jareya tanto massra'agi ba'na ka polisi. Bi' polisi jareya ba'na tanto pas epamaso' ka penjara." 
Matthew5:26 Ban kaenga'e, ya: Ba'na ta' kera bisa kalowar dhari penjara jareya, sabellunna dhindhana ba'na lonas kabbi.”" 
Matthew5:27 “Ba'na tao ja' badha pangajaran se amonye kantha reya: Ja' azina. 
Matthew5:28 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: sapa se ngabas ka oreng babine' kalaban napso barai, oreng jareya la azina ban babine' gella' e dhalem atena." 
Matthew5:29 Mon matana ba'na se kangan daddi sababba ba'na agabay dusa, congke' mata jareya pas buwang! Lebbi becce' ba'na kaelangan sala settong dhari bagiyanna badanna etembang ba'na sabadan ecabbur ka apoy naraka." 
Matthew5:30 Mon tanangnga ba'na se kangan daddi sababba ba'na agabay dusa, ketthok tanang jareya pas buwang! Lebbi becce' kaelangan tanang settong etembang ba'na sabadan maso' ka naraka.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Badha pole pangajaran se amonye kantha reya: sapa se nellak binena kodu aberri' sorat panellak ka binena jareya. 
Matthew5:32 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: pa-sapa se nellak binena mangkana babine' jareya ta' alako serong, andaddiyagi binena jareya azina, mon binena jareya sampe' alake pole. Ban sapa se ngabine babine' se etellak jareya, azina keya.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Ba'na tao ja' bangatowana Sengko' ban ba'na andhi' pangajaran se amonye kantha reya: ja' mongkere janji. Apa se la ejanjiyagi ba'na kalaban sompa e ajunanna Allah, kodu elakone." 
Matthew5:34 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: ba'na ja' asompa'a kalaban asakse langnge', sabab langnge' reya tahtana Allah," 
Matthew5:35 bariya keya ta' olle kalaban asakse bume, sabab bume reya katongko'anna padana; otabana asakse Yerusalim, sabab jareya kotthana Rato raja." 
Matthew5:36 Bariya keya ja' asompa asakse cethagga ba'na dibi', sabab ba'na ta' kobasa mapote otaba macelleng obu'na maske pera' salambar." 
Matthew5:37 Cokop mon ba'na ngoca' ‘Iya’ otaba ‘Enja'’ – lebbi dhari jareya dhatengnga dhari Iblis.” 
Matthew5:38 “Ba'na tao ja' badha keya pangajaran se amonye kantha reya: mata gante mata, gigi gante gigi." 
Matthew5:39 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: ja' males sake' ate ka oreng se alako juba' ka ba'na. Sabaligga, mon badha oreng nampeleng pepena ba'na se kangan, dina me' olle oreng jareya nampeleng pepena se kacer keya." 
Matthew5:40 Ban mon badha oreng se agugat ba'na ka hakim sarta menta kalambina ba'na, bagi sakale jubana ba'na ka oreng jareya." 
Matthew5:41 Mon oreng se kobasa maksa ba'na mekollagi barangnga sampe' sakilometer jauna, pekollagi sampe' dhu kilo sakale jauna." 
Matthew5:42 Mon badha oreng ta-menta ka ba'na, berri'i. Bariya keya ja' sampe' nolak mon badha oreng se jam-ngenjama ka ba'na.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Ba'na tao ja' badha keya pangajaran se amonye cara reya: kataresnae ca-kancana ban kabaji'i so-mosona. 
Matthew5:44 Tape sateya Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: kaneserre so-mosona, pojiyagi reng-oreng se nganeyaja ba'na," 
Matthew5:45 sopaja ba'na daddiya tra-pottrana Ramana e sowarga. Sabab Allah mamoncar arena kaangguy reng-oreng se becce' ban reng-oreng se juba'. Salerana matoron ojan kaangguy reng-oreng se teppa' ban reng-oreng se jahat. 
Matthew5:46 Sabab mon ba'na pera' neser ka reng-oreng se neser ka ba'na, apa ganjaranna? Reng-oreng tokang tagina pajek kantha jareya keya." 
Matthew5:47 Ban mon ba'na aberri' salam pera' ka ca-kancana malolo, apa kalebbiyanna jareya? Reng-oreng se ta' kennal ka Allah kantha jareya keya!" 
Matthew5:48 Ramana ba'na se badha e sowarga samporna panganeserra ka sakabbiyanna oreng. Ba'na kodu kantha jareya keya.” 
Matthew6:1 “Kaenga'e, ya, ja' sampe' ba'na ajalannagi kawajibanna agama e adha'na oreng bannya' kalaban maksod sopaja etangaleyana oreng. Mon kantha jareya, ba'na ta' kera olle ganjaran dhari Ramana e sowarga." 
Matthew6:2 Daddi, mon ba'na aberri' sandhekka ka oreng mesken, ja' la-kabala ka oreng akantha reng-oreng monafik. Reng-oreng jareya seggut kantha jareya e dhalem kennengnganna kabakteyan ban e lorong raja, terro ealem oreng. Kaenga'e, ya, reng-oreng jareya la olle opana." 
Matthew6:3 Tape ba'na, mon aberri' sandhekka, ta' osa asa'-kasa', sopaja tadha' oreng se tao." 
Matthew6:4 Dina ma' olle lalakonna ba'na jareya ta' ekataowe sapa'a bai, kajabana bi' Ramana e sowarga. Salerana ngoladi ka lalakonna ba'na se ta' etangale'e oreng jareya ban tanto apareng ganjaran ka ba'na.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Mon ba'na adu'a, ja' papadha ban reng-oreng se dujan tha'-kantha'an rowa. Reng-oreng jareya dujan adu'a sambi manjeng e kennengnganna kabakteyan-kabakteyan ban e dhang-tapadhangdhang, terro etangaleyana oreng. Bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana: jareya opana se la etarema oreng jareya." 
Matthew6:6 Tape mon ba'na adu'a, maso' ka kamarra, kanceng labangnga, pas adu'a ka Ramana se ta' etangale'e oreng rowa. Ramana ba'na se ngoladi lalakonna ba'na se ta' etemmo oreng jareya bakal aparenga ganjaranna ka ba'na." 
Matthew6:7 Mon ba'na adu'a, ja' jang-lanjang akantha oreng se ta' kennal ka Pangeran. Reng-oreng jareya nyangka mon du'ana lanjang tanto parnyo'onanna epeyarsa'agi." 
Matthew6:8 Ja' kantha oreng jareya. Ramana ba'na la ngagali apa se ekaparlo ba'na, sabellunna ba'na menta." 
Matthew6:9 Daddi, adu'a kantha reya, ‘Rama se jumenneng e sowarga: Moga asmaepon Junandalem emolja'agiya." 
Matthew6:10 Karaja'annepon Junandalem moga dhatengnga. Karsaepon Junandalem moga kalakona e bume akadi e sowarga. 
Matthew6:11 Parenge abdidalem rajekke are mangken. 
Matthew6:12 Parenge sapora abdidalem dhari sadajana kasala'an, akadi abdidalem jugan nyapora sadajana oreng se gadhuwan sala ka abdidalem." 
Matthew6:13 Ja' maso'agi abdidalem ka dhalem gudha'an, namong palopoddagi abdidalem dhari se jahat. [Junandalem rato se molja sareng se kobasa salanjangnga. Amin.]’" 
Matthew6:14 Mon ba'na nyapora oreng se andhi' sala ka ba'na, bariya keya Ramana ba'na e sowarga bakal nyapora'a kasala'anna ba'na." 
Matthew6:15 Tape mon ba'na ta' nyapora kasala'anna oreng laen, kasala'anna ba'na ta' kera esapora keya bi' Ramana ba'na e sowarga.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Mon ba'na apowasa, mowana ja' paacom akantha oreng se dujan tha'-kantha'an rowa. Reng-oreng jareya com-maacom terro atemmowa bi' reng-oreng laen ja' aba'na apowasa. Kaenga'e, ya, jareya opana se la etarema reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew6:17 Tape mon ba'na apowasa, araop pas asoroy," 
Matthew6:18 sopaja tadha'a oreng se tao ja' ba'na apowasa, kajabana Ramana ba'na se ta' etangale'e oreng jareya malolo. Salerana ngoladi lalakonna ba'na se ta' etangale'e oreng jareya tanto apareng ganjaran ka ba'na.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Ba'na ja' makompol dunnya e bume, sabab dunnya e bume bisa rosak polana ekakan ngetnget otaba tattaen otaba ekeco' maleng." 
Matthew6:20 Sabaligga, pakompol dunnya e sowarga, sabab dunnya e dhissa' ta' kera rosak polana ngetnget otaba tattaen, ban ta' kera ekeco' maleng." 
Matthew6:21 Sabab e kennengnganna dunnyana ba'na, e jadhiya keya kennengnganna atena ba'na!”" 
Matthew6:22 “Mata reya damarra badan. Mon matana ba'na benneng, ba'na sabadan tera' kabbi." 
Matthew6:23 Tape mon matana ba'na rabuk, ba'na sabadan petteng calemodan. Daddi mon damar e dhalem badanna ba'na petteng, pettengnga tanto calemodan!”" 
Matthew6:24 “Tadha' settonga oreng se bisa ngabula ka lora kadhuwa. Sabab ta' burung lorana se settong ekataresnae alebbiyan dhari lorana se settonganna. Otabana oreng jareya aestowan ka lorana se settong ebandhing ban ka settonganna. Bariya keya ba'na. Ba'na ta' bisa abakte ka Allah ban ka dunnya. 
Matthew6:25 Daddi kaenga'e, ya; ba'na ta' osa kobater mekkere odhi'na, iya areya apa se ekakana ban eenoma ba'na, otabana apa se eangguya. Odhi' reya gu ta' alebbiyan dhari kakanan, ban badan reya alebbiyan dhari angguy, ta' iya?" 
Matthew6:26 Abassagi, ra, mano' e bang-abang rowa. No'-mano' jareya tadha' se namen, tadha' se anye, ban tadha' se nyempen hasella tamennanna e dhalem lombung. Maske bariya bi' Ramana ba'na se badha e sowarga no'-mano' jareya epeyara! Ba'na reya gu ta' lebbi aji dhari mano', ta' iya?" 
Matthew6:27 Sapa e antarana ba'na se bisa nambai omorra maske sakone' kalaban kakobateranna jareya? 
Matthew6:28 Arapa ba'na me' kobater mekkere angguy? Abassagi, ra, kembang kacobung se tombu e teggal rowa. Bang-kembang jareya ta' alako ban ta' atennon;" 
Matthew6:29 tape Rato Sulaiman se ce' sogina rowa, ta' ngangguy kalambi se bagussa padha ban bang-kembang jareya!" 
Matthew6:30 Rebba e teggal tombu sateya ban lagguna la eobbar. Tape maske kantha jareya, rebba jareya bi' Allah erengga sampe' ce' bagussa. Apa pole ba'na! Tape ba'na ta' pate parcaja!" 
Matthew6:31 Ta' osa kobater sarta ngoca', ‘Apa se ekakana’ otabana ‘apa se eenoma’, otabana ‘apa se eangguya’?" 
Matthew6:32 Jareya kabbi ros-terrosan eserser bi' reng-oreng se ta' kennal ka Allah. Mangkana Ramana ba'na se e sowarga ngagali ja' ba'na marlowagi jareya kabbi. 
Matthew6:33 Daddi, ehteyarragi gallu sopaja Allah marenta odhi'na ba'na ban jalannagi apa kasokanna. Mon kantha jareya en-laenna bakal eparengngagiya keya bi' Allah ka ba'na." 
Matthew6:34 Daddi ba'na ta' osa kobater parkara lagguna, sabab lagguna badha kakobateranna dibi'. Are teya la cokop kasossa'anna, ta' osa etambai pole.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Ba'na ja' ahakime oreng laen, sopaja ba'na dibi' ta' ehakime bi' Allah." 
Matthew7:2 Sabab ba'na bakal ehakimana Allah akantha ba'na se ahakime oreng laen. Ban okoran se eangguy ba'na ka oreng laen, bakal egabaya okoran ka ba'na keya bi' Allah." 
Matthew7:3 Arapa ba'na me' ngabas ka kaju satembil se badha e matana oreng laen, tape balo' se badha e matana ba'na dibi' me' ta' epekkere?" 
Matthew7:4 Baramma ba'na me' bisa ngoca' ka taretanna, ‘Mara bi' sengko' kaju se satembil jareya epakalowarragiya dhari matana,’ mon e matana ba'na dibi' badha balo'na?" 
Matthew7:5 He, monafik! Pakalowar gallu balo' dhari matana ba'na dibi', saellana jareya buru ba'na terrang pangabassa, ban bisa makalowar kaju se satembil dhari matana taretanna." 
Matthew7:6 Ja' magi barang se socce ka pate', sabab pate' jareya tanto pas abalik nyerrang ba'na. Ban ja' magi motteyara ka babi, sabab motteyara jareya tanto enyek-enyek bi' babi jareya.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Mara menta, ba'na tanto narema. Mara sare, ba'na tanto nemmo. Mara thokthok, tanto ba'na ebukka'e labang." 
Matthew7:8 Sabab oreng se menta bakal narema'a: oreng se nyare bakal nemmowa; ban oreng se athokthok bakal ebukka'ana labang. 
Matthew7:9 E antarana ba'na ba' badha'a eppa' se aberri' bato ka ana'na mon ana'na jareya menta roti? 
Matthew7:10 Otabana se aberri' olar mon ana'na jareya menta juko'? 
Matthew7:11 Sanajjan ba'na jahat, ba'na tao keya aberri' se becce' ka na'-ana'na. Apa pole Ramana ba'na e sowarga! Salerana bi-lebbi tanto apareng se becce' ka oreng se menta." 
Matthew7:12 Daddi parlakowagi oreng laen akantha parlakowan ekaterro ba'na dhari oreng laen. Jareya essena hokomma Mosa ban pangajaranna bi-nabbi.” 
Matthew7:13 “Mon maso'a, lebat e labang se cope', sabab labang ban jalan ka naraka reya raja ban lebar, ban bannya' oreng se lebat e jadhiya." 
Matthew7:14 Sabaligga labang ban jalan se ngeba oreng ka odhi' reya cope' ban malarat elebadi. Daddi sakone' oreng se nemmo labang ban lorong jareya.” 
Matthew7:15 “Pate-ngate ngadhebbi bi-nabbi palsu. Reng-oreng jareya dhateng ka ba'na aropa dumba, tape sanyatana reng-oreng jareya pate' alas se galak." 
Matthew7:16 Ba'na bakal taowa sapa reng-oreng jareya dhari hasella lalakonna. Alas se adhuri ta' kera abuwa anggur, ban ombut se adhuri ta' kera ngasellagi buwana ara." 
Matthew7:17 Kajuwan se bagus ngasellagi buwa se becce', ban kajuwan se ta' bagus ngasellagi buwa se juba'." 
Matthew7:18 Kajuwan se bagus ta' kera ngasellagi buwa se juba', ban kajuwan se ta' bagus ta' kera ngasellagi buwa se becce'." 
Matthew7:19 Saneyap kajuwan se ta' ngasellagi buwa se becce' tanto epoger pas eobbar. 
Matthew7:20 Bariya keya bi-nabbi se palsu. Ba'na tanto tao sapa reng-oreng jareya dhari hasella lalakonna.” 
Matthew7:21 “Ta' sakabbiyanna oreng se ngolok Sengko', ‘Guste, Guste,’ daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah, tape pera' reng-oreng se ajalannagi kasokanna Tang Rama se e sowarga." 
Matthew7:22 E Are Keyamat bannya' oreng se ngoca'a kantha reya ka Sengko', ‘Guste, Guste, gu ta' kalaban asmana Junandalem abdidalem ampon manapa' dhabuna Allah? Jugan gu ta' kalaban asmana Junandalem abdidalem ampon ngojuk roh-erroh jahat sareng mabadha kaajiban sabannya'na?’" 
Matthew7:23 Tape Sengko' nyaoda, ‘Sengko' ta' tao kennal ka ba'na! Kassa' ondur dhari dhinna', ba'na se alako jahat!’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Daddi, oreng se ngedhing Tang oca' reya, sarta atoro' ka oca' jareya, padha ban oreng penter se maddek bengko e attassa bato." 
Matthew7:25 Teppa'na toron ojan, ban banjir sarta angen tandhes nambu bengko jareya, bengko jareya ta' robbu sabab la epaddek e attassa dhasar bato." 
Matthew7:26 Ban oreng se ngedhing Tang oca' reya, tape ta' atoro' ka oca' jareya, padha ban oreng budhu se maddek bengkona e attassa beddhi." 
Matthew7:27 Teppa'na toron ojan, ban aeng banjir sarta angen tandhes nambu bengko jareya, bengko jareya robbu. Ban karosaganna ce' berra'na!”" 
Matthew7:28 Dhi-budhina Isa mare se morok, ban reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya ce' heranna ngedhing pangajaranna jareya." 
Matthew7:29 Sabab se morok katon kobasa, ta' akantha ru-guru agama laenna." 
Matthew8:1 Isa toron dhari gumo', ban bannya' oreng se noro' bunte'." 
Matthew8:2 E bakto jareya pas badha oreng se andhi' panyaket kole' budhuk. Oreng jareya asojud e ajunanna Isa, pas mator, “Guru, manabi Panjennengngan kasokan, tanto Panjennengngan bisa mabaras abdina.”" 
Matthew8:3 Isa nyedding oreng jareya sambi adhabu, “Sengko' endha'. Mara, baras!” E bakto jareya keya panyakedda oreng jareya pas elang." 
Matthew8:4 Isa pas adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Senga', ya! Ja' ala-bala ka pa-sapa. Tape kassa' ba'na entar ka imam, menta sopaja imam jareya neptebbagi ja' ba'na la pajat baras onggu. Saellana jareya pas atorragi kurban se eparenta'agi Mosa, menangka bukte ka reng-oreng ja' ba'na la baras ongguwan!”" 
Matthew8:5 E bakto Isa maso' ka Kapernaum, badha parwira Roma manggi'i Salerana, sarta nyo'on tolong." 
Matthew8:6 “Guru,” atorra parwira jareya, “sareng abdina nganglo e compo'. Aba'epon empon, ta' kengeng jaga dhari katedhunganna sareng talebat nyangsarana.”" 
Matthew8:7 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' dha' essa'a mabarasa barengnga ba'na jareya.”" 
Matthew8:8 “Ampon, ta' mabi Guru,” atorra parwira jareya, “Abdina ta' patot narema Panjennengngan e compo'. Dhabuwagi saos. Tanto sareng abdina pas sae." 
Matthew8:9 Sabab abdina jugan kodu atoro' ka dhabuna attasan. Ban e baba'anna abdina badha rit-parjurit se kodu atoro' ka parenta abdina. Manabi abdina nyoro ka parjurit, ‘Mangkat!’ parjurit gapaneka mangkat. Manabi abdina ngoca' ka se laen, ‘Dha' enna'!’ oreng gapaneka nyander; ban manabi abdina marenta ka dunor abdina, ‘Lakone reya!’ parenta gapaneka elakone.”" 
Matthew8:10 E bakto meyarsa apa se eatorragi parwira jareya, Isa ce' kasambu'na. Salerana pas adhabu ka reng-oreng se ngerengngagi, “Lowar biyasa oreng areya. E antarana oreng Isra'il sakale Sengko' gi' ta' tao nemmone iman se rajana sajareya!" 
Matthew8:11 Onggu! Bannya' oreng dhatengnga dhari temor ban bara' kaangguy anga-bunga ban Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub e Dunnyana Allah se Anyar." 
Matthew8:12 Mangkana reng-oreng se samasthena daddi ommadda Allah bakal ebuwanga ka pettengnga e lowar. E jadhiya reng-oreng jareya bakal nangesa tor nyandhang sangsara.” 
Matthew8:13 Isa pas adhabu ka parwira jareya, “Kassa' mole, apa se eparcaja ba'na bakal kalakona.” Ban e bakto jareya keya barengnga gella' baras." 
Matthew8:14 Isa meyos ka compo'na Petrus. E jadhiya Salerana ngoladi mattowa bine'na Petrus parappa'na songkan panas e pasareyanna. 
Matthew8:15 Isa agagap tanangnga, panassa pas elang. Babine' jareya jaga ban molae aladine Isa." 
Matthew8:16 E bakto la molae asar, bannya' oreng nyabis ka Isa ngeba reng-oreng sabannya'na se kasosoban erroh jahat. Kalaban dhabu sakeccap Isa ngojuk roh-erroh jahat jareya sarta mabaras keya sakabbiyanna oreng se sake'." 
Matthew8:17 Isa alampa'agi jareya kabbi, ban kalaban cara se kantha jareya kalakon apa se edhabuwagi Nabbi Yesaya, iya areya, “Salerana nanggung kasangsara'anna sengko' ban ba'na ban mabaras panyakedda sengko' ban ba'na.”" 
Matthew8:18 E sakalenglengnga Isa ce' bannya'na oreng. E bakto Isa ngoladi reng-oreng jareya kabbi, red-moredda pas epakon alengka talaga." 
Matthew8:19 Pas badha guru agama nyander ka Salerana sarta mator, “Guru, abdina ngerenga Panjennengngan ka ka'dhimma'a saos.”" 
Matthew8:20 Isa adhabu, “Pate' alas andhi' rongkang, ban mano' andhi' lebun, tape Pottrana Manossa ta' andhi' kennengngan kaangguy bu-marobbu.”" 
Matthew8:21 Moredda se laen pas mator, “Guru, abdina nyo'ona edi palemana dhimen ngoburragiya eppa'.”" 
Matthew8:22 Tape Isa adhabu, “Mara noro' Sengko', dina oreng mate me' olle ngoburragi oreng matena dibi'.”" 
Matthew8:23 Isa ongga ka parao ban red-moredda padha ngereng. 
Matthew8:24 O-tao pas badha kaleng busbus se ce' rajana e talaga jareya sampe' paraona eanjul omba'. E bakto jareya Isa parappa'na asare. 
Matthew8:25 Daddi red-moredda nyander, Isa pas ebungowe. “Guru! Tolong! Abdina sadaja calaka'!” ca'na paera'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew8:26 “Arapa ba'na me' tako'?” dhabuna Isa. “Ba'na ta' pate parcaja ka Sengko'!” Saellana jareya Isa ngadek sarta abentak angen ban talaga jareya. Talaga jareya pas ceddu. 
Matthew8:27 Red-moredda Isa kasambu'. Pas padha ngoca', “Oreng apa Guru reya, me' sampe' angen ban omba' atoro' ka dhabuna!”" 
Matthew8:28 Isa la alengka talaga napa' ka dhaera Gadara. E jadhiya badha oreng kadhuwa se kasosoban erroh jahat; oreng se kadhuwa jareya nyander ka Salerana. Se kadhuwa jareya mok-ngamok ce' sarana sampe' tadha' oreng se bangal lebat e jadhiya. 
Matthew8:29 Se kadhuwa jareya kalowar dhari wa-guwana koburan sarta aera', “Pottrana Allah, epakadiya ponapa abdidalem sareng Junandalem? Ponapa ampon eseksa'a sanare gi' ta' napa' ka baktona?”" 
Matthew8:30 Ta' jau dhari jadhiya badha babi ce' bannya'na se teppa'na nyare kakan. 
Matthew8:31 Roh-erroh jahat jareya nyo'on ka Isa, “Manabi abdidalem padha epakona kalowar sareng Junandalem, ngereng padha pakon maso' ka dhalem bi-babi ka'dhissa'!”" 
Matthew8:32 “Ondur!” dhabuna Isa. Roh-erroh jahat jareya kalowar dhari oreng se kadhuwa gella', pas maso' ka dhalem bi-babi jareya. Ban bi-babi jareya padha buru pas acabbur ka talaga dhari penggirra jurang, terros tasellem." 
Matthew8:33 Reng-oreng se ajaga babi gella' berka' ka kottha, sarta nyareta'agi sakabbiyanna kadaddiyan jareya, bariya keya parkara oreng kadhuwa se kasosoban erroh jahat jareya." 
Matthew8:34 Daddi reng-oreng kottha jareya padha entar ka Isa. E bakto nangale'e Isa, reng-oreng jareya nyo'on kalaban sanget sopaja Isa kasokana nyengla dhari dhaerana reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew9:1 Isa ongga ka dhalem parao, pas alengka talaga, abali ka kampongnga." 
Matthew9:2 E jadhiya badha oreng nyander ngeba oreng empon se epatedhung e teker. E bakto Isa ngoladi saapa rajana imanna reng-oreng jareya, pas adhabu ka oreng empon gella', “Pasabbar, na'! Sa-dusana ba'na la esapora.”" 
Matthew9:3 Ru-guru agama se teppa'na badha e jadhiya ngoca' e dhalem atena, “Oreng reya ya-nyeya Allah!”" 
Matthew9:4 Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya, daddi pas adhabu, “Arapa pekkeranna ba'na me' ce' jahadda kantha jareya?" 
Matthew9:5 Kemma se agampangan: ngoca', ‘Dusana ba'na la esapora’, otabana ngoca', ‘Mara jaga pas ajalan’?" 
Matthew9:6 Tape sateya Sengko' abukteyagiya ka ba'na ja' Pottrana Manossa andhi' kobasa e bume reya kaangguy nyapora dusa.” Isa pas adhabu ka oreng empon gella', “Mara jaga, angka' tekerra pas mole!”" 
Matthew9:7 Oreng se empon jareya pas jaga sarta mole ka bengkona. 
Matthew9:8 E bakto nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya, reng-oreng padha katako'en kabbi sarta amolja'agi Allah, sabab Allah la apareng kobasa se ce' rajana ka manossa." 
Matthew9:9 Saellana jareya Isa meyos dhari kennengngan jareya. Sabatara alomampa, Salerana ngoladi tokang narek pajek, se anyama Matiyus, teppa'na toju' e kantor pajek. Isa adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Mara noro' Sengko'!” Daddi Matiyus manjeng pas ngereng Isa." 
Matthew9:10 E bakto Isa teppa'na adha'ar e bengkona Matiyus, pas bannya' oreng tokang narek pajek ban reng-oreng se eanggep ta' becce' bi' masarakat, entar ka jadhiya noro' ngakan abareng Isa ban red-moredda." 
Matthew9:11 Badha reng-oreng Farisi se nangale'e jareya. Reng-oreng jareya atanya ka red-moredda Isa, “Aponapa guruna sampeyan me' adha'ar bi' reng-oreng tokang narek pajek ban reng-oreng se ta' becce'?”" 
Matthew9:12 Isa meyarsa partanya'anna reng-oreng jareya pas adhabu, “Oreng se baras ta' parlo dokter, pera' oreng se sake'." 
Matthew9:13 Kodda' ajari apa artena ayat e dhalem Alketab se amonye kantha reya: ‘Se ekarsa'agi Sengko' kabellasan, banne kurban keban’. Sabab Sengko' dhateng banne ngologa oreng se nganggep aba'na la becce', tape ngologa oreng se eanggep tadha' argana.”" 
Matthew9:14 Saellana jareya red-moredda Yahya Pambaptis entar nemmone Isa, pas padha atanya, “Aponapa abdina sadaja sareng reng-oreng Farisi padha apowasa, red-moredda Panjennengngan me' bunten?”" 
Matthew9:15 Isa adhabu, “Baramma ca'na panemmona ba'na? Ba' bisa'a moy-tamoy e jang-onjangan sossa mon pangantan lake' gi' badha e jang-onjangan jareya? Tanto enja'! Tape bakal dhapa'a baktona pangantan lake' jareya ekala' dhari reng-oreng jareya. E bakto jareya buru reng-oreng jareya apowasa." 
Matthew9:16 Tadha' oreng se nambal kalambi se la laju bi' kaen se gi' anyar. Sabab kaen panambella tanto kerker ban kalambina tanto pas beddha, daddi beddhana sajan raja." 
Matthew9:17 Bariya keya tadha' oreng se nyelen anggur se anyar ka kanthong kole' se laju. Sabab kanthong jareya tanto leddu' ban rosak, anggurra pas tabuwang. Anggur anyar kodu selen ka dhalem kanthong se anyar keya, sopaja anggur ban baddhana pagguna becce'.”" 
Matthew9:18 Sabatara Isa abu-dhabu ka red-moredda Yahya Pambaptis, pas badha pamimpinna kennengnganna kabakteyan, asojud e ajunanna Isa. Oreng jareya mator, “Ana' bine' abdina gi' buru adinggal omor. Namong, ta' langkong, ngereng seddingngagi me' olle odhi' pole.”" 
Matthew9:19 Isa ngadek pas meyos bi' red-moredda abareng oreng jareya. 
Matthew9:20 E tengnga lorong badha oreng babine' se la dhubellas taon sake' sambang, nyander ka seddi'na Isa dhari budhi. Ca'na pekkerra, “Mon sengko' nyedding jubana bai, tanto sengko' pas baras.” Daddi babine' jareya pas nyedding konco'na jubana Isa." 
Matthew9:21  
Matthew9:22 E bakto jareya Isa atole sarta ngoladi babine' jareya pas adhabu, “Pasabbar ba'na, na'! Sarrena ba'na parcaja ka Sengko' ba'na baras!” E bakto jareya keya babine' gella' laju baras." 
Matthew9:23 Saellana jareya Isa pas napa' ka bengkona pamimpinna kennengnganna kabakteyan rowa. E jadhiya Isa ngoladi reng-oreng se amaen mosik kasossa'an ban bannya' oreng se agariyungan," 
Matthew9:24 pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mara kalowar kabbi! Kana' reya ta' mate; coma tedhung.” Bi' reng-oreng jareya Isa ekala'-gella'." 
Matthew9:25 Saellana reng-oreng jareya padha kalowar, Isa maso' ka dhalem kamarra kana' jareya, laju ngastane tanangnga. Kana' bine' jareya pas jaga." 
Matthew9:26 Kabar jareya daddi balattra ka saantero dhaera jareya. 
Matthew9:27 Isa meyos dhari jadhiya ban e tengnga lorong etoro' bunte' oreng buta kadhuwa. Se kadhuwa jareya aera', “Pottrana Daud, kaneserre abdina!”" 
Matthew9:28 E bakto Isa maso' ka dhalem bengko, oreng buta se kadhuwa jareya nyander. Isa mareksane, “Apa ba'na padha parcaja ja' Sengko' bisa mabaras ba'na?” “Parcaja, Guru!” saodda se kadhuwa jareya." 
Matthew9:29 Isa pas nyedding matana se kadhuwa jareya sambi adhabu, “Sarrena ba'na padha parcaja, apa se ekaterro ba'na sateya katekkan.”" 
Matthew9:30 Se kadhuwa jareya pas bisa nangale. Isa maenga' se kadhuwa jareya epagu-onggu, sopaja parkara jareya ta' ecareta'agi ka sapa'a bai." 
Matthew9:31 Tape se kadhuwa jareya entar aberta'agi kabar parkara Isa ka saantero dhaera jareya. 
Matthew9:32 E bakto oreng se kadhuwa jareya la ondur, pas badha oreng buwi se ekobasae erroh jahat egiba ka Isa." 
Matthew9:33 Isa ngojuk erroh jahat jareya ban e bakto jareya keya oreng buru bisa acaca pole. Oreng se bannya' se badha e jadhiya kasambu' sarta ngoca', “Sengko' ta' tao nangale'e kadaddiyan se kantha reya e Isra'il!”" 
Matthew9:34 Tape reng-oreng Farisi ngoca', “Kapalana roh-erroh jahat se aberri' kobasa ka oreng jareya ngojuk roh-erroh jahat rowa.”" 
Matthew9:35 Daddi Isa alengleng dhari settong kottha ka kottha laenna ban dhari settong kampong ka kampong laenna. Salerana morok e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan ban aberta'agi Kabar Bagus parkara baramma Allah se marenta menangka Rato. Reng-oreng se nyandhang panyaket apa'a bai ban se ena badanna epabaras. 
Matthew9:36 E bakto ngoladi oreng se bannya' jareya, Isa arassa neser, sabab reng-oreng jareya bingong ban ta' bisa apa-rapa, akantha dumba se tadha' oreng ngowanna." 
Matthew9:37 Isa pas adhabu ka red-moredda, “Hasella teggal bannya' tape se anye sakone'." 
Matthew9:38 Daddi nyo'on ka se kaagungan kebbun sopaja ngerem oreng se anyeya hasella teggalla.” 
Matthew10:1 E settong are Isa nembali moredda se dhubellas epakon akompol. Red-moredda jareya pas eparenge kobasa kaangguy ngojuk roh-erroh jahat ban mabaras panyaket apa'a bai ban badan se ena kantha apa'a bai. 
Matthew10:2 Nyamana rasul se dhubellas oreng jareya iya areya: se kapeng settong, Simon (se ajuluk Petrus) ban taretanna Andreyas, pas Yakobus ban taretanna Yahya, iya areya na'-ana'na Zebedeyus." 
Matthew10:3 Saellana jareya Filipus ban Bartolomeyus, bi' Tomas ban Matiyus, tokang narek pajek sarta Yakobus ana'na Alfeyus, ban Tadeyus;" 
Matthew10:4 dhi-budhina Simon, se patriot ban Yudas Iskariyot se akiyanadi Isa." 
Matthew10:5 Rasul se dhubellas jareya bi' Isa pas eotos sambi eparenge babala'an kantha reya, “Ba'na ja' entar ka dhaera kennengnganna reng-oreng se banne Yahudi. Bariya keya ja' entar ka tha-kotthana oreng Samaria." 
Matthew10:6 Tape entar ka reng-oreng Isra'il, bi-lebbi ka reng-oreng se nyalethong." 
Matthew10:7 Kabala ka reng-oreng jareya ja' Allah bakal duliya marenta menangka Rato. 
Matthew10:8 Pabaras reng-oreng se sake'; paodhi' pole reng-oreng se mate; pabaras reng-oreng se nyandhang panyake' kole' budhuk, ban ojuk roh-erroh jahat. Ba'na narema reya kabbi kalaban ma-coma. Daddi, berri' keya kalaban ma-coma." 
Matthew10:9 Ba'na ja' ngeba pesse emmas, pesse salaka, otabana pesse dimbaga." 
Matthew10:10 Bariya keya ba'na ja' ngeba kanthong baddhana sandhekka, otabana kalambi dhu lambar kaangguy parjalananna, otabana sapatu, bariya keya tongket. Sabab oreng se alako, la tanto esadhiyai kabutowanna." 
Matthew10:11 Mon ba'na napa' ka kottha otaba kampong, sare oreng se endha' narema ba'na. Pas enneng e jadhiya sampe' ba'na mangkat pole." 
Matthew10:12 Mon ba'na maso' ka dhalem bengkona oreng, ngoca', ‘Moga-moga sampeyan eberkadana Pangeran.’" 
Matthew10:13 Mon reng-oreng e dhalem bengko jareya narema ba'na, dina salamma ba'na jareya me' terros badha e reng-oreng jareya. Tape mon reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' narema ba'na, tarek pole salamma jareya." 
Matthew10:14 Mon badha bengko otaba kottha se ta' endha' narema ba'na otaba ta' endha' ngedhingngagi ba'na, onduri kennengngan jareya ban gebbessagi abu dhari pa'-dapa'na sokona ba'na." 
Matthew10:15 Kaenga'e, ya! E Are Keyamat, reng-oreng kottha Sodom ban Gomora bakal lebbiya gampang esapora Allah, etembang reng-oreng e kottha jareya!”" 
Matthew10:16 “Edhingngagi pateppa', ya: Ba'na bi' Sengko' eotos akantha dumba se ta' bisa apa-rapa ka nga'-tengnga'anna pate' alas se galak. Ba'na kodu te-ngate akantha olar ban ehlas atena akantha dara." 
Matthew10:17 Aga-jaga, sabab ba'na bakal etangkebba ban eadhebbagiya ka mahkamah-mahkamah. Ba'na bakal eseksa'a e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan." 
Matthew10:18 Ba'na bakal egiba'a ka adha'anna para pangobasa ban to-rato polana ba'na daddi Tang mored. Ban jareya kasempadan monggu ka ba'na kaangguy nyakse'e Sengko' ka reng-oreng jareya ban ka reng-oreng se ta' tao ka Allah. 
Matthew10:19 Tape mon ba'na egiba polana eadilana, ba'na ta' osa kobater parkara apa se ekoca'agiya, otabana baramma ba'na se acaca'a. Sabab ba'na bakal ebala'ana apa se kodu ekoca'agi ba'na mon la baktona." 
Matthew10:20 Sabab se acaca e bakto jareya banne ba'na, tape Errohna Rama se e sowarga, kalaban parantara'anna ba'na." 
Matthew10:21 Bakal kadaddiyana badha'a oreng massra'agi taretanna dibi' kaangguy epate'e. Se kantha jareya bakal kadaddiyana keya e antarana ana' bi' eppa'na. Ana' bakal alabana ka rama ebuna, ban massra'agiya rama ebuna jareya kaangguy epate'e." 
Matthew10:22 Ba'na bakal ekabaji'ana sakabbiyanna oreng polana ba'na noro' Sengko'. Tape oreng se kowat sampe' aher bakal epasalamedda. 
Matthew10:23 Mon ba'na ekaneyaja e settong kottha, buru ka kottha laenna. Sengko' mala'ana ka ba'na: Sabellunna ba'na mare entar ka sakabbiyanna kottha Isra'il, Pottrana Manossa la rabu." 
Matthew10:24 Mored ta' araja'an dhari guruna, ban bareng ta' araja'an dhari lorana." 
Matthew10:25 La cokop mon mored padha ban guruna, ban bareng padha ban lorana. Mon kapala soma la enyamae Be'elzebul, apa pole saessena bengkona, tanto enyamae se ajuba'an pole!”" 
Matthew10:26 “Ba'na ja' tako' ka manossa. Apa'a bai se eerrep dhi-budhina tanto etangale'e, ban apa'a bai se eroseya'agi dhi-budhina masthe etemmo." 
Matthew10:27 Apa se ekoca'agi Sengko' ka ba'na e pettengnga kodu olange e dhalem tera'na seyang. Ban apa se ekoto'agi ka kopengnga ba'na, berta'agi pabalattra!" 
Matthew10:28 Ba'na ja' tako' ka oreng se mate'e badan, tape ta' kobasa mate'e sokma. Patako' ka Allah se kobasa mate'e badan ban sokma e dhalem naraka." 
Matthew10:29 Mano' keddi' dhadhuwa' ekenneng belli bi' pesse saketheng. Maske bariya tadha' mano' keddi' settonga se gaggar ka tana mon banne kasokanna Ramana ba'na. 
Matthew10:30 Bariya keya bannya'na obu' e cethagga ba'na la ebitong kabbi. 
Matthew10:31 Daddi, ta' osa tako'! Ba'na lebbi arga etembang ban no'-mano' keddi'!”" 
Matthew10:32 “Pa'-sapa'a se ngako Tang mored e adha'na oreng bannya', bi' Sengko' eakowa keya e ajunanna Tang Rama e sowarga." 
Matthew10:33 Tape pa'-sapa'a se ta' ngako e adha'na oreng bannya' ja' aba'na Tang mored, bi' Sengko' ta' eakowa keya e ajunanna Tang Rama e sowarga.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Ba'na ja' nyangka Sengko' ngeba pardhameyan ka dunnya reya. Sengko' ta' ngeba pardhameyan, tape madhateng parmosowan." 
Matthew10:35 Sengko' dhateng andaddiyagi ana' lake' ngamoso eppa'na ban ana' bine' ngamoso ebuna, ban manto bine' ngamoso mattowa bine'na." 
Matthew10:36 Ongguwan, se bakal daddiya moso se paleng raja, iya areya anggotana kalowargana dibi'." 
Matthew10:37 Oreng se ataresna'an ka eppa'na otaba ebuna etembang bi' ka Sengko', ta' patot daddi Tang mored. Bariya keya oreng se ataresna'an ka ana' lake'na otaba ana' bine'na etembang bi' ka Sengko'." 
Matthew10:38 Ban oreng se ta' endha' mekol salibba ban noro' Sengko', ta' patot daddi Tang mored." 
Matthew10:39 Oreng se eman ka nyabana, bakal kaelangana nyabana, tape oreng se kaelangan nyabana polana esto ka Sengko', bakal odhi'a.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Oreng se narema ba'na, narema Sengko'. Ban oreng se narema Sengko', narema Salerana se ngotos Sengko'." 
Matthew10:41 Oreng se narema nabbi polana oreng jareya nabbi, bakal narema'a ganjaranna nabbi. Ban pa'-sapa'a se narema oreng se becce' polana oreng jareya becce', bakal narema'a ganjaranna oreng se becce'." 
Matthew10:42 Pa'-sapa'a aberri' ngenom maske coma aeng cellep ka sala settong dhari oreng se nespa jareya, polana oreng jareya Tang mored, tanto oreng jareya bakal narema'a ganjaranna!”" 
Matthew11:1 Saellana apareng du-petodu ka red-moredda se dhubellas oreng jareya, Isa pas meyos dhari jadhiya, moroga sarta aberta'agiya pessen dhari Allah e tha-kottha se semma' dhari jadhiya." 
Matthew11:2 Yahya Pambaptis se teppa'na badha e penjara meyarsa parkara pa-apa se elampa'agi Almasih. Red-moredda badha se pas epakon nyabis ka Isa epakon atanya kantha reya," 
Matthew11:3 “Panjennengngan enggi oreng se badhi rabu se ejanjiyagi Allah, otabana ponapa abdina gi' kodu anante' oreng laen?”" 
Matthew11:4 Isa adhabu, “Kassa' ba'na abali ka Yahya ban kabala apa se ekaedhing ban etangale'e ba'na:" 
Matthew11:5 oreng buta nangale, oreng empon ajalan, oreng se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk baras; oreng kopok ngedhing, oreng mate odhi' pole, ban Kabar Bagus dhari Allah eberta'agi ka reng-oreng mesken." 
Matthew11:6 Pojur onggu oreng se ta' mangmang kaangguy narema Sengko'!” 
Matthew11:7 Saellana reng-oreng se eotos Yahya jareya abali, Isa molae adhabu ka oreng se bannya' e jadhiya parkara Yahya, dhabuna, “Ba'na entar ka ra-ara terro nangaleyana apa? Rebba salambar se etongngo' angen?" 
Matthew11:8 Entara nenggu apa ba'na? Oreng se akalambi bagus? Reng-oreng se akalambi bagus kennengnganna e karaton! 
Matthew11:9 Daddi arapa'a ba'na me' entar ka ra-ara? Nengguwa nabbi? Pajat iya, la'-mala' lebbi dhari nabbi." 
Matthew11:10 Sabab Yahya jareya se emaksod e dhalem Alketab se amonye kantha reya: ‘Areya' Tang otosan, dhabuna Allah, Sengko' ngotos oreng reya ajangadha'i ba'na sopaja oreng jareya ababat jalan se elebadana ba'na.’" 
Matthew11:11 Kaenga'e, ya! E dunnya reya ta' tao badha oreng se araja'an dhari Yahya Pambaptis. Tape maske bariya, oreng se paleng kene' e antarana ommadda Allah araja'an dhari Yahya." 
Matthew11:12 Sajjegga Yahya ngabarragi bertana sampe' sateya reya, ommadda Allah elaban bi' reng-oreng se aehteyar ngobasa'ana aba'na kalaban kakerrasan." 
Matthew11:13 Sampe' padhatengnga Yahya, sakabbiyanna hokomma Mosa ban pangajaranna bi-nabbi aramallagi parkara pa-apa se bakal kadaddiyana." 
Matthew11:14 Ban mon ba'na parcaja, Yahya jareya Eliya, se la eramallagi padhatengnga." 
Matthew11:15 Mon andhi' kopeng, mara edhingngagi!" 
Matthew11:16 Ebandhingngagiya ban apa bi' Sengko' reng-oreng e jaman sateya reya? Reng-oreng reya padha ban na'-kana' se toju' e pasar. Se sakalompo' aera' ka se laen," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Bi' sengko' ba'na enyanyeyagi lagu se gumbira, tape ba'na ta' endha' atangdang! Bi' sengko' enyanyeyagi lagu kasossa'an, ban ba'na ta' endha' nanges!’" 
Matthew11:18 Yahya dhateng, apowasa ban ta' ngenom anggur; ban reng-oreng padha ngoca', ‘Oreng rowa kasosoban setan!’" 
Matthew11:19 Sateya Pottrana Manossa dhateng, ngakan ban ngenom; reng-oreng pas ngoca', ‘Abas, ra, oreng rowa! Dhakka, bu'-mabu'an, akanca ban tokang narek pajek ban akanca ban oreng se bannya' dusana.’ Maske bariya, kabicaksana'anna Allah ekenneng bukteyagi dhari hasella.”" 
Matthew11:20 Saellana jareya Isa pas molae nyale tha-kottha se paleng seggut ekennengnge Salerana mabadha kaajiban. Sabab reng-oreng e tha-kottha jareya ta' endha' atobat dhari sa-dusana. 
Matthew11:21 “Calaka' ba'na, Korazim! Bariya keya ba'na, Betsaida! Ja' sakenga kaajiban-kaajiban se epabadha e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na epabadha neng e Tirus ban Sidon, tanto reng-oreng e dhissa' la abit se atobat dhari sa-dusana ban ngangguy kalambi kasossa'an sarta cethagga epobuwi abu." 
Matthew11:22 Kaenga'e, ya, e Are Keyamat reng-oreng Tirus ban Sidon agampangan narema sapora dhari Allah etembang bi' ba'na!" 
Matthew11:23 Ban ba'na, Kapernaum! Apa ba'na eangka'a sampe' ka sowarga? Enja'! La'-mala' ba'na bakal ebuwanga ka naraka! Sabab saompamana kaajiban-kaajiban se epabadha e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na kabbi jareya epabadha neng e Sodom, tanto sateya reya Sodom gi' badha!" 
Matthew11:24 Kaenga'e, ya, e Are Keyamat, agampangan oreng Sodom esapora etembang ba'na!”" 
Matthew11:25 E bakto jareya Isa adu'a, “Rama, Pangeran se ngobasae langnge' sareng bume! Abdidalem mator sakalangkong ka Junandalem amarga ka'dhinto' sadaja sareng Junandalem eroseya'agi dhari reng-oreng se penter sareng se gadhuwan elmo, namong sareng Junandalem eduduwagi ka reng-oreng se ta' penter." 
Matthew11:26 Gapaneka se masenneng panggaliyannepon Junandalem, Rama.”" 
Matthew11:27 Isa laju adhabu, “Apa'a bai la epassra'agi Rama ka Sengko'. Tadha' oreng se kennal ka Ana', kajabana Rama. Bariya keya tadha' se kennal ka Rama kajabana Ana', ban reng-oreng se bi' Ana' jareya epakennal ka Rama." 
Matthew11:28 Mara nyander ka Sengko' ba'na kabbi se lesso, sarta nanggung berra'na odhi'; bi' Sengko' ba'na epaseggerra." 
Matthew11:29 Mara toro' Tang parenta ban ajar dhari Sengko'. Sabab Sengko' reya alos ban andhap asor, daddi ba'na bakal arassa'a segger." 
Matthew11:30 Sabab Tang ta-parenta masenneng, ban kasossa'an se bi' Sengko' epekollagi ka ba'na dhammang.”" 
Matthew12:1 E settong are, teppa'na are Sabat, e bakto Isa alomampa e teggal se etamenne gandum, red-moredda molae metthek gandum pas ekakan." 
Matthew12:2 E bakto reng-oreng Farisi nangale'e jareya, pas mator ka Isa, “Oladi ka'issa'! Red-moredda sampeyan nerrak hokomma agama, enggi paneka ngalakone barang se elarang e are Sabat.”" 
Matthew12:3 Dhabuna Isa, “Apa ba'na ta' tao maca parkara apa se elakone Daud e bakto aba'na ban pangerengnga padha lapar?" 
Matthew12:4 Daud jareya maso' ka Padalemman Socce; pas ngakan roti se la eatorragi ka Allah. Mangkana, noro' hokomma ba'na ban sengko', Daud ban bariya keya pangerengnga, ta' olle ngakan roti jareya – se olle pera' para imam." 
Matthew12:5 Otabana apa ba'na gi' ta' tao maca e dhalem hokomma Mosa ja' sabban are Sabat mam-imam se alako e Padalemman Socce nerrak atoranna are Sabat, tape ta' eanggep sala?" 
Matthew12:6 Edhingngagi apa se ekoca'agiya Sengko' reya: e dhinna' badha se araja'an dhari Padalemman Socce. 
Matthew12:7 E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi: Se epenta Sengko' kabellasan, banne kurban keban. Ja' sakenga ba'na pajat ngarte onggu ca'-oca' jareya, tanto ba'na ta' kera nyala'agi reng-oreng se ta' sala." 
Matthew12:8 Sabab Ana'na Manossa kobasa ka are Sabat.” 
Matthew12:9 Isa meyos dhari kennengngan jareya, terros ka settong kennengnganna kabakteyan." 
Matthew12:10 E jadhiya badha oreng se tanangnga mate salaja. Badha reng-oreng se terro nyareya salana Isa, atanya kantha reya, “Ponapa kengeng mabaras oreng e are Sabat?”" 
Matthew12:11 Dhabuna Isa, “Saompamana e antarana ba'na badha se andhi' dumba settong, ban e are Sabat dumba jareya tacabbur ka lobang se dhalem; apa kerana se andhi' dumba jareya ta' aehteyara makalowara dumba jareya dhari lobang gella'?" 
Matthew12:12 Ban manossa lebbi aji dhari dumba! Daddi mon bariya, ba'na olle nolong oreng e are Sabat.”" 
Matthew12:13 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu ka oreng se tanangnga mate salaja rowa, “Mara tanangnga paloros!” Oreng jareya maloros tanangnga, ban tanang jareya pas baras akantha tanangnga se salajanna." 
Matthew12:14 Tape reng-oreng Farisi ondur dhari kennengngan jareya, pas amopakat mateyana Isa." 
Matthew12:15 Isa ngagali ja' reng-oreng Farisi aneyat juba' ka Salerana. Daddi Salerana pas nyengla dhari jadhiya etoro' bunte' oreng sabannya'na. Saellana jareya Isa pas mabaras sakabbiyanna oreng se sake'. 
Matthew12:16 Tape reng-oreng jareya ta' ebagi ala-bala parkara Salerana ka oreng laen. 
Matthew12:17 Daddi la kalakon dhabuna Allah se epanapa' kalaban parantara'anna Nabbi Yesaya," 
Matthew12:18 “Areya' otosan se epele Sengko', oreng se ekataresnae Sengko' ban cocok ka Tang ate. Bi' Sengko' Tang Erroh ebagiya ka otosan jareya, otosan se aberta'agiya Tang kaadilan ka sa-bangsa." 
Matthew12:19 Tang otosan jareya ta' kera atokar otaba aera', otabana apidato e rong-lorong raja." 
Matthew12:20 Perreng se londhu ta' kera epotel bi' oreng jareya damar se lep-kellebban ta' kera epate'e. Otosan jareya bakal terrosa aperrang sampe' kaadilan abujud; 
Matthew12:21 sakabbiyanna bangsa bakal agantongngagiya pangarebbanna ka tang otosan jareya.” 
Matthew12:22 Saellana jareya badha oreng buta ban buwi polana ekobasae erroh jahat egiba ka Isa. Oreng jareya bi' Isa epabaras sampe' bisa acaca ban nangale. 
Matthew12:23 Oreng padha heran ban ngoca', “Apa olle daddi oreng reya Pottrana Daud se ejanjiyagi rowa?”" 
Matthew12:24 E bakto reng-oreng Farisi ngedhing parkara jareya, pas padha nyaot, “Oreng reya bisa ngojuk erroh jahat polana eberri'i kobasa bi' Be'elzebul, kapalana roh-erroh jahat.”" 
Matthew12:25 Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna reng-oreng Farisi jareya, daddi pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mon settong nagara aca-pecca daddi pan-barampan galumpo' se saleng amosowan, nagara jareya ta' kera kowat terros. Ban settong kottha otaba kalowarga se aca-pecca ban saleng amosowan tanto ancor." 
Matthew12:26 Bariya keya e dhalem karaja'anna Iblis; mon se sakalompo' ngojuk sakalompo' laenna, karaja'anna Iblis jareya nyamana la aca-pecca ban bakal ancora." 
Matthew12:27 Ba'na ngoca' ja' Sengko' reya ngojuk erroh jahat ngangguy kobasana Be'elzebul. Daddi mon kantha jareya, red-moredda ba'na se ngojuk erroh jahat ngangguy kobasana sapa? Lalakonna red-moredda ba'na dibi' noduwagi ja' ba'na sala!" 
Matthew12:28 Tape Sengko' ngojuk erroh jahat ngangguy kobasana Errohna Allah. Ban jareya andhi' arte ja' Allah la molae marenta e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na kabbi. 
Matthew12:29 Tadha' oreng se bisa maso' ka dhalem bengkona oreng se kowat kaangguy arampasa dhi'-andhi'na mon oreng se kowat jareya ta' etale'e gallu. Mon la mare etale'e, buru ekenneng rampas dhi'-andhi'na." 
Matthew12:30 Oreng se ta' noro' Sengko' saongguna amoso ban Sengko'. Ban oreng se ta' nolonge Sengko' saongguna marosak Tang lalakon! 
Matthew12:31 Daddi, ba'na kodu tao, ja' mon oreng alako dusa ban makalowar ca'-oca' se ya-nyeya oreng, oreng jareya bisa esapora! Tape mon oreng jareya ya-nyeya Errohna Allah, ta' bisa esapora!" 
Matthew12:32 Mon oreng makalowar ca'-oca' se alaban ka Pottrana Manossa, gi' ekenneng sapora; tape mon ya-nyeya Errohna Allah, ta' bisa esapora, maske sateya otabana e aherat!”" 
Matthew12:33 “Mon terro olleya buwa se bagus, bungkana kodu dhuluk. Mon bungkana ta' dhuluk, buwana ta' bisa bagus keya. Dhuluk enja'na settong bungka etemmo dhari buwana." 
Matthew12:34 Ba'na oreng daraka, baramma ba'na se bisa'a ngoca'agi rang-barang se becce' mon ba'na dibi' jahat? Apa se kalowar dhari colo' jareya essena atena!" 
Matthew12:35 Oreng becce' ngoca'agi rang-barang se becce' sabab atena aesse kabecce'an. Sabaligga, oreng daraka ngoca'agi rang-barang se jahat sabab atena aesse kajahadan." 
Matthew12:36 Daddi, kaenga'e, ya: e Are Keyamat, oreng kodu padha atanggung jawab kaangguy sakabbiyanna cacana se tadha' gunana." 
Matthew12:37 Sabab cacana ba'na dibi' jareya se eangguya motossagi apa ba'na sala otaba enja'.” 
Matthew12:38 Saellana jareya ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi badha se padha ngoca', “Guru, kaula terro nengalana Panjennengngan mabadha kaajiban.”" 
Matthew12:39 “Reng-oreng jaman sateya reya ce' jahadda ban ce' darakana!” dhabuna Isa. “Ba'na menta Sengko' mabadha kaajiban? Ba'na ta' eberri'ana kaajiban maske settonga, kajabana kaajibanna Nabbi Yunus." 
Matthew12:40 Yunus badha e dhalem tabu'na juko' se raja tello are tello malem abidda. Bariya keya Pottrana Manossa bakal ennengnga e dhalem tabu'na bume tello are tello malem abidda. 
Matthew12:41 E Are Keyamat, oreng Niniwe bakal jaga'a abareng ban reng-oreng jaman sateya, sarta agugada reng-oreng jareya. Sabab reng-oreng Niniwe jareya atobat dhari sa-dusana e bakto Yunus akotbah ka aba'na! Tape e dhinna' sateya badha se araja'an dhari Yunus." 
Matthew12:42 E Are Keyamat, rato dhari nagara Lao' bakal jaga'a abareng ban reng-oreng jaman sateya sarta agugada reng-oreng jareya. Sabab rato jareya ajalanan ce' jauna dhari konco'na bume pera' parlo ngedhingngagiya pangajaranna Sulaiman se bicaksana. Tape e dhinna' sateya badha se araja'an dhari Sulaiman!”" 
Matthew12:43 “Mon erroh jahat ondur dhari settong oreng, erroh jareya alengleng man-dha'emman ka kennengngan se reng-kerreng nyareya kennengnganna bu-ambu lesso, tape ta' nemmo." 
Matthew12:44 Daddi erroh jareya ngoca', ‘Sengko' abaliya ka bengko se eonduri sengko' rowa bai.’ Sanapa'na ka jadhiya, bengko jareya kosong, berse sarta la eator." 
Matthew12:45 Erroh jareya pas ngeba erroh jahat laenna kapetto se ajahadan dhari aba'na; roh-erroh jareya pas padha maso' kabbi ka dhalem oreng gella', terros enneng e jadhiya. Ban dhi-budhina kabadha'anna oreng jareya asara'an dhari sabellunna. Reng-oreng jahat jaman sateya bakal kantha'a jareya keya.”" 
Matthew12:46 Teppa'na Isa gi' abu-dhabu ban oreng se bannya' jareya, ebu ban tan-taretanna rabu, ngadek e lowar sambi aehteyar terro bisa'a abu-dhabu ban Salerana." 
Matthew12:47 Sala settong dhari oreng se bannya' jareya mator ka Isa, “Guru, ebu sareng tan-taretanna Panjennengngan badha e lowar, terro abu-dhabuwa sareng Panjennengngan.”" 
Matthew12:48 Isa pas adhabu, “Sapa Tang ebu? Sapa Tang tan-taretan?”" 
Matthew12:49 Saellana jareya Isa pas aduding ka red-moredda laju adhabu, “Areya' Tang ebu ban Tang taretan." 
Matthew12:50 Oreng se ajalannagi karsana Tang Rama se badha e sowarga, jareya Tang taretan lake', Tang taretan bine' ban Tang ebu.”" 
Matthew13:1 E are jareya keya Isa meyos dhari bengko jareya pas terros ka penggirra talaga sarta alenggi e jadhiya. 
Matthew13:2 Ce' bannya'na oreng se agaribbunge Isa, daddi Salerana pas alenggi e dhalem parao, dineng oreng se bannya' jareya manjeng e paseser." 
Matthew13:3 Isa pas morok reng-oreng jareya parkara se acem-macem ngangguy parompama'an. “Badha oreng tane nabur ne-bine,” dhabuna Isa molae acareta." 
Matthew13:4 “Parappa'na nabur, badha ne-bine se gaggar e lorong. Pas badha mano' ngabber ka jadhiya, ne-bine jareya ekakan sampe' tadha' karena." 
Matthew13:5 Badha keya se gaggar e kennengngan se bannya' batona, se tanana pera' sakone'. Ne-bine jareya lekkas tombu polana tanana ta' pate dhalem." 
Matthew13:6 Tape e bakto are la tenggi, selbi'na pas elop, laju kerreng sarta mate polana ramo'na ta' pate dhalem maso'na." 
Matthew13:7 Badha keya ne-bine se gaggar e tengnga'anna ombut se bannya' dhurina. Ombut se bannya' dhurina jareya tombu nyecce'e selbi'na tamennan gella' sampe' mate. 
Matthew13:8 Tape badha keya ne-bine se gaggar ka tana se landhu, laju abuwa; badha se saratos kalena bannya'na, badha keya se sabidak kalena ban badha keya se tello polo kalena.”" 
Matthew13:9 Saellana nyareta'agi parompama'an jareya Isa adhabu, “Mon andhi' kopeng, edhingngagi!”" 
Matthew13:10 Saellana jareya red-moredda Isa nyander sarta atanya, “Aponapa Panjennengngan mon abu-dhabu sareng oreng se bannya' me' ngangguy parompama'an?”" 
Matthew13:11 Dhabuna Isa, “Sabab ba'na la olle papareng kaangguy ngataowe roseyana baramma Allah se marenta, dineng reng-oreng jarowa enja'." 
Matthew13:12 Sabab oreng se la andhi' bakal eberri'ana abannya'an pole, ban oreng jareya bakal andhi'a sampe' bi-talebbi. Tape oreng se ta' andhi' pa-apa, la'-mala' dhi'-andhi'na se sakone' bakal ekala'a." 
Matthew13:13 Jareya sababba arapa Sengko' ma' ngangguy parompama'an mon acaca ka oreng se bannya' jareya, sabab reng-oreng jareya ngabas, tape padha ban oreng se ta' nangale; reng-oreng jareya ngedhingngagi, tape padha ban oreng se ta' ngedhing ban ta' ngarte." 
Matthew13:14 Daddi la kalakon apa se eramallagi Nabbi Yesaya: ‘Allah adhabu: Reng-oreng jareya ngedhingngagi tape ta' ngarte; reng-oreng jareya terros ngabassagi tape ta' nangale'e pa-apa. 
Matthew13:15 Sabab pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya la tompol, kopengnga la kopok ban matana la epameddem. Kan epakantha jareya sopaja matana ta' nangale, kopengnga ta' ngedhing, pekkeranna ta' ngarte ban ta' abali ka Sengko', sarta pas epabaras bi' Sengko'.’ ”" 
Matthew13:16 “Tape ba'na pojur onggu,” dhabuna Isa pole ka para panganodda, “sabab ba'na nangale ban ngedhing ongguwan." 
Matthew13:17 Kaenga'e, ya, bannya' nabbi ban oreng se ta'at ka Allah terro nangaleyana pa-apa se etangale'e ba'na sateya reya, tape reng-oreng jareya ta' nangale'e. Reng-oreng jareya terro ngedhinga apa se ekaedhing ba'na sateya reya, tape ta' ngedhing.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Edhingngagi apa artena parompama'anna oreng se nabur jarowa. 
Matthew13:19 Ne-bine se gaggar e lorong rowa parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar parkara baramma Allah se marenta, tape ta' ngarte. Se Jahat dhateng arampas pa-apa se la etabur e dhalem atena." 
Matthew13:20 Ne-bine se gaggar e kennengngan se bannya' batona, parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya, terros etarema kalaban senneng ate." 
Matthew13:21 Tape kabar jareya ta' aramo' e dhalem atena, daddi ta' abit cekka'na. Buru nemmo kasossa'an otabana ekaneyaja oreng polana kabar jareya, pas mortad." 
Matthew13:22 Ne-bine se gaggar e ombut se bannya' dhurina parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya, tape kobater parkara odhi'na dibi' sarta terro odhi'a mewah. Daddi kabar dhari Allah tacecce' e dhalem atena sampe' ta' abuwa." 
Matthew13:23 Ban ne-bine se gaggar e tana se landhu parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya sarta paham ka essena. Ne-bine jareya abuwa bannya', badha se hasella saratos kalena, badha se sabidak kalena, ban badha se tello polo kalena.”" 
Matthew13:24 Isa nyareta'agi pole settong parompama'an ka oreng se bannya', dhabuna, “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha oreng tane se nabur ne-bine e teggalla." 
Matthew13:25 E settong malem, e bakto oreng padha tedhung kabbi, mosona oreng tane jareya dhateng nabur bigina lalang e antarana gandum jareya, saellana laju nyengga." 
Matthew13:26 E bakto men-tamennan jareya la tombu ban lir-bulirra la kalowar, lalangnga pas etangale'e keya." 
Matthew13:27 La-kabulana oreng tane jareya nyander ka oreng tane jareya pas atanya, ‘Pa', se etamen sampeyan e teggal ka'dhissa' gu ta' ne-bine se sae, ta' enggi? Kadi ponapa me' pas badha lalangnga e ka'dhissa'?’" 
Matthew13:28 Saodda oreng tane jareya, ‘Jareya lalakonna moso.’ La-kabulana jareya pas atanya pole, ‘Ponapa lalangnga edabu'a saos?’" 
Matthew13:29 ‘Ella,’ saodda oreng tane jareya, ‘sabab mon lalang jareya edabu', dhaggi' gandumma badha se tanoro'." 
Matthew13:30 Dina panneng lalang jareya me' olle tombu ban gandum sampe' baktona anye. Sengko' pas ngoca'a kantha reya ka reng-oreng se anye: Pakompol gallu lalangnga, tale'e, pas obbar. Saellana jareya pas pakompol gandumma, pas sempen e lombung.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Isa nyareta'agi pole settong parompama'an ka oreng se bannya' jareya, dhabuna, “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha oreng ngala' bigina sawi, pas etamen e teggalla." 
Matthew13:32 Bigina sawi reya bigi se paleng kene'. Tape mon la tombu, pas daddi se paleng raja e antarana men-tamennan laenna. Tamennan jareya pas daddi kajuwan, sampe' no'-mano' dhateng alebun e ka-cangkana.”" 
Matthew13:33 Gi' badha pole parompama'an laen se ecareta'agi Isa ka oreng se bannya' jareya. “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban ragi se ekala' bi' settong oreng bine'; ragi jareya egaluy ban teppong pa' polo liter sampe' adun jareya marobuk!”" 
Matthew13:34 Isa morok parkara jareya kabbi ka oreng se bannya' jareya ngangguy parompama'an. 
Matthew13:35 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya la kalakon apa se edhabuwagi nabbi, “Sengko' ngangguy parompama'an mon acaca ban reng-oreng jareya; Sengko' aberta'agiya pa-apa se ta' ekataowe oreng molae dunnya reya ecepta'agi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Saellana jareya Isa adinggallagi oreng se bannya' jareya, laju malebbet ka dhalem compo'. Red-moredda nyander, laju mator, “Ngereng terrangngagi ponapa arteepon lalang e antara gandum ka'dhissa'.”" 
Matthew13:37 Isa adhabu, “Oreng se nabur ne-bine se becce' jarowa Pottrana Manossa." 
Matthew13:38 Teggal rowa dunnya reya. Ne-bine se becce' iya areya reng-oreng se la daddi ommadda Allah. Lalang jareya reng-oreng se noro' Iblis. 
Matthew13:39 Moso se namen lalang iya areya Iblis. Bakto anye iya areya Are Keyamat, ban reng-oreng se anye iya areya kat-malaekat." 
Matthew13:40 Akantha lalang se epakompol ban eobbar e dhalem apoy, bariya keya se bakal kadaddiyana e Are Keyamat." 
Matthew13:41 Pottrana Manossa bakal makona kat-malaekadda makompol dhari antarana ommadda sakabbiyanna oreng se daddi lantaranna oreng agabay dusa, ban sakabbiyanna oreng laenna se alako jahat." 
Matthew13:42 Reng-oreng jareya bakal ebuwanga ka dhalem tomang se apoyya rabbang; e jadhiya reng-oreng jareya bakal nangesa ban nanggunga kasangsara'an. 
Matthew13:43 Ban reng-oreng se ajalannagi kasokanna Allah bakal nyonara akantha are e Dunnya Se Anyar, Dunnyana Allah, Ramana. Daddi, mon andhi' kopeng, edhingngagi!”" 
Matthew13:44 “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: badha arta se tabendhem e dhalem tana, pas etemmo oreng, laju emaso'agi pole ka dhalem tana. Saellana jareya, dhari gumbirana, oreng jareya ajuwal sakabbiyanna dhi'-andhi'na, laju abali pole, melle tana jareya.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha sodagar se nyare ra-motteyara se larang." 
Matthew13:46 E bakto nemmo motteyara settong se talebat bagussa, sodagar jareya entar ajuwal sakabbiyanna dhi'-andhi'na, laju melle motteyara se settong jareya.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna eompama'agi bi' jala se etebbar ka talaga, laju olle juko' acem-macem." 
Matthew13:48 Saellana possa', jala jareya pas eangka' ka tenggangan bi' reng-oreng majangnga. Reng-oreng jareya pas toju', juko'na pas esa-pesa: se bagus esaba' e dhalem pennay ban se ta' bagus ebuwang." 
Matthew13:49 Kantha jareya keya kabadha'anna e Are Keyamat, kat-malaekat entar malaen reng-oreng se jahat dhari reng-oreng se ajalannagi kasokanna Allah." 
Matthew13:50 Saellana jareya reng-oreng se jahat pas ebuwang ka dhalem tomang se rabbang apoyya. E jadhiya reng-oreng buru bakal nangesa ban nanggunga kasangsara'an.” 
Matthew13:51 “Ba'na ba' la padha ngarte jareya kabbi, ya?” dhabuna Isa. “Enggi!” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew13:52 Isa pas adhabu, “Lantaran jareya, sakabbiyanna guru agama se la daddi anggotana ommadda Allah, akantha towan roma se makalowar barang se anyar ban se laju dhari dha-baddhana dhi'-andhi'na.”" 
Matthew13:53 Samarena nyareta'agi parompama'an-parompama'an jareya, Isa laju meyos dhari kennengngan jareya," 
Matthew13:54 terros abali ka kampongnga. E kampong jareya Salerana morok neng e kennengnganna kabakteyan, ban reng-oreng se ngedhingngagi e jadhiya padha ce' gettonna. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Olle dhari dhimma oreng rowa kapenterran se kantha jareya? Ban dhari dhimma olle kobasa mabadha kaajiban?" 
Matthew13:55 Jareya gu ta' ana'na tokang kaju, ta' iya? Ebuna gu ta' Miriyam, ban tan-taretanna anyama Yakobus, Yusup, Simon ban Yudas?" 
Matthew13:56 Ban tan-taretan babine'anna gu ta' enneng e dhinna' keya? Olle dhari dhimma jareya kabbi?” 
Matthew13:57 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' narema Isa. Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Nabbi reya neng e man-dhimman ehormat oreng, kajabana neng e kampongnga ban e bengkona dibi'.”" 
Matthew13:58 Daddi neng e jadhiya Isa ta' bannya' mabadha kaajiban sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' parcaja. 
Matthew14:1 E bakto jareya Herodes, se neggu' kakobasa'an e Galilea, meyarsa parkara Isa." 
Matthew14:2 Herodes adhabu ka om-kaom oreng agung, “Tanto jareya Yahya Pambaptis se odhi' pole! Daddi pantes ja' andhi'a kobasa mabadha kaajiban.”" 
Matthew14:3 Sabab sabellunna jareya bi' Herodes Yahya jareya esoro pega' pas etale'e sarta pas epamaso' ka penjara. Bi' Herodes epakantha jareya polana parkara Herodiyas, rajina taretanna dibi' se anyama Filipus." 
Matthew14:4 Sabab Yahya tao adhabu kantha reya ka Herodes, “Junandalem ta' kengeng araji Herodiyas!”" 
Matthew14:5 Sanyatana Herodes terro mateyana Yahya, tape tako' ka reng-oreng, sabab reng-oreng jareya nganggep Yahya jareya nabbi." 
Matthew14:6 E bakto Herodes araya'agi are olang taonna, ana'na Herodiyas se babine' atari e adha'na jang-onjangan. Herodes ce' leburra ngoladi tariyanna jareya," 
Matthew14:7 sampe' Herodes ajanji ka ana'na Herodiyas jareya kalaban asompa ja' apa'a bai se epenta eparengngana. 
Matthew14:8 Herodiyas nas-manase ana'na, daddi kana' jareya ngoca', “Abdina nyo'ona cethakkepon Yahya Pambaptis samangken jugan, baddhai talam!”" 
Matthew14:9 Meyarsa parmenta'an jareya Herodes ce' sossana. Tape sarrena la asompa e adha'na para tamoyya, daddi pas apareng parenta sopaja parmenta'anna paraban jareya etorodi." 
Matthew14:10 Herodes pas ngotos oreng ka penjara epakon ngetthok serana Yahya. 
Matthew14:11 Saellana jareya serana Yahya buru pas egiba maso' ebaddhai talam, ebagi ka paraban jareya. Bi' paraban buru pas egiba ka ebuna." 
Matthew14:12 Jinazana Yahya jareya pas ekala' bi' red-moredda, laju ekoburragi. Samarena jareya red-moredda pas entar ngatore oneng parkara jareya ka Isa." 
Matthew14:13 E bakto meyarsa kabar jareya, Isa pas ongga ka parao kadibi'an terros meyos dhari jadhiya ka settong kennengngan se seppe. Tape e bakto reng-oreng ngedhing parkara jareya, laju padha mangkat dhari tha-kotthana, nyosol Isa lebat tenggangan." 
Matthew14:14 E bakto Isa toron dhari paraona sarta ngoladi oreng sabannya'na jareya, laju arassa neser. Reng-oreng jareya e antarana badha se padha sake' bi' Isa pas epabaras." 
Matthew14:15 E baja ri'-bari', red-moredda Isa dhateng laju mator, “Samangken ampon malem, dineng kennengngan ka'dhinto' jau bara' jau temor. Langkong sae reng-oreng ka'dhinto' pakon ondur, me' olle ngobange teddha'an e sa-disa.”" 
Matthew14:16 “Ta' osa soro man-dha'emman,” dhabuna Isa. “Kassa' berri'i ngakan ba'na bai.”" 
Matthew14:17 “Abdina namong gadhuwan roti kare lalema' sareng juko' kare dhadhuwa'!” jawabba red-moredda Isa jareya. 
Matthew14:18 “Kassa' kala',” dhabuna Isa." 
Matthew14:19 Saellana jareya reng-oreng se bannya' gella' pas epakon toju' e rebba. Rotina se lalema' ban juko'na se dhadhuwa' epondhut; Isa pas adhanga ka langnge' terros asokkor ka Allah. Samarena jareya rotina eba'-seba' bi' astana laju eparengngagi ka red-moredda epakon gi-bagi ka oreng se sabannya'na rowa. 
Matthew14:20 Reng-oreng se bannya' jareya padha ngakan sampe' kennyang. Lebbina bi' red-moredda Isa epakompol, badha dhubellas budhak sa'-possa'." 
Matthew14:21 Se ngakan e bakto jareya badha ra-kera lema ebu oreng, ta' tamaso' babine'an ban na'-kana'." 
Matthew14:22 Saellana jareya Isa makon red-moredda ongga ka parao ban alengka talaga kaadha', sabatara Salerana gi' makon mole oreng se sabannya'na rowa." 
Matthew14:23 Saellana reng-oreng se sabannya'na jareya padha mole, Isa pas ongga ka gumo' kadibi'an kaangguy adu'a. E bakto are la malem, Isa gi' badha e jadhiya kadibi'an." 
Matthew14:24 Dineng paraona se etompa' red-moredda la napa' ka tengnga talaga. Parao jareya ejul-anjullagi omba', sabab angenna dhari adha'." 
Matthew14:25 E antarana pokol tello' ban pokol ennem gu-laggu, Isa rabu ka kennengnganna red-moredda gella' alomampa e attas aeng." 
Matthew14:26 E bakto red-moredda nangale'e Isa se alomampa e attas aeng jareya, kabbi padha ce' takerjadda. “Din-dadin!” ca'na cerrengnga red-moredda jareya, padha katako'en." 
Matthew14:27 Tape Isa terros adhabu, “Ella ja' tako'! Sengko' reya Isa!”" 
Matthew14:28 Petrus pas mator, “Manabi Panjennengngan pajat Isa, ngereng abdina pakon nyander ka Panjennengngan ajalan e attas aeng.”" 
Matthew14:29 “Mara dha' enna',” dhabuna Isa. Daddi Petrus toron dhari paraona, alomampa e attas aeng nyander ka Isa." 
Matthew14:30 Tape e bakto Petrus ngoladi ja' angenna ce' tandhessa, atena pas tako' sarta pas para' tasellemma. “Tolong, Guste!” ca'na cerrengnga." 
Matthew14:31 Isa duli ajuluwagi astana pas nyandhak Petrus laju adhabu, “Petrus, Petrus, ba'na reya ta' pate parcaja. Arapa ba'na me' mangmang ka Sengko'?”" 
Matthew14:32 Se kadhuwa jareya pas ongga ka paraona, ban angenna pas ceddu." 
Matthew14:33 Red-moredda Isa jareya pas padha asojud abakte ka Salerana. Red-moredda jareya pas padha mator, “Junandalem lerres Pottraepon Allah!”" 
Matthew14:34 E bakto Isa ban red-moredda la alengka talaga laju toron e Genesaret. 
Matthew14:35 Ban e bakto reng-oreng e jadhiya tao ja' se rabu jareya Isa, kabar jareya pas epabalattra ka man-dhimman e sabingkerra kottha jareya. Reng-oreng sake' pas padha egiba ka Isa." 
Matthew14:36 Reng-oreng jareya nyo'on ka Isa sopaja se sake' eedine nyedding jubana, maske pera' konco'na. Reng-oreng se nyedding jubana Isa jareya pas padha baras." 
Matthew15:1 Badha reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama dhari Yerusalim nyabis ka Isa. Ca'na atorra reng-oreng jareya," 
Matthew15:2 “Aponapa red-moredda sampeyan me' ta' atoro' ka adadda bangatowa? Manabi neddha'a, ta' abacco dhimen menorot atoran!”" 
Matthew15:3 Dhabuna Isa, “Ban arapa ba'na keya me' ta' atoro' ka papakonna Allah, pera' polana atoro'a ka adadda bangatowa?" 
Matthew15:4 Sabab Allah adhabu, ‘Hormadi rama ban ebuna,’ ban ‘Pa'-sapa'a se ca'-ngoca'e rama ban ebuna, kodu eokom mate.’" 
Matthew15:5 Tape ba'na ngajarragi: mon badha oreng se ngoca' ka oreng towana, ‘Apa se bi' sengko' koduna eatorragi ka rama ban ebu, bi' sengko' la eatorragi ka Allah,’" 
Matthew15:6 oreng jareya la ta' osa hormat ka oreng towana. Daddi, polana adadda bangatowana ba'na ta' ngargai dhabuna Allah." 
Matthew15:7 Ba'na reya oreng monafik! Ce' teppa'na se eramallagi Yesaya parkara ba'na," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Kantha reya dhabuna Allah: Reng-oreng jareya abakte ka Sengko' pera' e bibirra, tape atena jau dhari Sengko'." 
Matthew15:9 Tadha' gunana reng-oreng jareya abakte ka Sengko', sabab reng-oreng jareya ngajarragi atoranna manossa epakantha Tang atoran.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Saellana jareya Isa adikane reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya; laju adhabu, “Mara edhingngagi me' olle ba'na ngarte!" 
Matthew15:11 Banne se maso' ka colo' se manajjis oreng; tape se kalowar dhari colo'na se manajjis aba'na.” 
Matthew15:12 Red-moredda Isa pas nyander ka seddi'anna sarta mator, “Panjennengngan ba' ngagaliya reng-oreng Farisi padha sake' ate e bakto mereng Panjennengngan adhabu kadi ka'dhinto'?”" 
Matthew15:13 Dhabuna Isa, “Sakabbiyanna men-tamennan se ta' etamen Tang Rama e sowarga bakal edabu'a." 
Matthew15:14 Ba'na la ta' osa mekkere reng-oreng Farisi jareya. Reng-oreng jareya pin-pamimpin se buta, se mimpin reng-oreng buta; ban mon oreng buta mimpin oreng buta, se kadhuwa jareya tanto padha tacabbur ka sellogan.”" 
Matthew15:15 Ca'na Petrus, “Ngereng terrangngagi ka abdina sadaja ponapa arteepon parompama'an ka'dhinto', Guru.”" 
Matthew15:16 Isa adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Ba'na me' gi' tadha' bidana ban reng-oreng laen, me' gi' ta' endha' ngarte." 
Matthew15:17 Masa' ba'na ta' tao, ja' se maso' ka dhalem colo' toron ka dhalem tabu' ban pas kalowar pole?" 
Matthew15:18 Tape se kalowar dhari colo' asalla dhari ate, ban jareya se manajjis oreng." 
Matthew15:19 Sabab dhari ate jareya kalowar pekkeran-pekkeran se jahat, se daddi lantaranna oreng mate'e oreng laen, azina, alako messom, ngeco', daddi sakse palsu ban metenna." 
Matthew15:20 Jareya kabbi se manajjis oreng, banne mon ngakan ta' abacco akantha se ekoca'agi reng-oreng Farisi rowa.”"
