Matthew15:21 Saellana jareya Isa meyos dhari jadhiya terros ka dhaera e seddi'na Tirus ban Sidon. 
Matthew15:22 Badha oreng babine' Kana'an se enneng e dhaera jareya; babine' buru nyander ka Isa sambi ra'-era'an, “Pottrana Daud, kabellasi abdidalem! Ana' bine' abdidalem kasosoban erroh jahat. Kabadha'annepon ce' sarana.”" 
Matthew15:23 Tape Isa ta' adhabu pa-apa ka babine' jareya. Red-moredda nyander laju nyo'on, “Pakon ondur saos babine' ka'dhissa'! Oreng ka'dhissa' terros noro' bunte' ce' rammena!”" 
Matthew15:24 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' eotos ka bangsa Isra'il, bi-lebbi ka reng-oreng se nyalethong.”" 
Matthew15:25 Babine' jareya nyander, laju asojud e ajunanna Isa sarta pas mator, “Nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, Guste.”" 
Matthew15:26 Dhabuna Isa, “Ta' becce' ngala' kakananna na'-kana' ban magi kakanan jareya ka pate'.”" 
Matthew15:27 “Lerres, Guste,” saodda babine' jareya, “namong pate' jugan neddha re-kare se gaggar dhari mejaepon lorana.”" 
Matthew15:28 Isa pas adhabu ka babine' jareya, “Imanna ba'na raja onggu! Apa se daddi pangaterrona ba'na bi' Sengko' ekabbulana.” E bakto jareya keya ana' bine'na baras." 
Matthew15:29 Isa meyos dhari kennengngan jareya, laju alomampa lebat peggirra Talaga Galilea. Saellana jareya pas ongga ka settong gumo' laju alenggi e jadhiya." 
Matthew15:30 Bannya' oreng nyander ka Salerana ngeba oreng se dippang, se buta, se empon, se buwi ban se nyandhang panyaket laenna. Reng-oreng se sake' jareya bi' reng-oreng se ngeba esaba' e ajunanna Isa, dineng Isa laju mabaras reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew15:31 Oreng se sabannya'na se badha e jadhiya padha ce' kasambu'na, e bakto nangale'e oreng buwi acaca, oreng dippang epabaras, oreng empon ajalan, ban oreng buta nangale. Reng-oreng jareya pas ngagungngagi Allahna bangsa Isra'il." 
Matthew15:32 Isa pas adikane red-moredda laju adhabu, “Sengko' arassa neser ka oreng se sabannya'na reya. La tello are se noro' Sengko', ban sateya la ta' andhi' pa-apa se ekakana. Bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya ta' epamoleya kalaparan, tako' me' kalengnger e lorong.”" 
Matthew15:33 Red-moredda Isa jareya pas atanya, “E kennengngan se jau bara' jau temor kadi ka'dhinto', e ka'dhimma se manggiya teddha'an se bisa'a nyokobi oreng se saka'dhinto bannya'epon?”" 
Matthew15:34 “Ba'na andhi' roti barampa meggi'?” ca'na dhabuna Isa ka red-moredda. “Papetto',” atorra red-moredda, “sareng juko' ne'-kene' sakone'.”" 
Matthew15:35 Bi' Isa oreng se sabannya'na jareya epakon toju' e tana. 
Matthew15:36 Rotina se papetto' ban juko'na pas epondhut, saellana jareya Salerana pas asokkor ka Allah. Samarena asokkor roti ban juko'na ethok-ketthok bi' astana, laju eparengngagi ka red-morreda. Bi' red-moredda laju egi-bagi ka oreng se sabannya'na jareya." 
Matthew15:37 Reng-oreng jareya kabbi padha ngakan sampe' kennyang. Saellana jareya red-morreda Isa makompol karena kakanan jareya. Kabbi badha pettong budhak sa'-possa'. 
Matthew15:38 Bannya'na oreng lalake' se ngakan e bakto jareya badha pa' ebu, babine'an ban na'-kana' gi' ta' kabitong." 
Matthew15:39 Saellana jareya oreng se sabannya'na gella' bi' Isa epakon mole. Dineng Isa dibi' ongga ka parao laju meyos ka dhaera Magadan. 
Matthew16:1 Badha reng-oreng Farisi ban oreng Saduki nyabis ka Isa. Reng-oreng jareya andhi' maksod ajebbaga Isa, daddi laju menta sopaja Isa mabadha kaajiban kaangguy abukteyagi ja' Salerana pajat dhari Allah." 
Matthew16:2 Dhabuna Isa, [“Mon la compet are, ba'na ngoca', ‘Are bakal bagusa, sabab langnge'na, mera.’" 
Matthew16:3 Ban e baja laggu, ba'na ngoca', ‘Are teya ojana, sabab langnge'na mera ban ondhem.’ Daddi ba'na tao nebbak kabadha'anna are kalaban ngabas ka langnge', tape ba'na ta' tao nebbak dha-tandhana jaman!”]" 
Matthew16:4 “Ce' jahadda ban ce' darakana onggu reng-oreng jaman sateya reya. Ba'na menta sopaja Sengko' mabadha kaajiban. Ba'na ta' eberri'ana kaajiban settonga balakka' salaenna kaajibanna Nabbi Yunus.” Samarena adhabu kantha jareya Isa nyengla dhari jadhiya. 
Matthew16:5 E bakto la alengka talaga, red-moredda Isa buru tao ja' kabbi padha loppa ta' ngeba roti." 
Matthew16:6 Isa adhabu, “Pate-ngate ka ragina reng-oreng Farisi ban Saduki.”" 
Matthew16:7 Ngedhing dhabuna Isa jareya, red-moredda padha saleng ngoca' kantha reya, “Guru adhabu kantha jareya polana sengko' ban ba'na tadha' se ngeba roti.”" 
Matthew16:8 Isa ngagali ka se ekacaca red-moredda jareya, daddi pas adhabu, “Arapa ba'na ma' acaca parkara se ta' andhi' roti? Ba'na gi' ta' pate parcaja!" 
Matthew16:9 Masa' ba'na gi' ta' ngarte? Apa ba'na ta' enga' e bakto Sengko' thok-ngetthok roti se lema meggi' se epakannagi ka oreng se lema ebu rowa? Barampa budhak karena roti se epakompol bi' ba'na? 
Matthew16:10 Ban baramma roti se papetto' se epakannagi ka oreng se pa' ebu rowa? Barampa budhak karena kakanan se epakompol ba'na? 
Matthew16:11 Arapa ba'na ma' sampe' ta' ngarte ja' Sengko' ta' acaca parkara roti ka ba'na? Pate-ngate ka ragina oreng Farisi ban Saduki!” 
Matthew16:12 Dhi-budhina red-moredda ngarte ja' Isa makon te-ngate banne ka ragi se eangguy agabay roti, tape ka pangajaran-pangajaranna reng-oreng Farisi ban Saduki." 
Matthew16:13 Isa meyos ka dhaera e seddi'na kottha Kaisareya Filipi. E jadhiya Salerana laju mareksane ka red-moredda, “Ca'na oreng, sapa Pottrana Manossa rowa?”" 
Matthew16:14 Red-moredda mator, “Badha se ngoca' Yahya Pambaptis. Badha jugan se ngoca' Eliya. Se laen ngoca' Yeremiya, otabana sala settong dhari para nabbi.”" 
Matthew16:15 “Tape mon ca'na ba'na, sapa Sengko' reya?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simon Petrus nyaot, “Junandalem Rato Panyalamet, Pottrana Allah Se Odhi'.”" 
Matthew16:17 “Pojur onggu ba'na, Simon ana'na Yona!” dhabuna Isa. “Sabab banne manossa se malae ba'na, tape Tang Rama se jumenneng e sowarga." 
Matthew16:18 Daddi ba'na kodu tao, ba'na reya Petrus, bato karang se kowat. Ban e attassa dhasar bato karang reya Sengko' maddegga Tang gereja se ta' bisa epakala maske bi' maot sakale!" 
Matthew16:19 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana koncina Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar. Apa se elarang ba'na e bume, elarang keya e sowarga. Ban apa se ebendherragi bi' ba'na e bume, ebendherragi keya e sowarga.”" 
Matthew16:20 Saellana jareya Isa maenga' sopaja red-moredda ta' abala ka sapa'a bai ja' Salerana jareya Rato Panyalamet. 
Matthew16:21 Molae dhari jareya, Isa adhabu rang-terrangan ka red-moredda, “Sengko' masthe entar ka Yerusalim ban bannya' nanggung kasangsara'an dhari pin-pamimpin, mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama. Sengko' bakal epateyana, tape e are se kapeng tello' Sengko' bakal epaodhi'a pole.”" 
Matthew16:22 Bi' Petrus Isa etaja' ka penggir laju mator, oca'na, “Moga-moga se kadi gapaneka ejauwagiya sareng Allah, Guste! Ja' kantos Junandalem ngalame kadaddiyan kadi gapaneka, Guste!”" 
Matthew16:23 Isa atole ka Petrus laju adhabu, “Ondur ba'na, Se Panggudha! Ba'na lang-ngalange Sengko'. Pekkeranna ba'na jareya pekkeranna manossa; banne pekkeranna Allah!”" 
Matthew16:24 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu ka red-morreda, “Pa'-sapa'a se noro'a Sengko', kodu paloppa ka kaparlowanna dibi', mekol salibba, pas terros noro' Sengko'." 
Matthew16:25 Sabab oreng se arebbu' odhi'na, bakal kaelangana odhi'na. Tape oreng se ngorbannagi odhi'na polana Sengko', bakal nemmowa odhi'na jareya." 
Matthew16:26 Apa ontongnga oreng se ngaandhi' saantero dunnya tape kaelangan odhi'na? Ba' ekennenga odhi' reya eporop bi' apa'a bai? 
Matthew16:27 Sabab ta' abit pole Pottrana Manossa bakal dhatengnga kalaban kobasana Ramana abareng ban kat-malaekadda. E bakto jareya Pottrana Manossa bakal malessa ka sakabbiyanna oreng menorot lalakonna bang-sebang. 
Matthew16:28 Ba'na ebala'ana ya! E antarana ba'na se badha e dhinna' reya badha se ta' kera mate, sabellunna nangale'e Pottrana Manossa rabu menangka Rato.”" 
Matthew17:1 Nem are saellana jareya Isa abakta Petrus ban Yakobus ban taretanna, Yahya, nyese ka gunong se tenggi." 
Matthew17:2 E adha'na se katello jareya Isa aoba ropa: Raena mancorong akantha are ban rasoganna rap-galiraban. 
Matthew17:3 Saellana jareya morreda se katello buru nangale'e Mosa ban Eliya abu-dhabu ban Isa. 
Matthew17:4 Daddi Petrus pas mator ka Isa, “Guste, ce' saena e ka'dhinto'. Manabi Junandalem kasokan, abdidalem maddegga kemah tatello': settong kaagem Junandalem, settong kaagem Mosa, sareng settonganna kaagem Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Sabatara Petrus gi' tor-mator, pas badha ondhem se ce' tera'na notobi se katello jareya ban dhari ondhem jareya badha sowara se adhabu kantha reya, “Areya' Tang Ana' se kataresnan, se masenneng Tang ate. Edhingngagi apa oca'na.”" 
Matthew17:6 E bakto red-morreda Isa ngedhing sowara jareya pas padha katako'en sampe' labu tajarungngep ka tana. 
Matthew17:7 Tape Isa nyander laju adulit se katello jareya. “Mara jaga,” ca'na dhabuna, “ja' tako'!”" 
Matthew17:8 E bakto mored se katello jareya adhanga, e jadhiya tadha' oreng laenna kajabana Isa malolo." 
Matthew17:9 E bakto Isa ban red-moredda toron dhari gunong, Isa maemot red-moredda jareya, “Se etangale'e ba'na gella' ja' kabala ka pa-sapa, sabellunna Pottrana Manossa odhi' pole dhari sedana.”" 
Matthew17:10 Red-moredda Isa atanya, “Aponapa ru-guru agama me' adhabu ca'epon Eliya kodu rabu kaadha'?”" 
Matthew17:11 Dhabuna Isa, “Eliya pajat dhatengnga mateppa'a kabadha'an." 
Matthew17:12 Tape Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na, Eliya la dhateng, tape tadha' oreng se tao; ban reng-oreng jareya ka Eliya ngala' sakarebba dibi'. Ban bakal kantha'a jareya keya ka Pottrana Manossa.”" 
Matthew17:13 Red-moredda Isa jareya pas ngarte ja' se ekamaksod Isa iya areya Yahya Pambaptis. 
Matthew17:14 E bakto Isa ban moredda se katello abali ka kennengnganna oreng se bannya' rowa, pas badha oreng lalake' nyander, asojud e ajunanna Isa," 
Matthew17:15 laju mator, “Pa', kaneserre ana' abdina se nganglo jan-ajanen. Manabi komat ce' sarana kantos ce' serrengnga labu ka dhalem apoy sareng ka dhalem aeng." 
Matthew17:16 Sareng abdina ampon e bakta ka red-moredda Panjennengngan, tape tadha' se onenga mabaras ana' abdina.”" 
Matthew17:17 Isa adhabu, “Talebat onggu ba'na reya! Ba'na reya reng-oreng se nyalethong ban ta' parcaja. Sampe' bila Sengko' kodu apolong ban ba'na ban kodu sabbar ngadhebbi ba'na kabbi reya? Giba dha' enna' ana'na!”" 
Matthew17:18 Isa pas makon erroh jahat se badha e dhalem na'-kana' jareya sopaja kalowar. Ban erroh jahat jareya kalowar, dineng na'-kana' jareya pas baras e bakto jareya keya." 
Matthew17:19 Red-moredda Isa pas nyander ka Isa mencar dhari reng-oreng laenna, pas atanya kantha reya, “Aponapa abdina sakanca ma' ta' bisa ngojuk erroh jahat ka'dhissa'?”" 
Matthew17:20 Dhabuna Isa, “Sabab ba'na ta' pate parcaja. Kaenga'e, ya! Mon ba'na andhi' iman se rajana padha ban bigina sawi bai, ba'na bisa ngoca' ka gumo' reya, ‘Ngalle dha' essa'!’ tanto gumo' reya pas ngalle. Tadha' barang se ta' bisa elakone ba'na! [" 
Matthew17:21 Tape erroh jahat se reya pera' ekenneng ojuk bi' du'a ban powasa malolo.]” 
Matthew17:22 E bakto red-moredda Isa akompol e Galilea, Isa adhabu, “Ta' abit pole Pottrana Manossa bakal epassra'agiya ka kobasana manossa," 
Matthew17:23 bakal epateyana, tape e are se kapeng tello' bakal epaodhi'a pole.” Daddi red-moredda pas ce' sossana." 
Matthew17:24 E bakto Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka Kapernaum, reng-oreng tokang narek pajegga Padalemman Socce nyander ka Petrus laju atanya, “Guruna sampeyan majar pajegga Padalemman Socce ponapa bunten?”" 
Matthew17:25 Saodda Petrus, “Majar!” E bakto Petrus mole, Isa nyapa kaadha', “Simon, baramma panemmona ba'na? Sapa se kodu majar biya ban pajek ka to-rato e dunnya reya? Ra'yat apa oreng manca?”" 
Matthew17:26 “Oreng manca,” saodda Petrus. “Mon bariya,” dhabuna Isa, “ra'yat ta' osa majar." 
Matthew17:27 Tape Sengko' ban ba'na ja' mapeggel reng-oreng rowa. Daddi, kassa' ba'na entar manceng ka talaga. Kala' juko' se ekenneng dha'-adha' kadibi' bi' ba'na. E dhalem colo'na ba'na bakal nemmowa pesse se cokop kaangguy epamajar pajegga Sengko' ban ba'na. Kala' pesse jareya, bajarragi ka reng-oreng rowa menangka pajegga Sengko' ban ba'na kaangguy Padalemman Socce.”" 
Matthew18:1 E bakto jareya red-moreddda Isa nyander ka Salerana laju atanya, “Pasera se eanggep paleng raja e antaraepon ommadda Allah?”" 
Matthew18:2 Isa adikane na'-kana' kene' kasorang, dineng kana' jareya epamanjeng e adha'na red-moredda." 
Matthew18:3 Isa pas adhabu, “Paparcaja, ya! Pera' mon ba'na aoba daddi akantha na'-kana', ba'na bakal daddiya ommadda Allah." 
Matthew18:4 Oreng se paleng raja e antarana ommadda Allah iya areya oreng se andhap asor ban daddi akantha na'-kana' reya. 
Matthew18:5 Ban oreng se narema na'-kana' se kantha reya polana Sengko', padha ban se narema Sengko'.”" 
Matthew18:6 “Sapa se daddi margana sala settong dhari na'-kana' kene' reya ta' parcaja pole ka Sengko', lebbi becce' mon oreng jareya le'erra egantonge bato gilingan laju ecabbur ka tase' se dhalem ma' olle tasellem." 
Matthew18:7 Palang onggu dunnya reya polana pa-apa se daddi margana oreng agabay dusa. Se kantha jareya pajat badha terros, tape palang oreng se daddi margana!" 
Matthew18:8 Mon tanang otaba sokona ba'na daddi margana ba'na agabay dusa, ketthok, pas buwang. Lebbi becce' ba'na odhi' bi' Allah maske tanang otaba sokona tadha' salaja, etembang ba'na ebuwang ka dhalem apoy naraka maske soko ban tanangnga genna' dhu kalaja." 
Matthew18:9 Ban mon matana ba'na daddi margana ba'na agabay dusa, congke', pas buwang. Lebbi becce' ba'na odhi' bi' Allah maske matana tadha' salaja etembang ebuwang ka dhalem apoy naraka maske matana genna' dhu kalaja.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Senga'! Ba'na ja' sampe' ya-nyeya sala settong dhari na'-kana' se kene' reya. Sabab kaenga'e, ya, kat-malaekadda na'-kana' reya ros-terrosan badha e ajunanna Tang Rama e sowarga. [" 
Matthew18:11 Sabab Pottrana Manossa rabu parlo masalamedda oreng se nyalethong!] 
Matthew18:12 Baramma panemmona ba'na? Saompamana badha oreng se andhi' dumba saratos meggi', laju elang settong, ba' apa se elakonana oreng jareya? Tanto dumbana se sangang polo sanga' meggi' edina'agi e gumo', laju entar nyare se elang gella'." 
Matthew18:13 Ban mon dumbana se elang jareya la etemmo – paparcaja, ya – oreng jareya tanto aperagan polana nemmo dumba se settong jareya etembang se polana andhi' dumba sangang polo sanga' se ta' elang." 
Matthew18:14 Bariya keya Ramana ba'na e sowarga ta' kasokan mon sampe' badha sala settonga oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' se nyalethong.” 
Matthew18:15 “Mon badha taretanna ba'na se agabay dusa ka ba'na, entare, duduwagi kasala'anna. Tape ba'na kadhuwa'an bai, ja' sampe' badha oreng laen se tao. Mon taretanna ba'na jareya atoro', artena ba'na ahasel nemmo taretanna pole." 
Matthew18:16 Tape mon enja', ajak oreng laen kasorang otaba kadhuwa' aggi'. Sabab e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Paleng sakone'na kodu badha sakse kadhuwa otaba katello kaangguy noduwagi ja' oreng se earane sala jareya pajat sala onggu.’" 
Matthew18:17 Mon taretanna ba'na jareya ta' endha' narema babala'anna reng-oreng buru pas kabala ka jema'at. Ban dhi-budhina, mon ta' endha' narema babala'anna jema'at, oreng jareya anggep papadha ban tokang narek pajek sarta oreng se ta' kennal ka Allah.”" 
Matthew18:18 “Ba'na ebala'ana, ya: Apa se bi' ba'na elarang e dunnya, elarang keya e sowarga. Ban apa se bi' ba'na ebendherragi e dunnya, ebendherragi keya e sowarga." 
Matthew18:19 Ban ba'na ebala'ana keya, ya: Mon e antarana ba'na e dunnya reya badha oreng kadhuwa se la saroju' parkara settong parkara sarta pas nyo'on parkara jareya ka Allah, parnyo'onanna ba'na tanto ekabbuli bi' Tang Rama e sowarga." 
Matthew18:20 Sabab mon badha oreng kadhuwa otaba katello akompol polana Sengko', Sengko' badha e jadhiya keya.”" 
Matthew18:21 Saellana jareya Petrus nyander ka Isa, pas mator, “Guste, manabi taretan abdina agabay dusa ka abdina, kantos saponapa kale abdina kodu nyapora? Kantos pettong kale?”" 
Matthew18:22 Dhabuna Isa, “Enja', banne sampe' pettong kale, tape pettong polo kale pettong kale!" 
Matthew18:23 Sabab mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha rato se ngorosa otangnga la-kabulana." 
Matthew18:24 E bakto gi' buru mareksa, pas badha kabula se egiba ngadhep ka jadhiya; kabula jareya otangnga ajuta'an," 
Matthew18:25 ban ta' kellar majar. Daddi bi' rato jareya kabulana buru esoro juwal saana' binena ban sakabbiyanna dhi'-andhi'na, ekagabaya pamajarra otangnga." 
Matthew18:26 Kabula buru asojud e ajunanna rato sarta mator, ‘Guste, nyo'ona sabbar dhimen ka abdidalem. Sadaja otang abdidalem elonasana.’" 
Matthew18:27 Rato jareya neser ka kabulana, sampe' otangnga eanggep tadha' kabbi." 
Matthew18:28 E bakto kabula jareya kalowar, pas atemmo ban kancana, padha kabulana rato keya, se andhi' otang pera' pan-barampan ebu. Bi' kabula gella' kancana jareya pas epega', sarta ecekkel, laju ngoca', ‘Mara lonase otangnga ba'na!’" 
Matthew18:29 Kancana jareya asojud e adha'na sambi ngoca', ‘Pasabbar dhimen, pa', bi' kaula ebajarana sadaja!’" 
Matthew18:30 Tape kabula gella' nolak. Sabaligga, kancana gella' epamaso' ka penjara sampe' otangnga elonase." 
Matthew18:31 E bakto la-kabula laenna nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya, atena padha arassa ngennes, daddi pas pada areppot parkara jareya ka ratona." 
Matthew18:32 Daddi rato jareya pas adikane kabulana se jahat gella', laju adhabu, ‘Kabula se jahat! Otangnga ba'na bi' sengko' eanggep lonas kabbi polana ba'na menta ka sengko'." 
Matthew18:33 Sabendherra ba'na gu ta' kodu andhi' panganeser keya ka kancana ba'na akantha panganeserra sengko' ka ba'na?’ 
Matthew18:34 Rato jareya ce' dukana. Kabula se jahat gella' emaso'agi ka penjara sampe' otangnga elonase kabbi.” 
Matthew18:35 Isa ambu se acareta sambi adhabu, “Bariya keya ba'na bakal epakantha'a jareya bi' Tang Rama e sowarga, mon ba'na ta' nyapora taretanna kalaban ate se ehlas.”" 
Matthew19:1 Saellana mare adhabu parkara jareya kabbi, Isa laju meyos dhari Galilea ka dhaera Yudea e temorra Songay Yordan." 
Matthew19:2 Bannya' oreng se ngereng, ban reng-oreng jareya bi' Isa epabaras e jadhiya." 
Matthew19:3 Reng-oreng Farisi pas entar ka jadhiya nyoba'a Isa. Ca'na patanyana reng-oreng jareya, “Menorot hokomma agamana sampeyan sareng kaula, ponapa kengeng oreng nellak binena ponapa'a saos margana?”" 
Matthew19:4 Dhabuna Isa, “Apa ba'na gi' ta' maca e dhalem Alketab ja' Se Amorba Jagat abadhi manossa lalake' ban babine'?" 
Matthew19:5 Salerana laju adhabu, ‘Jareya sababba oreng lalake' adina'agi rama ebuna ban daddi settong bi' binena, ban se kadhuwa jareya laju daddi settong.’" 
Matthew19:6 Daddi se kadhuwa jareya banne kadhuwa pole, tape la daddi settong. Daddi apa se la epadaddi settong bi' Allah ta' ekenneng pesa manossa pole.”" 
Matthew19:7 Reng-oreng Farisi jareya pas atanya ka Isa, “Manabi sapaneka aponapa Mosa me' makon oreng apareng sorat panellak ka rajina se etellak?”" 
Matthew19:8 Dhabuna Isa, “Mosa ngedine ba'na nellak binena polana ba'na malarat se ekennenga ajar. Tape dha'-adha'na sabendherra ta' kantha jareya." 
Matthew19:9 Daddi, edhingngagi, ya: Pa'-sapa'a se nellak binena, mangkana binena jareya ta' nyalethong, saellana jareya laju abine babine' laen, oreng jareya azina.”" 
Matthew19:10 Red-moredda Isa pas mator, “Manabi parkara oreng alake bine sapaneka, langkong sae ta' osa alake otaba abine.”" 
Matthew19:11 Dhabuna Isa, “Ta' sakabbiyanna oreng bisa narema ca'-oca' jareya, kajabana reng-oreng se la etantowagi bi' Allah." 
Matthew19:12 Sabab badha oreng se ta' alake otaba ta' abine polana molae lahir la pajat cara jareya. Badha keya se ta' bisa alake otaba abine polana ban oreng laen ekagabay kantha jareya. Ban badha keya se mele dibi' ta' abine otaba ta' alake, sopaja bisa'a aladine Allah. Reng-oreng se sanggup narema pangajaran reya, dina me' olle narema.”" 
Matthew19:13 Badha reng-oreng ngeba na'-kana' ka Isa. Reng-oreng jareya menta sopaja Isa kasokana nompangngagi astana ka cethagga na'-kana' jareya ban nyo'onnagi na'-kana' jareya ka Allah. Tape reng-oreng jareya bi' red-moredda Isa egigiri. 
Matthew19:14 Daddi Isa adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Dina panneng ma' olle na'-kana' jareya nyander ka Sengko'! Ja' langlang, sabab reng-oreng se akantha na'-kana' reya se daddi anggotana ommadda Allah.”" 
Matthew19:15 Isa laju nompangngagi astana ka cethagga na'-kana' jareya sarta aberkadi na'-kana' jareya. Saellana jareya Salerana pas meyos dhari jadhiya. 
Matthew19:16 Kacatora e settong are badha oreng lalake' nyander ka Isa. “Guru,” atorra, “lalakon becce' ponapa se kodu elakone abdina sopaja kengenga odhi' se salerressa sareng se langgeng?”" 
Matthew19:17 Dhabuna Isa, “Arapa ba'na me' atanya ka Sengko' parkara apa se becce'? Pera' badha Settong se becce'. Mon ba'na terro odhi'a, toro' pa-apa se eparenta'agi Allah.”" 
Matthew19:18 “Parenta se ka'dhimma?” ca'na oreng jareya. Dhabuna Isa, “Ja' mate'e oreng, ja' azina, ja' co'-ngeco'on, ja' daddi sakse palsu," 
Matthew19:19 hormadi rama ebuna; ban kataresnae sasamana manossa papadha ban kataresna'anna ba'na ka aba'na dibi'.” 
Matthew19:20 “Sadajana ampon etoro' sareng abdina,” sambidda oreng ngodha jareya. “Ponapa pole se gi' parlo elakone abdina?”" 
Matthew19:21 Dhabuna Isa ka oreng jareya, “Mon ba'na terro samporna'a, kassa' juwal sakabbiyanna dhi'-andhi'na ba'na. Pessena bagi ka oreng se mesken, ban ba'na bakal olleya arta e sowarga. Mon la mare, pas noro' Sengko'!”" 
Matthew19:22 Ngedhing ca'-oca' buru, oreng ngodha buru pas nyengga; atena sossa polana aba'na ce' sogina." 
Matthew19:23 Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda, “Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na, ce' malaradda oreng sogi se daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah." 
Matthew19:24 Ban areya' pole se ekoca'agiya Sengko' ka ba'na: agampangan onta maso' ka lobangnga jarum etembang oreng sogi maso'a ka Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar.” 
Matthew19:25 E bakto ngedhing dhabuna Isa se kantha jareya, red-moredda padha heran. “Manabi kadi ka'dhinto',” atorra, “pasera se bisa'a salamet?”" 
Matthew19:26 Isa ngoladi ka red-moredda jareya laju adhabu, “Monggu ka manossa, jareya mostahel! Tape monggu ka Allah, tadha' barang se mostahel.”" 
Matthew19:27 Petrus pas mator, “Mangken oladi, abdina sakanca ka'dhinto' ampon adinggallagi sadajana kaangguy ngereng Panjennengngan. Ba' ponapa se ekaolleya abdina sakanca ka'dhinto'?”" 
Matthew19:28 Dhabuna Isa ka red-moredda jareya, “Ba'na kodu paparcaja, ya. E Dunnya Se Anyar, Pottrana Manossa bakal alenggiya e tahtana se molja. E bakto jareya ba'na Tang red-mored se dhubellas reya, bakal toju'a e tahta se dhubellas meggi' kaangguy ahakime suku bangsa Isra'il se dhubellas!" 
Matthew19:29 Ban sapa'a bai se adina'agi bengkona, otaba taretan lalake'na otaba taretan bine'na, otaba rama ebuna, otaba na'-ana'na, otaba teggalla polana Sengko', oreng jareya bakal narema'a gantena se bannya'na saratos kalena. Ban oreng jareya bakal narema'a odhi' se sabendherra ban se langgeng." 
Matthew19:30 Tape bannya' oreng se sateya reya daddi se dha'-adha' bakal daddiya se dhi-budhi ban se sateya daddi se dhi-budhi bakal daddiya se dha'-adha'.” 
Matthew20:1 “Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha oreng se andhi' kebbun anggur kalowar e baja laggu nyare oreng se epalakowe e kebbun anggurra." 
Matthew20:2 Saellana erembak, bajaranna etantowagi saare settong pesse salaka, ban reng-oreng jareya laju esoro alako e kebbun anggurra." 
Matthew20:3 Pokol sanga' gi' laggu oreng se andhi' kebbun jareya kalowar pole, laju nangale'e reng-oreng se nganggur e pasar." 
Matthew20:4 Se andhi' kebbun jareya laju ngoca' ka reng-oreng jareya, ‘Kassa' ba'na alako e tang kebbun anggur. Bi' sengko' ba'na eberri'ana bajaran se pantes.’" 
Matthew20:5 Reng-oreng jareya pas mangkat. Pokol dhubellas dhuk-beddhuk ban bariya keya pokol tello' asar, se andhi' kebbun gella' kalowar pole sarta malako reng-oreng pole akantha sabellunna." 
Matthew20:6 Ban ra-kera pokol lema' para' compet are, oreng se andhi' kebbun jareya gi' nangale'e badha oreng se gi' jeng-manjeng tadha' lakona. Ca'na se andhi' kebbun gella' ka reng-oreng jareya, ‘Arapa ba'na ma' pera' jeng-manjeng malolo neng e dhinna' ma' ta' endha' alalakon?’" 
Matthew20:7 Saodda reng-oreng jareya, ‘Tadha' oreng se poron apareng lako ka kaula.’ ‘Mon kantha jareya,’ ca'na se andhi' kebbun gella', ‘kassa' ba'na alako e tang kebbun anggur bai.’" 
Matthew20:8 Saellana are para' malemma, se andhi' kebbun ngoca' ka mandhurra, ‘Kassa' olok reng-oreng se alako rowa, bajari opana bang-sebang, molae dhari oreng se maso' dhi-budhi sampe' ka se maso' dha'-adha'.’" 
Matthew20:9 Reng-oreng se alako molae pokol lema' sar-asar nyander ka jadhiya laju padha narema bajaran pesse salaka settong ebang. 
Matthew20:10 Saellana reng-oreng se epalako molae dhari gi' laggu nyander ka jadhiya, e atena padha ngera narema'a opa se abannya'an. Tape reng-oreng jareya padha ebajari pesse salaka settong ebang keya." 
Matthew20:11 E bakto narema pesse opana, reng-oreng jareya aseddhiyan ka se andhi' kebbun gella'," 
Matthew20:12 ‘Reng-oreng se molae alako dhi-budhi kadibi' ka'dhissa' namong alako saejjam. Mangkana kaula sareng en-laenna paneka saare benteng alako e panassa are, nangeng sareng panjennengngan bajaranna epapadha sareng reng-oreng ka'dhissa'!’" 
Matthew20:13 Se andhi' kebbun jareya nyaot ka sala settong dhari reng-oreng jareya, ‘Taretan, sengko' ta' sala ka ba'na. Gella' gu ta' la erembak opana ba'na settong pesse salaka saare?" 
Matthew20:14 Daddi, mara kala' opana ba'na, pas le-mole. Sengko' pajat terro aberri'a opa ka oreng se maso' dhi-budhi rowa padha ban opana ba'na." 
Matthew20:15 Apa sengko' ta' olle aguna'agi tang pesse sakarebba sengko' dibi'? Otabana apa ba'na reya ere, polana sengko' lamba'?’ ”" 
Matthew20:16 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu, “Daddi reng-oreng se dhi-budhi bakal daddiya se dha'-adha', ban reng-oreng se dha'-adha' bakal daddiya se dhi-budhi.”" 
Matthew20:17 E naleka Isa meyos ka Yerusalim, e tengnga jalan red-moredda edikane, epesa dhari reng-oreng laenna. Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya," 
Matthew20:18 “Edhingngagi! Sengko' ban ba'na sateya entara ka Yerusalim. E dhissa' Pottrana Manossa bakal epassra'agiya ka mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama, pas eokoma mate," 
Matthew20:19 saellana jareya bakal epassra'agiya ka reng-oreng se banne Yahudi. Bi' reng-oreng jareya Pottrana Manossa bakal ebi-cebbiya, eseksa'a ban ethangthanga e kaju salib. Tape e are se kapeng tello' bakal epaodhi'a pole.”" 
Matthew20:20 Saellana jareya binena Zebedeyus nyabis ka Isa abareng ban ana'na se kadhuwa, laju asojud e ajunanna parlo on-nyo'ona." 
Matthew20:21 “Ba'na arapa'a?” dhabuna Isa. Babine' jareya nyaot, “Abdina terro sopaja ana' abdina se kadhuwa ka'dhinto' kengenga toju' e kangan kacerra Panjennengngan manabi Panjennengngan ampon jumenneng Rato.”" 
Matthew20:22 “Ba'na ta' tao apa se epenta ba'na jareya,” dhabuna Isa ka babine' ban ana'na se kadhuwa jareya. “Ba' sangguba ba'na ngenom dhari piala kasangsa'ra'an se kodu eenom Sengko'?” “Enggi, sanggup,” saodda se katello jareya." 
Matthew20:23 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na pajat padha ngenoma dhari Tang piala. Tape parkara sapa se kodu toju' e kangan ban e kacerra Sengko', banne Sengko' se andhi' ha' nantowagi. Kennengngan jareya esadhiya'agi kaangguy reng-oreng se la etantowagi bi' Tang Rama.”" 
Matthew20:24 E bakto ngedhing parkara jareya, red-moredda Isa se sapolo oreng padha peggel ka oreng sataretan se kadhuwa jareya." 
Matthew20:25 Daddi Isa adikane red-moredda jareya kabbi laju adhabu, “Ba'na tao ja' ra'yadda bangsa se ta' kennal ka Allah ekaneyaja bi' pin-pamimpinna sarta ececce' bi' om-kaom oreng agungnga." 
Matthew20:26 Tape ba'na ta' olle kantha jareya. Sapa e antarana ba'na se terro daddiya oreng raja, kodu daddi pangladinna se laenna." 
Matthew20:27 Ban oreng se terro daddiya se dha'adha' e antarana ba'na, kodu daddi dunorra ba'na." 
Matthew20:28 Akantha Pottrana Manossa, se dhateng banne polana menta'a eladine, tape aladinana, sarta massra'agiya nyabana sopaja bannya' oreng se salamet.”" 
Matthew20:29 E naleka Isa ban red-moredda mangkat dhari Yerikho, bannya' oreng se noro' bunte'." 
Matthew20:30 Badha oreng buta kadhuwa toju' e penggir lorong. E bakto ngedhing ja' Isa lebat e jadhiya, se kadhuwa jareya pas aera', “Pottrana Daud, kaneserre abdina!”" 
Matthew20:31 Oreng se bannya' se badha e jadhiya gigir ka se kadhuwa jareya, esoro neng-enneng. Tape se kadhuwa jareya la'-mala' aera' epakaja'an pole. “Pottrana Daud, kaneserre abdina!”" 
Matthew20:32 Isa pas ambu, se kadhuwa laju edikane. “Apa se epenta'a ba'na dhari Sengko'?” dhabuna Isa." 
Matthew20:33 Se kadhuwa jareya mator, “Pa', abdina terro nengalana.”" 
Matthew20:34 Isa neser ka se kadhuwa jareya, laju agagap matana. E bakto jareya keya se kadhuwa buru se nangale, sarta laju ngereng Isa." 
Matthew21:1 E bakto la para' napa'a ka Yerusalim, Isa ban red-moredda pas napa' ka Betfage e Gumo' Jaitun. E jadhiya Isa makon moredda kadhuwa ajalan kaadha'." 
Matthew21:2 “Kassa' ba'na entar ka kampong e adha' rowa,” dhabuna Isa ka red-moredda jareya. “Mon ba'na buru napa' ka jadhiya tanto pas nangale'e badha hemar se epangger ban budhu'na. Ocol hemar se dhadhuwa' jareya, pas giba dha' enna'." 
Matthew21:3 Mon badha oreng se anya-tanya, kabala ka orengnga, ‘Ekaparlo Pangeran’, oreng jareya tanto neng-enneng hemarra egiba ba'na.”" 
Matthew21:4 Kan kadaddiyan kantha jareya sopaja kalakon apa se edhabuwagi nabbi, iya areya:" 
Matthew21:5 “Kabala ka Siyon, Ratona ba'na rabu. Andhap asor ban netene hemar, budhu'na hemar se gi' ngodha omorra.”" 
Matthew21:6 Saellana jareya red-moredda mangkat ajalannagi apa se edhabuwagi Isa. 
Matthew21:7 Hemar ban budhu'na rowa egiba. Reng-oreng jareya mokka' jubana, ekagabay pa-kapana. Saellana jareya Isa pas netene hemar jareya." 
Matthew21:8 Bannya' oreng ngampar jubana bang-sebang e lorong, ban bannya' keya se ngala' ca'-ranca'na kajuwan, laju etabur e lorong." 
Matthew21:9 Reng-oreng se bannya' se ajalan e ajunanna ban e bingkengnga Isa padha ra'-era'an, “Molja'agi Pottrana Daud! Mandar eberkadana Allah se rabu kalaban asmana Pangeran! Molja'agi Allah Se Mahatenggi!”" 
Matthew21:10 E bakto Isa maso' ka Yerusalim oreng sakottha padha baridhu kabbi. “Sapa rowa?” ca'na reng-oreng e kottha jareya. 
Matthew21:11 “Rowa Nabbi Isa, dhari Nazaret e Galilea,” saodda oreng se bannya' se ngereng Isa jareya." 
Matthew21:12 Saellana jareya Isa maso' ka Padalemman Socce, laju ngojuk sakabbiyanna oreng se ajuwal belli e jadhiya. Ja-mejana oreng se narema poroban pesse ban ku-bangkuna oreng se ajuwal mano' dara epajungkelang kabbi." 
Matthew21:13 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi ja' Allah adhabu, ‘Tang bengko bakal esebbuda kennengnganna oreng adu'a.’ Tape bi' ba'na sateya ekagabay rongkangnga bigal!”" 
Matthew21:14 Reng-oreng buta ban empon padha nyander ka Isa e Padalemman Socce, ban Isa laju mabaras reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew21:15 Tape mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama peggel e bakto nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban se epabadha Isa jareya, sarta ngedhing na'-kana' padha ra'-era'an e Padalemman Socce, “Molja'agi Pottrana Daud!”" 
Matthew21:16 Reng-oreng jareya padha mator ka Isa, “Sampeyan meyarsa ponapa ca'epon na'-kana' ka'issa'?” “Iya, Sengko' ngedhing,” dhabuna Isa. “Apa ba'na ta' tao maca Alketab se nyebbuttagi kantha reya, ‘Na'-kana' ban babaji' bi' ba'na la eajari ngoca'agi pojiyan se samporna?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Saellana jareya Isa adinggallagi reng-oreng jareya, laju terros kalowar dhari kottha jareya ka Betania, pas kelem e jadhiya." 
Matthew21:18 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu, e dhalem parjalanan abaliya ka kottha, Isa lapar." 
Matthew21:19 Salerana ngoladi bungkana ara e penggir lorong, laju esemma'e, tape bungkana ara jareya tadha' buwana sakale; se badha pera' dhaun malolo. Isa laju adhabu ka bungkana ara jareya, “Ba'na ta' kera abuwa pole.” Bungkana ara jareya pas elop sanatkala jareya keya." 
Matthew21:20 E bakto red-moredda nangale'e parkara jareya, kabbi padha heran. “Bungkana ara reya me' pas mate sanatkala?” oca'na." 
Matthew21:21 Dhabuna Isa, “Ongguwan, mon ba'na parcaja ban ta' mangmang, ba'na bisa ngalakone apa se la elakone Sengko' ka bungkana ara reya. Ban banne pera' jareya malolo, la'-mala' ba'na tanto bisa ngoca' ka gumo' reya, ‘Mara ongga ban ngalto' ka tase'’, tanto pas kalakon cara jareya." 
Matthew21:22 Apa'a bai se epenta ba'na e dhalem du'a, tanto ekaolle, sokor ba'na parcaja.”" 
Matthew21:23 Saellana jareya Isa abali ka Padalemman Socce, laju maso' ban morok e jadhiya. Parappa'na morok jareya, mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi nyander ka seddi'na laju atanya, “Kalaban dhasar ponapa sampeyan ngalakone paneka sadaja? Pasera se apareng ha' ka sampeyan?”" 
Matthew21:24 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' badha se etanya'agiya keya ka ba'na. Mon bi' ba'na ejawab, Sengko' abala'a ka ba'na kalaban ha'na sapa Sengko' ngalakone jareya kabbi." 
Matthew21:25 Olle ha' dhari dhimma Yahya abaptis? Dhari Allah apa dhari manossa?” Mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi jareya pas padha aparembagan. “Nyaoda baramma reya? Mon sengko' nyaot ‘Dhari Allah,’ oreng reya tanto ngoca', ‘Mon bariya, arapa ba'na me' ta' parcaja ka Yahya jareya?’" 
Matthew21:26 Tape mon sengko' nyaot ‘Dhari manossa,’ sengko' tako' ka oreng bannya', sabab reng-oreng reya kabbi padha yakin ja' Yahya reya nabbi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Daddi reng-oreng jareya nyaot, “Ta' oneng.” Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mon bariya, Sengko' ta' abala'a keya ka ba'na kalaban ha'na sapa Sengko' ngalakone jareya kabbi.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Sateya baramma panemmona ba'na parkara reya?” dhabuna Isa pole. “Badha oreng lalake' andhi' ana' kadhuwa. Oreng jareya entar ka ana'na se sareyang, laju ngoca', ‘Na', kassa' alako ka kebbun anggur sateya.’" 
Matthew21:29 ‘Bunten’ ca'na ana'na jareya. Tape saellana jareya kana' buru pas aoba pekkeranna sarta pas entar alako ka kebbun anggurra. 
Matthew21:30 Saellana jareya eppa'na entar ka ana'na se nomer dhuwa', sarta nyoro akantha ka ana'na se sareyang. ‘Enggi, Pa',’ ca'na ana'na se nomer dhuwa' jareya. Tape kana' jareya ta' entar ka kebbunna." 
Matthew21:31 Daddi, e antarana kana' se kadhuwa jareya, se kemma se ajalannagi karebba eppa'na?” “Se sareyang,” saodda mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi jareya. Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na paparcaja, ya: Reng-oreng se lakona narek pajek ban del-sondel bakal daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah kaadha' etembang ba'na." 
Matthew21:32 Sabab Yahya Pambaptis dhateng, ban noduwagi ka ba'na carana odhi' se ekasokane Pangeran, tape ba'na ta' endha' parcaja ka pangajaranna; tape reng-oreng tokang narek pajek ban del-sondel parcaja ka Yahya jareya. Tape maske ba'na la nangale'e jareya kabbi, pekkeranna ba'na ta' endha' aoba ban gi' ta' parcaja ka Pangeran.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Mara edhingngagi keya parompama'an se settong reya,” dhabuna Isa. “Badha settong towan tana se namen anggur e kebbunna. Kebbunna anggurra jareya epagari e sakalenglengnga; oreng jareya ngale lobang egabaya pamerressanna anggurra, sarta agabay manara panjaga'an. Saellana jareya kebbun anggurra epasewa ka reng-oreng se agarap, ban oreng jareya laju mangkat ka nagara manca." 
Matthew21:34 Saellana napa' ka mosemma metthek anggur, towan tana jareya nyoro nor-dunorra entar ka reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna esoro menta bagiyanna." 
Matthew21:35 Tape reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna jareya mega' nor-dunorra towan tana gella', badha se epokol, badha se epate'e, se laenna egarujuk ban bato." 
Matthew21:36 Towan tana jareya nyoro nor-dunorra se laen, abannya'an dhari se dha'-adha'na. Tape nor-dunor jareya ngalame padha ban se entar jang adha'an." 
Matthew21:37 Dhi-budhina towan tana jareya nyoro ana'na dibi'. ‘Tantona tang ana' eargai,’ ca'na pekkerra." 
Matthew21:38 Tape e bakto reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya nangale'e ana'na towan tana jareya, laju padha saleng ngoca', ‘Areya' ana'na. Mara pate'e, me' olle sangkolanna gaggar ka sengko' ban ba'na!’" 
Matthew21:39 Daddi kana' jareya epega', ebuwang ka lowar, pas epate'e.”" 
Matthew21:40 Isa mareksane, “Daddi, mon oreng se andhi' kebbun jareya mole, ba' epabaramma'a reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna jareya?”" 
Matthew21:41 Reng-oreng jareya nyaot, “Tanto reng-oreng se jahat gapaneka epate'e, ban kebbunna tanto epasewa ka reng-oreng laen se poron ngatorragi bagiyanna hasella ka se gadhuwan tana manabi ampon napa' baktona.”" 
Matthew21:42 Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Apa ba'na gi' ta' tao maca se etoles e dhalem Alketab? ‘Bato se ta' eangguy bi' tokang bangonan la daddi bato se paleng parlo. Jareya lalakon se elampa'agi Pangeran; bagus onggu abasanna!’ ”" 
Matthew21:43 “Daddi kaenga'e,” dhabuna Isa, “sakabbiyanna ha'na ba'na menangka ommadda Allah bakal ecabuda ban ebagiya ka settong bangsa se bakal ajalannagiya pa-apa se eparenta'agi Allah. [" 
Matthew21:44 Oreng se labu ka bato rowa, bakal ancora; ban oreng se ekacecce'e bato jareya, bakal egilessa sampe' daddi abu.]”" 
Matthew21:45 E bakto mam-imam kapala ban reng-oreng Farisi ngedhing parompama'an-parompama'anna Isa jareya, kabbi padha ngarte ja' se ekamaksod Isa iya areya reng-oreng jareya dibi'." 
Matthew21:46 Daddi reng-oreng jareya aehteyar mega'a Isa, tape tako' ka oreng se bannya', sabab reng-oreng jareya nganggep Isa jareya nabbi." 
Matthew22:1 Isa abu-dhabu ngangguy parompama'an pole ka oreng se bannya'," 
Matthew22:2 dhabuna, “Mon Allah la marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha rato badha gabayya, se ajang-onjang mangantanana pottrana." 
Matthew22:3 Rato jareya makon la-kabulana ngone'e reng-oreng se eonjang. Tape reng-oreng se eonjang tadha' se endha'a dhateng. 
Matthew22:4 Saellana jareya rato buru ngotos la-kabulana se laen. Dhabuna rato jareya ‘Kabala ka reng-oreng se eonjang jareya ja' ka'-angka'na la ranta. Tang Sape ban dhu'-budhu'na se paleng bagus la esambelli. Kabbi la ranta. Mara atore lenggi ka jang-onjangan reya!’ 
Matthew22:5 Tape moy-tamoy se eonjang jareya ta' marduli, padha entar ka lalakonna bang-sebang: badha se entar ka teggalla, se laenna entar ka tokona;" 
Matthew22:6 ban badha keya se mega' la-kabulana rato jareya, epokole sarta epate'e." 
Matthew22:7 E bakto meyarsa parkara jareya, rato jareya ce' dukana. Rato jareya pas ngerem tantarana esoro mate'e reng-oreng se la mate'e la-kabulana gella', sarta ngobbar kotthana." 
Matthew22:8 Saellana jareya rato buru pas adikane la-kabulana, sarta adhabu, ‘Jang-onjangan reya la ranta, tape reng-orengnga se eonjang ta' pantes." 
Matthew22:9 Kassa' entar ka rong-lorong raja, ajak oreng sanya'-bannya'na, soro kaonjangan dha' enna'.’" 
Matthew22:10 Daddi la-kabulana jareya pas mangkat ka rong-lorong raja sarta makompol sakabbiyanna oreng se etemmo e jadhiya, se becce' ban bariya keya se jahat. Daddi kennengnganna jang-onjangan jareya possa' ban tamoy." 
Matthew22:11 Saellana jareya rato pas maso', lat-ngoladi moy-tamoyya. E jadhiya rato buru ngoladi badha oreng se kaonjangan tape ta' ngangguy kalambi pesta." 
Matthew22:12 Rato pas atanya ka oreng jareya, ‘Taretan, baramma ba'na ma' bisa maso' dha' enna' ta' ngangguy kalambi pesta?’ Oreng jareya ta' metto oca'." 
Matthew22:13 Rato pas adhabu ka la-kabulana, ‘Tale'e soko ban tanangnga oreng reya, pas buwang ka kennengngan se petteng. E jadhiya bakal badha'a tanges ban kasangsara'an.’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 Isa pas matotok parompama'an jareya, dhabuna, “Bannya' se etembali, tape sakone' se epele.”" 
Matthew22:15 Reng-oreng Farisi aparembagan baramma carana se bisa'a ajebbak Isa bi' partanya'an-partanya'an. 
Matthew22:16 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ngotos red-moredda ka Isa abareng ban reng-oreng anggotana golonganna Herodes. Reng-oreng jareya mator ka Isa, “Guru, kaula oneng ja' Sampeyan jujur. Sampeyan morok rang-terrangan parkara kasokanna Allah kaangguy manossa, ta' marduli pamanggina pasera'a saos, sabab Sampeyan ta' parduli ka pasera'a saos." 
Matthew22:17 Daddi, kadi ponapa pamanggina Sampeyan? Menorot atoranna agamana kaula sareng Sampeyan, majar pajek ka Kaisar kengeng ponapa bunten?”" 
Matthew22:18 Isa ngagali ka maksod jahadda reng-oreng jareya, daddi pas adhabu, “He, reng-oreng monafik! Arapa ba'na me' ajebbaga Sengko'?" 
Matthew22:19 Kemma mara duduwagi ka Sengko' pesse se bi' ba'na eangguy majar pajek!” Reng-oreng jareya pas magi pesse salaka ka Isa. 
Matthew22:20 Isa adhabu, “Gambarra ban nyamana sapa reya?”" 
Matthew22:21 “Kaisar,” saodda reng-oreng jareya. Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mon bariya, bagi ka Kaisar apa se daddi andhi'na Kaisar, ban atorragi ka Allah apa kaagunganna Allah.”" 
Matthew22:22 E bakto ngedhing katerrangan jareya, reng-oreng jareya padha heran. Daddi kabbi padha ondur adina'agi Isa." 
Matthew22:23 E are jareya keya badha reng-oreng Saduki entar ka Isa. Oreng Saduki reya tamaso' golonganna oreng se ta' parcaja ja' oreng mate bakal odhi'a pole. 
Matthew22:24 “Guru,” ca'na atorra, “Mosa ngajarragi ja' manabi badha oreng lalake' ta' gadhuwan ana' laju adinggal omor, taretanna kodu ngabin randhana sopaja apareng toronan ka se adinggal omor." 
Matthew22:25 E ka'dhinto' gi' dhimen badha oreng lalake' kapetto sataretan. Se wa'-towa'an araji, namong ta' gadhuwan pottra, laju adinggal omor. Daddi randhaepon edinggallagi ka taretanna." 
Matthew22:26 Taretanna gapaneka ta' gadhuwan ana' jugan, pas adinggal omor. Kadi paneka jugan taretanna se nomer tello' sareng saterrossepon kantos ka se nomer petto'." 
Matthew22:27 Dhi-budhina babine' gapaneka adinggal omor jugan. 
Matthew22:28 Daddi, e bakto oreng mate epaodhi' pole, pasera lakena babine' gapaneka? Sabab kapetto sadaja padha oneng daddi lakena.”" 
Matthew22:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na ce' kalerona, sabab ba'na ta' ngarte ka essena Alketab, bariya keya kobasana Allah." 
Matthew22:30 Sabab mon oreng mate odhi' pole, odhi'na padha ban malaekat e sowarga, ta' abineya pole." 
Matthew22:31 Apa ba'na ta' tao ngedhing dhabuna Allah parkara oreng mate se epaodhi' pole? Dhabuna Allah," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Sengko' reya Allahna Ibrahim, Allahna Ishak ban Allahna Yakub.’ Allah jareya banne Allahna oreng mate, tape Allahna oreng odhi'!”" 
Matthew22:33 E bakto ngedhing katerranganna Isa jareya, oreng se bannya' jareya laju padha ce' heranna ka pangajaranna." 
Matthew22:34 E bakto ngedhing ja' reng-oreng Saduki ta' metto oca' e bakto ngadhebbi Isa, reng-oreng Farisi laju padha akompol." 
Matthew22:35 Settong e antarana, iya areya guru agama, atanya ka Isa, maksodda ajebbaga." 
Matthew22:36 “Guru,” atorra, “se ka'imma papakon se nomer settong e dhalem hokomma agama?”" 
Matthew22:37 Dhabuna Isa, “Taresnae Allahna ba'na sampe' ka dhalem atena, sampe' nyarepsep ka sokmana, kalaban ngettokkagi akkalla." 
Matthew22:38 Jareya parenta se paleng otama ban se paleng parlo! 
Matthew22:39 Dineng parenta se nomer dhuwa' se padha ban se nomer settong iya areya: Taresnae sasamana ba'na papadha ban kataresna'anna ba'na ka aba'na dibi'. 
Matthew22:40 Sakabbiyanna hokomma agama se eajarragi Mosa ban sakabbiyanna pangajaranna para nabbi adhasar ka parenta se dhadhuwa' jareya.” 
Matthew22:41 E naleka reng-oreng Farisi gi' akompol e jadhiya, Isa adhabu," 
Matthew22:42 “Baramma panemmona ba'na parkara Rato Panyalamet? Toronanna sapa jareya?” “Toronanna Daud,” sambidda reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew22:43 “Mon bariya,” dhabuna Isa, “Errohna Allah arapa ma' apareng ilham ka Daud sopaja nyebbut ‘Pangeran’ ka Rato Panyalamet jareya? Sabab Daud ngoca'," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Pangeran adhabu ka tang Pangeran: Mara toju' e kanganna Sengko', sampe' so-mosona ba'na bi' Sengko' epatellok ka ba'na.’" 
Matthew22:45 Daddi mon Daud jareya nyebbut ‘Pangeran’ ka Rato Panyalamet, baramma se bisa'a Rato Panyalamet jareya toronanna Daud?”" 
Matthew22:46 Tadha' se bisa'a nyaodi Isa. Ban sajjegga are jareya, tadha' oreng se bangal anya-tanya pole ka Salerana." 
Matthew23:1 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu ka oreng se bannya' ban ka red-moredda," 
Matthew23:2 “Ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi reya olle kakobasa'an kaangguy ngarte'e hokomma Mosa. 
Matthew23:3 Daddi ta'adi ban toro' apa se eparenta'agi. Tape ja' tero apa lalakonna, sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' ngalakone barang se eajarragi dibi'." 
Matthew23:4 Reng-oreng jareya nyoro pa-apa se malarat ban aberri' atoran-atoran se berra', tape ta' aberri' partolongan sakale sopaja oreng bisa'a ajalannagi atoran-atoran jareya." 
Matthew23:5 Pa-apa se elakone reng-oreng jareya coma terro etangaleyana oreng. Reng-oreng jareya nengnget ngangguy tale sambajangan se bar-lebar, ban dir-galindirra jubana epalanjang!" 
Matthew23:6 Reng-oreng jareya mele kennengngan se paleng nyaman mon kaonjangan, ban nyare korse se istimewa e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan." 
Matthew23:7 Reng-oreng jareya lebur ehormadi oreng e sar-pasar, ban mon eolok ‘Guru’." 
Matthew23:8 Tape ba'na ja' endha' mon eolok ‘Guru’, sabab ba'na kabbi sataretan ban Guruna ba'na pera' settong." 
Matthew23:9 Ban ja' sampe' badha oreng e dunnya reya se bi' ba'na eolok ‘Rama’, sabab Ramana ba'na pera' settong, iya areya Ramana se e sowarga." 
Matthew23:10 Ban pole ba'na ja' endha' mon eolok ‘Pamimpin’, sabab pamimpinna ba'na pera' badha settong, iya areya Rato Panyalamet se ejanjiyagi Allah." 
Matthew23:11 Oreng se paleng raja e antarana ba'na kodu daddi pangladinna ba'na. 
Matthew23:12 Oreng se matenggi aba'na bakal ekababa'agiya, ban oreng se marendha aba'na bakal epatenggiya.”" 
Matthew23:13 “Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Ba'na lang-ngalange oreng kaangguy daddi anggotana ommadda Allah. Ba'na dibi' ta' endha' daddi anggotana ommadda Allah, ban oreng laen se endha' bi' ba'na elang-alange. [" 
Matthew23:14 Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Ba'na co-ngoco dha-randha ban arampas bengkona ban kaangguy notobi kajahadanna jareya ba'na adu'a epajang-lanjang. Jareya sababba okomanna ba'na dhaggi' berra' onggu!] 
Matthew23:15 Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Ajalanan sampe' jau, alajar e tase' ban entar ka sabalattrana tenggangan pera' parlo nyareya oreng settong se epanoro'a agamana ba'na. Ban saellana oreng jareya maso' agamana ba'na, bi' ba'na egabay calonna essena naraka se kajuba'anna dhu kalena ba'na dibi'!" 
Matthew23:16 Calaka' ba'na pin-pamimpin se buta! Ba'na ngajarragi reya, ‘Mon oreng asompa bit Padalemman Socce, oreng jareya ta' wajib neptebbi sompana; tape mon asompa bit emmas e Padalemman Socce, oreng jareya kodu neptebbi sompana jareya!’" 
Matthew23:17 Ba'na reya budhu ban buta! Kemma se lebbi penting: emmassa, otabana Padalemman Soccena se masocce emmas jareya?" 
Matthew23:18 Salaenna jareya ba'na ngajarragi reya keya, ‘Mon oreng asompa bit mezba, oreng jareya ta' wajib neptebbi sompana; tape mon oreng asompa bit tor-ator se badha e attas mezba, oreng jareya kodu neptebbi sompana.’" 
Matthew23:19 Buta onggu ba'na reya! Kemma se lebbi penting? Tor-atorra otabana mezba se masocce tor-ator jareya? 
Matthew23:20 Daddi, mon badha oreng asompa bit nyamana mezba, jareya artena asompa bit nyamana mezba, ban bit nyamana sakabbiyanna tor-ator se badha e attassa." 
Matthew23:21 Ban mon oreng asompa bit nyamana Padalemman Socce, jareya artena asompa bit nyamana Padalemman Socce, ban bit asmana Allah se alenggi e jadhiya." 
Matthew23:22 Ban mon oreng asompa bit nyamana sowarga, jareya artena asompa bit nyamana tahtana Pangeran, ban bit asmana Allah se alenggi e tahta jareya." 
Matthew23:23 Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Ba'na ngatorragi ka Pangeran saparpolonna racegan akantha salase, addas manes, ban jinten. Mangkana rang-barang se paleng penting e dhalem kom-hokomma agama, akantha: Kaadilan, kabellasan ban kaestowan, bi' ba'na ta' eparduli. Mangkana jareya se kodu elakone ba'na, maske se laen ja' sampe' eenthengngagi keya!" 
Matthew23:24 Ba'na pamimpin se buta kabbi! Lala' se badha e dhalem nom-enomanna ba'na esareng, tape onta bi' ba'na ekalodhu'." 
Matthew23:25 Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Tobung ban perengnga ba'na ekorae epaberse bagiyan lowaranna, tape bagiyan dhalemma ce' gedda'na, buddhak pan-apan se bi' ba'na ekaolle dhari kakerrasan ban kadhakka'an." 
Matthew23:26 Farisi se buta! Korae gallu paberse bagiyan dhalemma bung-tobung ban reng-perengnga ba'na, ma' olle bagiyan lowaranna berse keya!" 
Matthew23:27 Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Ba'na akantha makam se ekorap sampe' pote; e bagiyan lowaranna katon bagus, tape e dhalemmanna possa' ban tolang ban sabarang se la bucco'." 
Matthew23:28 Bariya keya ba'na. E bagiyan lowar katon bagus abasanna ka sakabbiyanna oreng; tape e bagiyan dhalemma possa' bi' kapalsuwan sarta dusa.” 
Matthew23:29 “Calaka' ba'na ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi! Ba'na dujan tha'-kantha'an! Kam-makamma bi-nabbi bi' ba'na epabagus, ban gu-tugu parengeddanna reng-oreng se odhi'na becce' bi' ba'na epasange rarenggan." 
Matthew23:30 Ban ba'na ngoca', ‘Ja' sakenga sengko' odhi' e jamanna tang bangatowa lamba', sengko' ta' kera noro' tang bangatowa mate'e bi-nabbi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Daddi ba'na dibi' ngakone ja' ba'na toronanna reng-oreng se mate'e bi-nabbi! 
Matthew23:32 Mon bariya, la paterros ban pamare sa-dusa se la emolae bangatowana ba'na jareya!" 
Matthew23:33 Ba'na reya jahat ban toronanna oreng jahat! Baramma ba'na se bisa'a lopot dhari okoman e naraka? 
Matthew23:34 Mara edhingngagi pateppa': Sengko' madhatengnga bi-nabbi ka ba'na, bariya keya reng-oreng se bicaksana ban ru-guru; sabagiyan dhari reng-oreng jareya bi' ba'na badha se bakal epateyana, ban badha pole se bakal ethangthanga e kaju salib. Badha se bi' ba'na bakal eseksa'a e dhalem kennengnganna kabakteyan, ban badha se bakal eserserra dhari kottha se settong ka kottha laenna." 
Matthew23:35 Daddi, ba'na bakal eokoma polana sakabbiyanna reng-oreng se ta' andhi' sala se padha epate'e – molae dhari se mate'e Habil se tadha' salana, sampe' ka Zakhariya ana'na Berekhya se bi' ba'na epate'e e antarana Padalemman Socce ban mezba." 
Matthew23:36 Senga', ya: jareya kabbi bakal etanggunga bi' reng-oreng jaman sateya!”" 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusalim, Yerusalim! Bi-nabbi bi' ba'na epate'e. Para otosanna Allah bi' ba'na padha egarujuk bi' bato sampe' mate. La barampa kale Sengko' terro agellu'a sakabbiyanna pandhudhu'na ba'na akantha korbina ajam se ngepkebbana dhu'-budhu'na e baba'anna kalembangnga, tape ba'na ta' endha'!" 
Matthew23:38 Daddi Allah ta' asarengnge ba'na pole. 
Matthew23:39 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya: Molae dhari sateya ba'na ta' kera nangale'e Sengko' pole sampe' ba'na ngoca', ‘Mandar eberkadana Allah se rabu kalaban asmana Pangeran.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 E bakto Isa meyos dhari Padalemman Socce, red-moredda nyander laju aduding ka ngon-bangonan Padalemman Socce jareya." 
Matthew24:2 Isa laju adhabu, “Apa ba'na nangale'e jareya kabbi? Ba'na ebala'ana, ya, batona ngon-bangonan jareya bakal tadha'a settonga balakka' se gi' pagguna asoson e kennengnganna. Kabbi bakal ngalotora.”" 
Matthew24:3 Saellana jareya Isa meyos ka Gumo' Jaitun, ban parappa'na alenggi e jadhiya, red-moredda nyander acaca'a ban Salerana sacara pribadhi. “Ngereng abdina parenge oneng bilaepon gapaneka se bakal kadaddiyana,” ca'na atorra. “Dha-tandha ponapa se bakal noduwagiya ja' Panjennengngan ampon rabuwa sareng ja' ampon napa' baktona keyamat?”" 
Matthew24:4 Dhabuna Isa, “Pate-ngate, ya, ja' sampe' ba'na ekenneng tepo." 
Matthew24:5 Sabab bannya' oreng se bakal dhatengnga kalaban ngangguy Tang nyama sarta ngoca', ‘Sengko' reya Rato Panyalamet!’ Reng-oreng jareya bakal nepowa oreng bannya'." 
Matthew24:6 Ba'na bakal ngedhinga garudhu'na paperrangan ban bar-kabar parkara paperrangan, tape ba'na ta' osa tako'. Jareya kabbi kodu kalakon, tape jareya ta' ekenneng arte'e ja' la dhapa' baktona keyamat." 
Matthew24:7 Bangsa se settong bakal aperranga ban bangsa laenna, ban nagara se settong bakal nyerranga nagara laenna. E man-dhimman bakal badha'a babaja kalaparan ban lendhu." 
Matthew24:8 Jareya kabbi pera' parmola'an, akantha sake' tabu' se ekarassa bi' babine' se rembi'a." 
Matthew24:9 Saellana jareya ba'na bakal padha'a epega' ban epassra'agi kaangguy eseksa otaba epate'e. Oreng sadunnya bakal baji'a ka ba'na polana ba'na daddi Tang mored. 
Matthew24:10 E bakto jareya bakal bannya'a oreng se mortad, padha saleng kiyanat ban padha saleng ngabaji'i." 
Matthew24:11 Bakal bannya'a nabbi palsu, ban nepo oreng bannya'." 
Matthew24:12 Kajahadan bakal alatlada san-kassannagi sampe' bannya' oreng se ta' andhi' ate taresna pole. 
Matthew24:13 Tape pa'-sapa'a se koko emanna sampe' ka aherra, bakal salamedda." 
Matthew24:14 Ban Kabar Bagus parkara Allah se marenta bakal eberta'agiya sampe' balattra sadunnya, sopaja oreng padha'a ngedhing kabbi. Saellana jareya buru keyamat.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Ba'na bakal padha'a nangale'e ‘Kajahadan se maancor’ akantha se ekoca'agi Nabbi Daniyel, manjeng e kennengngan se socce. (Catheddan kaangguy se maca: Tetene apa artena!)" 
Matthew24:16 E bakto jareya, oreng se badha e Yudea kodu buru ka pagunongan." 
Matthew24:17 Oreng se badha e ata'na bengkona ja' marlowagi toron kaangguy ngala'a dhi'-andhi'na dhari dhalem bengkona. 
Matthew24:18 Oreng se badha e teggalla ja' abali parlo ngala'a jubana. 
Matthew24:19 Nako'e onggu re-are jareya monggu ka babine' se teppa'na ngandhung ban kaom ebu se gi' andhi' ana' baji'! 
Matthew24:20 Nyo'on ka Allah sopaja ba'na ta' sampe'a kodu buru e mosem nambara' otaba e are Sabat! 
Matthew24:21 E bakto jareya bakal badha'a kasossa'an se talebat rajana se gi' ta' tao badha sajjegga parmola'anna dunnya sampe' sateya, ban ta' kera badha pole samarena jareya." 
Matthew24:22 Ja' sakenga Allah ta' mapandha' bakto jareya; ta' kera badha oreng se salamet. Tape polana ommadda Allah mapandha' bakto jareya. 
Matthew24:23 E bakto jareya mon badha oreng se ngoca' ka ba'na, ‘Abas, Rato Panyalamet rowa badha e dhinna'!’ otaba ‘Salerana badha e dhissa'!’ – ja' parcaja ka oreng jareya." 
Matthew24:24 Sabab bakal dhatengnga panyalamet-panyalamet se palsu ban bi-nabbi se palsu. Reng-oreng jareya bakal mabadha'a kon-lalakon se lowar biyasa, sarta kaajiban-kaajiban kaangguy nepo oreng, ja' ekennenga rowa, ommat peleyanna Allah keya." 
Matthew24:25 Daddi kaenga'e! Bi' Sengko' ba'na la ebalai kaadha' parkara jareya sabellunna baktona. 
Matthew24:26 Mon badha oreng se ngoca' ka ba'na, ‘Abas, salerana badha e ra-ara!’ – ba'na ja' entar ka jadhiya. Otabana mon badha se ngoca', ‘Abas, salerana ngetek e dhinna'!’ – ba'na ja' parcaja." 
Matthew24:27 Sabab Pottrana Manossa bakal dhatengnga akantha sonarra kelap se ngareddhap e langnge', molae dhari temor sampe' ka bara'." 
Matthew24:28 E dhimma badha babathang, e jadhiya tanto badha mano' se ngakanan babathang.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Ta' abit saellana kasossa'an e bakto jareya, are bakal pettengnga, ban bulan ta' nyonar pole. Tang-bintang bakal gaggara dhari langnge', ban kabbi se ngobasae bang-abang bakal salbuda." 
Matthew24:30 Saellana jareya tandhana Pottrana Manossa bakal etangaleyana e langnge'. E bakto jareya sa-bangsa e dunnya bakal nangesa kabbi. Reng-oreng jareya bakal nangaleyana Pottrana Manossa rabu e attassa ondhem kalaban kobasa ban kamolja'an se talebat rajana. 
Matthew24:31 Tarompet se raja bakal epamonyeya ban Pottrana Manossa bakal makona kat-malaekadda makompol ommadda dhari padduna bume se pa'-empa', dhari konco'na langnge' se settong ka konco' settongnga.”" 
Matthew24:32 “Kala', ra, pangajaran dhari bungkana ara. Mon ca'-ranca'na la biru ban lembu', sarta molae nyemme, ba'na tao ja' la para' mosem panas." 
Matthew24:33 Bariya keya mon ba'na nangale'e kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan jareya, ba'na tao ja' baktona la ce' para'na." 
Matthew24:34 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya! Jareya kabbi bakal kadaddiyana sabellunna reng-oreng se odhi' sateya reya mate kabbi." 
Matthew24:35 Langnge' ban bume bakal mosna'a, tape Tang oca' bakal teptebba salanjangnga.”" 
Matthew24:36 “Tadha' se taowa bila are ban ejjamma, maske kat-malaekat e sowarga ta' tao keya, bariya keya Pottrana Allah, pera' Rama malolo se ngagali." 
Matthew24:37 Mon Pottrana Manossa la dhateng, kabadha'anna bakal padha'a ban jamanna Ennoh lamba'." 
Matthew24:38 Sabellunna banjir raja rowa, reng-oreng kan-ngakan ban ngenom, alake ban abine. Kantha jareya ros-terrosan sampe' napa' ka baktona Ennoh maso'a ka dhalem kapalla." 
Matthew24:39 E bakto banjir dhateng, reng-oreng jareya buru apangrasa badha kadaddiyan apa. Bariya keya kabadha'anna mon Pottrana Manossa rabu." 
Matthew24:40 E bakto jareya badha lalake' kadhuwa teppa'na alako e teggalla: se settong bakal egiba'a, settongnga bakal edina'a." 
Matthew24:41 Badha babine' dhadhuwa' teppa'na agilis gandum: Se settong bakal egiba'a, settongnga bakal edina'a." 
Matthew24:42 Daddi te-ngate, ya, sabab ba'na ta' tao bila Pangeranna ba'na se rabuwa." 
Matthew24:43 Kaenga'e, ya! Ja' sakenga oreng se andhi' bengko tao pokol barampa e baja malem maleng se dhatengnga, tanto oreng jareya ta' tedhung, me' olle maleng jareya ta' maso' ka bengkona." 
Matthew24:44 Daddi, ba'na kodu aya-sadhiya. Sabab Pottrana Manossa bakal rabuwa e bakto se bi' ba'na ta' eka-sangka.”" 
Matthew24:45 Dhabuna Isa pole, “Mon bariya, abdi se kemma se esto ban bicaksana? Iya areya se bi' lorana epadaddi kapalana di-abdi laenna, se esoro aberri' ngakan ka di-abdi laenna jareya teppa' baktona." 
Matthew24:46 Saapa sennengnga abdi jareya mon lorana mole, nemmo aba'na teppa'na ajalannagi lalakonna." 
Matthew24:47 Paparcaja, ya, bi' lorana jareya dhi'-andhi'na bakal eparcaja'agiya kabbi ka abdi jareya." 
Matthew24:48 Tape mon abdi jareya jahat, tanto ngoca' e dhalem atena," 
Matthew24:49 ‘Tang lora gi' abit se moleya,’ ban aba'na pas molae mokole di-abdi laenna, sarta kan-ngakan ban nom-enoman bi' reng-oreng se dujan mabu'." 
Matthew24:50 Saellana jareya lorana bakal dhatengnga e are ban bakto se ta' eka-sangka. 
Matthew24:51 Abdi jareya tanto pas eajar epamare bi' lorana ban ebuwang ka nga'-tengnga'anna reng-oreng monafik. Neng e jadhiya reng-oreng jareya bakal padha'a nanges ban nanggung kasangsara'an.” 
Matthew25:1 “Mon Pottrana Manossa rabu menangka Pangeran, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha paraban sapolo oreng ngala' damarra, laju mangkat ngamba'a pangantan lake'." 
Matthew25:2 Se kalema budhu ban se kalema bicaksana. 
Matthew25:3 Paraban se kalema se budhu gella' ngeba damar, tape ta' ngeba parsadhiya'anna mennya'." 
Matthew25:4 Dineng paraban se kalema se bicaksana ngeba damar ban mennya' parsadhiya'an. 
Matthew25:5 Pangantan lake'na tellat dhatengnga, daddi ban-paraban gella' pas ngantok, laju tatedhung." 
Matthew25:6 E tengnga malem buru badha oreng ra'-era'an, ‘Pangantan lake' dhateng! Mara amba'!’" 
Matthew25:7 Paraban se sapolo gella' jaga, laju ngodhi'i damarra bang-sebang." 
Matthew25:8 Ban-paraban se budhu gella' ngoca' ka se bicaksana, ‘Mara, ra, sengko' berri'i mennya'na sakone' bai, polana tang damar mateya.’" 
Matthew25:9 ‘Ta' bisa!’ ca'na ban-paraban se bicaksana gella', ‘dhaggi' sengko' ban ba'na padha kakorangan mennya'. Kassa' melle ka toko.’" 
Matthew25:10 Daddi ban-paraban se budhu gella' entar melle mennya'. Gi' teppa'na entar melle mennya' jareya, pangantan lake'na dhateng. Ban-paraban se kalema se la asadhiya e jadhiya laju maso' ka kennengnganna jang-onjangan abareng ban pangantan lake'na, saellana jareya labang pas etotop!" 
Matthew25:11 Saellana jareya ban-paraban laenna gella' dhateng, laju padha aera', ‘Guste! Guste! bukka'agi labangnga, kaula maso'a.’" 
Matthew25:12 Tape pangantan lake'na nyaot, ‘Sengko' ta' kennal ka ba'na!’ ”" 
Matthew25:13 Isa pas matotok parompama'anna jareya kalaban adhabu, “Daddi ba'na kodu aga-jaga, sabab ba'na ta' tao bila arena ban bila ejjamma.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Mon Pottrana Manossa rabu menangka Pangeran, kabadha'anna padha keya ban parompama'an reya. Badha oreng lalake' kasorang mangkada ka kennengngan se jau. Oreng jareya ngolok di-abdina, laju epassrae dhi'-andhi'na." 
Matthew25:15 Sabban abdi eberri'i menorot kakowadanna bang-sebang. Se settong eberri'i lema ebu obang emmas. Se settonganna eberri'i dhu ebu obang emmas. Ban se laenna eberri'i saebu obang emmas. Saellana jareya aba'na pas mangkat. 
Matthew25:16 Abdi se narema lema ebu obang emmas jareya duli entar adagang, laju olle kaontongan lema ebu obang emmas pole." 
Matthew25:17 Bariya keya abdi se narema dhu ebu obang emmas, saellana adagang pas olle kaontongan dhu ebu obang emmas." 
Matthew25:18 Tape abdina se narema saebu obang emmas gella' entar ngale lobang, obangnga lorana laju eerrep e jadhiya." 
Matthew25:19 Saellana abit se ajalanan, lora gella' mole, pas mabadha paretongan ban di-abdina." 
Matthew25:20 Abdi se narema lema ebu obang emmas nyander, pas massra'agi sapolo ebu. ‘Guste,’ atorra, ‘Panjennengngan massra'agi lema ebu obang emmas ka abdina. Ka'dhinto', abdina kengeng kaontongan lema ebu.’" 
Matthew25:21 ‘Bagus!’ ca'na lorana, ‘ba'na reya abdi se becce' ban esto. Sarrena ba'na ekenneng parcaja epassrae se sakone', bi' sengko' epassra'ana se abannya'an pole. Mara dha' enna' noro' anga-bunga bi' sengko'!’" 
Matthew25:22 Saellana jareya abdi se epassrae dhu ebu obang emmas nyander sarta mator, ‘Guste, panjennengngan massra'agi dhu ebu obang emmas ka abdina. Ka'dhinto', abdina kengeng kaontongan dhu ebu.’" 
Matthew25:23 ‘Bagus,’ ca'na lorana, ‘ba'na reya abdi se becce' ban esto. Sarrena ba'na ekenneng parcaja epassrae se sakone' bi' sengko' epassra'ana se abannya'an pole. Mara dha' enna', noro' anga-bunga bi' sengko'!’" 
Matthew25:24 Saellana jareya abdi se narema saebu obang emmas jarowa nyander, laju mator, ‘Guste, abdina oneng panjennengngan ka'dhinto' kerras. Panjennengngan ta' namen e settong kennengngan namong metthek buwana, panjennengngan ta' nabur ne-bine e settong kennengngan namong mondhut hasella." 
Matthew25:25 Abdina tako', daddi obangnga panjennengngan sareng abdina eerrep e dhalem tana. Ka'dhinto' obangngepon.’" 
Matthew25:26 ‘Ba'na reya abdi se jahat ban males!’ ca'na lorana. ‘Ba'na la tao ja' sengko' ta' namen e settong kennengngan tape metthek buwana, ban sengko' ta' nabur ne-bine e settong kennengngan tape ngala' hasella." 
Matthew25:27 Daddi masthena, ba'na nyaba' tang obang jareya e bank, sopaja mon sengko' mole, sengko' bisa narema tang obang jareya ban budhu'na." 
Matthew25:28 Sateya, kala' obang jareya dhari oreng reya, bagi ka se andhi' sapolo ebu obang emmas gella'." 
Matthew25:29 Sabab oreng se la andhi', bakal eberri'ana pole, sampe' andhi'na oreng jareya bi-talebbi. Tape oreng se ta' andhi', andhi'na se la sakone' la'-mala' bakal ekala'a dhari aba'na." 
Matthew25:30 Ban abdi se ta' aguna jareya, kassa' buwang ka kennengngan se petteng e lowar. E dhissa' aba'na bakal nangesa ban bakal nanggunga kasangsara'an!’ ”" 
Matthew25:31 “Mon Pottrana Manossa rabu menangka Rato eerengngagi para malaekadda, Salerana bakal alenggiya e tahtana se molja." 
Matthew25:32 Sa-bangsa bakal epakompola kabbi e ajunanna. Sa-bangsa jareya bakal epalaena epadaddi dhuwa' padha ban oreng ngowan se malaen dumba dhari embi'. 
Matthew25:33 Reng-oreng se ajalannagi karsana Allah bakal epakompola e kanganna, ban se laen e kacerra." 
Matthew25:34 Rato jareya pas bakal adhabuwa ka reng-oreng se badha e kanganna, ‘Mara ba'na kabbi se eberkadi Tang Rama. Mara maso' ka dhalem Karaja'an se la esadhiya'agi kaangguy ba'na molae parmola'anna dunnya." 
Matthew25:35 Sabab e bakto Sengko' lapar, bi' ba'na eberri'i ngakan, ban e bakto Sengko' pelka', bi' ba'na eberri'i ngenom. Sengko' oreng manca ban ba'na narema Sengko' e bengkona." 
Matthew25:36 Sengko' ta' akalambi, bi' ba'na eberri'i kalambi. Sengko' sake', bi' ba'na erabat. Sengko' epenjara, bi' ba'na esapot.’" 
Matthew25:37 Reng-oreng se becce' jareya bakal nyaoda, ‘Guste, bilaepon abdina nengale Junandalem lapar pas ngatore teddha'an ka Junandalem, otaba nengale Junandalem pelka' laju ngatore aeng dha'ar ka Junandalem?" 
Matthew25:38 Bilaepon abdidalem nengale Junandalem menangka oreng manca, laju narema Junandalem e compo'? Otabana nengale Junandalem ta' ngagem rasogan laju ngatore rasogan ka Junandalem?" 
Matthew25:39 Bilaepon abdidalem nengale Junandalem songkan otaba epenjara laju nyapot Junandalem?’ 
Matthew25:40 Rato jareya bakal adhabuwa, ‘Ba'na, ebala'ana ya: mon ba'na ngalakone jareya ka sala settong dhari Tang taretan se paleng nespa, artena ba'na ngalakone jareya ka Sengko'!’" 
Matthew25:41 Rato jareya pas bakal adhabuwa ka reng-oreng se badha e kacerra, ‘Kassa' ondur dhari dhinna', la'nat! Kassa' maso' ka dhalem apoy se ta' bisa mate se la esadhiya'agi kaangguy Iblis ban kat-malaekadda!" 
Matthew25:42 Sabab e bakto Sengko' lapar bi' ba'na ta' eberri'i ngakan; e bakto Sengko' pelka' bi' ba'na ta' eberri'i ngenom. 
Matthew25:43 E bakto Sengko' oreng manca bi' ba'na ta' etarema e bengkona. E bakto Sengko' ta' akalambi bi' ba'na ta' eberri'i kalambi. E bakto Sengko' sake' ban epenjara bi' ba'na ta' erabat.’ 
Matthew25:44 Reng-oreng jareya pas bakal atanya'a ka rato jareya, ‘Guste, bilaepon abdidalem nengale Junandalem lapar, otaba pelka', otaba menangka oreng manca, otaba ta' ngangguy rasogan otaba songkan sareng epenjara, abdidalem ta' poron nolong Junandalem?’" 
Matthew25:45 Rato jareya bakal adhabuwa, ‘Ba'na, ebala'ana ya: mon ba'na ta' endha' nolong sala settong dhari Tang taretan se paleng nespa, artena ba'na ta' endha' nolong Sengko'.’" 
Matthew25:46 Daddi reng-oreng jareya bakal eokoma bi' okoman se langgeng, dineng reng-oreng se ajalannagi kasokanna Allah bakal olleya odhi' se saongguna ban langgeng.”" 
Matthew26:1 Saellana mare morok parkara jareya kabbi, Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda," 
Matthew26:2 “Ba'na tao dhu are aggi' Are Raja Paska, ban Pottrana Manossa bakal epassra'agiya kaangguy esalib.”" 
Matthew26:3 E bakto jareya mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi teppa'na akompol e karatonna Imam Agung Kayafas. 
Matthew26:4 Reng-oreng jareya aparembagan; Isa epega'a tape ta' asa'-kasa'a, laju epateyana." 
Matthew26:5 “Tape,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “mon mega'a ja' teppa'na paraya'an, sabab dhaggi' ra'yat pas baridhu.”" 
Matthew26:6 E naleka settong are Isa badha e Betania e bengkona Simon, iya areya oreng se tao sake' kole' budhuk." 
Matthew26:7 Teppa'na Isa adha'ar, pas badha oreng babine' entar ka jadhiya ngeba butol dhari marmar, aesse mennya' ro'om se larang. Mennya' jareya bi' babine' buru eserammagi ka serana Isa." 
Matthew26:8 Red-moredda Isa nangale'e jareya, laju gigir. “Apa gunana wang-mowang cara jareya?” ca'na red-mored buru." 
Matthew26:9 “Mennya' ro'om jareya ekenneng juwal, argana larang, ban pessena ekenneng bagi ka oreng mesken!”" 
Matthew26:10 Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna red-moredda jareya, daddi pas adhabu, “Arapa ba'na ma' masossa babine' reya? Babine' reya ngalakone barang se bagus ban pantes ealem kaangguy Sengko'." 
Matthew26:11 Oreng mesken ros-terrosan badha e antarana ba'na, tape Sengko' ta' salanjangnga apolong ban ba'na." 
Matthew26:12 Kalaban nyerame Tang badan bi' mennya' ro'om, babine' reya maranta Sengko' se ekoburragiya." 
Matthew26:13 Paparcaja, ya! Neng e dhimma'a bai e dunnya reya mon Kabar Bagus eberta'agi, lalakonna babine' reya bakal ecareta'agiya keya kaangguy ngenga'e aba'na.”" 
Matthew26:14 Saellana jareya sala settong dhari moredda Isa se dhubellas se anyama Yudas Iskariyot, entar ka mam-imam kapala." 
Matthew26:15 Oca'na Yudas ka reng-oreng jareya, “Kaula eparengngana ponapa manabi kaula massra'agi Isa ka sampeyan?” Reng-oreng jareya pas ngetong pesse salaka tello polo, laju ebagi ka Yudas." 
Matthew26:16 Molae dhari bakto jareya Yudas nyare kasempadan se massra'agiya Isa ka mam-imam kapala jareya. 
Matthew26:17 E are se kapeng settong e dhalem Paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i, red-moredda Isa nyander ka Salerana laju atanya, “Dhadha'aran Paska kaagem Panjennengngan esadhiya'agiya e ka'imma?”" 
Matthew26:18 Dhabuna Isa, “Kassa' entar ka settong oreng se badha e kottha, pas ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Dhabuna Guru, Tang bakto la napa'; Sengko' ban Tang red-mored terro araya'agiya Paska e bengkona ba'na.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Red-moredda Isa ajalannagi pa-apa se edhabuwagi Isa jareya, sarta laju nyadhiya'agi dhadha'aran Paska jareya." 
Matthew26:20 Saellana malem, Isa ban moredda se ka dhubellas oreng jareya alenggi adha'ar." 
Matthew26:21 Teppa'na adha'ar, Isa adhabu, “Edhingngagi: e antarana ba'na badha se akiyanadana Sengko'.”" 
Matthew26:22 Ngedhing jareya, red-moredda Isa padha sossa, laju padha ate-gante atanya ka Isa, “Tantona banne abdina se emaksod sareng Panjennengngan, ta' enggi?”" 
Matthew26:23 Isa adhabu, “Oreng se nyabbur rotina ka dhalem tobung abareng ban Sengko', jareya se akiyanadana Sengko'." 
Matthew26:24 Pajat Pottrana Manossa bakal seda'a akantha se la etoles e dhalem Alketab. Tape calaka' oreng se akiyanadi Pottrana Manossa jareya! Lebbi becce' mon oreng jareya ta' elahirragi!” 
Matthew26:25 Yudas se tokang kiyanat laju mator, “Tantona banne abdina se emaksod sareng Panjennengngan, ta' enggi?” Dhabuna Isa, “Kantha oca'na ba'na dibi'.”" 
Matthew26:26 Teppa'na Isa ban red-moredda padha adha'ar, Isa mondhut roti sakerra', laju asokkor ka Allah. Saellana jareya roti buru ethok-ketthok bi' astana laju eparengngagi ka red-moredda sambi adhabu, “Mara kala', pas kakan; areya' Tang badan.”" 
Matthew26:27 Saellana jareya Isa pas mondhut tobung se aesse anggur, laju asokkor ka Allah. Tobung jareya pas eparengngagi ka red-moredda, sambi adhabu, “Mara ba'na ngenom kabbi." 
Matthew26:28 Sabab reya Tang dhara se maessa parjanjiyanna Allah – dhara se epangalocor kaangguy oreng bannya' sopaja dusana esapora. 
Matthew26:29 Paparcaja, ya: Sengko' ta' ngenoma anggur reya pole sampe' baktona sengko' ngenom anggur se anyar ban ba'na kabbi e Dunnyana Tang Rama Se Anyar.”" 
Matthew26:30 Saellana jareya Isa ban red-moredda pas padha ngejung amolja'agi Allah. Samarena pas padha meyos ka Gumo' Jaitun. 
Matthew26:31 Isa pas adhabu ka red-moredda, “E malem reya keya ba'na bakal padha'a buru adina'agi Sengko'; sabab e dhalem Alketab la esebbuttagi: Allah adhabu, ‘Oreng ngowan jareya bi' Sengko' epateyana, ban ba-dumbana bakal asalebbudana.’" 
Matthew26:32 Tape saellana Sengko' epaodhi' pole, Sengko' ajangadha'ana ba'na entara ka Galilea.”" 
Matthew26:33 Petrus mator ka Isa, “Sanare se laen adinggallagi Panjennengngan, abdina bunten!”" 
Matthew26:34 “Kaenga'e, ya,” dhabuna Isa ka Petrus, “E malem reya keya, sabellunna ajam akongko', ba'na la bakal mongkerana Sengko' tello kale.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petrus nyaot, “Sanare abdina kodu mate asareng Panjennengngan, abdina ta' kera ngoca' ta' kennal ka Panjennengngan!” Ban red-moredda se laen ngoca' kantha jareya kabbi." 
Matthew26:36 Saellana jareya Isa ban red-moredda pas meyos ka settong kennengngan se anyama Getsemani. E jadhiya Isa adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Ba'na toju' e dhinna' gallu, Sengko' entara adu'a.”" 
Matthew26:37 Isa pas ngajak Petrus ban ana'na Zebedeyus, epakon ngereng. Salerana molae arassa sossa ban ngalengsang," 
Matthew26:38 laju adhabu ka se katello gella', “Tang ate ce' sossana, rassana Sengko' reya akantha se mateya. Ba'na neng e dhinna', ya, ban aga-jaga ban Sengko'.”" 
Matthew26:39 Isa pas alomampa abak ka dhalemman, laju asojud sampe' ka tana sarta adu'a, “Rama,” dhabuna, “manabi kengeng, jauwagi dhari Abdidalem kasangsara'an se kodu etanggung Abdidalem ka'dhinto'. Namong menorot kasokannepon Junandalem, banne menorot karep Abdidalem.”" 
Matthew26:40 Isa pas abali ka moredda se katello ban se katello jareya etemmo tedhung. Dhabuna Isa ka Petrus, “Pera' saejjam balakka' ba'na ta' bisa aga-jaga bi' Sengko', ya?" 
Matthew26:41 Mara, ra, aga-jaga ban nyo'on ka Allah sopaja ba'na ja' sampe' ekenneng coba. Pajat errohna ba'na endha' ajalannagi barang se bendher tape ba'na ta' bisa, sabab tabi'adda manossa reya ta' kowat.”" 
Matthew26:42 Isa pas adu'a kadhukaleyanna, dhabuna, “Rama, manabi kasangsara'an ka'dhinto' kodu etanggung sareng Abdidalem, sareng ta' kengeng ejauwagi, eatore kadi ponapa kasokanna Junandalem.”" 
Matthew26:43 Isa pas abali pole, ban red-moredda jareya etemmo gi' paggun tedhung sabab talebat ngantok." 
Matthew26:44 Isa adinggallagi red-moredda jareya sakaleyan aggi' ban adu'a katellokaleyanna ngangguy ca'-oca' se padha ban du'ana se jang adha'an. 
Matthew26:45 Saellana jareya Isa pas abali pole ka red-moredda laju adhabu, “Ba'na gi' tedhung ban aistirahat? Abassagi, ra, sateya la baktona Pottrana Manossa epassra'agi ka kobasana reng-oreng se daraka." 
Matthew26:46 Mara jaga, kalowar dhari dhinna'. Abas! Oreng se akiyanadi Sengko' la dhateng!”" 
Matthew26:47 Teppa'na Isa gi' abu-dhabu, Yudas, sala settong e antarana red-moredda se dhubellas rowa dhateng. Yudas jareya abareng ban oreng sabannya'na se ngeba peddhang ban thong-penthong. Reng-oreng jareya esoro mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi." 
Matthew26:48 Oreng se akiyanat jareya la ajanji aberri'a tandha cara reya, “Oreng se eseyom kaula, ganeka se esare sampeyan. Pas pega'!”" 
Matthew26:49 Gi' buru napa' ka jadhiya, Yudas terros nyander ka Isa laju ngoca', “Salam, Pa' Guru!” pas terros nyeyom Isa." 
Matthew26:50 Dhabuna Isa, “Taretan, arapa'a ba'na dha' enna'?” Oreng se sabannya'na gella' pas nyander ka adha', terros nangkep Isa." 
Matthew26:51 Sala settong dhari moredda se badha e seddi'na Isa ngonos peddhangnga pas mokol dunorra imam agung se badha e jadhiya sampe' kopengnga kotthong. 
Matthew26:52 Isa adhabu ka moredda jareya, “Maso'agi peddhangnga jareya ka barangkana, sabab oreng se aguna'agi peddhangnga bakal mateya bi' peddhang." 
Matthew26:53 Apa ba'na ta' tao ja' Sengko' bisa menta tolong ka Tang Rama, ban sateya keya Sengko' bisa ekereme lebbi dhari dhubellas pasukanna tantara malaekat?" 
Matthew26:54 Tape mon kantha jareya, baramma se kalakona akantha se la eramallagi e dhalem Alketab ja' pajat kodu kalakon kantha se sateya reya?”" 
Matthew26:55 Isa pas adhabu ka oreng se sabannya'na jareya, “Arapa ba'na me' dha' enna' ngeba peddhang ban thong-penthong pera' parlo nangkebba Sengko'? Apa Sengko' reya oreng jahat? Sabban are Sengko' ngajar e Padalemman Socce, tape ba'na ta' endha' nangkep Sengko'!" 
Matthew26:56 Tape pajat kodu kantha jareya sopaja kalakon pa-apa se etoles bi-nabbi e dhalem Alketab.” Saellana jareya red-moredda buru ondur, Isa edina'agi." 
Matthew26:57 Saellana etangkep bi' reng-oreng gella' Isa pas egiba ka bengkona Imam Agung Kayafas. E jadhiya ru-guru agama ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Yahudi la padha akompol. 
Matthew26:58 Petrus noro' bunte' Isa dhari jauna sampe' gan taneyanna imam agung. Sanapa'na ka taneyan jareya laju toju' apolong ban wal-pangawal. Aba'na terro taowa baramma dhi-budhina daddina jareya kabbi. 
Matthew26:59 Mam-imam kapala ban sakabbiyanna Mahkamah Agama aehteyar nyare katerrangan palsu sopaja bisa'a ngokom mate Isa," 
Matthew26:60 tape settonga ta' nemmo, maske bannya' oreng se maju daddi sakse palsu. Dhi-budhina badha oreng kadhuwa se nyander ka adha'," 
Matthew26:61 pas ngoca', “Oreng ka'dhinto' ngoca', ‘Sengko' magujura Padalemman Socce reya, ban e dhalem bakto tello are bi' Sengko' la epamareya epaddek pole.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Imam agung jareya pas manjeng, laju ngoca' ka Isa, “Apa ba'na ta' nyambidana se earannagi ka ba'na reya?”" 
Matthew26:63 Tape Isa mendel malolo. Imam agung ngoca' sakaleyan aggi', “Bit asmana Allah se odhi', mara ngoca', apa ba'na reya Rato Panyalamet, Pottrana Allah?”" 
Matthew26:64 Isa adhabu, “Akantha oca'na ba'na dibi'. Tape paparcaja, ya: molae dhari sateya, ba'na bakal nangaleyana Pottrana Manossa alenggi e kanganna Allah Se Mahakobasa, ban rabu e attassa ondhem e langnge'!”" 
Matthew26:65 Imam agung jareya pas bit-nyebbit kalambina dibi', laju ngoca', “Oreng reya metenna Allah! Ta' parlo nyare sakse pole. Sampeyan ampon padha meyarsa dibi' ca'-oca'na se metenna Allah." 
Matthew26:66 Samangken kadi ponapa pamanggina sampeyan sadaja?” Saodda reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Oreng ganeka sala, sareng kodu pate'e.”" 
Matthew26:67 Saellana jareya bi' reng-oreng jareya Isa pas ecopae raena sarta epokole. Badha keya se namper 
Matthew26:68 sambi ngoca', “Kodda' tebbak ban ngoca', he Rato Panyalamet! Sapa se namper ba'na buru?”" 
Matthew26:69 Petrus teppa'na toju' e lowar, e taneyan. Sala settong dhari para abdi babine' se badha e jadhiya entar ka jadhiya pas ngoca' ka Petrus, “Sampeyan gu ta' asareng Isa oreng Galilea ka'issa', enggi?”" 
Matthew26:70 Tape Petrus mongker e adha'na reng-oreng jareya kabbi. “Kaula ta' ngarte se ekamaksod sampeyan,” Petrus nyaot," 
Matthew26:71 pas ngalle ka labangnga taneyan. Pas badha abdi babine' laen se nangale'e Petrus, laju ngoca' ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Oreng paneka gella' abareng bi' Isa dhari Nazaret ka'issa'.”" 
Matthew26:72 Petrus mongker pole sambi ngoca', “Onggu, kaula ta' kennal ka oreng ganeka!”" 
Matthew26:73 Sakejja' aggi' reng-oreng se manjeng e jadhiya nyander ka Petrus, laju ngoca', “Tantona sampeyan sala settong dhari moredda. Katara dhari pacacana sampeyan.”" 
Matthew26:74 Petrus pas apa-sompa sarta ngoca', “Kaula ta' oneng ka oreng ganeka!” E bakto jareya keya ajam akongko'." 
Matthew26:75 Ban Petrus pas enga' ja' Isa la adhabu ka aba'na, “Sabellunna ajam akongko' ba'na bakal mongkerana Sengko' tello kale.” Petrus pas kalowar, ban nanges ce' ngennessa." 
Matthew27:1 Gi' gu-laggu, mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi la motose mateyana Isa." 
Matthew27:2 Isa ekalenthong, pas egiba, epassra'agi ka Pilatus, gubennorra pamarenta'an Roma." 
Matthew27:3 E bakto Yudas se akiyanat rowa nangale'e Isa la epotose okomanna, pas kasta, laju mabali pesse salakana se tello polo rowa ka mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi." 
Matthew27:4 Oca'na, “Kaula dusa akiyanadi oreng se ta' andhi' sala, sampe' eokom mate!” “La ta' tao, ra. Jareya orosanna ba'na dibi'!” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew27:5 Yudas melpallagi pesse jareya ka dhalem Padalemman Socce, laju ondur pas mate aradda'." 
Matthew27:6 Mam-imam kapala mele pesse jareya laju ngoca', “Pesse paneka pesse dhara. Menorot hokomma agama, pesse paneka ta' kengeng maso'agi ka kennengnganna tor-ator e Padalemman Socce.”" 
Matthew27:7 Saellana mopakat se aparembagan, pesse jareya pas ekabelli tana se enyamae Tanana Tokang Polo'. Tana jareya ekagabay koburanna reng-oreng manca." 
Matthew27:8 Jareya sababba arapa tana jareya sampe' sateya ma' enyamae “Tana Dhara.” 
Matthew27:9 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya kalakon apa se edhabuwagi Nabbi Yeremiya, “Reng-oreng jareya narema tello polo pesse salaka, iya areya arga se la emopakadi bi' bangsa Isra'il menangka kabellina Salerana." 
Matthew27:10 Ban pesse jareya bi' reng-oreng buru ekabelli tanana tokang polo', akantha se la edhabuwagi Pangeran ka sengko'.”" 
Matthew27:11 E bakto Isa egiba ngadhep ka Pilatus gubennor pamarenta'an Roma jareya, atanya, “Apa ba'na ratona oreng Yahudi?” “Panjennengngan ampon adhabu dibi',” dhabuna Isa." 
Matthew27:12 Tape e bakto mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi nyebbuttagi parkara sabannya'na se earannagi ka Isa, Isa pas ta' abu-dhabu pa-apa sakale." 
Matthew27:13 Daddi Pilatus mator ka Isa, “Apa ba'na ta' ngedhing da'wa'anna reng-oreng rowa ka ba'na?”" 
Matthew27:14 Tape Isa ta' kasokan adhabu pa-apa pole sampe' gubennor jareya ce' heranna. 
Matthew27:15 Sabban Paraya'an Paska, gubennor biyasana mabebas oreng tahanan menorot peleyanna oreng bannya'." 
Matthew27:16 E bakto jareya badha settong oreng okoman se kasohor. Nyamana Isa Barabbas. 
Matthew27:17 Daddi e bakto la bannya' oreng se akompol, Pilatus atanya ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na menta'a sapa se epabebasa sateya, Isa Barabbas otabana Isa se esebbut Almasih?”" 
Matthew27:18 Pilatus ngoca' kantha jareya sabab tao ja' reng-oreng Yahudi se neggu' kakobasa'an massra'agi Isa ka aba'na polana denggi. 
Matthew27:19 E bakto Pilatus teppa'na alenggi e balai pangadilan, rajina akerem pessen kantha reya, “Ba'na ja' ro'-noro' nyampore orosanna oreng se tadha' salana jareya, sabab polana oreng jareya, sengko' malemma amempe se talebat nako'e.”" 
Matthew27:20 Tape mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi terros nas-manase oreng se bannya' jareya sopaja menta ka Pilatus kaangguy mabebas Barabbas ban ngokom mate Isa.
