Matthew27:21 Gubennor jareya pas adhabu pole ka reng-oreng buru, “Dhari oreng se kadhuwa jareya, se kemma se epenta'a ba'na kaangguy epabebas bi' sengko'?” “Barabbas,” saodda reng-oreng jareya." 
Matthew27:22 “Mon bariya, epabaramma'a bi' sengko' Isa se esebbut Almasih reya?” dhabuna Pilatus ka reng-oreng se bannya' gella'. “Salib!” ca'na saodda reng-oreng jareya kabbi." 
Matthew27:23 Tape Pilatus atanya, “Tape apa kajahadanna?” Reng-oreng gella' pas aera' jang kaja'an pole, “Salib!”" 
Matthew27:24 Dhi-budhina Pilatus tao ja' salerana ta' bisa apa-rapa pole, ban olle daddi reng-oreng jareya bisa aberonta'. Daddi Pilatus laju mondhut aeng, maccowe astana e adha'na oreng bannya' laju adhabu, “Sengko' ta' ro'-noro'a nanggung sedana oreng reya! Jareya orosanna ba'na!”" 
Matthew27:25 Oreng se bannya' jareya padha nyaot, “Dinggal abdina sareng na'-ana' abdina se nanggunga okoman polana mate'e oreng gapaneka!”" 
Matthew27:26 Daddi bi' Pilatus Barabbas epabebas polana jareya se epenta oreng bannya', dineng Isa epakon peccot, pas epassra'agi kaangguy esalib." 
Matthew27:27 Saellana jareya bi' rit-parjuridda Pilatus Isa egiba maso' ka karatonna gubennor, ban sakabbiyanna pasukan padha akompol e sakalenglengnga Isa." 
Matthew27:28 Rasoganna Isa ebukka', laju epangagem juba bungo terrong." 
Matthew27:29 Rit-parjurit jareya agabay makotha dhari ca'-ranca' se ari-dhuri, laju epasang ka serana Isa. Astana se kangan epangastane tongket, ban reng-oreng jareya pas asojud e ajunanna sambi co-ngoco, “Mator sandika ka'dhinto' Guste, Ratona Oreng Yahudi!”" 
Matthew27:30 Isa ecopae, tongkedda ekala', epokollagi ka serana." 
Matthew27:31 Saellana mare ekaen-maenan, jubana se bungo terrong ebukka', pas epangagem rasoganna dibi' pole. Saellana jareya Isa pas egiba kalowar esaliba." 
Matthew27:32 E tengnga jalan, reng-oreng jareya tatemmo ban oreng dhari Kirene nyamana Simon. Simon jareya epaksa epamekol salibba Isa." 
Matthew27:33 Reng-oreng jareya pas napa' ka settong kennengngan se anyama Golgota, se artena “Kennengnganna Galunthonganna Cethak”." 
Matthew27:34 E jadhiya Isa eatore adha'ar anggur se ecampore kalengmaddu. Tape saellana anggur jareya ecepcep, bi' Isa ta' edha'ar." 
Matthew27:35 Saellana jareya Isa pas esalib; rasoganna eellot egi-bagi e antarana reng-oreng jareya. 
Matthew27:36 Samarena, reng-oreng jareya pas toju' ajaga Isa e jadhiya." 
Matthew27:37 E attassa serana Isa epobuwi tolesan se noduwagi parkara se earannagi ka salerana, se monyena kantha reya: “Areya' Isa, Ratona Oreng Yahudi”." 
Matthew27:38 Badha keya oreng laen kadhuwa, iya areya rampok raja, se esalib epabareng ban Isa; se settong esaba' e kanganna, settongnga esaba' e kacerra." 
Matthew27:39 Reng-oreng se lebat e jadhiya pek-kepeggan, ca'-ngoca'e Isa." 
Matthew27:40 Oca'na, “Ba'na se magujura Padalemman Socce, pas maddegga pole epamareya e dhalem tello are! Mon ba'na pajat Pottrana Allah, mara toron dhari kaju salib jareya, pasalamet aba'na dibi'!”" 
Matthew27:41 Bariya keya mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama sarta pin-pamimpin Yahudi ya-nyeya Isa. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya," 
Matthew27:42 “Reng-oreng laen epasalamet, tape ta' bisa masalamet aba'na dibi'! Mon Isa jareya pajat rato Isra'il, dina sateya ma' olle toron dhari kaju salibba, buru sengko' parcaja." 
Matthew27:43 Aba'na parcaja ka Allah, sarta ngako Pottrana Allah. Sateya mara tenggu ba' etolonga bi' Allah.”" 
Matthew27:44 La'-mala' pok-rampok se epabareng esalib e jadhiya noro' ya-nyeya Isa kantha jareya keya. 
Matthew27:45 E baja beddhuk sanagara jareya petteng calemodan, sampe' tello ejjam abidda." 
Matthew27:46 Pokol tello' asar, Isa aera' ce' kajana, “Eli, Eli, lama sabakhtani?” se artena, “Ya Allah, Ya Allah, aponapa Abdidalem me' edinggallagi?”" 
Matthew27:47 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya badha se ngedhing paera'na jareya, laju ngoca', “Oreng rowa ngolok Eliya!”" 
Matthew27:48 E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha kasorang se duliyan ngala' seppon, ecelluppagi ka anggur se celo'. Seppon jareya pas ejujjuwagi ka konco'na kaju, sarta ejuluwagi ka lathena Isa." 
Matthew27:49 Tape reng-oreng laenna ngoca', “Nante' gallu, mara tenggu pola Eliya me' dhateng masalamet aba'na!”" 
Matthew27:50 Saellana jareya Isa aera' pole epakaja, pas anaza'." 
Matthew27:51 Bir-tabir se agantong e Padalemman Socce sebbit madhuwa dhari attas ka baba. Bume agundhek ban nong-gunong maroka. 
Matthew27:52 Kam-makam bungkar, ban bannya' ommadda Allah se la mate odhi' pole." 
Matthew27:53 Saellana Isa odhi' pole kabbi padha kalowar dhari koburanna, laju padha entar ka Yerusalim, etangale'e oreng bannya' e jadhiya." 
Matthew27:54 Kapalana pasukan ban rit-parjurit se ajaga Isa padha katako'en e bakto nangale'e badha lendhu ban pa-apa se kadaddiyan e are jareya. Reng-oreng jareya padha ngoca', “Oreng reya Pottrana Allah onggu!”" 
Matthew27:55 E jadhiya bannya' keya babine'an se ngabas dhari jauna. Babine'an jareya noro' bunte' ban nolonge Isa molae dhari Galilea. 
Matthew27:56 E antarana iya areya Miriyam Magdalena, Miriyam ebuna Yakobus ban Yusup, ban ebuna na'-ana'na Zebedeyus." 
Matthew27:57 E malem jareya badha oreng sogi dhari Arimateya napa' ka jadhiya; nyamana Yusup, moredda Isa keya." 
Matthew27:58 Yusup entar ka Pilatus, menta jinazana Isa. Bi' Pilatus esoro bagi." 
Matthew27:59 Daddi bi' Yusup jinaza jareya ekala', pas ebundu' bi' kaen linen se anyar," 
Matthew27:60 laju esaba' e makam se ekagabay e dhalem settong gumo' bato se esadhiya'agi kaangguy aba'na dibi'. Saellana jareya lobangnga koburanna pas etotop, egulu'i bato se raja, ban Yusup laju mole." 
Matthew27:61 Miriyam Magdalena ban Miriyam settonganna toju' e jadhiya addhep ka makam jareya. 
Matthew27:62 Kalagguwanna, e are Sabat, mam-imam kapala ban reng-oreng Farisi areng-bareng ngadhep ka Pilatus" 
Matthew27:63 laju mator, “Towan, abdina emot ja' gi' odhi'na oreng ka'dhissa' oneng ngoca', ‘E are se kapeng tello' Sengko' jaga'a dhari kobur.’" 
Matthew27:64 Daddi, koburanna pakonnagi jaga pagu-onggu kantos are se kapeng tello', manabi ta' kadi ka'dhinto' tako' jinazaepon ekeco' sareng red-moredda pas ebar-kabarragi ja' oreng gapaneka ampon odhi' pole. Tepowan se jang budhiyan gapaneka ajuba'an dhari se jang adha'an.”" 
Matthew27:65 “Ba'na andhi' tantara pangawal,” dhabuna Pilatus ka reng-oreng jareya, “kassa' jaga pagu-onggu makam jareya.”" 
Matthew27:66 Daddi mam-imam kapala ban reng-oreng Farisi jareya pas mangkat ka koburan gella', bato totobba esegel ban e adha'na esaba'i panjaga'an, sopaja makam jareya ta' eli-guli oreng." 
Matthew28:1 Saellana are Sabat la lebat, e are Ahad gi' petteng, Miriyam Magdalena ban Miriyam settonganna entar ka koburan jareya." 
Matthew28:2 O-tao laju badha lendhu se ce' rajana. Badha malaekadda Pangeran settong toron dhari sowarga laju magulu' bato panotobba makam gella', terros alenggi e attassa." 
Matthew28:3 Robana malaekat jareya padha ban dhap-keddhap, dineng rasoganna ce' potena." 
Matthew28:4 Tantara se ajaga e jadhiya katako'en sampe' ngetter, ban akantha oreng mate." 
Matthew28:5 Dhabuna malaekat jareya ka babine'an gella', “Ba'na ta' osa tako'! Sengko' tao ba'na padha nyare Isa se esalib rowa." 
Matthew28:6 Sateya la tadha' e dhinna', la abungo akantha se la edhabuwagi dibi' sabbanna. Mara dha' enna', reya' abas kennengnganna pasareyanna." 
Matthew28:7 Sateya, kassa' ba'na duli entar ka red-moredda, kabala kantha reya, ‘Isa ampon abungo, ban samangken meyos ka Galilea ajangadha'i sampeyan. E ka'dhissa' sampeyan bakal tapanggiya sareng Salerana!’ Kaenga'e apa se la ekoca'agi sengko' ka ba'na reya.”" 
Matthew28:8 Babine'an jareya duli nyengga dhari makam jareya. Atena arassa tako' acampor gumbira, kabbi padha ka'-berka' entara malae red-moredda parkara jareya." 
Matthew28:9 O-tao Isa etemmo manggi'i babine'an jareya, pas adhabu, “Salam!” Babine'an jareya nyander nyemma'e Isa, laju agellu' padana ban nyemba ka Salerana." 
Matthew28:10 “Ta' osa tako',” ca'na dhabuna ka reng-oreng jareya, “kassa' kabala ka Tang tan-taretan, soro padha entar ka Galilea; e dhissa' reng-oreng jareya bakal tatemmowa ban Sengko'.”" 
Matthew28:11 Sabatara babine'an gella' ajalan, tantara se ajaga makam gella' badha se padha entar abali ka kottha, areppot ka mam-imam kapala parkara sakabbiyanna kadaddiyan gella'." 
Matthew28:12 Mam-imam kapala aparembagan ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi; tantara se ajaga gella' padha eberri'i pesse sabannya'na," 
Matthew28:13 laju ebalai kantha reya, “Ba'na kodu ngoca' ja' red-moredda Isa entar ka makamma e bakto malem, sarta ngeco' jinazana teppa'na ba'na padha tedhung." 
Matthew28:14 Ban mon parkara jareya epeyarsa gubennor, ban sengko' ecaca'ana me' olle parcaja ban ba'na me' olle ta' nemmo karekongan pa-apa.”" 
Matthew28:15 Tantara se ajaga jareya nampane pesse gella', ban ajalannagi akantha se epessennagi ka aba'na. Daddi sampe' sateya careta jareya gi' ekacaca e kalanganna oreng Yahudi." 
Matthew28:16 Moredda Isa se sabellas oreng padha entar ka gumo' e Galilea akantha se la edhabuwagi Isa. 
Matthew28:17 E bakto nangale'e Isa, red-moredda pas padha asojud abakte. Tape e antarana red-mored jareya gi' badha se mangmang atena." 
Matthew28:18 Isa pas nyander ka seddi'na red-moredda jareya, laju adhabu, “Sakabbiyanna kobasa e sowarga ban e bume la epassra'agi ka Sengko'." 
Matthew28:19 Daddi mara entar ka sakabbiyanna bangsa e sabingkerra dunnya, padaddi Tang mored kabbi. Baptis sakabbiyanna bangsa jareya kalaban nyebbut asmana Rama ban Pottra ban Errohna Allah." 
Matthew28:20 Ajari kabbi sopaja padha'a ta'at ka pa-apa se la eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na. Ban kaenga'e, ya, Sengko' abarengngana ba'na terros sampe' are keyamat.”" 
Mark1:1 Areya' Kabar Bagus parkara Isa Almasih, Pottrana Allah." 
Mark1:2 Kabar Bagus jareya emolae akantha se etoles bi' Nabbi Yesaya, iya areya, “ ‘Areya' Tang otosan,’ dhabuna Allah; ‘Bi' Sengko' eotos ajangadha'i ba'na, sopaja ababat jalan kaangguy ba'na.’" 
Mark1:3 Badha oreng ra'-era'an e sagara beddhi, ‘Sadhiya'agi jalan kaagem Pangeran; parata'agi lan-jalan se elebadana Salerana.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Yahya pajat bendher kalowar e ra-ara, akantha se la etoles bi' nabbi gella'. Yahya jareya abaptis reng-oreng ban manapa' berta dhari Allah. “Ba'na kodu atobat dhari sa-dusana, ban kodu ebaptis, sopaja ba'na esapora bi' Allah,” dhabuna Yahya jareya." 
Mark1:5 Bannya' oreng dhari nagara Yudea ban dhari kottha Yerusalim entar ngedhingngagi Yahya. Reng-oreng jareya ngakone sa-dusana, ban Yahya abaptis reng-oreng jareya e Songay Yordan." 
Mark1:6 Rasoganna Yahya jareya dhari buluna onta. Sabbu'na dhari kole', ban se edha'ar balang ban maddu alas." 
Mark1:7 Yahya jareya manapa' kabar reya ka oreng se bannya', “Saellana sengko' reya bakal rabuwa oreng se araja'an dhari sengko'. Mokka'a talena sapatuna bai sengko' ta' pantes." 
Mark1:8 Sengko' abaptis ba'na ngangguy aeng, tape oreng jareya abaptisa ba'na ngangguy Errohna Allah.”" 
Mark1:9 E bakto jareya Isa rabu dhari Nazaret e dhaera Galilea, laju ebaptis bi' Yahya e Songay Yordan." 
Mark1:10 E bakto gi' buru kalowar dhari songay jareya, Isa laju ngoladi langnge' abukka' ban Errohna Allah toron ka attassa Salerana aropa mano' dara." 
Mark1:11 Pas badha sowarana Allah dhari langnge' se adhabu kantha reya, “Ba'na Tang Ana' se kataresnan, se masenneng Tang ate.”" 
Mark1:12 Saellana jareya dhari kakowadanna Errohna Allah Isa laju meyos ka ra-ara sanatkala jareya. 
Mark1:13 Isa alenggi e jadhiya pa' polo are abidda, egudha Iblis. Neng e jadhiya badha keya run-burun alas, ban kat-malaekat rabu ka jadhiya aladine Salerana." 
Mark1:14 Saellana Yahya epenjara, Isa meyos ka Galilea, laju ngabarragi Kabar Bagus dhari Allah e jadhiya." 
Mark1:15 “Baktona la napa',” ca'na dhabuna, “Allah bakal duliya marenta. Mara atobat dhari sa-dusana, ban paparcaja ka Kabar Bagus dhari Allah!”" 
Mark1:16 E bakto alomampa e paseserra Talaga Galilea, e jadhiya Isa ngoladi badha oreng majang kadhuwa, iya areya Simon ban ale'na se anyama Andreyas. Se kadhuwa jareya teppa'na ajala juko' e talaga jareya." 
Mark1:17 Isa adhabu ka se kadhuwa jareya, “Mara noro' Sengko'. Bi' Sengko' ba'na eajarana ajala manossa.”" 
Mark1:18 Sanatkala jareya keya se kadhuwa buru pas ngereng Isa, jalana edina." 
Mark1:19 Isa alomampa terros, laju ngoladi badha oreng kadhuwa laenna, sataretan keya, nyamana Yakobus ban Yahya, na'-ana'na Zebedeyus. Se kadhuwa jareya teppa'na badha e dhalem paraona, mateppa' jalana." 
Mark1:20 Gi' buru eoladi bi' Isa terros edikane. Se kadhuwa jareya laju ngereng Isa. Eppa'na ban la-kabulana se padha badha e paraona edina'agi. 
Mark1:21 Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka kottha Kapernaum, ban e are Sabat samarena jareya laju meyos ka kennengnganna kabakteyan sarta pas morok e jadhiya." 
Mark1:22 Reng-oreng se ngedhingngagi padha kasambu' polana se morok kalaban kobasa, ta' akantha ru-guru agama." 
Mark1:23 E bakto jareya laju badha oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat maso' ka kennengnganna kabakteyan jareya, pas aera'," 
Mark1:24 “Adhu, Isa, oreng Nazaret, abdidalem ka'dhinto' padha epakadiya ponapa sareng Junandalem? Ponapa abdidalem epatompessa sadaja? Abdidalem oneng pasera Junandalem: Junandalem otosan se socce dhari Allah!”" 
Mark1:25 Isa abentak erroh jahat jareya. “Neng-enneng!” ca'na dhabuna. “Kalowar dhari oreng reya!” 
Mark1:26 Oreng gella' bi' erroh jahat jareya edhu-ondhu epasanta', saellana jareya erroh jahat buru laju kalowar dhari oreng jareya sambi atharat." 
Mark1:27 Reng-oreng se nangale'e jareya padha kasambu', sampe' padha ngoca' kantha reya, “Adhu, apa reya? Areya pangajaran anyar! Oreng reya kalaban kobasana marenta roh-erroh jahat epakon kalowar, ban roh-erroh jahat jareya atoro' ka dhabuna!”" 
Mark1:28 Kabar parkara Isa jareya ce' ceppedda balattra ka sabingkerra dhaera Galilea. 
Mark1:29 Isa ban red-moredda gubar dhari kennengnganna kabakteyan, terros meyos ka bengkona Simon ban Andreyas. Yakobus ban Yahya noro' keya." 
Mark1:30 Ebu mattowana Simon teppa'na sake' panas, tedhung e katedhunganna. Bakto Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka jadhiya laju eatore oneng parkara jareya." 
Mark1:31 Daddi Isa ngoladi mattowana Simon jareya, laju eastane tanangnga, pas epajaga. Panassa elang, laju aladine tamoyya." 
Mark1:32 Saellana are compet, reng-oreng ngeba sakabbiyanna oreng se padha sake' ban kasosoban erroh jahat, egiba ka Isa." 
Mark1:33 Reng-oreng sakottha jareya padha agaribbung e adha'na bengko jareya. 
Mark1:34 Isa mabaras oreng sabannya'na se nanggung panyaket acem-macem sarta ngojuk roh-erroh jahat. Roh-erroh jahat jareya ta' eparengngagi ca'-ngoca' pa-apa, sabab roh-erroh jahat jareya tao sapa Salerana jareya." 
Mark1:35 Kalagguwanna e baja sobbu, Isa abungo laju meyos dhari compo'na ka kennengngan se seppe e lowaranna kottha, pas adu'a e jadhiya." 
Mark1:36 Tape Simon ban ca-kancana entar nyare'e. 
Mark1:37 Ban saellana etemmo laju padha mator, “Sadajana oreng nyare'e Panjennengngan.”" 
Mark1:38 Tape Isa adhabu, “Mara terros entar ka tha-kottha laen se ma'-semma' dhari dhinna'. Sengko' kodu akotbah e dhissa' keya, sabab jareya maksodda Sengko' entar dha' enna'.”" 
Mark1:39 Daddi Isa meyos ka man-dhimman e saantero Galilea, sarta akotbah e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan sarta ngojuk roh-erroh jahat." 
Mark1:40 Badha oreng lalake' kasorang andhi' panyaket kole' budhuk. Oreng jareya nyander ka Isa, pas asojud sarta mator, “Manabi Panjennengngan kasokan, Panjennengngan bisa mabaras abdina.”" 
Mark1:41 Isa neser ka oreng jareya, daddi oreng jareya pas esedding sambi adhabu, “Sengko' endha'. Mara, baras!”" 
Mark1:42 Sanaleka jareya keya panyakedda elang ban oreng jareya baras. 
Mark1:43 Bi' Isa oreng jareya pas esoro mole sambi eparenge parengeddan kantha reya," 
Mark1:44 “Senga' ja' kabala ka sapa'a bai. Tape kassa' entar ka imam, soro tenggu ma' olle etemmo ja' ba'na pajat baras onggu. Saellana jareya, atorragi kurban menorot se eparenta'agi Mosa, menangka bukte ka reng-oreng laen ja' ba'na la pajat baras onggu.”" 
Mark1:45 Tape oreng jareya nyengga dhari jadhiya, laju notorragi kadaddiyan jareya e man-dhimman sampe' Isa ta' bisa maso' ka kottha rang-terrangan. Daddi Salerana pas alenggi e lowar kottha e kennengngan-kennengngan se seppe. Tape reng-oreng dhari man-dhimman gi' dhateng nyabis." 
Mark2:1 Saellana olle pan-barampan are dhari jareya Isa abali ka Kapernaum. Kabar ja' Isa badha e bengko jareya pas balattra. 
Mark2:2 Daddi bannya' oreng nyabis, sampe' ta' nemmo kennengngan pole. Bariya keya e adha'na labang sella' ban oreng. Isa notorragi berta dhari Allah ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya." 
Mark2:3 Sabatara Salerana abu-dhabu pas badha oreng kaempa ngosong oreng empon egiba'a ka Isa. 
Mark2:4 Tape sarrena oreng talebat bannya'na, oreng se empon jareya ta' ekenneng giba maso' sampe' ka seddi'na Isa. Daddi, oreng se kaempa gella' abungkar ata'na bengko jareya teppa' e attassa kennengngan se elenggi'i Isa. Saellana alobang, se empon epatoron ban tekerra." 
Mark2:5 E bakto ngoladi saapa rajana imanna reng-oreng jareya, Isa laju adhabu ka se empon, “Na', sa-dusana ba'na la esapora.”" 
Mark2:6 Ru-guru agama se teppa'na toju' e jadhiya badha se padha ngoca' e dhalem atena," 
Mark2:7 “Me' ce' bangalla oreng reya ngoca' kantha reya! Areya nyamana ya-nyeya Allah! Coma Allah se bisa nyapora dusa.” 
Mark2:8 E bakto jareya keya Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' atanya kantha jareya e dhalem atena?" 
Mark2:9 Kemma gampang ngoca' ka oreng se empon reya: ‘Dusana ba'na la esapora’, otaba ngoca', ‘Mara jaga, kala' tekerra pas ajalan’?" 
Mark2:10 Tape sateya Sengko' abukteyagiya ka ba'na ja' Pottrana Manossa e bume reya andhi' kobasa nyapora dusa.” Isa laju adhabu ka oreng se empon gella'," 
Mark2:11 “Mara jaga, kala' tekerra pas mole!”" 
Mark2:12 Oreng jareya jaga laju duli ngala' tekerra, terros kalowar eabassagi reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya. Reng-oreng jareya padha kasambu' kabbi laju amolja'agi Allah. Oca'na, “Sengko' sajjegga ta' tao nangale'e kadaddiyan se kantha reya!”" 
Mark2:13 Isa abali pole ka penggirra Talaga Galilea. Bannya' oreng se nyander ka Salerana, ban Isa laju morok reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark2:14 Sabatara alomampa e jadhiya, Isa laju ngoladi tokang narek pajek se anyama Lewi, ana'na Alfeyus, se teppa'na toju' e kantor pajek. “Mara noro' Sengko',” ca'na dhabuna Isa. Lewi pas jaga ngereng Isa." 
Mark2:15 E bakto Isa teppa'na adha'ar e bengkona Lewi, bannya' tokang narek pajek ban reng-oreng laenna se bi' masarakat eanggep oreng ta' becce' noro' ngakan e jadhiya abareng ban Isa sarta red-moredda." 
Mark2:16 Badha ru-guru agama se tamaso' golonganna kaom Farisi nangale'e Isa adha'ar apolong ban reng-oreng tokang narek pajek sarta reng-oreng laenna se eanggep oreng ta' becce' jareya. Daddi laju padha atanya ka red-moredda Isa, “Guruna sampeyan me' adha'ar abareng ban reng-oreng tokang narek pajek ban reng-oreng se ta' becce'?”" 
Mark2:17 Isa meyarsa partanya'anna reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Oreng se baras ta' parlo dokter; se parlo dokter oreng se sake'. Sengko' dhateng ngologa reng-oreng se eanggep juba', banne ngologa reng-oreng se nganggep aba'na la becce'.”" 
Mark2:18 E settong bakto red-moredda Yahya Pambaptis ban reng-oreng Farisi teppa'na apowasa. Laju badha oreng se nyander ka Isa; oreng jareya atanya, “Aponapa red-moredda Yahya Pambaptis sareng red-moredda oreng Farisi ma' aseyam, nangeng red-moredda sampeyan me' bunten?”" 
Mark2:19 Isa adhabu, “Mon badha oreng andhi' gabay, apa tamoyya ta' kan-ngakan? Ta' kera! Mon pangantan lake'na gi' badha, tanto tamoyya ngakan." 
Mark2:20 Tape bakal napa'a baktona pangantan lake' egiba dhari jadhiya. E bakto jareya buru tamoyya ta' ngakan. 
Mark2:21 Tadha' oreng se nambel kalambi laju bi' kaen anyar. Sabab kaen se anyar jareya tanto kerker, daddi beddhana tanto atamba raja." 
Mark2:22 Bariya keya tadha' oreng nyaba' anggur anyar ka dhalem kanthong kole' se laju. Sabab mon eesse'e anggur se anyar jareya kanthongnga tanto leddu'. Dhi-budhina anggur ban kanthongnga padha tabuwang. Anggur anyar kodu ebaddhai kanthong anyar keya!” 
Mark2:23 E settong are bakto are Sabat, Isa lebat e teggal se etamenne gandum. Red-moredda metthek bulirra gandum." 
Mark2:24 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi atanya ka Isa, “Aponapa moredda sampeyan ma' ta' atoro' ka hokomma agama, ngalakone barang se elarang e are Sabat?”" 
Mark2:25 Isa adhabu, “Apa ba'na ta' tao maca apa se elakone Daud e bakto Abyatar daddi imam agung? Daud ban tantarana lapar, tape ta' andhi' pa-apa se ekakana." 
Mark2:26 Daddi Daud maso' ka dhalem Padalemman Socce, laju ngakan roti se la eatorragi ka Allah. Ban roti jareya ebagi keya ka reng-orengnga. Mangkana menorot hokomma agama pera' mam-imam se olle ngakan roti jareya.”" 
Mark2:27 Isa laju adhabu pole, “Are Sabat reya epabadha kaangguy manossa; banne manossa kaangguy are Sabat." 
Mark2:28 Daddi, Pottrana Manossa kobasa, la'-mala' ka are Sabat.”" 
Mark3:1 Isa abali pole ka kennengnganna kabakteyan. E jadhiya badha oreng lalake' se tanangnga mate salaja. 
Mark3:2 E jadhiya badha keya reng-oreng se terro nyareya salana Isa, polana terro agugada Salerana. Daddi reng-oreng jareya terros ngabassagi dhari semma'na, terro taowa Isa ba' mabarasa oreng gella' e are Sabat." 
Mark3:3 Isa adhabu ka oreng se tanangnga mate salaja jareya, “Mara manjeng e dhinna', e bagiyan adha' reya.”" 
Mark3:4 Samarena laju adhabu ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Menorot agama, apa se olle elakone oreng e are Sabat? Alako bagus otaba alako juba' ka oreng laen? Nolong oreng apa mate'e?”" 
Mark3:5 Tape reng-oreng jareya tadha' se nyaoda. Isa ngoladi ka sakalenglengnga. Panggaliyanna peggel tape sossa, polana reng-oreng jareya cengkal. Isa pas adhabu ka oreng se sake' gella', “Pangaceng tanangnga.” Oreng jareya mangenceng tanangnga, ban tanangnga pas baras." 
Mark3:6 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi jareya pas nyengga dhari kennengnganna kabakteyan jareya, aparembagan ban pan-barampan oreng pangerengnga Herodes, asajja mateyana Isa." 
Mark3:7 Isa ban red-moredda nyengla ka Talaga Galilea, etoro' bunte' oreng sabannya'na. Reng-oreng jareya badha se dhari Galilea, dhari Yudea," 
Mark3:8 dhari Yerusalim, dhari dhaera Idumeya, dhari dhaera e temorra Yordan, ban dhari sabingkerra tha-kottha Tirus ban Sidon. Reng-oreng jareya entar ka jadhiya parlo tatemmowa ban Isa, sabab reng-oreng jareya ngedhing parkara pa-apa se la elampa'agi Isa." 
Mark3:9 Reng-oreng jareya ce' bannya'na sampe' Isa makon red-moredda nyadhiya'agi parao kaagem Salerana, sopaja Salerana ta' sampe'a elek-sellek bi' reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark3:10 Bannya' oreng se epabaras, sampe' reng-oreng se sake' saleng sellek aehteyar nyemma'e Salerana polana terro nyeddinga Salerana." 
Mark3:11 Ban reng-oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat nangale'e Salerana, laju asojud e ajunanna sambi atharat, “Junandalem Pottrana Allah!”" 
Mark3:12 Tape Isa kalaban gu-onggu alarang roh-erroh jahat jareya ala-bala sapa Salerana se saongguna. 
Mark3:13 Saellana jareya Isa ongga ka gumo', pas adikane reng-oreng se ekasokane. Reng-oreng jareya nyander," 
Mark3:14 Isa pas mele dhubellas oreng e antarana. Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' mele ba'na sopaja ba'na noro' Sengko'. Bi' Sengko' ba'na eotosa kaangguy mabalattra Kabar Bagus dhari Allah," 
Mark3:15 ban ba'na bakal narema'a kobasa kaangguy ngojuk roh-erroh jahat.” 
Mark3:16 Areya' nyamana dhubellas oreng se epele Isa jareya: Simon (se ejulugi Petrus)," 
Mark3:17 Yakobus ban taretanna se anyama Yahya, iya areya na'-ana'na Zebedeyus (se bi' Isa eparenge nyama Bowanerges se artena “ana'na galudhuk”)," 
Mark3:18 Andreyas, Filipus, Bartolomeyus, Matiyus, Tomas, Yakobus ana'na Alfeyus, Tadeyus, Simon se Patriot," 
Mark3:19 ban Yudas Iskariyot se akiyanat ka Isa. 
Mark3:20 Saellana jareya Isa gubar ka compo'na. Ce' bannya'na pole oreng se noro' bunte' akompol ka jadhiya, sampe' Isa ban red-moredda ta' sempat adha'ar." 
Mark3:21 Reng-oreng jareya ngoca', “Oreng jareya la gila!” E bakto ngedhing caca se kantha jareya, kalowargana Isa dhateng ngoneyana Isa." 
Mark3:22 Ru-guru agama se dhateng dhari Yerusalim padha ngoca', “Oreng jareya kamaso'an Be'elzebul! Kapalana erroh jahat jareya se aberri' kobasa ka oreng jareya kaangguy ngojuk erroh jahat.”" 
Mark3:23 Daddi Isa pas adikane reng-oreng se bannya' jareya, laju nyareta'agi pan-barampan parompama'an. Dhabuna, “Baramma erroh jahat se bisa'a ngojuk erroh jahat?" 
Mark3:24 Mon badha nagara se pecca daddi pan-barampan golongan se saleng amosowan, nagara jareya ta' kera kowat." 
Mark3:25 Mon e dhalem settong kalowarga orengnga ta' rokon ban anggotana padha saleng amosowan, kalowarga jareya tanto ancor." 
Mark3:26 Daddi mon karaja'anna Iblis aca-pecca ban saleng amosowan, karaja'an jareya ta' kera abit omorra ban tanto tompes tadha' karena." 
Mark3:27 Tadha' oreng se bisa maso' ka dhalem bengkona oreng laen se kowat ban arampas dhi'-andhi'na mon oreng se kowat se andhi' bengko jareya ta' etale'e gallu. Saellana jareya, buru oreng jareya bisa arampas dhi'-andhi'na." 
Mark3:28 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya! Mon oreng agabay dusa sarta makalowar ca'-oca' se ya-nyeya oreng, oreng jareya bisa esapora." 
Mark3:29 Tape mon oreng jareya ya-nyeya Errohna Allah, oreng jareya ta' bisa esapora! Sabab ya-nyeya Errohna Allah jareya tamaso' dusa se langgeng.” (" 
Mark3:30 Isa adhabu kantha jareya polana badha oreng se ngoca' ja' Isa jareya kasosoban erroh jahat.) 
Mark3:31 Saellana jareya ebu ban tan-taretanna Isa rabu, padha anante' e lowar, laju nyoro oreng adikane Isa." 
Mark3:32 E bakto jareya teppa'na bannya' oreng padha toju' e sakalenglengnga Isa. Ca'na atorra reng-oreng jareya, “Panjennengngan esare ebu sareng tan-taretanna. Ka'dhissa' anante' e lowar.”" 
Mark3:33 Dhabuna Isa, “Sapa Tang ebu? Sapa Tang taretan?”" 
Mark3:34 Saellana jareya Isa laju ngoladi ka reng-oreng se toju' e sakalenglengnga pas adhabu, “Areya' Tang ebu ban Tang taretan!" 
Mark3:35 Sakabbiyanna oreng lake' ban oreng bine' se ajalannagi karsana Allah, jareya Tang taretan ban Tang ebu.”" 
Mark4:1 Isa morok pole e penggirra Talaga Galilea. Oreng se agaribbung e jadhiya ce' bannya'na. Daddi Isa pas ongga ka parao e attas aeng, laju alenggi e jadhiya. Dineng oreng se bannya' gella' padha manjeng e penggirra talaga." 
Mark4:2 Isa pas morok reng-oreng jareya acem-macem parkara ngangguy parompama'an. Kantha reya pamorogga: 
Mark4:3 “Mara edhingngagi! E settong are badha oreng tane entar nabur ne-bine. 
Mark4:4 Teppa'na oreng jareya nabur, badha ne-bine se gaggar e lorong. Laju badha mano' ngabber ka jadhiya, ne-binena ecocco' sampe' tadha' karena." 
Mark4:5 Badha keya se gaggar ka kennengngan se bannya' batona se sakone' tanana. Ne-bine jareya lekkas tombu sabab korang tanana," 
Mark4:6 tape e bakto are molae tenggi, bi'-selbi'na molae elop, laju kerreng terros mate amarga ramo'na ta' dhalem." 
Mark4:7 Badha pole ne-bine se gaggar ka ombut se ari-dhuri. Ombut se ari-dhuri jareya tombu nyecce'e bi'-selbi'na ne-bine se buru tombu, sampe' ta' abuwa." 
Mark4:8 Tape badha keya se gaggar ka tana se landhu. Ne-bine jareya tombu, sampe' raja, laju abuwa. Buwana badha se tello polo, badha se sabidak, ban badha se saratos kalena.”" 
Mark4:9 Samarena nyareta'agi parompama'an jareya Isa adhabu, “Ba'na andhi' kopeng, edhingngagi!”" 
Mark4:10 E naleka Isa kadibi'an, reng-oreng se ngedhing pangajaranna nyabis abareng ban red-moredda se dhubellas oreng. Reng-oreng jareya padha atanya maksodda parompama'an gella'." 
Mark4:11 “Ba'na la eparenge tao roseyana parkara baramma Allah marenta,” dhabuna Isa. “Tape reng-oreng lowar eajari ngangguy parompama'an," 
Mark4:12 sopaja ‘Reng-oreng jareya bakal terrosa ngabassagi tape ta' tao badha kadaddiyan apa, reng-oreng jareya bakal terrosa ngedhingngagi, tape ta' ngarte, jareya kalakon sopaja reng-oreng jareya ta' nangale'e ban ta' ngarte ban ta' entar ngadhep ka Allah ban Allah ta' nyapora dusana.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mon ba'na ta' ngarte parompama'an jareya, baramma ba'na se ngarteya parompama'an en-laenna?" 
Mark4:14 Oreng se nabur jareya oreng se manapa' kabar dhari Allah sampe' epabalattra. 
Mark4:15 Ne-bine se gaggar e lorong rowa parompama'anna reng-oreng se ngedhing kabar parkara baramma Allah marenta. Gi' buru ngedhing kabar jareya, Iblis dhateng ngala' apa se la etabur e dhalem atena oreng jareya." 
Mark4:16 Ne-bine se gaggar e tana se bannya' batona jareya parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya, laju narema kabar jareya kalaban ate senneng." 
Mark4:17 Tape kabar jareya ta' aramo' e dhalem atena, ban ta' abit omorra. Buru nemmo kasossa'an otaba ekaneyaja polana kabar jareya, laju terros mortad e bakto jareya keya." 
Mark4:18 Ne-bine se gaggar e ombut se ari-dhuri jareya parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya," 
Mark4:19 tape oreng jareya kobater mekkere odhi'na, ban terro odhi'a mewah, napso se acem-macem maso' ka dhalem atena. Daddi kabar dhari Allah jareya tacecce' e dhalem atena, sampe' ta' abuwa." 
Mark4:20 Ban ne-bine se gaggar ka tana se landhu rowa parompama'anna oreng se ngedhing kabar jareya sarta etarema e dhalem atena, bannya' buwana. Hasella badha se tello polo, badha se sabidak, ban badha keya se saratos kalena.”" 
Mark4:21 Isa laju adhabu pole, “Ba' badha'a oreng se ngodhi'i damar ban damarra jareya laju ekodhunge pennay, otabana esaba' e babana katedhunganna? Apa kerana damarra jareya ta' esaba' e ko'-tongko'na damar?" 
Mark4:22 Apa'a bai se ta' etangale'e oreng tanto pas etangale'e, ban apa'a bai se etop-totobi masthe etemmo." 
Mark4:23 Daddi, mon andhi' kopeng, edhingngagi!”" 
Mark4:24 Saellana jareya Isa laju adhabu pole, “Tetene apa se ekaedhing ba'na reya! Okoran se bi' ba'na eangguy ka oreng laen, bi' Allah bakal eagemma menangka okoran ka ba'na, la'-mala' aberra'an pole." 
Mark4:25 Sabab oreng se la andhi', bakal eparengngana jang bannya'an pole; tape se ta' andhi', apa se ekaandhi' aba'na maske la ce' sakone'na bakal epondhuda.”" 
Mark4:26 Isa materros dhabuna pole, “Mon Allah la marenta menangka rato, kabadha'anna ekenneng ompama'agi akantha oreng se nabur ne-bine e teggalla." 
Mark4:27 Oreng jareya mon malem tedhung, mon seyang jaga. Ban sabatara jareya ne-binena gella' tombu ban atamba raja. Tape oreng jareya ta' tao baramma carana ne-bine jareya se tombu ban atamba raja." 
Mark4:28 Tana jareya dibi' se matombu ban mabuwa men-tamennan jareya; dha'-adha'na kalowar dalangkedanna, pas noro' bulirra, laju kalowar buwana." 
Mark4:29 Ban mon gandum jareya la massa', bi' oreng jareya molae eanye sabab la napa' ka baktona molong.”" 
Mark4:30 “Mon Allah marenta, ba' ekennenga bandhingngagi bi' apa, ya?” ca'na dhabuna Isa pole. “Conto apa ba'nengan se ekennenga angguy nerrangngagi?" 
Mark4:31 Mon Allah marenta, kabadha'anna padha ban parompama'an reya: Badha oreng ngala' bigina sawi laju etamen e tana. Bigina sawi reya bigi se paleng kene' e dunnya." 
Mark4:32 Tape mon la tombu, daddi se paleng raja e antarana men-tamennan. Ka-cangkana ce' rampa'na sampe' no'-mano' entar ka jadhiya laju alebun e baba'anna.”" 
Mark4:33 Daddi cara jareya Isa se morok oreng bannya', ngangguy parompama'an sabannya'na se kantha jareya, menorot kakowadanna pekkeranna reng-oreng se ngedhingngagi." 
Mark4:34 Isa ros-terrosan ngangguy parompama'an mon morok reng-oreng jareya, tape mon pera' kare red-moredda malolo, parompama'an jareya bi' Isa pas eterrangngagi kabbi." 
Mark4:35 E baja asar are jareya keya, Isa adhabu ka red-moredda, “Mara ja' alajara alengka talaga.”" 
Mark4:36 Daddi oreng se bannya' jareya pas edina'agi. Isa laju ongga ka parao, bariya keya red-moredda. E jadhiya badha keya o-parao laenna. Saellana jareya Isa ban red-moredda molae alajar." 
Mark4:37 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya o-tao laju badha angen barat. Omba'na molae mokol parao jareya sarta maso' ka dhalem sampe' parao jareya para' possa'a ban aeng. 
Mark4:38 Isa badha e bagiyan budhina parao jareya, asare abantalan. Bi' red-moredda ebungowe. Ca'na red-moredda jareya, “Guru, ponapa Panjennengngan ta' parduli manabi abdina sadaja sareng Panjennengngan padha calaka'?”" 
Mark4:39 Isa abungo, laju abentak ka angen, sarta adhabu ka talaga, “Mara paceddu!” Angenna pas ceddu ban talaga jareya pas tadha' omba'na." 
Mark4:40 Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda, “Arapa ba'na me' tako'? Arapa ba'na me' padha ta' parcaja ka Sengko'?”" 
Mark4:41 Red-moredda jareya padha katako'en laju padha saleng ngoca', “Sapa sabendherra oreng reya? Me' sampe' angen ban omba' atoro' ka dhabuna.”" 
Mark5:1 Isa ban red-moredda la alengka Talaga Galilea, e dhaera Gerasa." 
Mark5:2 Buru toron dhari paraona, Isa laju esanderri oreng lalake' se gi' buru kalowar dhari wa-guwa e koburan." 
Mark5:3 Oreng jareya kasosoban erroh jahat ban enneng e kam-makam. Oreng jareya la ta' ekenneng tale'e pole, maske bi' rantay sakale;" 
Mark5:4 la seggut soko ban tanangnga ekalenthong, tape tay-rantay bessena epapegga' ban besse e sokona epapotong. Oreng jareya ce' kowadda sampe' tadha' se kellar nagenne." 
Mark5:5 Seyang malem lakona leng-ngaleleng e kam-makam ban e mo'-gumo', sambi rat-tharadan; badanna ekol-pokol bi' bato sampe' loka kabbi." 
Mark5:6 E bakto oreng jareya nangale'e Isa dhari jauna, oreng jareya ka'-berka' sarta pas asojud e ajunanna Isa." 
Mark5:7 Oreng jareya pas aera' ce' kajana, “Isa, Pottrana Allah Se Mahatenggi! Epakadiya ponapa abdidalem? Bit asmana Allah, abdidalem nyo'ona, abdidalem ja' seksa'agi!” (" 
Mark5:8 Oreng jareya ngoca' kantha jareya polana Isa adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Erroh jahat, mara kalowar dhari oreng reya!”)" 
Mark5:9 Isa laju mareksane ka oreng jareya, “Sapa nyamana ba'na?” Saodda oreng jareya, “Nyama abdidalem ‘Legiun’ – sabab se akompol e ka'dhinto' ce' bannya'na!”" 
Mark5:10 Ban erroh jahat jareya li-baliyan nyo'on ka Isa sopaja roh-erroh jahat jareya ta' epakona ondur dhari dhaera jareya. 
Mark5:11 E seddi'na kennengngan jareya badha babi ce' bannya'na padha nyare pakan e penggirra gumo'. 
Mark5:12 Roh-erroh jahat jareya nyo'on ka Isa, “Ngereng abdidalem sadaja pakon maso' ka dhalem bi-babi ka'dhissa'.”" 
Mark5:13 Bi' Isa eedine, daddi roh-erroh jahat jareya kalowar dhari oreng gella' laju maso' ka dhalem bi-babi jareya. Bi-babi jareya padha buru laju alonca' dhari penggirra jurang ka dhalem talaga sarta pas padha mate tasellem; bannya'na kabbi badha ra-kera dhu ebu." 
Mark5:14 Reng-oreng se ajaga babi jareya padha ka'-berka', laju ngabarragi parkara jareya sampe' balattra e kottha ban e sa-disa e sabingkerra. Reng-oreng laju padha kalowar terro nengguwa kadaddiyan jareya." 
Mark5:15 Sanapa'na ka kennengnganna Isa, reng-oreng jareya nangale'e oreng se asalla kasosoban erroh jahat jarowa teppa'na toju' e jadhiya. Oreng jareya la akalambi ban pekkeranna la baras. Reng-oreng se nangale'e jareya laju padha tako'." 
Mark5:16 Reng-oreng se la padha nangale'e dibi' apa se kadaddiyan ka oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat sarta bi-babi jareya nyareta'agi kadaddiyan jareya. 
Mark5:17 Pandhudhu' dhaera jareya nyo'on ka Isa sopaja adinggallagi dhaera jareya. 
Mark5:18 E bakto Isa ongga ka paraona, oreng se dha'-adha'na ekobasae roh-erroh jahat gella' nyo'on ka Isa sopaja eparengngagi ngereng." 
Mark5:19 Tape Isa ta' kasokan, laju adhabu, “Kassa' mole, kabala ka la-balana ba'na apa se la elampa'agi Pangeran ka ba'na ban saapa saena Pangeran ka ba'na!”" 
Mark5:20 Daddi oreng jareya nyengga, pas entar ka dhaera Sapolo Kottha, nyareta'agi apa se elampa'agi Isa ka aba'na. Reng-oreng se ngedhing careta jareya padha kasambu'." 
Mark5:21 Isa abali pole alengka talaga. E penggirra talaga jareya bannya' oreng dhateng agaribbung e sakalenglengnga Isa. 
Mark5:22 Pas badha oreng dhateng nyamana Yairus, iya areya pamimpinna kennengnganna kabakteyan e kottha jareya. E bakto nangale'e Isa, Yairus laju asojud e ajunanna," 
Mark5:23 sarta nyo'on epagu-onggu, “Pa', ana' bine' abdina nganglo sanget. Ta' langkong ngereng eatorana lenggi ka compo'. Gagappagi saos sopaja ana' abdina pas sae sareng ta' mate!”" 
Mark5:24 Daddi Isa pas meyos bi' Yairus. Bannya' oreng se noro' bunte' sampe' Isa ekenneng sellek dhari kangan kacerra, dhari adha' ban dhari budhina." 
Mark5:25 E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha oreng bine' se sake' sambang la dhubellas taon abidda. 
Mark5:26 Dhi'-andhi'na sampe' tadha' epamajar ter-dokter, tape aba'na ta' endha' baras, la'-mala' atamba sara." 
Mark5:27 Babine' jareya la bannya' ngedhing parkara Isa. Daddi aba'na pas nyemma'e Isa dhari budhina. 
Mark5:28 Ca'na pekkerra, “Sokor bisa nyedding jubana bai sengko' tanto baras!”" 
Mark5:29 Oreng babine' jareya nyedding jubana Isa, ban e bakto jareya keya dharana pas ampet. Ban oreng jareya arassa ja' aba'na la baras." 
Mark5:30 E bakto jareya keya Isa arassa ja' badha kakowadan se kalowar dhari Salerana, daddi laju atole ka oreng se bannya' jareya sarta mareksane, “Sapa se nyedding Tang juba?”" 
Mark5:31 Ca'na red-moredda, “Panjennengngan ngagali dibi' oreng saleng sellek kadi ka'dhinto' bannya'na, ma' daddi Panjennengngan mareksane pasera se nyedding Panjennengngan?”" 
Mark5:32 Tape Isa paggun ngoladi ka kangan ka kacer nyare'e oreng se nyedding jubana. 
Mark5:33 Babine' jareya tao apa se kadaddiyan ka aba'na, daddi laju nyander asojud e ajunanna Isa; aba'na ngetter katako'en. Oreng jareya ngakone kabbi sabendherra." 
Mark5:34 Isa laju adhabu ka babine' jareya, “Na', ba'na baras polana parcaja ka Sengko'! Kassa' le-mole; Sengko' nyangowana salamet.”" 
Mark5:35 Teppa'na Isa gi' abu-dhabu, pas badha reng-oreng dhari bengkona Yairus. “Pottrana panjennengngan ampon seda,” ca'na atorra reng-oreng jareya ka Yairus. “Ampon ta' mabi pot-marepot ka Guru pole.”" 
Mark5:36 Isa ta' marduli ka pa-apa se ekoca'agi reng-oreng jareya, la'-mala' adhabu ka Yairus, “Ba'na ta' osa tako', paparcaja bai!”" 
Mark5:37 Isa laju terros alomampa, tape tadha' oreng se eparengngagi noro', kajabana Petrus ban Yakobus sarta Yahya sataretan." 
Mark5:38 Sanapa'na ka bengkona Yairus, Isa ngoladi kabadha'an ce' rammena, sarta meyarsa reng-oreng nanges agingging ce' kajana." 
Mark5:39 Isa malebbet, pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Arapa me' padha nanges sarta ce' rammena? Kana' rowa ta' mate; coma tedhung!”" 
Mark5:40 Isa ekala'-gella' bi' reng-oreng jareya. Daddi bi' Isa reng-oreng jareya epakon kalowar kabbi. Eppa' ebuna kana' se mate jareya sarta moredda se katello pas ebakta maso' ka kamarra kana' jareya. 
Mark5:41 Isa ngastane tanangnga kana' jareya laju adhabu, “Talita kum,” artena, “Kana' bine', Sengko' ngoca' ka ba'na: mara jaga!”" 
Mark5:42 Kana' jareya duli jaga, laju ajalan. (Omorra la dhubellas taon.) Se nangale'e jareya padha kasambu' kabbi." 
Mark5:43 Tape bi' Isa parkara jareya ta' eparengngagi la-kabala ka sapa'a bai. Isa laju adhabu, “Pangakan kana' reya!”" 
Mark6:1 Dhari kennengngan jareya Isa asareng ban red-moredda gubar ka kampongnga. 
Mark6:2 E are Sabat Salerana molae morok e kennengnganna kabakteyan. E jadhiya bannya' oreng. E bakto reng-oreng jareya ngedhing pangajaranna Isa, kabbi padha getton. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Dhari dhimma oreng rowa olle jareya kabbi? Kabicaksana'an apa se ekaandhi' oreng rowa? Baramma me' bisa mabadha kaajiban?" 
Mark6:3 Jareya gu ta' tokang kaju, ana'na Miriyam, taretanna Yakobus, Yoses, Yudas ban Simon rowa, ta' iya? Taretan babine'anna gu ta' badha e dhinna' keya, ta' iya?” Daddi reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' narema Isa." 
Mark6:4 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Nabbi reya neng e man-dhimman ehormat oreng, kajabana e kampongnga dibi' sarta bi' la-balana dibi'.”" 
Mark6:5 E jadhiya Isa ta' bisa mabadha kaajiban maske settonga, kajabana agagap reng-oreng sake' sarta mabaras reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark6:6 Salerana heran polana reng-oreng jareya ta' parcaja. Saellana jareya Isa meyos ka pong-kampong e kangan kacerra kennengngan jareya, pas morok e jadhiya." 
Mark6:7 Moredda se dhubellas edikane, laju eotos wa-kadhuwa ban eparenge kobasa ngojuk roh-erroh jahat." 
Mark6:8 Ca'na dhabuna, “Mon ajalan ba'na ja' ngeba pa-apa, kajabana tongket. Ja' ngeba kakanan otaba kanthong sandhekka, otaba pesse." 
Mark6:9 Asapatu, tape ja' ngeba salenan.”" 
Mark6:10 Salaenna jareya Isa adhabu keya kantha reya, “Mon ba'na etarema e settong bengko, ba'na enneng e bengko jareya sampe' ba'na mangkat pole dhari kottha jareya." 
Mark6:11 Tape mon ba'na napa' ka settong kennengngan, ban reng-oreng jadhiya ta' endha' narema ba'na ban ta' endha' ngedhingngagi ba'na, ba'na nyengga dhari jadhiya. Ban kosekkagi abu se cekka' ka sokona ba'na menangka tandha ka reng-oreng jareya!”" 
Mark6:12 Daddi moredda Isa se dhubellas jareya pas mangkat, mabalattra kabar ja' manossa kodu atobat dhari sa-dusana." 
Mark6:13 Red-moredda Isa jareya ngojuk roh-erroh jahat sabannya'na, ngosoddagi mennya' jaitun ka reng-oreng sake' sabannya'na, ban mabaras reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark6:14 Bar-kabar parkara kadaddiyan jareya kabbi epeyarsa bi' Rato Herodes, sabab asmana Isa la kalonta man-dha'emman. Badha oreng se ngoca' bariya, “Yahya Pambaptis odhi' pole! Pantes oreng jareya andhi' kobasa mabadha kaajiban rowa.”" 
Mark6:15 Tape reng-oreng laenna ngoca', “Oreng rowa Eliya.” Badha pole se ngoca', “Oreng jareya nabbi, padha ban sala settong nabbi gi' jaman lamba'.”" 
Mark6:16 E bakto Herodes meyarsa parkara jareya, laju adhabu, “Tanto rowa Yahya Pambaptis se sabbanna eketthok le'erra bi' Sengko' rowa. Sateya odhi' pole!”" 
Mark6:17 Sabab sabellunna jareya Herodes la marenta'agi sopaja Yahya etangkep, ban epamaso' ka penjara. Kan kantha jareya polana Herodiyas, se ekaraji, maske Herodiyas jareya binena taretanna dibi' se anyama Filipus." 
Mark6:18 Dineng Yahya Pambaptis li-baliyan apareng parengeddan ka Herodes parkara jareya, dhabuna, “Junandalem ta' kengeng araji rajiepon taretanna dibi'!”" 
Mark6:19 Daddi Herodiyas sake' ate ka Yahya ban terro mateyana Yahya, tape ta' bisa polana elang-alange bi' Herodes." 
Mark6:20 Sabab Herodes tako' ka Yahya, polana ngagali ja' Yahya jareya oreng teppa' se eotos Allah, daddi Herodes marenta'agi sopaja kasalameddanna Yahya ejaga kalaban gu-onggu. Ban mon Yahya abu-dhabu, Herodes senneng keya meyarsa'agi, sanajjan sabban mare meyarsa dhabuna Yahya panggaliyanna ngalengsang." 
Mark6:21 Dhi-budhina Herodiyas nemmo kasempadan keya, iya areya e are olang taonna Herodes. E bakto jareya Herodes ajang-onjang. Se eonjang sakabbiyanna pangrajana karaja'an, ra-parwira, ban pin-pamimpinna masarakat e Galilea." 
Mark6:22 E dhalem jang-onjangan jareya ana'na Herodiyas se la paraban atari ban tariyanna ce' leburra monggu ka Herodes ban moy-tamoyya. Daddi Herodes adhabu ka kana' jareya, “Ba'na terro apa, mara menta. Bi' sengko' eberri'ana!”" 
Mark6:23 Herodes pas ajanji ka kana' jareya kalaban asompa. Dhabuna, “Apa'a bai se epenta ba'na bi' sengko' eberri'ana, maske ba'na menta saparona tang karaja'an sakale!”" 
Mark6:24 Daddi pottre jareya kalowar laju atanya ka ebuna, “Bu, se sae kaula nyo'ona ponapa?” Dhabuna ebuna, “Menta cethagga Yahya Pambaptis.”" 
Mark6:25 Pottre jareya pas duli abali ka Herodes laju mator, “Kaula nyo'ona serana Yahya Pambaptis, baddhai talam, samangken jugan e ka'dhinto'!”" 
Mark6:26 Meyarsa parnyo'onanna pottrena se kantha jareya Herodes ce' sossana, tape ta' bisa nolak amarga la asompa e adha'na moy-tamoyya." 
Mark6:27 Daddi Herodes pas marenta'agi ka pangawalla ngala' serana Yahya Pambaptis. Daddi pangawal jareya pas entar ka penjara, laju ngetthok serana Yahya." 
Mark6:28 Sera jareya pas ebaddhai talam terros ebagi ka pottre. Ban pottre jareya pas ebagi ka ebuna. 
Mark6:29 E bakto red-moredda Yahya ngedhing parkara jareya, jinazana Yahya laju ekala', terros ekoburragi." 
Mark6:30 Sul-rasul se eotos Isa abali laju akompol bi' Isa, pas ngatore oneng pa-apa se la elakone tor eajarragi." 
Mark6:31 Ce' bannya'na oreng se ondur dhateng sampe' Isa ban red-moredda ta' sempat adha'ar. Daddi Isa adhabu ka red-moredda, “Mara nyare kennengngan se seppe me' olle ta' eganggu oreng, ban ba'na padha bisa bu-ambu lesso sakejja'.”" 
Mark6:32 Daddi Isa ban red-moredda jareya pas meyos netene parao ka kennengngan se seppe. 
Mark6:33 Tape bannya' oreng se nangale'e Isa ban red-moredda jareya meyos dhari kennengngan jareya, sarta tao sapa reng-oreng jareya. Daddi reng-oreng dhari sakabbiyanna kottha e dhaera jareya ka'-berka' lebat jalan e tenggangan, ajangadha'i Isa ban red-moredda." 
Mark6:34 E bakto toron dhari paraona Isa ngoladi bannya' oreng e jadhiya. Panggaliyanna arassa neser ka reng-oreng jareya, sabab akantha dumba se tadha' oreng ngowanna. Daddi Isa laju morok reng-oreng jareya parkara se acem-macem." 
Mark6:35 E bakto are la para' malemma, red-moredda Isa mator, “Samangken ampon para' compedda are, kennengngan ka'dhinto' jau bara' jau temor." 
Mark6:36 Pakon nyengga saos reng-oreng ka'dhissa', me' olle melle teddha'an e sa-disa sareng pong-kampong se ma'-semma'.”" 
Mark6:37 Dhabuna Isa, “La berri'i ngakan ba'na, ra, bai.” “Adhu, manabi neddha'ana oreng se saka'dhissa' bannya'epon, abdina kodu entar ngobange roti saarga dhu ratos pesse salaka,” atorra red-moredda Isa jareya." 
Mark6:38 Isa laju mareksane, “Ba'na andhi' roti barampa meggi'? Kodda' tenggu.” Saellana etenggu, red-moredda mator, “Badha roti lalema' sareng juko' dhadhuwa'.”" 
Mark6:39 Isa makon reng-oreng se bannya' jareya toju' apo'-galumpo' e rebba se biru. 
Mark6:40 Daddi oreng se bannya' jareya toju' epatartep, epadaddi pan-barampan galumpo'. Po'-sakalumpo'na bannya'na badha se saeket oreng, badha se saratos oreng." 
Mark6:41 Isa pas mondhut roti se lema meggi' ban juko' se dhu meggi' rowa, laju adhanga ka langnge', asokkor ka Allah. Saellana jareya, rotina ethok-ketthok bi' astana, laju eparengngagi ka red-moredda epakon parengngagi ka oreng se bannya' jareya. Juko'na se dhadhuwa' ebagi keya ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark6:42 Kabbi padha ngakan sampe' kennyang. 
Mark6:43 Red-moredda makompol karena, bannya'na kabbi dhubellas budhak, sa'-possa'." 
Mark6:44 Lalake'an se ngakan badha ra-kera lema ebu oreng. 
Mark6:45 Saellana jareya Isa duli makon red-moredda mangkat kaadha' nompa' parao ka Betsaida e dhajana talaga, sabatara Salerana makon mole reng-oreng se bannya' jareya." 
Mark6:46 Saellana oreng se bannya' jareya la ondur, Isa meyos adu'a ka gumo'." 
Mark6:47 Saellana malem, paraona red-moredda la napa' ka tengngana talaga, mangkana Isa gi' badha e tenggangan." 
Mark6:48 Isa ngoladi ja' red-moredda jareya ce' malaradda se aguwar paraona sabab ngadhebbi angen dhari adha'. Daddi, ra-kera e antarana pokol tello' ban pokol ennem gu-laggu, Isa meyos ka parao jareya alomampa e attas aeng. Ban Isa terros alomampa, katon nyaleba red-moredda jareya." 
Mark6:49 E bakto nangale'e Isa alomampa e attas aeng, red-moredda nyangka jareya din-dadin," 
Mark6:50 daddi kabbi padha reng-cerrengan katako'en. Sabab red-moredda jareya kabbi nangale'e Isa jareya ban ce' takerjadda. Tape Isa adhabu ka red-moredda buru, “Ella neng-enneng! Areya Sengko'. Ta' osa tako'!”" 
Mark6:51 Isa laju ongga ka paraona, ban angen laju ceddu. Red-moredda ce' kasambu'na." 
Mark6:52 Parkara kaajibanna roti se lalema' rowa bai pekkeranna gi' ta' paham. Ce' malaradda onggu reng-oreng jareya se ngarteya. 
Mark6:53 Sanapa'na ka dhajana talaga, Isa ban red-moredda toron e paseser Genesaret." 
Mark6:54 E bakto kalowar dhari paraona, reng-oreng nangale'e ja' se rabu jareya Isa." 
Mark6:55 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ka'-berka' san-kassannagi e saantero dhaera jareya, ban molae ngeba reng-oreng sake' se epatedhung e teker ka Isa. Mon reng-oreng jareya ngedhing ja' Isa badha e settong kennengngan, reng-oreng sake' jareya egiba ka jadhiya." 
Mark6:56 Dha' emma'a bai Isa se meyos – ka kampong, ka kottha otaba ka disa – reng-oreng noro' entar ka jadhiya ngeba reng-oreng sake' se pas esaba' e lon-alon. Reng-oreng jareya nyo'on ka Isa sopaja se sake' eparengngana edi nyedding jubana, maske pera' penggirra. Oreng sake' se nyedding penggirra jubana jareya padha baras kabbi." 
Mark7:1 Badha reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama dhari Yerusalim padha entar ka Isa. 
Mark7:2 Reng-oreng jareya nangale ja' red-moredda Isa badha se padha ngakan ngompa' ban tanangnga se ta' berse menorot atoranna agama, iya areya ta' kalaban abacco menorot atoranna agama." 
Mark7:3 Reng-oreng Farisi, bariya keya reng-oreng Yahudi laenna, esto atoro' ka adadda bangatowana: iya areya ta' endha' ngakan mon gi' ta' abacco menorot ra-cara se la etantowagi." 
Mark7:4 Apa'a bai se ebelli e pasar ta' ekakan mon gi' ta' ebacco. Ban gi' bannya' pole atoran laenna dhari bangatowana se gi' paggun ejalannagi; ompamana atoran carana ngorae gellas, cangker ban kas-pakakas dhari dimbaga." 
Mark7:5 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama gella' atanya ka Isa, “Aponapa red-moredda sampeyan neddha me' ta' abacco dhimen tanangnga? Me' ta' atoro' ka adadda bangatowa?”" 
Mark7:6 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na reya monafik! Teppa' ca'na ramalanna Yesaya se etoles nyebbuttagi parkara ba'na, se monyena kantha reya, ‘Areya' dhabuna Allah, Reng-oreng rowa coma abakte ka Sengko' bi' caca, tape atena jau dhari Sengko'." 
Mark7:7 Tadha' gunana reng-oreng jareya abakte ka Sengko', sabab reng-oreng jareya ngajarragi atoran gabayanna manossa se eanggep akantha atoran dhari Sengko'!’" 
Mark7:8 Papakonna Allah bi' ba'na ta' eparduli, ban ba'na atoro' kalaban gu-onggu ka atoran gabayanna manossa.”" 
Mark7:9 Isa pas adhabu pole, “Ba'na ce' penterra nolak papakonna Allah sopaja bisa'a paggun neggu' pangajaranna dibi'." 
Mark7:10 Mosa la aberri' parenta kantha reya, ‘Pahormat ka rama ebuna,’ ban ‘Pa-sapa se abasto rama otaba ebuna kodu eokom mate.’" 
Mark7:11 Tape ba'na ngajarragi: Mon badha oreng ngoca' ka oreng towana, ‘Pa-ponapa se bi' kaula koduna eatorragi ka rama ebu, ampon eatorragi ka Allah bi' kaula,’" 
Mark7:12 ba'na mabebas oreng jareya dhari kawajiban nolong rama ebuna. 
Mark7:13 Daddi kalaban aberri' pangajaranna dibi' ka reng-oreng laenna, ba'na ngelangngagi dhabuna Allah. Ban gi' bannya' lalakonna ba'na laenna se kantha jareya.”" 
Mark7:14 Isa laju adikane pole reng-oreng se bannya' jareya sarta adhabu, “Mara edhingngagi me' olle ngarte!" 
Mark7:15 Apa'a bai se maso' ka dhalem oreng dhari lowar ta' manajjis oreng jareya. Sabaligga, se kalowar dhari oreng se manajjis aba'na. [" 
Mark7:16 Daddi, mon andhi', kopeng, edhingngagi!]”" 
Mark7:17 E bakto Isa adinggallagi reng-oreng se bannya' jareya sarta alebbu ka dalemma, red-moredda atanya apa artena parompama'an jareya." 
Mark7:18 Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Apa ba'na gi' ta' ngarte keya? Apa ba'na ta' tao ja' apa'a bai se maso' ka dhalem oreng dhari lowar ta' manajjis oreng jareya?" 
Mark7:19 Sabab se maso' dhari lowar jareya ta' lebat e ate, tape lebat e tabu' pas kalowar pole.” Dhabuna Isa reya noduwagi ja' kakanan apa'a bai halal." 
Mark7:20 Saellana jareya pas adhabu pole, “Se kalowar dhari oreng, jareya se manajjis." 
Mark7:21 Sabab dhari dhalem, iya areya dhari ate, kalowar pekkeran se hat-jahat se daddi lantaranna oreng alako ma'seyat, ngeco', mate'e oreng," 
Mark7:22 azina, nepo, metenna ban ngalakone sakabbiyanna kajahadan laenna, dhakka, ta' sopan, ere atena, sombong ban ta' gampang eajar." 
Mark7:23 Sakabbiyanna barang se jahat jareya kalowar dhari dhalem, ban jareya se manajjis oreng.”" 
Mark7:24 Isa laju meyos dhari jadhiya ka dhaera e seddi'na kottha Tirus. E jadhiya Isa maso' ka dhalem settong bengko terro ta' etemmowa oreng ja' alenggi e jadhiya. Tape ta' bisa ngetek keya. 
Mark7:25 Badha oreng babine' kasorang, andhi' ana' babine' se kasosoban erroh jahat; babine' jareya ngedhing parkara Isa, laju duli nyabis sarta asojud e ajunanna," 
Mark7:26 sambi nyo'on sopaja Isa ngojuk erroh jahat dhari ana'na gella'. Babine' jareya banne oreng Yahudi, lahir e dhaera Fenisia e Siria." 
Mark7:27 Isa adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Na'-kana' kodu pakane kaadha'. Ta' bagus ngala' kakanna na'-kana' kaangguy eontallagiya ka pate'.”" 
Mark7:28 “Towan,” ca'na babine' jareya, “te'-pate' se badha e babana meja jugan neddha re-karena na'-kana' se ngalotor ka baba.”" 
Mark7:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Sarrena ba'na nyaot kantha jareya, kassa' mole; erroh jahat jarowa la kalowar dhari ana'na ba'na.”" 
Mark7:30 Babine' jareya mole. Sanapa'na ka bengkona, ana'na etemmo dhung-tedhungan e katedhunganna, ban erroh jahat jareya la kalowar dhari aba'na." 
Mark7:31 Saellana jareya Isa meyos dhari dhaera Tirus terros ka Talaga Galilea lebat e Sidon, e lorong se ngalebadi Sapolo Kottha." 
Mark7:32 E jadhiya badha reng-oreng ngeba oreng buwi ban kopok. Reng-oreng gella' nyo'on ka Isa sopaja kasokana nompangngagi astana ka attassa oreng se sake' jareya. 
Mark7:33 Bi' Isa oreng se buwi jareya ebakta nyengla ajauwi reng-oreng laenna; Isa nyojjuwagi garigi'na ka dhalem kopengnga oreng jareya. Samarena jareya Isa aedu sarta nyedding jilana oreng jareya. 
Mark7:34 Saellana jareya Isa pas adhanga ka langnge', laju anyaba epakaja sarta adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Efata,” artena “Mara abukka'!”" 
Mark7:35 Sanatkala jareya keya kopengnga oreng buru laju tabukka' ban jilana lemmes, sarta molae acaca ta' malarat sakale." 
Mark7:36 Bi' Isa reng-oreng jareya elarang ala-bala parkara jareya ka sapa'a bai. Tape sajan elarang reng-oreng jareya sajan ala-bala epabalattra. 
Mark7:37 Ban reng-oreng se ngedhing padha kasambu'. Oca'na, “Kabbi elampa'agi kalaban becce'! La'-mala' oreng buwi epacaca ban oreng kopok epangedhing!”" 
Mark8:1 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya pas badha oreng pole ce' bannya'na entar ka jadhiya. Sarrena reng-oreng jareya ta' andhi' se ekakana, Isa adikane red-moredda laju adhabu," 
Mark8:2 “Sengko' neser ka oreng se bannya' reya. La tello are abidda enneng bi' Sengko' ban sateya ta' andhi' se ekakana. 
Mark8:3 Mon bi' Sengko' esoro mole ta' ngakan gallu, tanto kalengnger e lorong, sabab e antarana badha se padha dhateng dhari jauna.”" 
Mark8:4 Red-moredda nyaot, “E kennengngan se jau bara' jau temor kadi ka'dhinto', e ka'dhimma se manggiya teddha'an se cokop eteddha'a reng-oreng ka'dhissa' sadaja?”" 
Mark8:5 “Ba'na andhi' roti barampa meggi'?” dhabuna Isa. “Papetto',” saodda reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark8:6 Isa makon reng-oreng se bannya' jareya toju' e tana, saellana pas mondhut roti se papetto' gella' laju asokkor ka Allah. Samarena jareya rotina pas ethok-ketthok bi' astana laju eparengngagi ka red-moredda epakon bagi ka reng-oreng se bannya' jareya. Red-moredda alampa'agi apa se epakonnagi Isa jareya." 
Mark8:7 Salaenna roti se papetto' jareya, red-moredda andhi' juko' ne'-kene' sakone'. Isa asokkor ka Allah polana ko'-juko' jareya, pas makon red-moredda magi ko'-juko' jareya ka oreng se bannya' gella'." 
Mark8:8 Reng-oreng gella' padha ngakan kabbi sampe' kennyang, bannya'na se ngakan ra-kera pa' ebu oreng. Saellana jareya red-moredda makompol lebbina, olle pettong budhak sa'-possa'. Bi' Isa reng-oreng jareya pas epakon mole kabbi;" 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 Isa dibi' ban red-moredda terros ongga ka paraona laju meyos ka dhaera Dalmanuta. 
Mark8:11 Badha reng-oreng Farisi se entar ka Isa sarta molae aguggak bi' Isa, maksodda ajebbaga Salerana. Reng-oreng jareya menta sopaja Isa mabadha kaajiban menangka tandha ja' Salerana dhari Allah asalla." 
Mark8:12 Tape Isa ngonju' nyaba, pas adhabu, “Arapa reng-oreng jaman sateya reya me' menta sopaja Sengko' mabadha kaajiban? Enja'! Sengko' ta' aberri'a tandha se kantha jareya ka reng-oreng jareya!”" 
Mark8:13 Bi' Isa reng-oreng jareya laju eonduri, ban Salerana pas ongga ka paraona; saellana jareya pas meyos alengka talaga." 
Mark8:14 Red-moredda Isa loppa ta' ngeba roti sacokobba. E parao jareya rotina pera' kare settong. 
Mark8:15 “Senga' pate-ngate ka ragina reng-oreng Farisi ban Herodes,” dhabuna Isa maemot red-moredda." 
Mark8:16 Red-moredda Isa jareya pas molae acaca parkara jareya. Oca'na, “Guru adhabu kantha jareya polana sengko' ban ba'na ta' ngeba roti.”" 
Mark8:17 Isa ngagali apa se ekacaca red-moredda jareya. Daddi pas mareksane kantha reya, “Arapa ba'na me' acaca parkara se ta' andhi' roti? Daddi ba'na ta' tao ban gi' ta' ngarte keya? Me' ce' tompolla pekkeranna ba'na jareya!" 
Mark8:18 Ba'na andhi' mata – masa' ta' nangale? Ba'na andhi' kopeng – masa' ta' ngedhing? Masa' ba'na ta' enga' 
Mark8:19 ka roti se lalema' se bi' Sengko' ethok-ketthok egabay makane oreng lema ebu rowa? Barampa budhak lebbina se epakompol bi' ba'na?” “Dhubellas,” saodda red-moredda jareya." 
Mark8:20 “Ban e bakto Sengko' thok-ngetthok roti se papetto' se egabay makane oreng se pa' ebu rowa?” dhabuna Isa pole, “barampa budhak lebbina kakanan se epakompol bi' ba'na?” “Pettong budhak,” saodda red-moredda." 
Mark8:21 “La, daddi ba'na gi' ta' ngarte keya?” dhabuna Isa." 
Mark8:22 Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka Betsaida. E jadhiya badha reng-oreng nyander ka Isa ngeba oreng buta, laju nyo'on sopaja Isa kasokana agagap oreng buta jareya sopaja barasa." 
Mark8:23 Oreng buta jareya bi' Isa eastane tanangnga, laju etonton kalowar kottha. Matana oreng buta jareya eeduwi. Saellana jareya astana pas etompangngagi ka oreng buta jareya, laju mareksane, “Apa ba'na la nangale'e sateya?”" 
Mark8:24 Oreng buta jareya addhep ka adha', pas ngoca', “Enggi. Abdina nengale oreng ajalan, namong katon akadi kajuwan.”" 
Mark8:25 Isa nompangngagi astana pole ka matana oreng jareya. Sateya oreng jareya ngoddi ngabas epagu-onggu. Matana baras sarta la nangale ce' terrangnga. 
Mark8:26 Isa laju adhabu, “Kassa' mole, ja' abali ka kottha rowa.”" 
Mark8:27 Saellana jareya Isa ban red-moredda meyos ka sa-disa e sabingkerra Kaisareya Filipi. E tengnga jalan Isa adhabu, “Ca'na oreng, Sengko' reya sapa?”" 
Mark8:28 Saodda red-moredda, “Badha se ngoca' Panjennengngan Yahya Pambaptis; badha pole se ngoca' Eliya, ban badha pole se ngoca': sala settongngepon nabbi.”" 
Mark8:29 “Mon ca'na ba'na, sapa Sengko' reya?” dhabuna ka red-moredda. Petrus mator, “Panjennengngan Rato Panyalamet.”" 
Mark8:30 Isa laju adhabu sopaja red-moredda jareya ta' ala-bala ka oreng laen parkara Salerana. 
Mark8:31 Isa laju molae morok red-moredda ja' Pottrana Manossa masthe bannya' nanggung sangsara, ban elaban bi' pin-pamimpin, mam-imam kapala sarta ru-guru agama. Salerana bakal epateyana, tape e are se kapeng tello' bakal epaodhi'a pole." 
Mark8:32 Ce' terrangnga Isa se adhabu parkara jareya ka red-moredda. Daddi bi' Petrus Isa laju etonton ka ereng, laju epaemot." 
Mark8:33 Tape Isa atole mandeng ka red-moredda, laju maemot Petrus, “Ondur dhari dhinna', Panggudha! Pekkeranna ba'na jareya pekkeranna manossa; banne pekkeranna Allah!”" 
Mark8:34 Isa laju adikane reng-oreng se bannya' se badha e jadhiya ban red-moredda. Salerana pas adhabu kantha reya, “Pa'-sapa'a se terro noro'a Sengko' kodu maloppa ka kabutowanna dibi', mekol salibba, sarta terros noro' Sengko'." 
Mark8:35 Sabab pa'-sapa'a se terro masalamedda odhi'na, bakal kaelangana odhi'na jareya. Tape oreng se ngorbannagi odhi'na kaangguy Sengko' ban Kabar Bagus dhari Allah, bakal salamedda." 
Mark8:36 Apa gunana mon oreng ngaandhi' dunnya reya tape kaelangan odhi'na? 
Mark8:37 Odhi' reya ta' ekenneng porop bi' apa'a bai. 
Mark8:38 Mon oreng todhus ngakone Sengko' ban Tang pangajaran e jaman se daraka ban jahat reya, bariya keya Pottrana Manossa bakal todhusa ngakone oreng jareya e baktona Pottrana Manossa jareya rabu kalaban kobasana Ramana, ebarengnge kat-malaekadda se socce.”" 
Mark9:1 “Ba'na ebala'ana, ya!” dhabuna Isa. “E antarana ba'na reya badha se gi' ta' kera mate, sabellunna nangale'e Allah marenta kalaban kobasa!”" 
Mark9:2 Saellana olle nem are dhari jareya Isa abakta Petrus, Yakobus ban taretanna Yahya, ka kennengngan se tadha' orengnga e gunong se tenggi. E adha'na reng-oreng se katello jareya Isa aoba ropa." 
Mark9:3 Rasoganna laju daddi pote rap-galiraban. Tadha' oreng settonga e dunnya reya se tao nyassa sampe' mapote kantha jareya. 
Mark9:4 Saellana jareya se katello buru pas nangale'e Eliya ban Mosa abu-dhabu ban Isa. 
Mark9:5 Daddi Petrus mator ka Isa, “Guru, e ka'dhinto' ce' saena. Dinggal abdina katellowan abadhiya kemah tatello': settong kaagem Panjennengngan, settong kaagem Mosa, ban settongnga kaagem Eliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Sanyatana Petrus ban kancana se kadhuwa jareya talebat katako'en sampe' ta' tao kodu ngoca' baramma. 
Mark9:7 Saellana jareya pas badha ondhem notobi se katello jareya ban dhari ondhem jareya badha sowara se adhabu kantha reya, “Areya' Tang Ana' se kataresnan. Edhingngagi cacana!”" 
Mark9:8 Se katello jareya duli ngabas ka sakalenglengnga, tape se etangale'e tadha' laen kajabana Isa malolo." 
Mark9:9 E bakto Isa ban moredda se katello jareya toron dhari gunong, laju adhabu, “Senga' ja' la-bala ka sapa'a bai apa se etangale'e ba'na gella', sabellunna Pottrana Manossa odhi' pole dhari sedana.”" 
Mark9:10 Se katello jareya atoro' ka dhabuna Isa buru, tape padha saleng atanya, “Apa se emaksod bi' ‘odhi' pole dhari sedana’ jareya?”" 
Mark9:11 Se katello jareya laju atanya ka Isa, “Aponapa ru-guru agama me' adhabu ja' Eliya masthe rabu kaadha'?”" 
Mark9:12 Dhabuna Isa, “Eliya pajat dhatengnga kaadha' maberesa sakabbiyanna. Tape baramma parkara Pottrana Manossa? Apa sababba e dhalem Alketab me' esebbuttagi ja' Pottrana Manossa jareya bakal bannya'a nanggung sangsara ban eya-seya oreng?" 
Mark9:13 Tape ba'na ebala'ana, ya: Eliya la dhateng, tape reng-oreng atengka sanyamanna ka Eliya jareya. Jareya la cocok ban se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab.”" 
Mark9:14 E bakto Isa ban moredda se katello jareya la abali akompol ban red-moredda se laen, e jadhiya etemmo bannya' oreng. Badha ru-guru agama se padha apadu bi' red-moredda Isa." 
Mark9:15 E bakto nangale'e Isa, red-moredda jareya laju padha tacengnga', pas ka'-berka' nyander." 
Mark9:16 Isa mareksane ka red-moredda jareya, “Apa se ekapadu ba'na bi' ru-guru agama rowa?”" 
Mark9:17 Sala settong dhari reng-oreng se bannya' jareya nyaot, “Guru, abdina abakta ana' abdina ka'dhinto'. Kana' ka'dhinto' buwi, polana kasosoban erroh jahat." 
Mark9:18 Manabi erroh gapaneka nyerrang, kana' ka'dhinto' badanna eteng-bantengngagi ka tana, colo'epon ngabuk, gigina ngaret, sabadan gerra sadaja. Abdina nyo'on tolong ka red-moredda Panjennengngan, namong red-moredda Panjennengngan ta' bisa mabaras.”" 
Mark9:19 Isa pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na reya me' ce' paranana! Ba'na reya oreng se ta' parcaja onggu. Sampe' bila Sengko' kodu apolong ban ba'na ban sabbar ka ba'na? Giba dha' enna' kana jareya!”" 
Mark9:20 Daddi bi' reng-oreng gella' kana' jareya egiba ka Isa. Erroh jahat jareya buru nangale Isa, na'-kana' gella' laju epaceng-ngaraceng sampe' labu lu'-gulu'an e tana. Colo'na ngabuk." 
Mark9:21 “La barampa abidda kana' reya se kantha reya?” dhabuna Isa ka eppa'na. “Ngabidi gi' kene',” ca'na eppa'na." 
Mark9:22 “Ampon pan-saponapan kale erroh jahat gapaneka ngoddi mateyana kana' ka'dhinto'; badannepon ebantengngagi ka dhalem apoy sareng aeng. Ngereng kabellasi, guru, nyo'ona tolong manabi Panjennengngan bisa mabaras!”" 
Mark9:23 “Apa ca'na ba'na? Mon Sengko' bisa mabaras?” dhabuna Isa. “Apa'a bai bisa sokor ba'na parcaja.” 
Mark9:24 E bakto jareya keya eppa'na kana' gella' aera', “Abdina parcaja, Namong kaparcaja'an abdina gi' korang. Nyo'ona tolong tamba'agi!”" 
Mark9:25 Isa ngoladi ja' oreng se bannya' jareya molae agaribbung, daddi pas adhabu ka erroh jahat jareya, “Erroh kopok ban buwi,” dhabuna, “Sengko' marenta'agi ka ba'na, mara kalowar dhari kana' reya, ban ja' sampe' abali pole!”" 
Mark9:26 Erroh jahat jareya atharat, na'-kana' gella' epaceng-ngaraceng badanna, laju kalowar. Kana' jareya katon akantha mayyit, ban reng-oreng padha ngoca', “Mate, la.”" 
Mark9:27 Tape Isa ngastane tanangnga kana' jareya, laju epajaga. Kana' jareya pas jaga." 
Mark9:28 Saellana Isa maso' ka dhalem compo'na, red-moredda nyander, majau dhari reng-oreng laen, laju atanya, “Aponapa abdina me' ta' bisa ngojuk erroh jahat?”" 
Mark9:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Erroh jahat se samacemma reya ta' ekenneng ojuk ngangguy cara apa'a bai kajabana ngangguy du'a.”" 
Mark9:30 Isa ban red-moredda meyos dhari kennengngan jareya nerrossagi parjalananna lebat e Galilea. Isa terro ta' etemmowa oreng," 
Mark9:31 polana teppa'na morok red-moredda. “Pottrana Manossa bakal epassra'agiya ka kobasana manossa,” ca'na dhabuna. “Saellana jareya pas bakal epateyana, tape e are se kapeng tello' bakal odhi'a pole.”" 
Mark9:32 Red-moredda ta' ngarte apa maksodda pangajaran jareya, tape ta' bangal atanya." 
Mark9:33 Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka Kapernaum. Sanapa'na ka compo'na, Isa mareksane ka red-moredda, “Apa se ekapadu ba'na e lorong gella'?”" 
Mark9:34 Tape red-moredda jareya ta' endha' nyaot, sabab e lorong padha apadu parkara sapa se paleng raja." 
Mark9:35 Isa alenggi, adikane red-moredda, pas adhabu, “Pa'-sapa'a se terro daddiya se nomer settong, kodu daddi se dhi-budhi ban kodu daddi pangladinna sakabbiyanna oreng.”" 
Mark9:36 Saellana jareya Isa laju mondhut na'-kana' kasorang, epamanjeng e adha'na red-moredda. Isa agellu' kana' jareya, pas adhabu ka red-moredda," 
Mark9:37 “Pa'-sapa'a se narema na'-kana' kene' kantha reya polana Sengko', artena narema Sengko'; ban pa'-sapa'a narema Sengko', artena banne pera' narema Sengko', tape narema keya se ngotos Sengko'.”" 
Mark9:38 Yahya mator ka Isa, “Guru, abdina sakanca oneng nengale badha oreng ngojuk erroh jahat kalaban asmana Panjennengngan. Sareng abdina sakanca oreng gapaneka elarang, polana oreng gapaneka ta' tamaso' morettepon Panjennengngan.”" 
Mark9:39 Dhabuna Isa, “Ja' larang oreng jareya, pa'-sapa'a mabadha kaajiban kalaban ngangguy Tang nyama, ta' kera ba'-majuba' Sengko'." 
Mark9:40 Sabab pa'-sapa'a se ta' ngamoso ka Sengko' ban ba'na, akanca bi' Sengko' ban ba'na." 
Mark9:41 Kaenga'e, ya! Pa'-sapa'a aberri' aeng enom ka ba'na polana ba'na moredda Rato Panyalamet, bakal narema'a opana.”" 
Mark9:42 “Pa'-sapa'a se daddi sababba sala settong dhari na'-kana' kene' reya ta' parcaja pole ka Sengko', lebbi becce' oreng jareya egantonge bato gilingan e le'erra, pas ontallagi ka dhalem tase'." 
Mark9:43 Mon tanangnga ba'na daddi sababba ba'na agabay dusa, ketthok tanang jareya! Lebbi becce' ba'na odhi' ban Allah maske tanangnga tadha' salaja, etembang andhi' tanang dhadhuwa' tape maso' ka dhalem naraka, iya areya apoy se langgeng. [" 
Mark9:44 E jadhiya apoy ta' bisa mate, ban ola' ta' bisa mate.]" 
Mark9:45 Ban mon sokona ba'na daddi sababba ba'na agabay dusa, ketthok soko jareya! Lebbi becce' ba'na odhi' ban Allah maske sokona tadha' salaja, etembang andhi' soko dhadhuwa' tape maso' ka dhalem naraka. [" 
Mark9:46 E jadhiya apoy ta' bisa mate, ban ola' ta' bisa mate.]" 
Mark9:47 Ban mon matana ba'na daddi sababba ba'na agabay dusa, congke' matana jareya! Lebbi becce' ba'na maso' ka dhalem Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar maske matana tadha' salaja, etembang andhi' mata dhu kalaja tape maso' ka dhalem naraka." 
Mark9:48 E jadhiya apoy ta' bisa mate, ban ola' ta' bisa mate." 
Mark9:49 Sakabbiyanna oreng bakal epamorneya bi' apoy, akantha kurban se epasocce bi' buja." 
Mark9:50 Buja reya nyaman, tape mon buja jareya daddi tabar, ba' ekennenga epaaccen pole? Daddi, ba'na kodu papadha ban buja, odhi' parokon along-polong.”" 
Mark10:1 Isa laju meyos dhari jadhiya ka dhaera Yudea, terros alengka Songay Yordan. Bannya' pole oreng se dhateng agaribbung e seddi'anna, ban akantha biyasana Isa morok reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark10:2 Badha reng-oreng Farisi se entar ka jadhiya keya ajebbaga Isa. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Menorot agamana kaula ban sampeyan, ponapa kengeng oreng nellak rajina?”" 
Mark10:3 Isa adhabu, “Baramma ca'na parentana Mosa ka ba'na?”" 
Mark10:4 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Mosa ngedine oreng nellak rajina, asal se lake' noles sorat panellak dhimen.”" 
Mark10:5 Dhabuna Isa, “Mosa noles parenta jareya polana malarat se ngajara ba'na." 
Mark10:6 Tape dha'-adha'na, e bakto Allah nyepta'agi manossa, esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab ja' ‘Allah abadhi manossa lalake' ban babine'." 
Mark10:7 Jareya sababba arapa oreng lalake' ma' adina'agi rama ebuna sarta manyettong ban binena," 
Mark10:8 ban se kadhuwa jareya daddi settong.’ Daddi lalake' ban babine' jareya banne oreng kadhuwa pole, tape la daddi settong." 
Mark10:9 Daddi, apa se la epadaddi settong bi' Allah, ta' olle epesa bi' manossa.”" 
Mark10:10 Saellana Isa ban red-moredda alebbu ka dhalem bengko, red-moredda atanya parkara jareya." 
Mark10:11 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng lalake' se nellak binena sarta pas abine pole, oreng jareya azina ka binena se nomer settong gella'." 
Mark10:12 Bariya keya mon babine' nellak lakena sarta pas alake oreng laen pole, babine' jareya azina keya.”" 
Mark10:13 Badha reng-oreng se ngeba na'-kana' ka Isa, nyo'on sopaja Isa kasokana nompangngagi astana ka na'-kana' jareya, tape reng-oreng jareya egigiri bi' red-moredda Isa." 
Mark10:14 E bakto ngoladi parkara jareya, Isa duka sarta adhabu ka red-moredda, “Dina, ra, na'-kana' jareya me' olle nyander ka Sengko'! Ja' langlang, sabab oreng se kantha na'-kana' reya se tamaso' anggotana ommadda Allah." 
Mark10:15 Kaenga'e, ya! Pa'-sapa'a ta' ngadhep ka Allah akantha na'-kana' reya, ta' kera daddi anggotana ommadda Allah.”" 
Mark10:16 Saellana adhabu kantha jareya, Isa laju agellu' na'-kana' jareya, sarta nompangngagi astana ka na'-kana' jareya, ban kabbi padha bang-sebang eberkadi." 
Mark10:17 E bakto Isa nerrossagi parjalananna pole, pas badha oreng lalake' ka'-berka', laju asojud e ajunanna Isa. Oreng jareya mator, “Guru se sae, ponapa se kodu ejalannagi abdina sopaja kengenga odhi' se salerressa sareng langgeng?”" 
Mark10:18 “Arapa ba'na me' ngoca' Sengko' becce'?” dhabuna Isa. “Tadha' se becce' kajabana Allah malolo. 
Mark10:19 Ba'na la tao ka papakon se edhabuwagi Allah: ‘Ja' mate'e oreng; ja' azina; ja' co'-ngeco'; ja' daddi sakse palsu; ja' co-ngocowan oreng; pahormat ka rama ebuna.’ ” 
Mark10:20 “Guru,” ca'na oreng jareya, “sadajana papakon gapaneka ampon etoro' sareng abdina ngabidi abdina gi' kene'.”" 
Mark10:21 Isa ngoladi ka oreng jareya, panggaliyanna arassa neser, laju adhabu, “Pera' badha settong se ekaparlo ba'na. Kassa' juwal dhi'-andhi'na ba'na kabbi, pessena bagi ka oreng mesken, ban ba'na bakal olleya dunnya e sowarga. Mon la mare pas noro' Sengko'.”" 
Mark10:22 E bakto oreng jareya ngedhing dhabuna Isa buru, mowana laju katon orem, pas ondur dhari jadhiya, atena sossa sabab oreng jareya ce' sogina." 
Mark10:23 Isa ngoladi ka red-moredda se badha e kangan kacerra, laju adhabu, “Ce' malaradda ka oreng sogi se daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah!”" 
Mark10:24 Red-moredda getton ngedhing dhabuna Isa se kantha jareya, tape Isa terros adhabu, “Na', pajat ce' malaradda mon daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah!" 
Mark10:25 Agampangan onta maso' ka lobangnga jarum etembang bi' oreng sogi maso'a ka Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar.” 
Mark10:26 Red-moredda Isa heran onggu ngedhing dhabuna Isa jareya, sampe' padha saleng atanya sakanca'an, “Mon kantha jareya sapa se salamedda?”" 
Mark10:27 Isa ngoladi ka red-moredda jareya, laju adhabu, “Monggu ka manossa jareya barang se mostahel, tape monggu ka Allah tadha' barang se mostahel; apa'a bai bisa monggu ka Allah.”" 
Mark10:28 Petrus laju mator, “Mangken oladi, abdina sakanca ka'dhinto' ampon adinggallagi sadajana kaangguy ngereng Panjennengngan.”" 
Mark10:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Paparcaja, ya: oreng se adina'agi bengkona, otabana taretan lake'na otabana taretan bine'na, otabana ebuna, otabana eppa'na, otabana na'-ana'na, otabana sabana polana Sengko' ban polana Kabar Bagus dhari Allah," 
Mark10:30 oreng jareya bakal narema'a jang bannya'an e jaman sateya reya. Oreng jareya bakal narema'a bengko bariya keya taretan lalake' ban taretan babine', ebu, ana' ban saba, – ban seksa'an keya, kabbi bannya'na saratos kalena. Ban dhaggi', e jaman se bakal dhatengnga, oreng jareya bakal narema'a odhi' se sabendherra tor langgeng." 
Mark10:31 Tape bannya' oreng se sateya reya dha'-adha' bakal daddiya se dhi-budhi, ban bannya' se sateya reya dhi-budhi bakal daddiya dha'-adha'.”" 
Mark10:32 Isa ban red-moredda teppa'na e dhalem parjalanan ka Yerusalim. Isa alomampa e adha', red-moredda ngerengngagi, padha arassa ketter. Reng-oreng laen se ngereng e budhina padha arassa ketter keya. Saellana jareya Isa adikane pole red-moredda se dhubellas, epalaen dhari reng-oreng laenna sarta laju apareng oneng parkara se bakal kadaddiyana ka Salerana." 
Mark10:33 “Mara edhingngagi,” ca'na dhabuna, “sateya Sengko' ban ba'na entara ka Yerusalim. E jadhiya Pottrana Manossa bakal epassra'agiya ka mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama, bakal eokoma mate sarta laju epassra'agiya ka reng-oreng se banne Yahudi." 
Mark10:34 Bi' reng-oreng se banne Yahudi jareya Pottrana Manossa bakal eco-kocowa, ecopa'ana, eseksa'a, ban bakal esaliba. Tape e are se kapeng tello' Pottrana Manossa bakal odhi'a pole.”" 
Mark10:35 Yakobus ban Yahya, iya areya na'-ana'na Zebedeyus, laju nyander ka Isa. “Guru,” ca'na atorra, “badha se eso'ona abdina sareng taretan abdina ka'dhinto' ka Panjennengngan.”" 
Mark10:36 “Apa se epenta'a ba'na ka Sengko'?” dhabuna Isa. 
Mark10:37 Saodda se kadhuwa gella', “Manabi Panjennengngan ampon alenggi e tahta se molja, abdina sareng taretan abdina ka'dhinto' terro toju'a e kangan kacerra Panjennengngan.”" 
Mark10:38 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na ta' tao apa se epenta ba'na jareya. Apa ba'na sanggup ngenom dhari tobung kasangsara'an se eenoma Sengko', maso' ka dhalem kasangsara'an se talebat berra'na se emaso'ana Sengko'?”" 
Mark10:39 “Enggi, sanggup,” ca'na se kadhuwa jareya. Dhabuna Isa ka se kadhuwa jareya, “Ba'na pajat bakal ngenoma dhari piala kasangsara'an se eenoma Sengko' ban maso' ka dhalem kasangsara'an se talebat berra'na se emaso'ana Sengko'." 
Mark10:40 Tape Sengko' ta' andhi' ha' nantowagi sapa se kodu toju' e kanganna ban e kacerra Sengko'. Allah se nantowagi pa-sapa se epatoju'a e kennengngan jareya.” 
Mark10:41 E bakto ngedhing parkara jareya, red-mored laenna se sapolo laju padha peggel ka Yakobus ban Yahya." 
Mark10:42 Daddi Isa adikane red-moredda jareya epakompol kabbi, laju adhabu, “Ba'na tao ja' pin-pamimpinna bangsa se ta' kennal ka Allah nendhes ra'yadda. Ban ja-pangrajana nyecce' ra'yadda jareya." 
Mark10:43 Tape ba'na ta' olle kantha jareya! Sabaligga, mon e antarana ba'na badha se terro daddiya oreng raja, kodu daddi pangladinna se laen." 
Mark10:44 Ban mon e antarana ba'na terro daddiya se dha'-adha', kodu daddi dunorra se laen." 
Mark10:45 Sabab maske Pottrana Manossa padha keya, rabu banne menta'a ladine, tape aladinana ban massra'agiya nyabana kaangguy mabebasa oreng sabannya'na.”" 
Mark10:46 Isa ban red-moredda ban reng-oreng se bannya' gella' napa' ka Yerikho. E bakto kabbi padha mangkat dhari kottha jareya, badha oreng ngemmes buta se anyama Bartimeyus ana'na Timeyus teppa'na toju' e penggir lorong." 
Mark10:47 E bakto oreng buta jareya ngedhing ja' se lebat e seddi'anna jareya Isa oreng Nazaret, laju aera', “Isa! Pottrana Daud! Kaneserre abdidalem!”" 
Mark10:48 Oreng buta jareya egigiri bi' oreng sabannya'na, esoro neng-enneng. Tape oreng jareya la'-mala' aera' sajan kaja, “Pottrana Daud, kaneserre abdidalem!”" 
Mark10:49 Isa ambu laju adhabu, “Kassa' olok oreng rowa!” Daddi oreng buta jareya eolok. “Mara neng-enneng,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. “Ba'na edikane, mara jaga!”" 
Mark10:50 Oreng buta jareya melpallagi jubana, pas duli manjeng laju nyander ka Isa." 
Mark10:51 “Apa se epenta'a ba'na ka Sengko'?” dhabuna Isa. Saodda oreng buta gella', “Guru, abdidalem terro nengalana pole.”" 
Mark10:52 “Kassa' mole,” ca'na dhabuna Isa. “Ba'na baras polana ba'na parcaja.” Sanatkala jareya keya oreng buta jareya laju nangale'e sarta pas ngereng Isa ka lorong." 
Mark11:1 E bakto para' napa'a ka Yerusalim, Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka kottha Betfage ban Betania, e erengnga Gumo' Jaitun. E jadhiya Isa makon moredda kadhuwa mangkat kaadha'." 
Mark11:2 “Kassa' entar ka kampong e adha' rowa,” ca'na dhabuna Isa. “Mon buru maso' ka kampong jareya ba'na bakal nangaleyana budhu'na hemar se teppa'na epangger; hemar jareya ta' tao etompa' oreng. Bukka' talena hemar jareya, pas giba dha' enna'." 
Mark11:3 Mon badha oreng atanya ka ba'na arapa hemar jareya ma' ebukka' talena, koca', ‘Ekaparlo Pangeran, ban duliya epabali.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Daddi moredda se kadhuwa jareya mangkat, laju nemmo budhu'na hemar epangger ka labangnga bengko e penggir lorong. E bakto se kadhuwa jareya teppa'na mokka' talena," 
Mark11:5 reng-oreng se manjeng e jadhiya padha atanya, “He, aponapa'a sampeyan? Aponapa talena budhu'na hemar ganeka me' ebukka'?”" 
Mark11:6 Mored se kadhuwa jareya nyaodi akantha se edhabuwagi Isa. Daddi bi' reng-oreng se kadhuwa jareya epanneng ngeba budhu'na hemar gella'. 
Mark11:7 Budhu'na hemar jareya egiba ka Isa. Se kadhuwa jareya laju mokka' jubana ekagabay pa-kapana hemar jareya, dineng Isa laju netene hemar buru." 
Mark11:8 Bannya' oreng se mokka' jubana bang-sebang, eampar e lorong, badha pole se ngetthok ca'-ranca'na bu-tombuwan e gal-teggal, etabur e tengnga lorong." 
Mark11:9 Reng-oreng se ajalan e adha'na Isa ban se noro' bunte' e budhina padha ra'-era'an," 
Mark11:10 “Molja'agi Allah! Moga Allah aberkadi se rabu bit asmana Pangeran! Moga Allah aberkadi pamarenta'anna se bakal dhatengnga, pamarenta'anna Daud tang bangatowa! Molja'agi Allah Se Mahatenggi!”" 
Mark11:11 Isa dhi-budhina napa' ka Yerusalim, laju maso' ka Padalemman Socce. E jadhiya Isa ngoladi ka sakalenglengnga. Tape sarrena la para' malemma, laju meyos ka Betania ban moredda se dhubellas oreng." 
Mark11:12 Kalagguwanna, e bakto Isa ban red-moredda alomampa kalowar dhari Betania, Isa arassa lapar." 
Mark11:13 Dhari jauna Isa ngoladi bungkana ara se gumbus dhaunna, daddi laju meyos ka kennengnganna kajuwan jareya terro ngoladana pola me' badha buwana. Tape sanapa'na ka jadhiya bungkana ara jareya etemmo tadha' buwana, pera' dhaun malolo, sabab e bakto jareya banne osomma ara." 
Mark11:14 Isa adhabu ka bungkana ara jareya, “Molae sateya tadha' oreng se ngakana buwana ba'na pole!” Dhabuna jareya ekaedhing bi' red-moredda." 
Mark11:15 Sanapa'na ka Yerusalim, Isa meyos pole ka dhalem Padalemman Socce. E jadhiya Isa laju ngojuk sakabbiyanna oreng se ajuwal-belli e kennengngan jareya. Mejana reng-oreng se narema poroban pesse epalang-jungkelang, bariya keya katoju'anna reng-oreng se ajuwal dara." 
Mark11:16 Tadha' oreng settonga se eedine ngeba apa'a bai lebat e taneyanna Padalemman Socce. 
Mark11:17 Saellana jareya Isa laju morok reng-oreng e jadhiya. Dhabuna, “E dhalem Alketab la esebbuttagi kantha reya: Allah adhabu, ‘Tang Padalemman bakal enyama'ana kennengnganna oreng adu'a dhari sakabbiyanna bangsa.’ Tape bi' ba'na egabay lebunna maleng.”" 
Mark11:18 Kadaddiyan jareya ekaedhing bi' mam-imam kapala sarta ru-guru agama, daddi reng-oreng jareya laju padha nyare jalan mateyana Isa. Mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama jareya padha tako' ka Isa polana oreng padha kasambu' ngedhing pangajaranna." 
Mark11:19 Saellana para' malemma, Isa ban red-moredda mangkat dhari kottha jareya." 
Mark11:20 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu, e bakto alomampa e lorong, Isa ban red-moredda ngoladi bungkana ara rowa la mate ka mo'-ramo'na." 
Mark11:21 Petrus enga' ka kadaddiyan kaba'ari'anna, laju mator ka Isa, “Guru, oladi! Bungkana ara se ebasto Panjennengngan ba'ari' ka'issa' samangken mate.”" 
Mark11:22 Dhabuna Isa, “Paparcaja ka Allah." 
Mark11:23 Ongguwan, ba'na bisa ngoca' ka gumo' reya, ‘Mara ba'na paarbut dhari tana reya sarta pas ngalto' ka tase'!’ jareya masthe ekabbuli, asal ba'na ta' mangmang e dhalem atena sarta yakin ja' apa se ekoca'agi ba'na jareya bakal kalakona onggu." 
Mark11:24 Daddi, kaenga'e, ya: Mon ba'na adu'a sarta on-nyo'on ka Allah, paparcaja ja' apa se eso'on ba'na bi' Allah la eparenge, ban ba'na bakal narema'a apa se eso'on ba'na jareya." 
Mark11:25 Ban mon ba'na adu'a, tape badha oreng se ta' ekasennengnge ba'na, berri'i sapora gallu oreng jareya, sopaja Ramana ba'na e sowarga kasokana nyapora sa-dusana ba'na. [" 
Mark11:26 Mon ba'na ta' nyapora oreng laen, Ramana ba'na e sowarga ta' kera nyapora sa-dusana ba'na.]”" 
Mark11:27 Isa ban red-moredda abali ka Yerusalim pole. Teppa'na Isa alomampa e Padalemman Socce, mam-imam kapala, ru-guru agama ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi nyander." 
Mark11:28 Reng-oreng jareya atanya, “Ponapa dhasarra sampeyan me' alako sapaneka? Pasera se apareng kobasa ka sampeyan?”" 
Mark11:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' anya'-tanya'a keya ka ba'na. Mon ba'na bisa nyaodi, bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana dhari dhimma Sengko' olle kobasa ngalakone jareya kabbi."
