Mark11:30 Mara koca'agi, olle kobasa dhari dhimma Yahya abaptis oreng: olle dhari Allah apa dhari manossa?”" 
Mark11:31 Mam-imam kapala ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi jareya molae aparembagan. Oca'na, “Ngoca'a baramma se nyaman? Mon ngoca' ‘Dhari Allah’, tanto Isa adhabu, ‘Mon bariya, arapa ba'na me' ta' parcaja ka Yahya?’" 
Mark11:32 Tape malarat keya se ngoca'a, ‘Dhari manossa’ ”. Sabab reng-oreng jareya tako' ka oreng se bannya', sabab sakabbiyanna oreng yakin ja' Yahya reya nabbi." 
Mark11:33 Daddi reng-oreng jareya nyaot, “Ta' oneng.” Isa laju adhabu, “Mon bariya, Sengko' ta' abala'a keya ka ba'na olle kobasa dhari sapa Sengko' ngalakone reya kabbi.”" 
Mark12:1 Saellana jareya Isa molae abu-dhabu ngangguy parompama'an ka mam-imam kapala, ru-guru agama ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi jareya. Dhabuna: “Badha oreng se namenne kebbun anggur, kebbun jareya epagari e sakalenglengnga. Saellana jareya oreng buru pas ngale lobang egabaya pamerressanna anggur, sarta maddek manara panjaga'an. Kebbun anggur jareya pas epasewa ka reng-oreng se agaraba, saellana laju mangkat ka nagara laen." 
Mark12:2 E naleka napa' baktona molong buwana anggur, oreng jareya nyoro dunorra entar ka reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna jareya, kaangguy narema bagiyanna." 
Mark12:3 Tape bi' reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya dunorra oreng gella' epega', laju epokol sarta pas esoro mole ta' epagibai pa-apa." 
Mark12:4 Oreng se andhi' kebbun gella' nyoro dunorra se laen. Tape dunor jareya bi' reng-oreng se agarap kebbun gella' epokol cethagga, laju eojuk sambi eso-pesowe." 
Mark12:5 Se andhi' kebbun nyoro dunorra se laen pole, dunor jareya epate'e. Bariya keya bannya' nor-dunor laenna epakantha jareya keya, badha se epokol, badha se epate'e." 
Mark12:6 Sateya se gi' ekenneng soro la tadha', coma kare settong, iya areya ana' lake'na dibi', ana' buwana atena. Daddi dhi-budhina ana'na jareya se esoro entar ka reng-oreng se agarap kebbun anggurra. ‘Tanto tang ana' eargai,’ ca'na pekkerra." 
Mark12:7 Tape reng-oreng se agarap kebbun anggur jareya padha aparembagan kantha reya, ‘Areya' ana'na se andhi' kebbun. Mara pate'e bai, sopaja sangkolanna gaggar ka sengko' ban ba'na!’" 
Mark12:8 Daddi kana' jareya epega', laju epate'e. Badanna eontallagi ka lowaranna kebbun anggur gella'.”" 
Mark12:9 Isa laju mareksane, “Mon ca'na ba'na ba' arapa'a kerana oreng se andhi' kebbun gella'? Tanto bai oreng jareya entar mate'e reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna, ban kebbunna tantona laju epasewa ka reng-oreng laenna." 
Mark12:10 Tantona ba'na la maca ayat reya e dhalem Alketab, ‘Bato se ta' ekendha'i bi' kang-tokang bangonan aoba daddi bato se paleng ekaparlo." 
Mark12:11 Jareya se elampa'agi Pangeran; Lebur onggu!’ ” 
Mark12:12 Pin-pamimpinna Yahudi se ngedhing parompama'an jareya aehteyar nangkebba Isa, sabab reng-oreng jareya ngarte ja' parompama'an jareya etojjuwagi ka aba'na. Tape reng-oreng jareya tako' ka oreng se bannya', daddi laju padha ondur dhari jadhiya." 
Mark12:13 Badha reng-oreng Farisi ban reng-oreng anggotana golonganna Herodes se esoro ajebbak Isa bi' partanya'an-partanya'an. 
Mark12:14 Reng-oreng jareya entar ka Isa laju atanya, “Guru, kaula oneng ja' Sampeyan paneka jujur sareng ta' parduli ka pamanggina pasera'a saos. Panjennengngan ta' parduli ka pangkadda oreng, rang-terrangan morok parkara ponapa se daddi kasokanna Allah monggu ka manossa sabab Panjennengngan ta' le-mele oreng. Kadi ponapa pamanggina Panjennengngan, ‘Menorot agama ponapa ta' kalero manabi majar pajek ka Kaisar? Ponapa kaula kodu majar pajek gapaneka, ponapa bunten?’ ”" 
Mark12:15 Isa ngagali kamonafiganna reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' ngoddi ajebbaga Sengko'? Kodda' patao ka Sengko' pesse salaka settong.”" 
Mark12:16 Reng-oreng jareya ngala' pesse salaka settong eatorragi ka Isa. Dhabuna Isa, “Gambarra sapa ban nyamana sapa reya?” “Kaisar,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark12:17 “Mon bariya,” dhabuna Isa, “bagi ka Kaisar apa se daddi andhi'na Kaisar, ban atorragi ka Allah apa se daddi kaagunganna Allah.” Reng-oreng padha getton ngedhing parkara jareya." 
Mark12:18 Badha reng-oreng Saduki entar ka Isa. (Oreng Saduki reya ta' parcaja ja' oreng mate bakal odhi'a pole.) 
Mark12:19 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Guru, Mosa noles hokom ka'dhinto': ‘Mon oreng lalake' mate, ta' andhi' ana', taretanna kodu ngabine randhana sopaja aberri' toronan ka oreng se mate jareya.’" 
Mark12:20 Oneng badha oreng lalake' sataretan kapetto. Se sareyang araji, ta' gadhuwan ana', pas adinggal omor." 
Mark12:21 Babine' gapaneka ekaraji taretanna se nomer dhuwa' oreng gapaneka adinggal omor jugan, padha ta' gadhuwan ana'. Taretanna se nomer tello' sapaneka jugan," 
Mark12:22 sareng saterrossepon kantos ka se nomer petto'. Dhi-budhina babine' gapaneka adinggal omor jugan. 
Mark12:23 E are baktona oreng mate padha odhi' pole e are keyamat, babine' gapaneka rajina se ka'dhimma? Sabab se kapetto padha oneng daddi lakena.”" 
Mark12:24 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na ce' kalerona. Sabab ba'na ta' ngarte ka essena Alketab otabana kobasana Allah." 
Mark12:25 Sabab mon oreng mate odhi' pole, odhi'na padha ban malaekat e sowarga, ta' alake otaba abine pole." 
Mark12:26 Ban parkara oreng mate se odhi' pole, apa ba'na ta' tao maca e dhalem Ketabba Mosa parkara ombut se rabbang rowa? E dhalem yat-ayat jareya esebbuttagi ja' Allah adhabu ka Mosa, ‘Sengko' reya Allahna Ibrahim, Allahna Ishak ban Allahna Yakub.’" 
Mark12:27 Allah jareya banne Allahna oreng mate, tape Allahna oreng odhi'. Ba'na ce' kalerona!”" 
Mark12:28 Pas badha guru agama ngedhingngagi Isa se abu-dhabu ban reng-oreng dhari golongan Saduki jareya. Guru agama jareya tao ja' jawabanna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya ce' teppa'na. Daddi guru agama jareya pas nyander, laju atanya, “Papakon se ka'imma se paleng otama dhari sadajana?”" 
Mark12:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Parenta se nomer settong, iya areya: ‘Edhingngagi, he, bangsa Isra'il! Allahna Sengko' ban ba'na, Allah jareya Pangeran Se Settong." 
Mark12:30 Taresnae Guste Allahna sampe' ka dhalem atena, sampe' nyarepsep ka sokmana, kalaban ngettokkagi akkalla ban ngettokkagi kakowadanna.’" 
Mark12:31 Parenta se nomer dhuwa' iya areya: ‘Taresnae sasamana, akantha kataresna'anna ba'na ka aba'na dibi'.’ Tadha' pole parenta laenna se aparlowan dhari parenta se dhadhuwa' jareya.”" 
Mark12:32 Guru agama jareya laju mator ka Isa, “Lerres, Guru! Pajat lerres dhabuna Panjennengngan: Pangeran ka'dhinto' Allah se settong, tadha' Allah laennepon pole." 
Mark12:33 Sarengngan manossa kodu taresna ka Allah sampe' ka dhalem atena, kalaban ngettokkagi akkalla sarta ngettokkagi kakowadanna. Sarengngan pole manossa kodu taresna ka sasamana akadi kataresna'anna ka aba'na dibi'. Langkong sae atoro' parenta se dhadhuwa' ka'dhinto' etembang ngatorragi kurban obbaran sareng ban-kurban laenna ka Allah.”" 
Mark12:34 Isa ngoladi ja' jawabanna guru agama jareya ce' teppa'na. Daddi Isa laju adhabu, “Ba'na la para' daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah.” Saellana jareya tadha' oreng se bangala anya-tanya ka Isa." 
Mark12:35 Sabatara morok e Padalemman Socce, Isa mareksane, “Baramma ru-guru agama me' bisa ngoca' ja' Rato Panyalamet reya toronanna Daud?" 
Mark12:36 Mangkana Daud dibi', polana eilhame Erroh Allah, ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Pangeran adhabu ka tang Pangeran: Mara toju' e kanganna Sengko' sampe' so-mosona ba'na bi' sengko' epatellok ka ba'na.’" 
Mark12:37 Daddi mon Daud dibi' nyebbut Rato Panyalamet jareya ‘Pangeran’ baramma se bisa'a Rato Panyalamet jareya toronanna Daud?” Bannya' oreng e Padalemman Socce jareya se lebur ngedhingngagi Isa se morok. 
Mark12:38 Dhabuna Isa e bakto morok jareya, “Pate-ngate ka ru-guru agama se lebur lan-jalanan ngangguy juba se lanjang tor lebur ehormadi oreng e sar-pasar." 
Mark12:39 Reng-oreng jareya mele kennengngan se tarhormat e kennengnganna ibadhat ban e jang-onjangan. 
Mark12:40 Reng-oreng jareya nepo dha-randha tor arampas bengkona. Ban kaangguy notobi kajuba'anna, reng-oreng jareya adu'a epajang-lanjang e adha'anna oreng laen. Okomanna reng-oreng jareya bakal berra'a!”" 
Mark12:41 Isa alenggi ngadhep ka petthe tor-ator e Padalemman Socce sambi ngoladi reng-oreng se nyabbur pesse ka petthe jareya. Bannya' oreng sogi nyabbur pesse sabannya'na; 
Mark12:42 Laju badha oreng randha se mesken dhateng nyabbur pesse dimbaga dhadhuwa', iya areya pesse tampes se paleng kene' argana." 
Mark12:43 Isa adikane red-moredda, laju adhabu, “Kataowe, ya: Pesse se ecabbur randha rowa ka dhalem petthe rowa abannya'an dhari se ecabbur reng-oreng laenna." 
Mark12:44 Sabab reng-oreng laenna jarowa ngatorragi pesse bin-lebbinna se ta' kaabi'. Dineng randha rowa sanajjan mesken, apa se ekaandhi' eatorragi kabbi, sanajjan jareya ekaparlo kaangguy odhi'na.”" 
Mark13:1 E naleka Isa gubar dhari Padalemman Socce, sala settong dhari moredda mator, “Guru, oladi pona ngon-bangonan ka'issa'. Oladi to-batona. Talebat saena!”" 
Mark13:2 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na nangale'e ngon-bangonan se raja jareya? Batona tadha' settonga karena se gi' pagguna asoson e kennengnganna. Kabbi bakal epagujura.”" 
Mark13:3 Saellana jareya Isa meyos ka Gumo' Jaitun, pas alonggu e kennengngan se addhep ka Padalemman Socce. Laju dhateng Petrus, Yakobus, Yahya ban Andreyas, abu-dhabuwa ban Salerana sacara pribadhi." 
Mark13:4 Atorra ka Isa, “Ngereng abdina parenge oneng, bilaepon se bakal kadaddiyana ka'dhinto'? Ban ponapa dha-tandha se bakal noduwagi ja' ampon napa' baktona?”" 
Mark13:5 “Te-ngate,” ca'na dhabuna Isa, “ja' sampe' ba'na etepo oreng." 
Mark13:6 Bannya' oreng se bakal dhatengnga kalaban ngangguy Tang nyama sarta ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Sengko' reya Salerana!’ ban reng-oreng jareya pas nepo reng-oreng sabannya'na." 
Mark13:7 Mon ba'na ngedhing nye-monyena paperrangan e semma'na ban bar-kabar parkara paperrangan dhari jauna, ta' osa tako'. Pajat kodu badha kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan se kantha jareya, tape jareya ta' ekenneng arte'e ja' la baktona keyamat." 
Mark13:8 Nagara se settong bakal aperranga ban nagara laenna. Karaja'an se settong bakal nyerranga karaja'an laenna. E man-dhimman bakal badha'a lendhu ban babaja kalaparan. Jareya kabbi pera' dha-tandha dha'-adha'na malolo, akantha sake' tabu' se ekarassa bi' babine' se rembi'a." 
Mark13:9 Ba'na dibi' kodu te-ngate, sabab ba'na bakal etangkebba ban egiba'a ka pangadilan. Ba'na bakal epokola e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan. Ba'na bakal egiba'a ngadhep ka pangobasa ban ka to-rato polana ba'na Tang mored. Jareya kasempadan monggu ka ba'na kaangguy nyakse'e parkara Sengko' ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark13:10 Tape sabellunna keyamat Kabar Bagus dhari Allah kodu epabalattra gallu ka sakabbiyanna bangsa. 
Mark13:11 Ban mon ba'na la etangkep tor egiba ka pangadilan, ba'na ta' osa tako' parkara apa se ekoca'agiya ba'na; mon la napa' baktona ba'na kodu acaca, koca'agi apa se ebala'agi ka ba'na e bakto jareya. Sabab pa-apa se ekoca'agi ba'na jareya banne oca'na ba'na dibi', tape dhari Erroh Allah dhatengnga." 
Mark13:12 Oreng bakal akiyanadi taretanna dibi' sopaja epate'e, bariya keya antara eppa' ban ana'na. Na'-kana' bakal alabana ka oreng towana sarta massra'agi oreng towana sopaja epate'e." 
Mark13:13 Oreng bakal baji'a kabbi ka ba'na polana ba'na Tang mored. Tape pa'-sapa'a se koko sampe' aherra, bakal epasalamedda.”" 
Mark13:14 “Ba'na bakal nangaleyana ‘Kajahadan se maancor’ manjeng e kennengngan se masthena banne kennengnganna. (Catheddan kaangguy para maos: tetene ponapa artena!) E bakto jareya oreng se badha e Yudea kodu buru ka pagunongan. 
Mark13:15 Oreng se badha e attassa ata'na bengkona ja' wang-mowang bakto toron ban maso' ka dhalem bengkona parlo la'-ngala'a. 
Mark13:16 Oreng se badha e teggalla ja' mole ngala'a jubana. 
Mark13:17 Marenges onggu re-are jareya monggu ka babine' se ngandhung otabana se so-nyosowe! 
Mark13:18 Nyo'on ka Allah sopaja kabadha'an se cara jareya ja' sampe' kadaddiyan e mosem nambara'. 
Mark13:19 Saabidda re-are se nako'e jareya bakal badha'a kasossa'an se gi' ta' tao kadaddiyan e dunnya reya molae dhari bakto Allah nyepta'agi dunnya sampe' sateya, ban ta' kera tao kadaddiyan pole." 
Mark13:20 Ja' sakenga Allah ta' mapandha' bakto jareya, ta' kera badha oreng se salamet. Tape polana ommat peleyanna, bakto jareya bi' Allah epapandha'." 
Mark13:21 Daddi, e bakto jareya mon badha oreng se ngoca' ka ba'na, ‘Tenggu, wa, Rato Panyalamet badha e dhinna'!’ otaba, ‘Tenggu, wa, Salerana badha e dhissa'!’ – ja' parcaja." 
Mark13:22 Sabab bakal dhatengnga panyalamet-panyalamet se palsu ban bi-nabbi palsu. Reng-oreng jareya bakal ngalakonana kon-lalakon se lowar biyasa sarta kaajiban-kaajiban kaangguy co-ngoco oreng, la'-mala' mon ekenneng, ommat peleyanna Allah eco-kocowa keya." 
Mark13:23 Daddi pate-ngate! Kabbi jareya bi' Sengko' la ekabala ka ba'na sabellunna kalakon.” 
Mark13:24 “Saellana masa kasossa'an se raja jareya la lebat, are bakal pettengnga ban bulan ta' tera' pole." 
Mark13:25 Tang-bintang bakal gaggara dhari langnge', ban sakabbiyanna se ngobasae bang-abang bakal salbuda." 
Mark13:26 E bakto jareya Pottrana Manossa bakal etangaleyana rabu e dhalem ondhem kalaban kobasa se raja tor kamolja'anna. 
Mark13:27 Pottrana Manossa jareya bakal ngotosa kat-malaekadda ka padduna bume se pa'-empa', epakona makompol ommat peleyanna dhari co'-konco'na bume ka co'-konco'na langnge'.”" 
Mark13:28 “Ba'na kodu ngala' pangajaran dhari bungkana ara. Mon ca'-ranca'na la biru ban lembu', sarta molae nyemme, jareya tandhana la para' mosem panas." 
Mark13:29 Bariya keya mon pa-apa se esebbuttagi Sengko' gella' molae kadaddiyan, ba'na kodu tao ja' baktona la ce' para'na." 
Mark13:30 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya, sakabbiyanna kadaddiyan jareya bakal kalakona sabellunna reng-oreng se odhi' sateya reya mate kabbi." 
Mark13:31 Langnge' ban bume bakal mosna'a, tape Tang oca' teptep salanjangnga.”" 
Mark13:32 “Maske bariya, tadha' oreng se taowa bila are otama ejjamma. Kat-malaekat e sowarga ban Pottra padha ta' tao keya, pera' Rama se ngagali." 
Mark13:33 Daddi ba'na kodu aga-jaga ban ngastete, sabab ba'na ta' tao bila baktona." 
Mark13:34 Kabadha'anna padha ban oreng se ajalanan jau dhari bengkona. La-kabulana epassrae esoro ngoros bengkona, kabbi padha eberri'i lako bang-sebang. Panjagana labangnga epessen sopaja ajaga epangastete." 
Mark13:35 Daddi ba'na kodu aga-jaga, sabab ba'na ta' tao bila oreng se andhi' bengko jareya se dhatengnga, olle daddi ri'-bari' otabana tengnga malem, olle daddi e bakto gi' petteng, otabana e bakto are molae moncar." 
Mark13:36 Mon se andhi' bengko jareya dhateng dadagan, ja' sampe' ba'na etemmo teppa'na tedhung." 
Mark13:37 Apa se ekoca'agi Sengko' ka ba'na reya, bi' Sengko' ekoca'agi keya ka sakabbiyanna oreng: aga-jaga!”" 
Mark14:1 Are Paska ban Paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i la korang dhu are. Mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama nyare jalan baramma carana se terro mega'a Isa tape se ta' etemmowa oreng, ban baramma se mateyana." 
Mark14:2 “Tape ta' ekenneng jalannagi e baktona paraya'an,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “dhaggi' pas baridhu.”" 
Mark14:3 E settong are Isa badha e Betania, e bengkona Simon se tao andhi' panyaket kole' budhuk. E bakto jareya badha oreng babine' kasorang nyander ka Isa. Babine' jareya ngeba butol dhari marmar aesse mennya' ro'om se larang, se ekagabay dhari mo'-ramo' se ro'om. Teppa'na Isa adha'ar, babine' jareya mabella butolla, mennya'na laju eserammagi ka serana Isa." 
Mark14:4 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya badha se padha peggel sarta padha saleng ngoca', “Apa gunana mennya' jarowa ewang-buwang?" 
Mark14:5 Mennya' jareya ekenneng juwal lebbi dhari tello ratos pesse salaka, pessena ekenneng bagi ka oreng mesken!” Reng-oreng jareya gigir ka babine' gella'." 
Mark14:6 Tape Isa adhabu, “La dina, ra, panneng! Arapa ba'na ma' masossa babine' reya? Oreng reya ngalakone barang se bagus ka Sengko'." 
Mark14:7 Oreng mesken salanjangnga badha e antarana ba'na, ban bila'a bai mon ba'na akarep, ba'na bisa nolong reng-oreng jareya. Tape Sengko' ta' salanjangnga apolong ban ba'na." 
Mark14:8 Babine' reya ngalakone barang se ekenneng lakone aba'na. Sengko' eserame mennya' ro'om, eparanta kaadha' sabellunna Sengko' ekoburragi." 
Mark14:9 Paparcaja, ya! E saantero dunnya, e dhimma'a bai Kabar Bagus dhari Allah eberta'agi oreng, lalakonna babine' reya bakal ecareta'agiya keya menangka parengeddan ka aba'na.”" 
Mark14:10 Saellana jareya Yudas Iskariyot, sala settong dhari moredda Isa se dhubellas oreng jarowa, entar ka mam-imam kapala, maksodda akiyanadana Isa ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark14:11 Reng-oreng jareya ce' peragga ngedhing oca'na Yudas, sarta ajanji aberri'a pesse ka Yudas jareya. Daddi Yudas laju molae nyare kasempadan se akiyanada ka Isa se epassra'agiya ka mam-imam kapala jareya." 
Mark14:12 E are parmola'an e dhalem Paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i, teppa' baktona oreng nyambelli dumba Paska, red-moredda Isa atanya, “Esadhiya'agiya e ka'imma dhadha'aran Paskana Panjennengngan?”" 
Mark14:13 Isa laju makon moredda kadhuwa, dhabuna, “Kassa' entar ka kottha, e dhissa' ba'na bakal tatemmowa ban oreng lalake' se ngeba kendhi aesse aeng. Toro' bunte' oreng jareya" 
Mark14:14 ka bengko se emaso'e oreng jareya. Ba'na pas ngoca' ka se andhi' bengko, ‘Ca'epon Guru, e ka'imma Guru sareng red-moredda se adha'ara dhadha'aran Paska?’" 
Mark14:15 Oreng jareya tanto laju noduwagi ka ba'na kennengngan se lebar e bagiyan attas. Kennengngan jareya la eator, genna' ban pakakassa. Paranta kabbi e jadhiya kaangguy Sengko' ban ba'na.”" 
Mark14:16 Mored se kadhuwa jareya mangkat ka kottha. E jadhiya se kadhuwa jareya nemmo akantha apa se la edhabuwagi Isa kabbi; se kadhuwa jareya laju maranta dhadha'aran Paska. 
Mark14:17 E baja malem Isa rabu ka jadhiya asareng ban moredda se dhubellas oreng. 
Mark14:18 Teppa'na padha adha'ar, Isa adhabu, “Edhingngagi: e antarana ba'na se sateya reya ngakan abareng ban Sengko', badha settong se bakal akiyanadana Sengko'.”" 
Mark14:19 Ngedhing dhabuna Isa jareya red-moredda padha takerjat, laju padha atanya ate-gante, “Tantoepon se emaksod Panjennengngan banne abdina, ta' enggi?”" 
Mark14:20 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng jareya sala settong e antarana ba'na se dhubellas reya, se ngakan sapereng bi' Sengko'." 
Mark14:21 Pajat Pottrana Manossa bakal seda'a akantha se la esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab. Tape calaka' onggu oreng se akiyanadi Pottrana Manossa jareya! Lebbi becce' ja' sakenga oreng jareya ta' elahirragi sakale!” 
Mark14:22 Teppa'na se laen padha ngakan, Isa mondhut roti laju adu'a asokkor ka Allah. Rotina pas ethok-ketthok bi' astana, laju eparengngagi ka red-moredda sambi adhabu, “Mara kala' pas kakan, areya' Tang badan.”" 
Mark14:23 Saellana jareya Isa laju mondhut pialana anggur, pas adu'a asokkor ka Allah, sarta marengngagi piala jareya ka red-moredda; red-moredda jareya padha ngenom anggur jareya." 
Mark14:24 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu, “Areya' Tang dhara se ngessa'agi parjanjiyanna Allah, dhara se epangalocor kaangguy oreng sabannya'na." 
Mark14:25 Paparcaja, ya: Sengko' ta' kera ngenom anggur reya pole sampe' baktona Sengko' ngenom anggur se anyar abareng ban ba'na e Dunnyana Rama Se Anyar.”" 
Mark14:26 Samarena jareya Isa ban red-moredda anyanye amolja'agi Allah. Saellana laju padha mangkat ka Gumo' Jaitun. 
Mark14:27 Isa pas adhabu pole ka red-moredda, “Ba'na bakal padha'a buru adina'agi Sengko'. Sabab e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Allah bakal mateyana se ngowan, ban ba-dumbana bakal asalebbudana.’" 
Mark14:28 Tape saellana Sengko' epaodhi' pole, Sengko' ajangadha'ana ba'na ka Galilea.”" 
Mark14:29 “Bunten,” ca'na atorra Petrus, “sanajjan se laen adinggallagi Panjennengngan, abdina bunten, ta' kera.”" 
Mark14:30 Dhabuna Isa ka Petrus, “Kaenga'e, ya, malem reya keya, sabellunna ajam akongko' dhu kale, ba'na la tello kale mongkere Sengko'.”" 
Mark14:31 Petrus nyaot epaterrang, “Sanare abdina kodu mate asareng Panjennengngan, abdina ta' kera ngoca' ta' kennal ka Panjennengngan!” Ban red-moredda se laen ngoca' kantha jareya keya." 
Mark14:32 Isa ban red-moredda napa' ka Getsemani; Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Ba'na toju' e dhinna' gallu sabatara Sengko' entara adu'a.”" 
Mark14:33 Isa laju ngajak Petrus, Yakobus ban Yahya. Panggaliyanna molae arassa sompek tor ngalengsang." 
Mark14:34 “Tang ate ce' sompegga,” ca'na dhabuna ka red-moredda se katello gella', “sampe' rassana akantha se mateya. Ba'na neng e dhinna' gallu, ya, ban aga-jaga!”" 
Mark14:35 Isa maso' ka dhalemman sakone', laju asojud ka tana sambi adu'a. E dhalem du'ana Salerana nyo'on ka Allah sopaja mon eparengngagi ja' sampe' epananggung kasangsara'an rowa." 
Mark14:36 “Rama, Rama kaula,” ca'na panyo'onna, “tadha' barang se mohal monggu ka Junandalem. Lopoddagi Abdidalem dhari kasangsara'an ka'dhinto'. Namong ja' norodi karep Abdidalem, kadi ponapa ca'epon kasokanna Junandalem.”" 
Mark14:37 Saellana jareya Isa abali, red-moredda etemmo padha tedhung. Isa adhabu ka Petrus, “Simon, ba'na tedhung, ya? Ta' bisa, ya, ba'na aga-jaga saejjam balakka'?”" 
Mark14:38 Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda, “Mara aga-jaga ban adu'a me' olle ba'na ta' ekenneng coba. Pajat, errohna ba'na endha' ngalakone barang se bendher, tape ba'na ta' sanggup sabab tabi'adda manossa reya ta' kowat.”" 
Mark14:39 Isa nyengla pole dhari jadhiya, pas adu'a ngangguy ca'-oca' se padha ban se jang adha'an." 
Mark14:40 Samarena pas abali pole ka kennengnganna red-moredda ban red-moredda jareya etemmo tedhung pole, sabab ce' ngantogga. Reng-oreng jareya ta' tao kodu mator baramma ka Isa." 
Mark14:41 E bakto abali katellokaleyanna, Isa adhabu ka red-moredda, “Ba'na gi' tedhung ban aistirahat, ya? Ella, la cokop! Sateya la napa' baktona Pottrana Manossa kodu epassra'agi ka reng-oreng se dusa." 
Mark14:42 Mara jaga, mara ajalan! Arowa' oreng se akiyanadi Sengko' la dhateng!”" 
Mark14:43 Teppa'na Isa gi' abu-dhabu, pas dhateng Yudas, iya areya sala settong dhari moredda. Yudas etoro' bunte' oreng sabannya'na se padha ngeba peddhang ban thong-penthong. Reng-oreng jareya eotos mam-imam kapala, ru-guru agama ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi." 
Mark14:44 Se akiyanat jareya la aberri' tandha ka reng-oreng se sabannya'na gella', oca'na, “Oreng se eseyom bi' kaula, ganeka orengnga. Tangkep, pas bakta, jaga palerres.”" 
Mark14:45 Sanapa'na ka jadhiya, Yudas nyander ka Isa, laju mator, “Guru!” pas nyeyom Isa." 
Mark14:46 Reng-oreng se abareng Yudas nyander, Isa etangkep, pas ekalenthong." 
Mark14:47 Tape sala settong dhari reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya ngonos peddhangnga laju mokol dunorra imam agung sampe' kotthong kopengnga. 
Mark14:48 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Apa Sengko' reya oreng jahat, ya, me' ba'na sampe' ngeba peddhang ban thong-penthong se mega'a Sengko'?" 
Mark14:49 Sabban are Sengko' ngajar e Padalemman Socce e adha'na ba'na, tape bi' ba'na Sengko' ta' epega'. Tape pajat kodu kalakon kantha reya, sopaja kalakon apa se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab.”" 
Mark14:50 Red-moredda Isa padha buru, guruna edina'agi." 
Mark14:51 Badha oreng gi' dha-ngodha kasorang, pera' ngangguy kaen linen salambar se ebetbeddagi ka badanna; oreng jareya noro' bunte' Isa. Oreng jareya bi' reng-oreng se bannya' epega'a," 
Mark14:52 tape oreng jareya mokka' kaenna, pas buru abangkang." 
Mark14:53 Isa laju egiba ka bengkona imam agung. E jadhiya akompol mam-imam kapala, pin-pamimpin Yahudi ban ru-guru agama." 
Mark14:54 Petrus noro' bunte' Isa dhari jauna, maso' ka taneyanna bengkona imam agung. E jadhiya Petrus toju' maanga' badanna e seddi'na kampowan, apolong ban para pangawal." 
Mark14:55 Mam-imam kapala ban sakabbiyanna Mahkamah Agama aehteyar nyare bukte se masala'a Isa sopaja bisa'a eokom mate, tape ta' nemmo." 
Mark14:56 Bannya' sakse se epadhateng egabaya sakse palsu, tape katerranganna reng-oreng jareya ta' padha se settong ban settongnga." 
Mark14:57 Saellana jareya pas badha reng-oreng se manjeng aberri' kasakseyan palsu kantha reya," 
Mark14:58 “Kaula mereng oreng paneka ngoca' sapaneka, ‘Sengko' magujura Padalemman Socce gabayanna manossa reya, ban saellana olle tello are Sengko' maddegga pole se banne gabayanna manossa.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Tape katerranganna reng-oreng jareya tadha' se cocoga keya se settong ban settongnga. 
Mark14:60 Imam agung jareya pas manjeng e adha'na reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, pas atanya ka Isa, “Apa ba'na ta' nyaodana se earannagi reng-oreng reya?”" 
Mark14:61 Tape Isa mendel, ta' adhabu pa-apa sakale. Imam agung gella' atanya pole, “Apa ba'na reya Rato Panyalamet, Pottrana Allah Se Mahakudus?”" 
Mark14:62 “Iya, bendher,” ca'na dhabuna Isa, “ban ba'na bakal nangaleyana Pottrana Manossa alenggi e kanganna Allah Se Mahakobasa, ban rabu e dhalem ondhem dhari langnge'!”" 
Mark14:63 Daddi imam agung pas bit-nyebbit kalambina sarta ngoca', “Samangken pon ta' parlo sakse pole!" 
Mark14:64 Sampeyan ampon padha meyarsa dibi' ca'-oca'na oreng paneka se metenna asmana Allah. Samangken ponapa potosanna sampeyan?” Reng-oreng jareya kabbi padha motose ja' Isa sala ban kodu eokom mate. 
Mark14:65 Badha reng-oreng se molae nyopae Isa, socana etotobi bi' rambing sarta laju epokole. “Mara tebbak,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “sapa se mokol ba'na?” Wal-pangawal ro'-noro' kantha jareya keya." 
Mark14:66 Sabatara Petrus gi' badha e taneyan, sala settong dhari bareng bine'na imam agung entar ka jadhiya." 
Mark14:67 E bakto nangale Petrus maanga' badanna e seddi'na kampowan, babine' jareya mandeng ka Petrus sarta pas ngoca', “Sampeyan gu ta' abareng bi' Isa dhari Nazaret ka'issa'?”" 
Mark14:68 Tape Petrus mongker. “Sengko' ta' tao ban ta' ngarte apa maksodda ba'na,” ca'na Petrus ka barengnga imam agung jareya. Petrus laju nyengga ka labang sakethengnga bengkona imam agung jareya. [E bakto jareya ajam akongko'.]" 
Mark14:69 Bareng se babine' gella' nangale'e Petrus pole, pas ngoca' ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Oreng ganeka pajat sala settong dhari reng-oreng se abareng Isa!”" 
Mark14:70 Tape Petrus mongker pole. Ta' abit dhari jareya reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya ngoca' pole ka Petrus, “Ba'na ta' bisa mongker pole. Ba'na pajat sala settong dhari red-moredda Isa rowa, sabab ba'na oreng Galilea!”" 
Mark14:71 Petrus pas aso-pesowan sambi ngoca', “Kaula ta' kennal ka oreng se ekamaksod bi' sampeyan ganeka!”" 
Mark14:72 E bakto jareya keya ajam akongko' kadhukaleyanna. Ban Petrus laju enga' apa se edhabuwagi Isa ka aba'na, “Sabellunna ajam akongko' dhu kale, ba'na la tello kale mongkere Sengko'.” Daddi Petrus laju nanges gut-sergudan." 
Mark15:1 Gi' teng-petteng sakabbiyanna Mahkamah Agama tamaso' mam-imam kapala, pin-pamimpin Yahudi ban ru-guru agama padha akompol aparembagan duliyan. Isa ekalenthong, pas egiba epassra'agi ka Pilatus." 
Mark15:2 Pilatus atanya ka Isa, “Apa bendher ba'na reya ratona oreng Yahudi?” “Panjennengngan dibi' adhabu saka'dhinto,” dhabuna Isa." 
Mark15:3 Bannya' se earannagi ka Isa bi' mam-imam kapala," 
Mark15:4 daddi Pilatus pas mareksane pole ka Isa, “Ba'na ta' nyaoda pa-apa, ya? Ba'na la ngedhing bannya'na se earannagi ka ba'na bi' reng-oreng reya!”" 
Mark15:5 Isa ta' adhabu pa-apa pole, sampe' Pilatus kasambu'." 
Mark15:6 Sabban Paraya'an Paska, biyasana Pilatus makalowar oreng tahanan kasorang, noro' peleyanna oreng bannya'." 
Mark15:7 E bakto jareya, e dhalem penjara, e antarana pamberonta'-pamberonta' se mate'e reng-oreng e dhalem rarusun, badha settong oreng se anyama Barabbas." 
Mark15:8 E bakto oreng se bannya' akompol sarta nyo'on ka Pilatus sopaja makalowar oreng tahanan kantha biyasana," 
Mark15:9 Pilatus mareksane, “Apa ba'na endha' mon Sengko' makalowar ratona oreng Yahudi reya kaangguy norodi parnyo'onanna ba'na?”" 
Mark15:10 Sabab Pilatus tao onggu ja' mam-imam kapala jareya massra'agi Isa ka salerana polana ere atena. 
Mark15:11 Tape mam-imam kapala jareya nas-manase ra'yat esoro menta ka Pilatus sopaja Barabbas bai se epakalowar kaangguy ra'yat jareya. 
Mark15:12 Pilatus pas adhabu pole ka oreng se bannya' jareya, “Mon bariya, epabaramma'a bi' sengko' oreng se bi' ba'na esebbut ratona oreng Yahudi rowa?”" 
Mark15:13 Reng-oreng se bannya' jareya aera', “Salib oreng gapaneka!”" 
Mark15:14 “Tape apa kajahadanna?” dhabuna Pilatus. Oreng se bannya' jareya aera' akaja'an pole, “Salib oreng gapaneka!”" 
Mark15:15 Pilatus terro masennengnga atena oreng se bannya' jareya, daddi Barabbas pas epakalowar norodi parmenta'anna reng-oreng jareya. Saellana jareya Isa laju esoro peccot, ban samarena pas epassra'agi kaangguy esalib." 
Mark15:16 Isa ebakta ka balai pangadilan e karatonna gubennor bi' rit-parjurit. Saellana jareya sakabbiyanna pasukan laju epakompol. 
Mark15:17 Isa pas epangagem juba bungo terrong, sarta egabayyagi makotha dhari ca'-ranca' se adhuri, se pas epasang ka serana." 
Mark15:18 Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya laju padha ngatore salam ka Isa. “Ngatore salam, Rato Yahudi!” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Mark15:19 Isa pas epokol bi' tongket, terros ecopae; reng-oreng jareya laju asojud e ajunanna." 
Mark15:20 Samarena ekagabay en-maenan, jubana se bungo terrong jareya ebukka', laju esalene rasoganna dibi' pole. Saellana jareya Isa pas egiba kalowar, esaliba." 
Mark15:21 E tengnga jalan reng-oreng se ngeba Isa jareya tatemmo ban oreng se dhari disa entara ka kottha; nyamana Simon. Oreng jareya bi' rit-parjurit se ngeba Isa epaksa esoro mekollagi salibba Isa. (Simon jareya dhari Kirene, eppa'na dhari Aleksander ban Rufus.)" 
Mark15:22 Isa egiba ka settong kennengngan se anyama Golgota, artena “Kennengnganna Galunthonganna Cethak”." 
Mark15:23 E jadhiya Isa eatorana anggur se ecampor ban emmor, tape Isa ta' kasokan adha'ar nom-enoman jareya." 
Mark15:24 Isa laju esalib, rasoganna egi-bagi, sarta pas eellot kaangguy nantowagi se kemma bagiyanna bang-sebang." 
Mark15:25 Se nyalib jareya pokol sanga' gu-laggu. 
Mark15:26 E attassa kaju salibba epasange tolesan se nyebbuttagi parkara se earannagi ka Salerana amonye kantha reya: “Ratona Oreng Yahudi”. 
Mark15:27 Badha keya bigal kadhuwa se esalib epabareng ban Isa; se settong e saba' e kanganna, settonganna esaba' e kacerra. [" 
Mark15:28 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya la kalakon apa se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab: “Salerana eanggep tamaso' oreng jahat.”] 
Mark15:29 Reng-oreng se lebat e jadhiya pek-kepeggan sambi ca'-ngoca'e Isa. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “He! Ba'na se magujura Padalemman Socce ban maddegga Padalemman jareya pole e dhalem tello are!" 
Mark15:30 Kodda' toron dhari kaju salib jareya ban tolong aba'na dibi'!” 
Mark15:31 Bariya keya mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama padha ca'-ngoca'e Isa. “Oreng laen epasalamet, tape ta' bisa masalamet aba'na dibi'!" 
Mark15:32 Mon oreng reya pajat rato Isra'il, Rato Panyalamet, dina me' olle toron dhari kaju salib; mon sengko' la nangale'e kantha jareya, buru sengko' parcaja!” Ban oreng kadhuwa se esalib epabareng ban Isa jareya ya-nyeya Isa keya." 
Mark15:33 E baja beddhuk saantero nagara petteng calemodan, abidda sampe' tello ejjam." 
Mark15:34 E baja pokol tello' asar Isa aera' ce' kajana, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakhtani?” se artena, “Ya, Allah, ya, Allah, aponapa abdidalem me' edinggallagi sareng Junandalem?”" 
Mark15:35 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya badha se padha ngedhing paera'na Isa jareya, laju ngoca', “Edhingngagi, oreng rowa lok-ologan Eliya!”" 
Mark15:36 E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha kasorang se ngala' kembangnga karang, ecabbur ka dhalem anggur se celo'. Kembangnga karang jareya pas ejujjuwagi ka konco'na kaju, laju ejuluwagi sampe' ka lathena Isa, sambi ngoca', “Nante', mara abassagi pola Eliya me' rabu matoron oreng reya dhari kaju salib reya.”" 
Mark15:37 Isa pas acerreng, laju seda." 
Mark15:38 Bir-tabir se epobu e Padalemman Socce beddha madhuwa dhari attas sampe' ka baba. 
Mark15:39 Parwira se manjeng e adha'na salibba Isa nangale'e baramma pasedana Isa. Ca'na parwira jareya, “Pajat bendher oreng reya Pottrana Allah!”" 
Mark15:40 E jadhiya badha babine'an se ngabassagi kadaddiyan jareya kabbi dhari jauna. E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha Salome, Miriyam Magdalena, ban Miriyam ebuna Yakobus se ngodha ban Yoses." 
Mark15:41 Babine'an jareya se noro' tor nolong Isa e bakto badha e Galilea. Bannya' keya babine'an laen e jadhiya se entar ka Yerusalim abareng ban Isa. 
Mark15:42 Are la molae malem e bakto Yusup dhari Arimateya dhateng. Yusup dhari Arimateya jareya anggotana Mahkamah Agama se ehormadi oreng, se anante' jamanna Allah marenta menangka Rato. Are jareya are Parsadhiya'an (iya areya are sabellunna are Sabat). Daddi Yusup mabangal ngadhep Pilatus nyo'on jinazana Isa." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Pilatus takerjat meyarsa ja' Isa la seda. Daddi laju adikane kapalana pasukan sarta mareksane apa Isa la abit se seda. 
Mark15:45 Saellana meyarsa reppodanna parwira jareya, bi' Pilatus Yusup eedine ngala' jinazana Isa." 
Mark15:46 Yusup laju melle kaen kapan dhari linen se alos. Saellana jinazana Isa epatoron, laju ebundu' bi' kaen jareya, sarta pas esaba' e dhalem pasareyan se ekagabay e dhalem gumo' bato. Saellana jareya Yusup laju magulu' bato se raja epanotop koburan jareya." 
Mark15:47 Sabatara jareya Miriyam Magdalena ban Miriyam ebuna Yoses ngabassagi e dhimma Isa se esareyagi. 
Mark16:1 E bakto are Sabat la lebat, Miriyam Magdalena, Miriyam ebuna Yakobus, ban Salome padha entar melle racegan kaangguy amennya'e jinazana Isa." 
Mark16:2 Gu-laggu, e bakto are gi' buru moncar e are Ahad, iya areya are se kapeng settong e dhalem menggu jareya, reng-oreng jareya entar ka makam." 
Mark16:3 E tengnga jalan reng-oreng jareya padha saleng ngoca', “Sapa dhaggi' se nolongana agulu'agi bato totobba makam rowa?” Sabab bato jareya ce' rajana. Tape sanapa'na ka makam, reng-oreng jareya nangale'e ja' batona la agulu'." 
Mark16:4  
Mark16:5 Daddi babine'an jareya laju padha maso' kabbi ka dhalem koburan jareya. E dhalem koburan jareya, reng-oreng jareya takerjat, amarga nangale'e badha oreng lalake' dha-ngodha kasorang, ngangguy juba pote, toju' neng e bagiyan kangan." 
Mark16:6 “Ella ja' tako',” dhabuna oreng ngodha jareya. “Sengko' tao ba'na nyare Isa oreng Nazaret se esalib rowa. Sateya tadha' e dhinna', la odhi' pole! Mara abassagi, areya' kennengnganna Salerana esarennagi bi' red-moredda." 
Mark16:7 Sateya kassa' ba'na entar abala ka red-moredda, tamaso' Petrus. Kabala kantha reya, ‘Isa meyos ka Galilea ajangadha'i sampeyan. E ka'issa' sampeyan tanto tapanggi sareng Salerana, akadi se ampon edhabuwagi Salerana ka sampeyan.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Daddi babine'an jareya kalowar dhari koburan gella', laju buru polana takerjat ban tako'. Kabbi padha ta' acaca'an ka pa-sapa, polana tako'. [" 
Mark16:9 Saellana Isa odhi' pole, e are Ahad gu-laggu, dha'-adha' kadibi' Salerana ngaton ka Miriyam Magdalena. (Dhari Miriyam Magdalena jareya Isa tao makalowar erroh jahat kapetto.) Babine'an jareya entar ka Petrus ban ca-kancana, pas notorragi epapandha' sabarang se edhabuwagi oreng ngodha rowa." 
Mark16:10 Daddi Miriyam Magdalena laju entar ngabala kadaddiyan jareya ka ca-kancana Isa, se teppa'na sossa sarta nanges. Saellana jareya, Isa dibi' kalaban parantara'anna red-moredda ngabarragi dhari temor ka bara' berta se socce ban langgeng parkara kasalameddan se langgeng.]" 
Mark16:11 Tape e bakto ngedhing kabar ja' Isa odhi' pole ban Miriyam Magdalena dibi' nangale'e Salerana, reng-oreng jareya ta' parcaja." 
Mark16:12 Saellana jareya Isa ngaton kalaban cara laen ka moredda kadhuwa se teppa'na ajalan entara ka kampong. 
Mark16:13 Reng-oreng jareya abali, notorragi kadaddiyan jareya ka en-laenna. Tape reng-oreng se laen jareya ta' parcaja." 
Mark16:14 Dhi-budhina Isa ngaton ka red-moredda se sabellas e bakto red-moredda jareya teppa'na ngakan. Isa apareng parengeddan ka red-moredda jareya polana korang imanna ban cengkal sampe' ta' parcaja ka reng-oreng se la padha nangale'e dibi' ja' Isa odhi' pole. 
Mark16:15 Isa pas adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Kassa' ba'na entar ka saantero dunnya ban pabalattra Kabar Bagus dhari Allah rowa ka sakabbiyanna ommat manossa." 
Mark16:16 Oreng se ta' parcaja bakal eokoma. Tape oreng se parcaja ban ebaptis, bakal salamedda." 
Mark16:17 Menangka bukte ja' parcaja, reng-oreng jareya bakal ngojuga erroh jahat bit Tang nyama; reng-oreng jareya bakal acaca'a ngangguy sa-basa se gi' ta' ekataowe bi' reng-oreng jareya dibi'." 
Mark16:18 Mon neggu' olar otabana ngenom racon, reng-oreng jareya ta' kera calaka'. Mon reng-oreng jareya nompangngagi tanangnga ka attassa reng-oreng se sake', se sake' jareya bakal barasa.”" 
Mark16:19 Saellana abu-dhabu ban red-moredda jareya, Isa pas eangka' ka sowarga. E jadhiya Salerana marenta asareng bi' Allah." 
Mark16:20 Red-moredda entar man-dha'emman mabalattra kabar dhari Allah. Ban Pangeran noro' ngastane lalakon jareya abareng ban red-moredda jareya ban abukteyagi kalaban kaajiban-kaajiban ja' kabar se eberta'agi red-moredda jareya teppa'.] [ 
Luke1:1 Teofilus se molja, Ampon bannya' oreng se ngoddi noles kalaban tartep parkara pa-ponapa se kadaddiyan e antarana sampeyan sareng kaula sadaja." 
Luke1:2 Reng-oreng gapaneka noles menorot se etotorragi ka sampeyan sareng ka kaula sadaja bi' reng-oreng se nengale dibi' sadajana kadaddiyan gapaneka dhari dha'-adha'na, sareng laju mabalattra kabar gapaneka." 
Luke1:3 Saamponna kaula epatete nalektegi sadajana kadaddiyan gapaneka dhari dha'-adha'na, noro' pamanggi kaula sae manabi kaula noles sadajana sacara tartep kaangguy ngatore oneng ka sampeyan." 
Luke1:4 Melana kaula ngalakone gapaneka sadajana sopaja sampeyan oneng ja' pa-ponapa se eajarragi ka sampeyan pajat lerres. 
Luke1:5 E bakto Herodes jumenneng rato nagara Yudea, badha imam se asmana Zakhariya. Zakhariya jareya tamaso' golonganna mam-imam Abiya. Asmana rajina Elisabet, toronanna imam keya." 
Luke1:6 Odhi'na se kadhuwa jareya masenneng panggaliyanna Allah. Lake' bine' padha ta'at ka sakabbiyanna papakon ban hokomma Pangeran kalaban gu-onggu. 
Luke1:7 Se kadhuwa jareya ta' kaagungan pottra sabab Elisabet jubeng ban se kadhuwa jareya la padha towa. 
Luke1:8 E settong are, e bakto giliranna golongan Abiya, Zakhariya alampa'agi lalakonna imam e ajunanna Allah." 
Luke1:9 Saellana eellot, akantha se biyasana ejalannagi bi' mam-imam, Zakhariya kapele kaangguy maso' ka Padalemman Socce ban ngobbar mennyan." 
Luke1:10 Sabatara opacara ngobbar mennyan ejalannagi, e lowar reng-oreng se bannya' padha adu'a." 
Luke1:11 E bakto jareya malaekadda Pangeran ngaton ka Zakhariya. Malaekat jareya ngadek e kanganna meja pangobbaranna mennyan. 
Luke1:12 E bakto Zakhariya ngoladi malaekat jareya, panggaliyanna arassa bingong ban tako'." 
Luke1:13 Tape malaekadda Pangeran jareya adhabu, “Ella, ja' tako', Zakhariya! Allah la meyarsa du'ana ba'na. Binena ba'na Elisabet bakal rembi'a lalake'. Kana' jareya nyamae Yahya." 
Luke1:14 Mon kana' jareya la lahir, ba'na tanto ce' peragga, bariya keya bannya' oreng laenna!" 
Luke1:15 Ana'na ba'na jareya bakal daddiya oreng raja e dhalem pangoladanna Pangeran, ban ta' ngenom anggur otabana nom-enoman kerras. Molae lahir kana' jareya bakal ekobasa'ana Errohna Allah." 
Luke1:16 Bannya' oreng Isra'il bakal etontona abali ka Allah, Pangeranna." 
Luke1:17 Ana'na ba'na jareya daddiya otosanna Pangeran se kowat ban kobasa akantha Eliya. Kana' jareya bakal marokona eppa' ban ana'na, oreng se ta' ta'at bakal etontona epabali ka jalanna pekkeran se bendher. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ana'na ba'na jareya nyadhiya'agi ommat se la asadhiya narema'a Pangeran.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakhariya mator ka malaekat jareya, “Kadi ponapa abdina se onenga ja' gapaneka bakal kadaddiyana? Abdina ampon towa, sapaneka jugan robiya abdina.”" 
Luke1:19 “Sengko' reya Jibra'il,” saodda malaekat jareya. “Sengko' aladine Allah se ngotos sengko' manapa' kabar bagus reya ka ba'na." 
Luke1:20 Apa se ekabala sengko' ka ba'na reya bakal kalakona mon la napa' baktona. Tape sarrena ba'na ta' parcaja ka kabar se egiba sengko' reya, ba'na bakal ta' bisa'a acaca; ban ba'na bakal pagguna buwi sampe' apa se ekoca'agi sengko' ka ba'na reya la kalakon.”" 
Luke1:21 Sabatara jareya reng-oreng se badha e lowar padha te'-nante'an Zakhariya; kabbi padha heran arapa ma' ce' abidda e dhalem Padalemman Socce. 
Luke1:22 Ban e bakto kalowar, Zakhariya ta' bisa abu-dhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, daddi pera' terros ngangguy isyarat malolo. Daddi reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha tao ja' tantona Zakhariya la nengale pangatonan e dhalem Padalemman Socce." 
Luke1:23 Saellana mare bakto giliranna se epalalakon e Padalemman Socce, Zakhariya pas gubar ka compo'na." 
Luke1:24 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Elisabet bubut pas, ta' kalowaran dhari compo'na lema bulan abidda." 
Luke1:25 “Dhi-budhina Pangeran nolong sengko' ban mamosna tang kanespa'an e adha'na oreng bannya',” oca'na." 
Luke1:26 E bakto Elisabet la bubut nem bulan, Allah ngotos malaekat Jibra'il ka Nazaret, settong kottha e dhaera Galilea." 
Luke1:27 Jibra'il eotos ka settong paraban se anyama Miriyam. Paraban jareya bakalla Yusup, toronanna Rato Daud." 
Luke1:28 Malaekat jareya manggi'i Miriyam, laju adhabu, “Salam, ba'na se eberkadi Pangeran sacara istimewa. Pangeran asarengnge ba'na!”" 
Luke1:29 Miriyam takerjat meyarsa kabar dhari malaekat jareya; ca'na panggaliyanna ba' apa maksodda ca'-oca' jareya. 
Luke1:30 Malaekat jareya pas adhabu ka Miriyam, “Ella ja' tako', Miriyam, sabab ba'na ekasokane Pangeran." 
Luke1:31 Ba'na bakal ngandhunga tor rembi'a, ban kana' jareya kodu enyamae Isa." 
Luke1:32 Kana' jareya bakal agunga ban bakal esebbuda Pottrana Allah Se Mahatenggi. Bi' Allah ana'na ba'na jareya bakal epadaddiya rato, akantha Rato Daud, bangatowana." 
Luke1:33 Ban pole kana' jareya bakal daddiya rato se marenta'a toronanna Yakub salanjangnga. Karaja'anna tadha' aherra.” 
Luke1:34 Miriyam mator ka malaekat jareya, “Abdina ka'dhinto' gi' paraban. Kadi ponapa se bisa'a kadi ka'dhinto'?”" 
Luke1:35 Dhabuna malaekat, “Errohna Allah bakal torona ka ba'na, ban ba'na bakal katotobana kobasana Allah. Jareya sababba kana' se bakal lahira jareya bakal esebbuda kana' se socce, Pottrana Allah." 
Luke1:36 Kaenga'e, balana ba'na Elisabet rowa, sateya la ngandhung nem bulan, maske la towa, ban maske ca'na oreng jubeng." 
Luke1:37 Sabab tadha' barang se mohal monggu ka Allah.” 
Luke1:38 Miriyam laju mator, “Abdina paneka abdiepon Pangeran; abdina narema ponapa se edhabuwagi panjennengngan.” Malaekat jareya laju maelang adina'agi Miriyam." 
Luke1:39 Ta' saapa abidda saellana jareya Miriyam laju meyos ka settong kottha e Yudea e dhaera pagunongan. 
Luke1:40 E jadhiya Miriyam meyos ka compo'na Zakhariya, ban e bakto maso' laju aberri' salam ka Elisabet." 
Luke1:41 E bakto Elisabet buru meyarsa salamma Miriyam, ana' e dhalem gindhu'anna Elisabet aguli. Elisabet ekobasae Errohna Allah," 
Luke1:42 laju aera', “Ba'na se paleng eberkadi Errohna Allah e antarana sakabbiyanna oreng babine'! Ban mandar eberkadana ana' se elahirragiya ba'na jareya!" 
Luke1:43 Sapa sengko' reya me' ebuna Pangeran rabu manggi'i sengko'? 
Luke1:44 Sengko' buru ngedhing salamma ba'na, ana' e tang gindhu'an reya aguli kaperagan." 
Luke1:45 Pojur onggu ba'na polana ba'na parcaja ja' apa se edhabuwagi Pangeran ka ba'na bakal kalakona!” 
Luke1:46 Dhabuna Miriyam, “Tang ate amolja'agi Pangeran," 
Luke1:47 ban tang sokma kaperagan sabab Allah tang Panyalamet. 
Luke1:48 Sengko' abdina se nespa, ekaemodi bi' Salerana! Molae sateya sakabbiyanna bangsa ngoca' ja' sengko' reya pojur parana." 
Luke1:49 Sabab Allah Se Mahakobasa ngalampa'agi rang-barang se raja ka sengko' reya. Socce asmana; 
Luke1:50 dhari toronan se settong ka settongnga Pangeran noduwagi kabellasanna ka reng-oreng se tako' ka Salerana. 
Luke1:51 Kalaban astana se kowat kobasa reng-oreng se angga' epasalebbudan, epasalbut sakabbiyanna sajjana." 
Luke1:52 To-rato epatoron dhari tahtana, reng-oreng se nespa epatenggi bi' Salerana." 
Luke1:53 Oreng se lapar epakennyang bi' sakabbiyanna kabecce'an, se sogi eojuk ta' epangeba pa-apa." 
Luke1:54 Isra'il abdina eparenge partolonganna, menorot janjina ka bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na." 
Luke1:55 Pangeran ta' kalep ka janjina, salanjangnga noduwagi kabellasanna, ka Ibrahim ban ka toronanna.”" 
Luke1:56 Miriyam alenggi ban Elisabet ra-kera tello bulan abidda, pas buru gubar." 
Luke1:57 Saellana napa' baktona, Elisabet babar lalake'." 
Luke1:58 Ga-tatanggana ban la-balana padha ngedhing saapa saena Pangeran ka Elisabet jareya, daddi kabbi padha noro' arassa gumbira." 
Luke1:59 E bakto babaji' jareya aomor ballung are, ga-tatangga ban la-balana padha dhateng; kana' jareya esonnada ban enyama'ana. Bi' reng-oreng kana' jareya enyama'ana Zakhariya noro' nyamana eppa'na," 
Luke1:60 tape ebuna adhabu, “Bunten! Kana' paneka kodu enyamae Yahya.”" 
Luke1:61 “Tadha' settonga balana sampeyan se anyama kantha ganeka,” ca'na ga-tatanggana ban la-balana ka Elisabet." 
Luke1:62 Reng-oreng jareya laju ngangguy isyarat atanya ka Zakhariya enyama'ana sapa pottrana jareya. 
Luke1:63 Zakhariya menta papan bato kene', laju nyerrat, “Nyamana Yahya.” Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha heran kabbi!" 
Luke1:64 E bakto jareya keya Zakhariya laju bisa abu-dhabu pole sarta amolja'agi Allah. 
Luke1:65 Ga-tatanggana padha katako'en, ban kabar jareya balattra ka saantero dhaera Pagunongan Yudea." 
Luke1:66 Sakabbiyanna oreng se ngedhing jareya atanya e dhalem atena, “Ba' daddiya apa kana' reya pagi'?” Sabab la terrang Pangeran asarengnge kana' jareya." 
Luke1:67 Zakhariya, ramana Yahya ekobasae Errohna Allah ban manapa' dhabuna Pangeran, dhabuna:" 
Luke1:68 “Mara padha amolja'agi Pangeran, Allahna bangsa Isra'il! Pangeran rabu nolong ommadda ban mabebas bangsana." 
Luke1:69 Ba'na ban sengko' eparenge Panyalamet se kowat kobasa dhari toronanna Daud, abdina." 
Luke1:70 Gi' jaman lamba' kalaban parantara'anna bi-nabbina, Pangeran la apareng janjina" 
Luke1:71 masalamedda sengko' ban ba'na dhari moso ban dhari kobasana reng-oreng se baji' ka ba'na ban sengko'. 
Luke1:72 Kaangguy noduwagi kamora'anna ka bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na, Allah bakal neptebbana janjina se socce jareya." 
Luke1:73 Allah asompa ka Ibrahim bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na, ajanji masalamedda sengko' ban ba'na dhari moso, me' olle sengko' ban ba'na abakte ka Salerana ta' kalaban andhi' rassa tako'," 
Luke1:74  
Luke1:75 ngabdi ka Salerana salanjangnga, tor masenneng panggaliyanna saomorra." 
Luke1:76 Ba'na, na', bakal esebbuda nabbina Allah Se Mahatenggi. Ba'na eotos ajangadha'i Pangeran ababat jalan kaagem Salerana," 
Luke1:77 kaangguy aberta'agi ka ommadda, ja' kabbi padha epasalamedda mon sa-dusana la esapora bi' Allah." 
Luke1:78 Pangeranna ba'na ban sengko' reya bellas ase; kaangguy masalamet sengko' ban ba'na Salerana rabu. Akantha are se moncar e baja laggu," 
Luke1:79 Salerana nyonare sakabbiyanna oreng se odhi' e dhalem papetteng ban katako'en. Nonton sengko' ban ba'na e jalan se nojju ka kataremtemman.” 
Luke1:80 Pottrana Zakhariya jareya badanna atamba raja ban errohna atamba kowat. Sarta laju alenggi e ra-ara sampe' napa' baktona kalowar anyata'agi aba'na ka ra'yat Isra'il. 
Luke2:1 E bakto jareya Kaisar Agustus apareng parenta sopaja sakabbiyanna warga nagarana Karaja'an Roma padha adhaftarragi aba'na kaangguy kaparlowan sensus. 
Luke2:2 Sensus se gi' buru tao ebadha'agi sakaleyan jareya ejalannagi e bakto Kireniyus daddi gubennor e nagara Siria. 
Luke2:3 Daddi reng-oreng padha entar adhaftar kabbi ka kotthana bang-sebang. 
Luke2:4 Yusup noro' mangkat keya dhari kottha Nazaret e Galilea, ka kottha Betlehem e Yudea, kennengnganna kalahiranna Rato Daud; polana salerana toronanna Daud." 
Luke2:5 Yusup entar adhaftar abareng ban bakalla, Miriyam, se teppa'na bubut." 
Luke2:6 Gi' teppa'na badha e Betlehem, Miriyam la napa' ka baktona se babara." 
Luke2:7 Se babar pottrana lalake', pottra sareyangnga. Kana' jareya egeddhung ban kaen, pas esaba' e baddhana pakanna ebin elama'e darameyan, sabab Yusup ban Miriyam ta' nemmo pangenebban." 
Luke2:8 E bakto jareya badha reng-oreng ngowan se teppa'na ajaga ba-dumbana e talon e dhaera jareya. 
Luke2:9 O-tao laju badha malaekadda Pangeran ngaton e jadhiya, ban reng-oreng ngowan jareya esonare tera'na cajana Pangeran. Reng-oreng ngowan jareya katako'en." 
Luke2:10 Tape malaekat jareya adhabu, “Ella ja' tako'! Sengko' ngeba kabar bagus ka ba'na, kabar se talebat maperak sakabbiyanna oreng." 
Luke2:11 E are teya e kotthana Daud lahir Rato Panyalamedda ba'na, iya areya Almasih, Pangeran!" 
Luke2:12 Areya' tandhana menangka bukte ka ba'na: Ba'na bakal nemmowa babaji' se egeddhung ban kaen, epatedhung e dhalem baddhana pakanna ebin.”" 
Luke2:13 O-tao pas bannya' malaekat laenna se abareng ban malaekat jareya, padha ngejung amolja'agi Allah, dhabuna," 
Luke2:14 “Molja'agi Allah e langnge' se paleng tenggi! Ban neng e bume, taremtem odhi'na manossa se masenneng panggaliyanna!”" 
Luke2:15 Saellana kat-malaekat jareya abali ka sowarga, reng-oreng ngowan gella' padha ngoca', “Mara ja' entara ka Betlehem nenggu kadaddiyan se edhabuwagi Pangeran ka sengko' ban ba'na gi' buru rowa.”" 
Luke2:16 Reng-oreng jareya laju duli mangkat, sarta pas tatemmo bi' Miriyam ban Yusup sarta babaji' se badha e baddhana pakanna ebin." 
Luke2:17 E bakto nangale'e babaji' buru, reng-oreng ngowan jareya laju nyareta'agi pa-apa se edhabuwagi malaekat parkara babaji' jareya." 
Luke2:18 Reng-oreng se ngedhing caretana reng-oreng ngowan jareya padha kasambu' kabbi. 
Luke2:19 Tape kabbi jareya bi' Miriyam esempen e dhalem panggaliyanna sarta eli-kagali. 
Luke2:20 Reng-oreng ngowan gella' abali ka talon sambi ngagungngagi tor amolja'agi Allah, polana la nangale'e tor ngedhing sakabbiyanna kadaddiyan jareya, tadha' bidana dhari se edhabuwagi malaekat." 
Luke2:21 Saellana aomor ballung are, kana' jareya esonnat, sarta laju eparenge asma Isa, iya areya asma se edhabuwagi malaekat sabellunna egandhu' ebuna." 
Luke2:22 Baktona la napa' ka Yusup ban Miriyam kaangguy alampa'agi adat panyocceyan menorot hokomma Mosa. Daddi se kadhuwa jareya laju abakta Isa ka Yerusalim, eatorragiya ka Pangeran." 
Luke2:23 Sabab e dhalem hokomma Pangeran la esebbuttagi kantha reya, “Saneyap ana' lalake' se sareyang kodu eatorragi ka Pangeran.”" 
Luke2:24 Yusup ban Miriyam amaksod ngatorragiya kurban keya, iya areya kurban se aropa mano' keteran sapasang otaba dara se gi' ngodha dhadhuwa', akantha se la etantowagi e dhalem hokomma Pangeran." 
Luke2:25 E bakto jareya e Yerusalim badha oreng lalake' nyamana Simeyon. Orengnga becce', tako' ka Allah; la abit se anante' sa'adda Allah se masalamedda Isra'il. Oreng jareya esarengnge Errohna Allah," 
Luke2:26 ban Errohna Allah la apareng oneng ka oreng jareya ja' aba'na ta' kera mate sabellunna nangale'e Rato Panyalamet se ejanjiyagi Pangeran. 
Luke2:27 Simeyon etonton Errohna Allah, maso' ka Padalemman Socce. E bakto jareya Yusup ban Miriyam abakta maso' Isa se gi' kene' parlo ajalannagiya hokomma agama." 
Luke2:28 Simeyon nampane kana' jareya laju eemban, sarta pas amolja'agi Allah, oca'na," 
Luke2:29 “Samangken, Guste, Junandalem ampon neptebbi janjina. Edine abdidalem abali ka Junandalem kalaban taremtem." 
Luke2:30 Sabab tengal abdidalem dibi' ampon nengale Panyalamet se eotos Junandalem," 
Luke2:31 se esadhiya'agi Junandalem kaangguy sadajana bangsa: 
Luke2:32 akadi sonar se nera'e jalan badhi sa-bangsa laen sopaja padha'a nyander ka Junandalem, sonar se madhateng kahormadan ka Isra'il ommattepon Junandalem.”" 
Luke2:33 Rama ebuna kana' jareya heran meyarsa cacana Simeyon parkara pottrana. 
Luke2:34 Simeyon aberkadi se katello jareya, laju mator ka Miriyam, ebuna kana' jareya, “Kana' reya epele bi' Allah kaangguy matompessa ban masalamedda oreng Isra'il sabannya'na. Kana reya bakal daddiya tandha dhari Allah, se bakal elabana bi' oreng sabannya'na," 
Luke2:35 daddi essena atena pas padha etemmo. Atena ba'na bakal sossa'a parana akantha se esoddu' bi' peddhang se tajem.” 
Luke2:36 Badha keya nabbi babine' kasorang la ce' towana. Nyamana Hana, ana'na Panuwel dhari suku Asyer. Saellana araka pettong taon abidda," 
Luke2:37 Hana laju daddi randha; omorra la ballung polo empa' taon. Hana jareya ta' tao aginjeggan dhari Padalemman Socce. Seyang malem abakte ka Allah kalaban adu'a ban apowasa 
Luke2:38 E bakto jareya keya Hana dhateng, pas amolja'agi Allah sarta acaca parkara kana' jareya ka sakabbiyanna oreng se anante' sa'adda Allah se mamardika'a Yerusalim." 
Luke2:39 Saellana mare alampa'agi sakabbiyanna se ewajibbagi Hokomma Pangeran, Yusup ban Miriyam laju padha gubar ka Nazaret e Galilea." 
Luke2:40 Na'-kana' gella' atamba raja tor kowat, ce' bicaksanana ban talebat ekataresnae bi' Allah." 
Luke2:41 Sabban taon oreng towana Isa meyos ka Yerusalim araya'agiya Are Raja Paska. 
Luke2:42 E naleka yuswana Isa dhubellas taon, Isa ban rama ebuna meyos ka paraya'an jareya akantha biyasana." 
Luke2:43 Saellana paraya'an jareya la mare, oreng towana gubar, tape Isa gi' enneng e Yerusalim. Oreng towana ta' ngagali." 
Luke2:44 Isa esanggu abareng bi' reng-oreng laenna. Saellana alomampa saare benteng, buru se kadhuwa jareya nyare'e Isa e antarana la-balana ban kennalanna." 
Luke2:45 Tape Isa ta' etemmo, daddi Yusup ban Miriyam abali ka Yerusalim nyare'e pottrana." 
Luke2:46 Saellana olle tello are se nyare'e, Isa etemmo e dhalem Padalemman Socce, parappa'na alenggi, meyarsa'agi ru-guru agama sambi anya-tanya." 
Luke2:47 Reng-oreng se ngedhingngagi padha kasambu' kabbi polana jawabanna se penter. 
Luke2:48 Oreng towana heran keya e bakto ngoladi Isa e jadhiya. Dhabuna ebuna, “Na', arapa Ba'na me' kantha jareya ka sengko' ban ramana? Sengko' ban ramana nyare'e ba'na, ce' kobaterra.”" 
Luke2:49 Dhabuna Isa, “Aponapa rama sareng ebu me' nyare'e kaula? Ponapa sampeyan ta' oneng ja' Kaula kodu badha e dalemma Rama Kaula?”" 
Luke2:50 Tape Yusup ban Miriyam ta' ngarte ka dhabuna Isa jareya. 
Luke2:51 Saellana jareya Isa laju gubar ka Nazaret abareng rama ebuna, sarta toro' oca' ka oreng towana jareya. Parkara jareya kabbi bi' ebuna esempen e dhalem panggaliyanna." 
Luke2:52 Isa atamba raja ban sajan bicaksana, sarta ekataresnae Allah ban ekaleburi oreng." 
Luke3:1 E taon se kapeng lema bellas pamarenta'anna Kaisar Tiberiyus, Pontiyus Pilatus jumenneng gubennor e Yudea, dineng Herodes marenta e Galilea. Filipus, taretanna Herodes marenta e dhaera Iturea ban Trakhonitis, dineng Lisaniyas marenta e Abilene." 
Luke3:2 Se daddi mam-imam agung iya areya Hanas ban Kayafas. E dhalem taon jareya Allah abu-dhabu ka Yahya, pottrana Zakhariya e ra-ara." 
Luke3:3 Daddi Yahya laju meyos san-kassannagi e saantero dhaera Songay Yordan, manapa' dhabuna Allah. “Mara atobat, ban ba'na kodu ebaptis me' olle esapora bi' Allah.”" 
Luke3:4 Jareya padha ban se esebbuttagi e dhalem ketab Nabbi Yesaya, “Badha oreng ra'-era'an e sagara beddhi, ‘Sadhiya'agi jalan kaagem Pangeran, parata'agi jalan se elebadana Salerana." 
Luke3:5 Ra-cora tembuk kabbi, nong-gunong ban gumo' padha parata'agi. Rong-lorong se agu'-leggu' paloros kabbi, se ba'-celbing parata'agi." 
Luke3:6 Reng-oreng e saantero bume bakal nangaleyana Allah masalamet manossa!’ ” 
Luke3:7 Bannya' oreng nyander ka Yahya menta ebaptis. Dhabuna Yahya ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na oreng jahat! Ca'na sapa ba'na lopoda dhari okomanna Allah se bakal dhatengnga?" 
Luke3:8 Duduwagi bi' tengka lakona ba'na ja' ba'na la atobat dhari sa-dusana! Ja' molae ngoca' ja' Ibrahim bangatowana ba'na. Kaenga'e, ya: Dhari to-bato reya sakale Allah bisa abadhi toronan kaangguy Ibrahim!" 
Luke3:9 Kapak la esadhiya'agi epamogerra kajuwan sampe' ka mo'-ramo'na. Sakabbiyanna kajuwan se ta' ngasellagi buwa se bagus epogerra ban ebuwanga ka dhalem apoy.” 
Luke3:10 “Daddi ponapa se kodu elakone kaula?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya ka Yahya. 
Luke3:11 Dhabuna Yahya, “Oreng se andhi' kalambi dhadhuwa', kodu magi se settong ka oreng se ta' andhi'; ban oreng se andhi' kakanan, kakananna jareya kodu kambuli'i ban oreng laen.”" 
Luke3:12 Badha reng-oreng tokang narek pajek nyander keya ka Yahya menta baptis, sambi atanya, “Guru, ponapa se kodu elakone kaula?”" 
Luke3:13 Dhabuna Yahya, “Ja' nagi lebbi dhari se la etantowagi.”" 
Luke3:14 Badha keya rit-parjurit se atanya, “Kadi ponapa kaula? Ponapa se kodu elakone kaula?” Dhabuna Yahya, “Ja' arampas pesse dhari sapa'a bai otabana ngarane oreng kalaban da'wa'an se palsu. Panarema atena olle gaji sabadhana!”" 
Luke3:15 Reng-oreng jareya la te'-nante'an ban rep-arebban, kabbi padha saleng atanya pola Yahya jareya Rato Panyalamet se la abit ete'-nante'." 
Luke3:16 Daddi Yahya adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya kabbi, “Sengko' abaptis ba'na ngangguy aeng, tape bakal rabuwa oreng se araja'an dhari sengko'. Mokka' talena kasodda bai sengko' ta' pantes. Oreng jareya bakal abaptisa ba'na kalaban Errohna Allah ban apoy." 
Luke3:17 Astana ngastane gaddhang epanampeya gandum epasampe'a berse. Gandumma bakal epakompola e dhalem lombung, tape sekkemma bakal eobbara e dhalem apoy se ta' tao mate!”" 
Luke3:18 Yahya manapa' Kabar Bagus ka oreng se bannya' jareya sambi la-malae kalaban cara se acem-macem, sopaja reng-oreng jareya padha'a ngoba odhi'na." 
Luke3:19 Tape Herodes, se neggu' kakobasa'an e Galilea, bi' Yahya eca'-koca'e polana abine Herodiyas, binena taretanna, sarta polana sakabbiyanna kajahadan laenna se la elampa'agi salerana." 
Luke3:20 Tape Herodes nambai kajahadanna dibi' kalaban mamaso' Yahya ka penjara. 
Luke3:21 Saellana reng-oreng jareya padha ebaptis kabbi, Isa laju ebaptis keya. Teppa'na Isa jareya adu'a, langnge' maroka," 
Luke3:22 ban Errohna Allah toron ka attasanna aropa dara. Dhari langnge' pas badha sowarana Allah se adhabu, “Ba'na Tang ana' se kataresnan. Ba'na masenneng Tang ate.”" 
Luke3:23 E bakto Isa molae alampa'agi lalakonna, yuswana ra-kera tello polo taon. Noro' panemmona oreng, Isa reya pottrana Yusup, Yusup pottrana Eli," 
Luke3:24 Eli pottrana Matat, Matat pottrana Lewi, Lewi pottrana Malki, Malki pottrana Yanai, Yanai pottrana Yusup," 
Luke3:25 Yusup pottrana Matica, Matica pottrana Amos, Amos pottrana Nahum, Nahum pottrana Hesli, Hesli pottrana Nagai," 
Luke3:26 Nagai pottrana Ma'at, Ma'at pottrana Matica, Matica pottrana Simei, Simei pottrana Yosekh, Yosekh pottrana Yoda," 
Luke3:27 Yoda pottrana Yokanan, Yokanan pottrana Resa, Resa pottrana Zerubabil, Zerubabil pottrana Seyaltiel, Seyaltiel pottrana Neri," 
Luke3:28 Neri pottrana Malki, Malki pottrana Adi, Adi pottrana Kosam, Kosam pottrana Elmadam, Elmadam pottrana Er," 
Luke3:29 Er pottrana Yesuwa, Yesuwa pottrana Eliyezer, Eliyezer pottrana Yorim, Yorim pottrana Matat, Matat pottrana Lewi," 
Luke3:30 Lewi pottrana Simeyon, Simeyon pottrana Yehuda, Yehuda pottrana Yusup, Yusup pottrana Yonam, Yonam pottrana Elyakim," 
Luke3:31 Elyakim pottrana Meleya, Meleya pottrana Mina, Mina pottrana Matata, Matata pottrana Natan, Natan pottrana Daud," 
Luke3:32 Daud pottrana Isay, Isay pottrana Obed, Obed pottrana Bowas, Bowas pottrana Salmon, Salmon pottrana Nahason," 
Luke3:33 Nahason pottrana Aminadab, Aminadab pottrana Admin, Admin pottrana Arni, Arni pottrana Hezron, Hezron pottrana Peres, Peres pottrana Yehuda," 
Luke3:34 Yehuda pottrana Yakub, Yakub pottrana Ishak, Ishak pottrana Ibrahim, Ibrahim pottrana Terah, Terah pottrana Nahor," 
Luke3:35 Nahor pottrana Serug, Serug pottrana Rehu, Rehu pottrana Peleg, Peleg pottrana Eber, Eber pottrana Salmon," 
Luke3:36 Salmon pottrana Kenan, Kenan pottrana Arpakhsad, Arpakhsad pottrana Sem, Sem pottrana Ennoh, Ennoh pottrana Lamekh," 
Luke3:37 Lamekh pottrana Metusalah, Metusalah pottrana Henokh, Henokh pottrana Yared, Yared pottrana Mahalale'el, Mahalale'el pottrana Kenan," 
Luke3:38 Kenan pottrana Enos, Enos pottrana Set, Set pottrana Adam, Adam pottrana Allah." 
Luke4:1 E bakto abali dhari Songay Yordan Isa ekobasae bi' Errohna Allah. Bi' Errohna Allah jareya Isa ebakta ka sagara beddhi. 
Luke4:2 E jadhiya Isa egudha Iblis pa' polo are abidda. Saabidda pa' polo are jareya Isa ta' adha'ar pa-apa sakale, daddi dhi-budhina pas arassa lapar." 
Luke4:3 Ca'na Iblis jareya, “Manabi Panjennengngan pajat Pottrana Allah, ngereng bato paneka pakon aoba daddi roti.”" 
Luke4:4 Dhabuna Isa, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Manossa ta' bisa odhi' pera' dhari roti malolo.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Bi' Iblis jareya Isa laju egiba ka kennengngan se tenggi ban e dhalem saparngedep epangoladi sakabbiyanna karaja'an e dunnya. 
Luke4:6 “Sadajana kakobasa'an sareng kasogiyan paneka sareng abdina eatorragiya ka Panjennengngan,” ca'na Iblis jareya. “Ka'dhissa' sadaja ampon eparengngagi ka abdina, ban abdina kengeng ngatorragi sadajana ka pasera'a saos sasoka'na abdina." 
Luke4:7 Ka'dhissa' sadaja bakal daddiya kaagunganna Panjennengngan manabi Panjennengngan kasokan nyemba ka abdina.” 
Luke4:8 Dhabuna Isa, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Semba Guste Allahna ban abakte ka Salerana malolo.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Saellana jareya bi' Iblis gella' Isa laju egiba ka Yerusalim pas esaba' e konco'na Padalemman Socce e bagiyan se paleng tenggi; Iblis jareya ngoca', “Manabi Panjennengngan Pottrana Allah, ngereng alonca' dhari ka'iya." 
Luke4:10 Sabab e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Allah bakal ngotosa kat-malaekadda sopaja ajaga'a Ba'na kalaban gu-onggu.’" 
Luke4:11 Esebbuttagi jugan, ‘Kat-malaekat bakal nampanana Ba'na ngangguy tanangnga, sopaja maske sokona balakka' ja' sampe' ba'na tatagguk ka bato.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Dhabuna Isa, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Ba'na ja' ba'-nyoba' Pangeran, Allahna.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Saellana Iblis jareya mare agudha Isa ngangguy cara acem-macem, kaangguy sabatara Iblis jareya ondur, Isa pas edina'agi sarta anante' bakto se becce'." 
Luke4:14 Saellana jareya Isa abali ka Galilea, ekobasae Errohna Allah. Kabar parkara Salerana balattra e saantero dhaera jareya." 
Luke4:15 Isa morok e pan-barampan kennengnganna kabakteyan, sarta ealem bi' sakabbiyanna oreng." 
Luke4:16 Isa laju meyos ka Nazaret pole, kalenggiyanna molae gi' kene' sampe' raja. E are Sabat, akantha biyasana Salerana meyos ka kennengnganna kabakteyan. Salerana ngadek maosa Alketab," 
Luke4:17 laju eatore ketab Nabbi Yesaya. Gulunganna ketab jareya ebukka', pas manggi ayat se amonye kantha reya," 
Luke4:18 “Errohna Pangeran badha e Sengko', sabab Errohna jareya la mele Sengko' kaangguy manapa' Kabar Bagus ka oreng mesken. Sengko' eotos kaangguy abala ja' reng-oreng tahanan epabebasa ban reng-oreng buta epabarasa; kaangguy nolonga reng-oreng se eseksa" 
Luke4:19 ban aberta'agi ja' la napa' baktona Pangeran masalamedda ommadda.” 
Luke4:20 Bi' Isa ketab jareya laju egulung pole, sarta pas epabali ka oreng se bagiyan ngoros, laju alenggi. Reng-oreng e jadhiya padha ngabas ka Salerana kabbi." 
Luke4:21 Isa laju molae adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Yat-ayadda Alketab reya e are teya la kalakon e bakto ba'na padha ngedhing dhari se ebaca Sengko' gella'.”" 
Luke4:22 Ca'-oca' se edhabuwagi Isa jareya ce' bagussa, sampe' nyarepsep ka dhalem atena reng-oreng se padha kasambu' ngedhingngagi dhabuna jareya. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Oreng reya gu ta' ana'na Yusup, ta' iya?”" 
Luke4:23 Dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, “Tantona ba'na padha ngangguya parebasan reya ka Sengko', ‘Dokter, pabaras badanna Sampeyan dibi'.’ Ban pole ba'na tanto ngoca'a ka Sengko' ja' ba'na ngedhing Sengko' mabadha kaajiban neng e Kapernaum ban ba'na menta'a sopaja Sengko' mabadha'a keya kaajiban jareya e Tang kampong reya.”" 
Luke4:24 Isa adhabu pole, “Kaenga'e, ya, tadha' nabbi se ehormadi e kampongnga dibi'." 
Luke4:25 Tape edhingngagi, ya: e jamanna Eliya, e bakto tadha' ojan tello taon satengnga abidda, e saantero nagara badha laep. E bakto jareya bannya' randha e Isra'il." 
Luke4:26 Maske bariya, Allah ta' makon Eliya entar ka sala settong dhari dha-randha jareya, tape pera' makon entar ka settong randha e Sarfat e dhaera Sidon." 
Luke4:27 Bariya keya e jamanna Nabbi Elisa bannya' oreng e Isra'il se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk; tape tadha' settonga dhari reng-oreng jareya se epabaras, kajabana Na'aman oreng Siria.”" 
Luke4:28 Reng-oreng se badha e kennengnganna kabakteyan se ngedhing jareya padha ce' peggella. 
Luke4:29 Reng-oreng jareya manjeng, Isa eeret epakalowar, laju egiba ka konco'na gumo', kennengngan se epamaddeggi kotthana reng-oreng jareya. Sajjana Isa ejungka'agiya dhari jadhiya." 
Luke4:30 Tape Isa nyalosso' e antarana oreng se bannya' e jadhiya, sarta pas nyengla dhari jadhiya." 
Luke4:31 Isa laju meyos ka kottha Kapernaum e Galilea. E jadhiya Salerana molang reng-oreng e are Sabat. 
Luke4:32 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha kasambu' ka carana morok, sabab Isa abu-dhabu kalaban kobasana." 
Luke4:33 E kennengnganna kabakteyan jareya badha settong oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat. Oreng jareya reng-cerrengan," 
Luke4:34 “He, Isa dhari Nazaret, aponapa'a Sampeyan ka kaula sadaja? Sampeyan ka'dhinto' ponapa mateyana kaula sakanca? Kaula oneng pasera Sampeyan: Sampeyan otosanna Allah se socce!”" 
Luke4:35 Isa nyentak erroh jahat jareya, “Neng-enneng! Mara kalowar dhari oreng reya!” Bi' erroh jahat gella' oreng jareya ebantengngagi e adha'na oreng se bannya', saellana jareya laju kalowar dhari oreng jareya ta' kalaban nyake'e oreng jareya." 
Luke4:36 Reng-oreng padha getton, laju padha ngoca', “Hebat onggu bu-dhabuna. Kalaban wibawa ban kobasa oreng reya marenta roh-erroh jahat kalowar, ban roh-erroh jahat jareya kalowar onggu!”" 
Luke4:37 Daddi kabar parkara Isa jareya balattra ka saantero dhaera jareya. 
Luke4:38 Isa gubar dhari kennengnganna kabakteyan jareya, pas meyos ka bengkona Simon. Ebu mattowana Simon teppa'na sake' panas; bi' reng-oreng ekabala ka Isa." 
Luke4:39 Isa maso', pas ngadek e seddi'na katedhunganna ebu mattowana Simon jareya, sarta ngojuk panassa. Panassa pas elang onggu, ban ebu mattowana Simon jareya laju jaga terros aladine tamoyya jareya." 
Luke4:40 E bakto molae compet are, reng-oreng padha dhateng nyabis ka Isa, ngeba la-balana se padha nyandhang panyaket acem-macem. Isa nompangngagi astana ka reng-oreng jareya bang-sebang, kabbi laju padha epabaras." 
Luke4:41 Bariya keya roh-erroh jahat padha kalowar dhari reng-oreng sabannya'na, sambi reng-cerrengan, “Sampeyan Pottrana Allah!” Tape roh-erroh jahat jareya bi' Isa ebentak ban ta' eparengngagi acaca, sabab roh-erroh jahat jareya tao ja' Isa reya Rato Panyalamet." 
Luke4:42 E bakto are buru moncar Isa meyos dhari kottha jareya ka settong kennengngan se seppe. Bi' reng-oreng molae esare, ban saellana etemmo reng-oreng jareya padha aehteyar sopaja Isa ta' meyos adinggallagi reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke4:43 Tape Isa adhabu, “Sengko' masthe manapa' keya ka reng-oreng e tha-kottha laen Kabar Bagus parkara baramma Allah se marenta menangka Rato, sabab Sengko' eotos Allah ka dunnya kaangguy kaparlowan jareya.”" 
Luke4:44 Daddi Isa akotbah e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan e saantero nagara Yudea. 
Luke5:1 E settong bakto Isa ngadek e paseserra Talaga Genesaret. Bannya' oreng saleng sellek terro ngedhinga kabar dhari Allah. 
Luke5:2 Isa ngoladi parao dhadhuwa' e paseser jareya; reng-oreng majangnga la toron dhari parao jareya sarta teppa'na nyassa jalana. 
Luke5:3 Isa ongga ka sala settongnga parao jareya, iya areya paraona Simon. Simon laju epakon nyothok paraona, epakon pajauwan sakone' dhari paseser. Isa alenggi e parao jareya, laju morok oreng se bannya' jareya." 
Luke5:4 Saellana mare se morok, Isa laju adhabu ka Simon, “Mara paraona guwar ka kennengngan se dhalem, jalana pas ocol kaangguy mega' juko'.”" 
Luke5:5 “Guru,” saodda Simon, “abdina sakanca alako samalem benteng, ta' kengeng pa-ponapa! Namong Panjennengngan se makon, enggi sae; bi' abdina jala eocola pole.”" 
Luke5:6 Saellana reng-oreng jareya ngocol jalana, laju olle juko' ce' bannya'na sampe' jalana molae beddha." 
Luke5:7 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ngolok ca-kancana se badha e parao settonganna, esoro nolonge. Ca-kancana padha nyander, laju areng-bareng ngesse'e parao se dhadhuwa' jareya epapossa' ban juko', sampe' padha para' tasellemma." 
Luke5:8 E naleka Simon nangale'e jareya, laju asojud e ajunanna Isa, laju mator, “Dinggallagi abdidalem, Guste! Sabab abdidalem oreng dusa!”" 
Luke5:9 Simon ban reng-oreng se abareng e jadhiya padha getton nangale'e juko' se talebat bannya'na jareya. 
Luke5:10 Bariya keya ca-kancana Simon, iya areya Yakobus ban Yahya, na'-ana'na Zebedeyus. Isa adhabu ka Simon, “Ta' osa tako'! Molae sateya ba'na bakal ajala'a oreng.”" 
Luke5:11 Simon ban ca-kancana ngeret o-parao jareya ka paseser, samarena laju ondur, kabbi edina, pas terros ngereng Isa." 
Luke5:12 E settong are, Isa badha e settong kottha. E jadhiya badha oreng lalake' se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk. E bakto oreng jareya nangale Isa, laju asojud e ajunanna sambi nyo'on, “Pa', manabi Panjennengngan kasokan, Panjennengngan bisa mabaras abdina!”" 
Luke5:13 Isa agagap oreng jareya sambi adhabu, “Sengko' endha', mara baras!” E bakto jareya keya panyakedda elang." 
Luke5:14 Bi' Isa oreng jareya ta' eparengngagi acaca parkara jareya ka sapa'a bai, dhabuna, “Kassa' entar ka imam, menta kamastheyan ja' ba'na la baras onggu. Saellana jareya pas ngeba kurban, atorragi ka Allah akantha se eparenta'agi Mosa, menangka bukte ka reng-oreng laen ja' ba'na la pajat baras onggu.”" 
Luke5:15 Tape kabar parkara Isa sajan balattra ka man-dhimman, ban bannya' oreng se entar parlo ngedhingngagiya dhabuna ban terro epabarasa dhari panyakedda." 
Luke5:16 Saellana jareya Isa laju meyos adu'a ka kennengngan se seppe. 
Luke5:17 E settong are teppa'na Isa morok, badha reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama padha toju' e jadhiya. Reng-oreng jareya dhateng dhari Yerusalim, ban dhari tha-kottha e Galilea ban Yudea. Kobasana Pangeran badha e Isa kaangguy mabaras reng-oreng se sake'." 
Luke5:18 E bakto jareya badha reng-oreng se dhateng ngeba oreng empon se epatedhung e teker. Reng-oreng jareya aehteyar ngeba'a oreng se empon jareya ka dhalem sopaja se sake' bisa esaba' e ajunanna Isa. 
Luke5:19 Tape sarrena oreng se badha e jadhiya talebat bannya'na, se sake' ta' ekenneng giba maso'. Daddi bi' reng-oreng se ngeba, se sake' jareya laju epaongga ka ata'na bengko. Ata'na bengko jareya ebungkar sampe' alobang. Se sake' epatoron ban tekerra lebat dhari lobang jareya sampe' ka ajunanna Isa e tengngana oreng se bannya' jareya." 
Luke5:20 E bakto ngoladi saapa rajana imanna reng-oreng jareya, Isa adhabu ka se sake', “Taretan, sa-dusana ba'na la esapora.”" 
Luke5:21 Ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi se badha e jadhiya padha molae acaca, oca'na, “Sapa oreng reya me' bangal ya-nyeya Allah? Sapa se kobasa nyapora dusana oreng kajabana Allah?”" 
Luke5:22 Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' padha apekker kantha jareya?" 
Luke5:23 Kemma se lebbi gampang, ngoca', ‘Sa-dusana ba'na la esapora’, otaba ngoca', ‘Mara jaga pas ajalan!’?" 
Luke5:24 Tape Sengko' abukteyagiya ka ba'na ja' e attas bume reya Pottrana Manossa kobasa nyapora dusana oreng.” Isa laju adhabu ka oreng se empon gella', “Mara jaga, kala' katedhunganna, pas mole!”" 
Luke5:25 Sanatkala jareya keya oreng se empon gella' laju jaga e adha'na oreng se badha e jadhiya kabbi. Katedhunganna ekala', terros mole sambi ngagungngagi Allah." 
Luke5:26 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha kasambu' kabbi, atena katako'en sarta padha ngagungngagi Allah, oca'na, “Ajib onggu kadaddiyan se etangale sengko' ban ba'na kabbi e are teya!”" 
Luke5:27 Saellana jareya Isa kalowar laju ngoladi oreng tokang narek pajek, nyamana Lewi, teppa'na toju' e kantorra. Isa adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Mara noro' Sengko'.”" 
Luke5:28 Lewi jaga, laju ngereng Isa, pa-apana edina kabbi." 
Luke5:29 Saellana jareya Lewi apesta e bengkona kaagem Isa. Bannya' oreng tokang narek pajek ban reng-oreng laenna noro' apesta e jadhiya. 
Luke5:30 Badha reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama se ta' senneng nangale jareya, pas ngoca' ka red-moredda Isa, oca'na, “Aponapa sampeyan me' adha'ar bi' reng-oreng tokang narek pajek sarta reng-oreng se ta' sae?”" 
Luke5:31 Isa adhabu, “Oreng se baras ta' parlo ka dokter; pera' reng-oreng se sake'." 
Luke5:32 Sengko' dhateng banne ngajaga reng-oreng se nganggep aba'na oreng becce', tape ngajaga reng-oreng se dusa, sopaja padha atobat dhari sa-dusana.”" 
Luke5:33 Reng-oreng mator ka Isa, “Red-moredda Yahya apowasa sareng adu'a, sapaneka jugan panganodda oreng Farisi. Nangeng red-moredda Sampeyan neddha sareng ngenom.”" 
Luke5:34 Dhabuna Isa, “Apa ba'na bisa nyoro tamoy se kaonjangan ka pangantan apowasa mon pangantan lake'na gi' badha e jang-onjangan jareya? Tanto enja'!" 
Luke5:35 Tape bakal napa'a sa'adda pangantan lake' egiba dhari reng-oreng jareya. E bakto jareya reng-oreng jareya kodu apowasa.” 
Luke5:36 Isa laju nyareta'agi parompama'an reya ka reng-oreng buru, “Tadha' oreng nambal kalambi laju ngangguy bit-sebbidanna kalambi anyar. Sabab mon kantha jareya kalambina se anyar tanto esebbit. Ban pole, kaen panambal se anyar jareya ta' kera cocok ka kalambi se laju." 
Luke5:37 Bariya keya tadha' oreng se nyelen anggur se anyar ka dhalem kanthong kole' se laju, sabab kanthong kole' jareya tanto leddu' polana anggur se anyar. Anggurra tanto nompa ban kanthongnga rosak." 
Luke5:38 Anggur se anyar kodu eselen ka kanthong se anyar keya. 
Luke5:39 Ban tadha' oreng se endha' ngenom anggur anyar mon la ngenom anggur se laju. ‘Anggur se laju anyamanan,’ ca'na oreng jareya.”" 
Luke6:1 E settong are Sabat, e bakto Isa alomampa e teggalla gandum, red-moredda metthek gandum. Gandum jareya ekosot ban tanangnga laju ekakan." 
Luke6:2 Badha reng-oreng Farisi se padha ngoca', “Sampeyan me' ta' atoro' ka hokomma agama, ajalannagi barang se elarang e are Sabat?”" 
Luke6:3 Dhabuna Isa, “Apa ba'na gi' ta' tao maca parkara apa se elakone Daud, e bakto aba'na ban pangerengnga padha lapar?" 
Luke6:4 Daud maso' ka dhalem Padalemman Socce, ngala' roti se la eatorragi ka Allah, laju ekakan. Saellana jareya pangerengnga padha eberri'i roti jareya keya. Mangkana, noro' hokomma agama, pera' mam-imam se olle ngakan roti jareya.”" 
Luke6:5 Isa laju adhabu, “Pottrana Manossa kobasa ka are Sabat.”" 
Luke6:6 E settong are Sabat laenna, Isa meyos ka kennengnganna kabakteyan, morok e jadhiya. E jadhiya badha oreng se tanangnga mate salaja." 
Luke6:7 Badha ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi se padha terro nyareya salana Isa sopaja ekennenga parkara'agi. Daddi reng-oreng jareya padha ngabassagi terro taowa apa Isa mabarasa oreng e are Sabat. 
Luke6:8 Tape Isa ngagali ka pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya. Daddi laju adhabu ka oreng se tanangnga mate salaja jareya, “Mara manjeng e dhinna', e bagiyan adha'!” Oreng jareya jaga, laju manjeng e jadhiya." 
Luke6:9 Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Mara Sengko' atanya'a. Menorot agama, apa se olle elakone e are Sabat? Alako becce' apa alako juba'? Masalamet oreng otabana macalaka'?”" 
Luke6:10 Isa ngoladi ka sakalenglengnga, ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya kabbi, laju adhabu ka oreng se sake' jareya, “Pangaceng tanangnga.” Oreng jareya mangaceng tanangnga, ban tanangnga laju baras." 
Luke6:11 Tape ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi jareya padha ce' peggella, laju molae aparembagan epabaramma'a Isa jareya." 
Luke6:12 E bakto jareya Isa ongga ka settong gumo' kaangguy adu'a. E jadhiya Isa adu'a ka Guste Allah samalem benteng. 
Luke6:13 E bakto are la tera', Isa adikane red-moredda, laju mele dhubellas oreng dhari red-moredda jareya. Oreng se dhubellas jareya bi' Isa enyamae rasul. Se kapele iya areya:" 
Luke6:14 Simon (se ejulugi Petrus), ban Andreyas taretanna Simon; Yakobus ban Yahya, Filipus ban Bartolomeyus," 
Luke6:15 Matiyus ban Tomas, Yakobus ana'na Alfeyus, ban Simon (se enyamae Patriot)," 
Luke6:16 Yudas ana'na Yakobus ban Yudas Iskariyot se e budhi arena akiyanat ka Isa. 
Luke6:17 Saellana jareya Isa toron dhari gumo' jareya asareng ban sul-rasulla gella', pas ambu sarta ngadek e settong kennengngan se rata. E jadhiya bannya' keya red-moredda se laen ban reng-oreng laenna se dhateng dhari man-dhimman e saantero Yudea, Yerusalim, ban tha-kottha paseser Tirus ban Sidon." 
Luke6:18 Reng-oreng jareya entar ka jadhiya terro ngedhingngagiya Isa ban terro epabarasa panyakedda. Reng-oreng se kasosoban erroh jahat entar ka jadhiya keya ban epabaras. 
Luke6:19 Reng-oreng padha aehteyar terro nyeddinga ka Isa, sabab dhari Isa kalowar kobasa se mabaras reng-oreng jareya kabbi." 
Luke6:20 Isa ngoladi ka red-moredda pas adhabu, “Pojur ba'na reng-oreng se mesken, sabab ba'na daddi anggotana ommadda Allah!" 
Luke6:21 Pojur ba'na se lapar sateya; sabab ba'na bakal epakennyanga! Pojur ba'na se nanges sateya; sabab ba'na bakal agella'a! 
Luke6:22 Pojur ba'na mon ekabaji'i, etolak, eya-seya ban epetenna oreng polana Pottrana Manossa!" 
Luke6:23 Bi-nabbi jaman lamba'na epakantha jareya keya. Daddi mon badha kadaddiyan kantha jareya, pasenneng atena ba'na, sarta atari pagumbira, sabab raja opana se esadhiya'agi ka ba'na e sowarga." 
Luke6:24 Tape calaka' ba'na se sogi sateya reya; sabab ba'na la tao rassana kane'madan! 
Luke6:25 Calaka' ba'na se kennyang sateya reya; sabab ba'na bakal kalaparana! Calaka' ba'na se agella'an sateya reya; sabab ba'na bakal sossa'a ban nangesa! 
Luke6:26 Calaka' ba'na mon ba'na ealem bi' sakabbiyanna oreng; sabab kantha jareya keya para bangatowana reng-oreng jareya gi' jaman lamba' ngalem bi-nabbi palsu.” 
Luke6:27 “Tape ka ba'na se ngedhingngagi Sengko' sateya reya, Sengko' mala'ana: taresnae so-mosona, ban pabagus ka oreng se baji' ka ba'na." 
Luke6:28 Berkadi oreng se abasto ba'na, ban nyo'onnagi ka Allah oreng se jahat ka ba'na." 
Luke6:29 Mon badha oreng nampeleng pepena ba'na se salaja, dina me' olle salajanna etampeleng keya. Mon jubana ba'na erampas oreng, dina me' olle kalambina ba'na erampas keya." 
Luke6:30 Mon badha barang se epenta oreng ka ba'na, bagi; ban mon dhi'-andhi'na ba'na erampas oreng, ja' penta balina." 
Luke6:31 Ba'na pabagus ka oreng laen akantha ba'na se terro oreng laen bagussa ka ba'na. 
Luke6:32 Mon ba'na pera' taresna ka reng-oreng se taresna ka ba'na, apa kabecce'anna ba'na? Oreng se dusa taresna keya ka reng-oreng se taresna ka aba'na!" 
Luke6:33 Ban mon ba'na pera' alako bagus ka reng-oreng se alako bagus ka ba'na, apa kabecce'anna ba'na? Reng-oreng se dusa kantha jareya keya!" 
Luke6:34 Ban mon ba'na maenjam pesse pera' ka oreng se bisa nyerra, apa kabecce'anna ba'na? Reng-oreng se dusa maenjam pesse keya ka oreng se andhi' dusa, saellana laju menta serra." 
Luke6:35 Masthena ta' kantha jareya! Ba'na kodu taresna ka mosona ban alako bagus ka mosona jareya. Ba'na kodu maenjam ban ja' ngarep balina. Mon kantha jareya ba'na bakal olleya opa se raja ban ba'na bakal daddiya pottrana Allah Se Mahatenggi. Sabab Allah reya becce' keya ka oreng se tadha' sakalangkongnga ban ka oreng se jahat. 
Luke6:36 Ba'na kodu bellas ase akantha Ramana e sowarga se bellas ase keya!” 
Luke6:37 “Ba'na ja' ahakime oreng laen, sopaja ba'na dibi' ta' ehakime bi' Allah. Ba'na ja' ngokom oreng laen, sopaja ba'na dibi' ta' eokom bi' Allah. Berri' sapora oreng laen, sopaja ba'na esapora keya." 
Luke6:38 Ri'-berri'i oreng laen, sopaja ba'na bi' Allah ereng-parenge keya. Ba'na bakal narema'a papareng se talebat bannya'na, se etaker epace'tapedda. Sabab ker-taker se bi' ba'na eangguy ka oreng laen bi' Allah bakal eagemma kaangguy ba'na.”" 
Luke6:39 Saellana jareya Isa nyareta'agi parompama'an reya ka red-moredda jareya, “Mon oreng buta nonton oreng buta laen, tanto se nonton ban se etonton laju padha tabalusok ka sellogan." 
Luke6:40 Tadha' mored se araja'an dhari guruna. Tape mored se la mare ajar, bakal padha'a ban guruna." 
Luke6:41 Arapa ba'na me' nangale kaju satembil se badha e matana taretanna, tape kaju salonjur se badha e matana ba'na dibi' ta' epekkere?" 
Luke6:42 Baramma ba'na se bisa'a ngoca', ‘Mara, taretan, kaju se badha e matana ba'na jareya bi' sengko' epakalowara,’ mangkana e matana ba'na dibi' badha kaju salonjur se bi' ba'na ta' etangale'e? He, oreng monafik! Pakalowar gallu kaju salonjur se badha e matana ba'na dibi'. Buru ba'na bisa terrang nangale'e ban bisa makalowar kaju satembil se badha e matana taretanna ba'na.”" 
Luke6:43 “Kajuwan se bagus ta' kera juba' buwana. Bariya keya kajuwan se juba' ta' kera bagus buwana. 
Luke6:44 Sakabbiyanna kajuwan etemmo dhari buwana. Ombut se adhuri ta' kera abuwa ara, bariya keya ombut se adhuri ta' kera abuwa anggur."
