Luke17:10 Padha bai ban ba'na. Mon ba'na la ajalannagi sakabbiyanna parenta se esorowagi ka ba'na, pas ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Sengko' reya pera' kabula biyasa; sengko' pera' ajalannagi kawajiban.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 E dhalem parjalanan ka Yerusalim, Isa lebat e bagiyan se daddi batessa Samaria ban Galilea." 
Luke17:12 E bakto maso' ka settong kampong, pas esanderri oreng kasapolo se padha nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk. Reng-oreng jareya manjeng e jauna" 
Luke17:13 ban aera', “Isa! Towan! Kaneserre abdina!”" 
Luke17:14 Isa ngoladi reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Kassa' entar ka mam-imam, soro pareksa badanna ba'na.” E tengnga jalan panyakedda reng-oreng jareya etemmo baras." 
Luke17:15 E bakto sala settong e antarana se kasapolo jareya tao ja' aba'na la baras, laju abali ka Isa sambi rak-soragan amolja'agi Allah." 
Luke17:16 Oreng jareya laju asojud e ajunanna Isa sambi mator sakalangkong. Oreng jareya oreng Samaria. 
Luke17:17 Isa adhabu, “Se epabaras gu ta' kasapolo, ta' iya? E kemma kasangana?" 
Luke17:18 Arapa me' pera' oreng manca reya se abali kaangguy asakalangkong ka Allah?” 
Luke17:19 Isa laju adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Mara jaga, pas le-mole. Polana ba'na parcaja ka sengko' daddi ba'na baras.”" 
Luke17:20 Badha reng-oreng Farisi atanya ka Isa bila Allah se rabuwa kaangguy marenta'a. Dhabuna Isa, “Pamarenta'anna Allah ta' molae kalaban dha-tandha se ekenneng abas oreng" 
Luke17:21 sampe' oreng bisa ngoca', ‘Mara tenggu, arowa' Salerana!’ otabana ‘Salerana badha e dhissa'!’ Sabab Allah reya la molae marenta e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na.”" 
Luke17:22 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu ka red-moredda, “E settong bakto ba'na bakal terrowa nangaleyana sala settong dhari re-arena Pottrana Manossa, tape ba'na ta' bisa nangale'e." 
Luke17:23 Bakal badha'a reng-oreng se ngoca'a kantha reya, ‘Tenggu e dhissa'!’ otabana ‘Tenggu e dhinna'!’ Tape ba'na ja' kalowar entara nyare." 
Luke17:24 Akantha dhap-keddhap se tera' e langnge', ban agalirap dhari konco' se settong ka konco' settongnga, kantha jareya keya dhaggi' kabadha'anna Pottrana Manossa e arena." 
Luke17:25 Tape dha'-adha'na Pottrana Manossa jareya kodu nanggung sangsara sabannya'na ban ta' etarema bi' reng-oreng jaman sateya. 
Luke17:26 E are baktona Pottrana Manossa jareya enyata'agi dhaggi', kabadha'anna padha ban jamanna Ennoh lamba'." 
Luke17:27 Oreng padha kan-ngakan ban nom-ngenom, abine; kantha jareya ros-terrosan sampe' Ennoh maso' ka dhalem kapal ban banjir dhateng mamate reng-oreng jareya kabbi." 
Luke17:28 Bariya keya e jamanna Lud. Oreng padha ngakan ban ngenom, ajuwal-belli, men-tamennan ban agabay bengko." 
Luke17:29 Tape e bakto Lud kalowar dhari Sodom, e are jareya apoy ban balirang toron dhari langnge' akantha ojan, matompes reng-oreng jareya kabbi." 
Luke17:30 Kantha jareya kabadha'anna dhaggi' e are baktona Pottrana Manossa enyata'agi. 
Luke17:31 E are jareya oreng se teppa'na badha e ata'na bengkona ja' toron ngala'a rang-barangnga se badha e dhalem bengkona. Bariya keya se badha e teggal ja' abali ka bengkona. 
Luke17:32 Kaenga'e baramma daddina binena Lud! 
Luke17:33 Oreng se aehteyar masalamedda odhi'na bakal kaelangana odhi'na. Tape oreng se kaelangan odhi'na bakal masalamedda odhi'na jareya. 
Luke17:34 Paparcaja, ya: E malem jareya badha oreng kadhuwa teppa'na tedhung e ranjang; se settong bakal egiba'a, ban settonganna bakal edina'a." 
Luke17:35 Badha babine' kadhuwa teppa'na agilis gandum, se settong bakal egiba'a, ban settonganna bakal edina'a. [" 
Luke17:36 Badha oreng lalake' kadhuwa teppa'na alako e teggal, se settong bakal egiba'a, settonganna bakal edina'a.]”" 
Luke17:37 Red-moredda Isa atanya, “E ka'dhimma se bakal badha'a kadaddiyan gapaneka, Guste?” Isa adhabu, “E kennengngan se badha babathangnga tanto badha mano' se ngakanan babathang.”" 
Luke18:1 Saellana jareya Isa nyareta'agi settong parompama'an kaangguy ngajar red-moredda sopaja ros-terrosan adu'a ban ja' sampe' potos pangarep. 
Luke18:2 Dhabuna Isa, “E settong kottha badha settong hakim se ta' tako' ka Allah ban ta' parduli ka sapa'a bai." 
Luke18:3 E kottha jareya badha keya settong randha se li-baliyan ngadhep ka hakim jareya menta tolong e dhalem parkarana. ‘Nyo'ona tolong kaula e dhalem ngadhebbi moso kaula, Pa',’ ca'na randha jareya." 
Luke18:4 Sampe' abit hakim jareya ta' endha' nolong randha buru. Tape dhi-budhina hakim jareya apekker, ‘Maske sengko' ta' tako' ka Allah ban ta' parduli ka oreng laen," 
Luke18:5 tape sarrena randha reya ros-terrosan rok-ngerok malolo ka sengko', lebbi becce' sengko' nolongana e dhalem parkarana. Mon enja', oreng reya tanto pas gi' ros-terrosan rok-ngerok malolo ka sengko'.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Guste Isa laju adhabu pole, “Kodda' pekker apa se ekoca'agi hakim se ta' adil jareya!" 
Luke18:7 Daddi, apa Allah ta' nolonga parkarana ommadda dibi' se aserro ka Salerana seyang malem? Apa kerana Allah bit-maabida se nolonga ommadda jareya?" 
Luke18:8 Paparcaja, ya: Allah masthe duli nolong parkarana ommadda jareya! Tape mon Pottrana Manossa rabu, ba' gi' badha'a oreng se parcaja ka Salerana e bume reya?”" 
Luke18:9 Isa nyareta'agi keya parompama'an reya ka reng-oreng se yakin ja' aba'na dibi' becce' sarta se ngababa'agi oreng laen. 
Luke18:10 Dhabuna Isa, “Badha oreng kadhuwa entar ka Padalemman Socce kaangguy adu'a. Se settong oreng Farisi, settonganna tokang narek pajek." 
Luke18:11 Oreng Farisi jareya manjeng majau dhari oreng laen ban adu'a, ‘Ya, Allah, abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem sabab abdidalem ta' akadi oreng laen, se dhakka, roce, otabana azina. Abdidalem asokkor eparenge ta' padha sareng tokang pajek ka'dhissa'." 
Luke18:12 Abdidalem apowasa dhu kale samenggu, sareng ngatorragi ka Junandalem saparpolonna sadajana pangaselan abdidalem.’" 
Luke18:13 Tape tokang narek pajek rowa manjeng majau, la'-mala' ta' bangal adhanga ka langnge'. Sambi ngosap dhadhana oreng jareya ngoca', ‘Ya, Allah, kaneserre abdidalem, oreng dusa ka'dhinto'!’ ”" 
Luke18:14 “Paparcaja, ya,” dhabuna Isa, “e bakto mole ka bengkona, tokang narek pajek jareya se etarema bi' Allah, banne oreng Farisi gella'. Sabab pa-sapa se matenggi aba'na bakal ekababa'agiya, ban pa-sapa se ngababa'agi aba'na bakal eagungngagiya.”" 
Luke18:15 Badha reng-oreng se ngeba na'-kana' ne'-kene' ka Isa nyo'on sopaja Isa kasokana nompangngagi astana ban aberkadi na'-kana' jareya. E bakto red-moredda nangale'e jareya, reng-oreng buru laju egigiri." 
Luke18:16 Tape Isa adikane na'-kana' jareya laju adhabu ka red-moredda, “Dina na'-kana' jareya me' nyander ka Sengko'! Ja' larang, sabab oreng se akantha na'-kana' reya se daddi anggotana ommadda Allah." 
Luke18:17 Kaenga'e! Oreng se ta' ngadhep ka Allah akantha na'-kana' kene', ta' kera daddi anggotana ommadda Allah.”" 
Luke18:18 Badha pamimpinna agama Yahudi se atanya ka Isa, “Guru se sae, ponapa se kodu elakone abdina sopaja narema odhi' se saongguna sareng se langgeng?”" 
Luke18:19 “Arapa ba'na me' ngoca' Sengko' bagus?” dhabuna Isa ka oreng jareya. “Tadha' se bagus kajabana Allah dibi'. 
Luke18:20 Ba'na la tao ka kon-papakonna Allah: ‘Ja' azina, ja' mate'e oreng, ja' co'-ngeco', ja' daddi sakse palsu, ban pahormat ka rama ebuna.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 “Sadajana papakon gapaneka sareng abdina ampon etoro' ngabidi abdina gi' ngodha,” sambidda oreng jareya." 
Luke18:22 Meyarsa jareya Isa adhabu, “Gi' badha pole settong se kodu elakone ba'na: Juwal dhi'-andhi'na ba'na kabbi, pessena bagi ka oreng mesken, ban ba'na tanto bakal narema'a dunnya e sowarga. Saellana jareya pas noro' Sengko'.”" 
Luke18:23 Tape e bakto oreng jareya ngedhing parkara jareya atena ce' sossana sabab oreng jareya sogi. 
Luke18:24 Isa ngoladi ja' oreng jareya sossa, daddi laju adhabu, “Malarat onggu monggu ka oreng sogi se daddiya anggotana ommadda Allah!" 
Luke18:25 Agampangan onta maso' ka dhalem lobangnga jarum, etembang oreng sogi maso' ka Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar.”" 
Luke18:26 Reng-oreng se ngedhing dhabuna Isa jareya atanya, “Manabi saka'dhinto, pasera se bisa'a salamet?”" 
Luke18:27 Isa adhabu, “Barang se mohal ka manossa, ta' mohal ka Allah!”" 
Luke18:28 Petrus laju mator, “Oladi! Abdina sakanca padha adinggallagi compo', ngereng Panjennengngan.”" 
Luke18:29 “Paparcaja, ya!” dhabuna Isa. “Oreng se adina'agi bengkona otaba binena, otaba taretanna otaba rama ebuna otaba na'-ana'na polana aladine Allah," 
Luke18:30 oreng jareya bakal narema'a balessan akel-tekel sateya reya, ban e jaman se bakal dhateng bakal narema'a odhi' se saongguna ban se langgeng.”" 
Luke18:31 Isa makompol moredda, laju ebakta majau dhari reng-oreng laenna. Dhabuna Isa, “Edhingngagi, ya! Sateya Sengko' ban ba'na entara ka Yerusalim. E jadhiya, pa-apa se etoles bi' bi-nabbi parkara Pottrana Manossa bakal kalakona kabbi." 
Luke18:32 Pottrana Manossa jareya bakal epassra'agiya ka reng-oreng se banne Yahudi; bi' reng-oreng jareya Salerana bakal eya'-seya'a, eco-kocowa, ban ecopa'ana." 
Luke18:33 Salerana bakal eseksa'a ban epateyana, tape e are se kapeng tello' bakal odhi'a pole.”" 
Luke18:34 Red-moredda ta' ngarte ka dhabuna Isa jareya. Artena ca'-oca' jareya eroseya'agi ka red-moredda jareya; kabbi padha ta' ngarte apa se edhabuwagi Isa jareya. 
Luke18:35 E bakto Isa para' napa'a ka Yerikho, badha oreng buta teppa'na toju' ngemmes e penggir lorong." 
Luke18:36 E bakto oreng jareya ngedhing bannya' oreng lebat e jadhiya laju atanya, “Badha apa, kana'?”" 
Luke18:37 “Isa, oreng Nazaret lebat e dhinna',” saodda reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya." 
Luke18:38 Oreng buta jareya laju aera', “Isa, Pottrana Daud! Kaneserre abdina!”" 
Luke18:39 Reng-oreng se badha e adha' gigir, oreng buta jareya esoro neng-enneng. Tape oreng buta jareya aera' epajangkaja'an. “Pottrana Daud! Kaneserre abdina!”" 
Luke18:40 Isa ambu laju makon oreng ngeba oreng buta jareya ka Salerana. Dhabuna Isa," 
Luke18:41 “Esorowa arapa Sengko' bi' ba'na?” “Towan,” sambidda oreng buta jareya, “abdina terro nengalana.”" 
Luke18:42 Isa pas adhabu ka oreng jareya, “Mon bariya, mara nangale! Polana ba'na parcaja ka Sengko', ba'na baras.”" 
Luke18:43 E bakto jareya keya oreng gella' nangale'e, laju ngereng Isa sambi asokkor ka Allah. E bakto oreng se bannya' jareya nangale'e parkara jareya, kabbi padha amolja'agi Allah." 
Luke19:1 E naleka Isa napa' ka Yerikho, laju terros alomampa ngalebadi kottha jareya." 
Luke19:2 E kottha jareya badha oreng kapalana tokang narek pajek se sogi. Nyamana Zakheyus. 
Luke19:3 Zakheyus jareya terro nangaleyana kantha apa Isa jareya, tape sarrena oreng ce' bannya'na ban aba'na dibi' pandha', daddi ta' ahasel nangale Isa." 
Luke19:4 Daddi Zakheyus pas berka' ajangadha'i reng-oreng laen, laju nae' ka kajuwan, sopaja nangaleyana Isa se sakejja' aggi' lebada e jadhiya." 
Luke19:5 E bakto Isa napa' ka babana kajuwan jareya, laju adhanga sambi adhabu, “Zakheyus, mara duli toron, Sengko' entara ka bengkona ba'na sateya.”" 
Luke19:6 Zakheyus duli toron sarta narema Isa kalaban senneng ate. 
Luke19:7 Reng-oreng se nangale'e jareya padha agarunggung kabbi. Oca'na, “Huh! Isa rowa namoy ka bengkona oreng se ta' becce'!”" 
Luke19:8 Saellana jareya, e bengkona, Zakheyus manjeng sarta mator ka Isa, “Guste, saparona dhi'-andhi' abdina esandhekka'agiya ka oreng mesken; sarengngan pole ra'-pasera'a se oneng etepo abdina, sareng abdina ebajarana tekel empa'na.”" 
Luke19:9 Isa laju adhabu, “E are teya ba'na ban saessena bengkona epasalamet bi' Allah sarta eparenge odhi' se anyar, sabab ba'na toronanna Ibrahim keya." 
Luke19:10 Pottrana Manossa rabu nyareya ban masalamedda oreng se nyalethong.” 
Luke19:11 Sabatara oreng gi' padha ngedhingngagi Isa se abu-dhabu, Isa laju nyareta'agi parompama'an ka reng-oreng jareya. Sabab e bakto jareya Isa la napa' ka Yerusalim, ban reng-oreng nyangka ja' Allah bakal duliya marenta menangka Rato neng e dunnya." 
Luke19:12 Dhabuna Isa, “Badha oreng agung entar ka nagara laen se jau; oreng jareya epadaddiya rato, samarena jareya pas abaliya ka bengkona." 
Luke19:13 Sabellunna mangkat, oreng jareya ngolok abdina sapolo oreng. Abdina jareya kabbi padha eberri'i obang emmas settong ebang. ‘Sabatara sengko' ajalanan, ba'na adagang ngangguy obang reya,’ oca'na." 
Luke19:14 Tape reng-oreng e nagarana jareya baji' ka aba'na. Daddi, saellana oreng jareya mangkat, reng-oreng e jadhiya ngerem otosan esoro ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Kaula sadaja ta' poron manabi oreng gapaneka se daddi rato.’" 
Luke19:15 Tape oreng agung jareya epadaddi rato, saellana laju abali ka nagarana. Sanapa'na laju duli adikane di-abdina, esoro ngadhep, sabab oreng jareya terro taowa barampa kaontongan se ekaolle di-abdina jareya." 
Luke19:16 Abdina se nomer settong nyander laju ngoca', ‘Guste,’ atorra, ‘obang emmas se settong paparengnga junandalem ka'issa' sareng abdidalem ampon epadaddi sapolo.’" 
Luke19:17 ‘Bagus jareya,’ ca'na lorana, ‘ba'na abdi se becce'! Sabab e dhalem parkara se ne'-kene' ba'na ekenneng parcaja, bi' sengko' ba'na, epangobasa'ana sapolo kottha.’" 
Luke19:18 Abdi se kapeng dhuwa' dhateng laju ngoca', ‘Guste, obang emmas settong se eparenge junandalem ka'dhissa' sareng abdidalem ampon epadaddi lalema'.’" 
Luke19:19 Ka abdi jareya rato gella' adhabu, ‘Ba'na epangobasa'ana kottha lalema'.’" 
Luke19:20 Abdina se laen dhateng laju ngoca', ‘Guste, ka'dhinto' obangnga junandalem; sareng abdidalem esempen e dhalem sottanang." 
Luke19:21 Abdidalem tako' ka junandalem, sabab junandalem kerras orengnga. Junandalem mondhut pa-ponapa se banne kaagunganna junandalem, sareng molong hasel e kennengngan se ta' etamenne junandalem.’" 
Luke19:22 Ca'na rato ka oreng jareya, ‘Ba'na reya abdi se jahat! Ba'na bi' sengko' eokoma noro' cacana ba'na dibi'. Ba'na tao ja' sengko' oreng kerras: pa-apa se banne tang andhi' bi' sengko' ekala', ban pole sengko' molong hasel e kennengngan se ta' etamenne sengko'." 
Luke19:23 Mon bariya arapa obang jareya bi' ba'na me' ta' esaba' e bank, me' olle mon sengko' abali sengko' olle narema budhu'na?’" 
Luke19:24 Saellana jareya rato buru ngoca' ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, ‘Kala' obang emmas se badha e oreng jareya, bagi ka abdi se andhi' obang emmas sapolo rowa.’" 
Luke19:25 Tape reng-oreng jareya ngoca', ‘Guste, oreng gapaneka ampon gadhuwan sapolo.’" 
Luke19:26 Rato jareya ngoca', ‘Kaenga'e, ya: oreng se la andhi', gi' eberri'ana jang bannya'an pole. Tape oreng se ta' andhi' pa-apa, apa'a bai se badha e aba'na bakal ekala'a dhari aba'na." 
Luke19:27 Ban sateya giba dha' enna' tang so-moso se ta' endha' narema sengko' daddi ratona. Pate'e kabbi e adha'na sengko'!’ ” 
Luke19:28 Saellana adhabu parkara jareya kabbi Isa laju alomampa kaadha', eerengngagi reng-oreng jareya meyosa ka Yerusalim." 
Luke19:29 Sanapa'na ka seddi'na Betfage ban Betania e Gumo' Jaitun, Isa laju makon moredda kadhuwa mangkat kaadha'." 
Luke19:30 “Kassa' ba'na entar ka kampong e adha' rowa,” ca'na dhabuna ka se kadhuwa jareya; “mon ba'na la maso' ka kampong jareya ba'na bakal nangaleyana budhu'na hemar se epangger. Hemar jareya gi' ta' tao etompa' oreng. Bukka' panggerra hemar jareya pas giba dha' enna'." 
Luke19:31 Mon badha oreng atanya ka ba'na, ‘Me' ebukka' talena budhu'na hemar jareya?’ kabala, ‘Ekaparlo Pangeran.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Moredda Isa se kadhuwa jareya mangkat, ban sabarang se etemmo cocok ban se edhabuwagi Isa." 
Luke19:33 Teppa'na se kadhuwa jareya mokka' talena budhu'na hemar jareya, se andhi' ngoca', “Me' ebukka' talena budhu'na hemar jareya?”" 
Luke19:34 Saodda se kadhuwa jareya, “Ekaparlo Guste.”" 
Luke19:35 Budhu'na hemar jareya laju egiba ka Isa. Saellana jareya, se kadhuwa jareya mokka' jubana, laju epobu ka attassa budhu'na hemar jareya; Isa laju etolonge epaongga ka attassa hemar jareya." 
Luke19:36 Teppa'na Isa lebat sambi netene budhu'na hemar jareya, reng-oreng padha ngampar jubana neng e lorong." 
Luke19:37 E bakto Isa para' napa'a ka Yerusalim, e ron-toronan e Gumo' Jaitun, para red-moredda se bannya' jareya kabbi molae ra'-era'an amolja'agi Allah sarta asokkor ka Salerana polana sakabbiyanna kaajiban se etangale'e reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke19:38 Ca'na paera'na reng-oreng jareya, “Moga eberkadana Allah Rato se rabu bit asmana Pangeran! Taremtem e sowarga ban molja'agi Allah!”" 
Luke19:39 Reng-oreng Farisi se badha e antarana oreng se bannya' jareya padha mator ka Isa, “Guru, para moredda Panjennengngan ka'issa' pakon neng-enneng, pona!”" 
Luke19:40 Isa adhabu, “Paparcaja ba'na, ya! Mon reng-oreng rowa neng-enneng, to-bato reya tanto aera'.”" 
Luke19:41 E bakto sajan semma' ka Yerusalim, sarta ngoladi kottha jareya, Isa laju molar." 
Luke19:42 Dhabuna, “Ja' sakenga sateya ba'na tao apa se bisa madhateng kataremtemman! Tape sateya ba'na ta' bisa nangale'e." 
Luke19:43 E settong bakto e sakalenglengnga ba'na bakal epasangana dhang-addhang bi' so-mosona; ba'na bakal ekepponga sarta eseddhek dhari man-dhimman. 
Luke19:44 Ba'na ban sakabbiyanna oreng se badha e dhalemmanna ba'na bakal epaancora; ban ta' kera badha karena bato settonga balakka' se gi' asosona e kennengnganna, sabab ba'na ta' parduli e bakto Allah rabu masalamedda ba'na!”" 
Luke19:45 Isa maso' ka Padalemman Socce, sarta molae ngojuk gar-sodagar se badha e jadhiya." 
Luke19:46 “E dhalem Alketab,” ca'na dhabuna ka reng-oreng jareya, “esebbuttagi kantha reya, ‘Tang Bengko epadaddiya kennengnganna adu'a.’ Tape bi' ba'na ekagabay rongkangnga maleng!”" 
Luke19:47 Sabban are Isa morok e dhalem Padalemman Socce. Mam-imam kapala, ban ru-guru agama sarta pin-pamimpin Yahudi terro mateyana Isa jareya," 
Luke19:48 tape tadha' se nemmowa jalan baramma carana, sabab sakabbiyanna oreng terros ngedhingngagi dhabuna, ban padha kapencot atena ngedhing bu-dhabuna Isa jareya." 
Luke20:1 E settong are, Isa teppa'na morok ban manapa' Kabar Bagus dhari Allah ka reng-oreng e dhalem Padalemman Socce. Mam-imam kapala, ru-guru agama ban pin-pamimpin Yahudi nyander," 
Luke20:2 laju atanya ka Salerana, “Kaula terro taowa ponapa dhasarra Sampeyan me' ngalakone sadajana paneka? Pasera se apareng ha' ka Sampeyan?”" 
Luke20:3 Isa adhabu, “Sengko' terro atanya'a. Kodda' koca'agi ka Sengko'," 
Luke20:4 Yahya abaptis oreng olle ha' dhari dhimma? Dhari Allah apa dhari manossa?” 
Luke20:5 Reng-oreng jareya laju padha aparembagan, “Mon sampeyan ban kaula ngoca', ‘Dhari Allah,’ tanto oreng paneka ngoca', ‘Mon bariya, arapa ba'na me' ta' parcaja ka Yahya?’" 
Luke20:6 Tape mon sampeyan ban kaula ngoca', ‘Dhari manossa,’ sampeyan ban kaula tanto egarujuk ban bato bi' reng-oreng, sabab reng-oreng ka'issa' parcaja ja' Yahya paneka nabbi.”" 
Luke20:7 Daddi reng-oreng jareya nyaot, “Kaula ta' oneng.”" 
Luke20:8 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Mon bariya Sengko' ta' abala'a keya ka ba'na dhari dhimma Sengko' olle ha' ngalakone jareya kabbi.”" 
Luke20:9 Isa nyareta'agi parompama'an reya ka reng-oreng gella', “Badha oreng se namenne kebbun anggur. Kebbun jareya bi' oreng buru epasewa ka reng-oreng laen, dineng oreng jareya laju entar ka nagara laen ban neng e jadhiya sampe' abit." 
Luke20:10 Saellana napa' baktona molong buwana anggur gella', se andhi' kebbun jareya nyoro dunorra entar ka reng-oreng se agarap kebbunna jareya, esoro menta bagiyanna. Tape dunor buru bi' reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya epokol sarta esoro mole ta' epagibai pa-apa." 
Luke20:11 Daddi se andhi' kebbun jareya nyoro dunorra se laen; tape dunor jareya epokole keya sarta eya-seya bi' reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya, pas esoro mole ta' epagibai pa-apa." 
Luke20:12 Se andhi' kebbun jareya nyoro dunorra se kapeng tello'; tape dunor jareya epokol keya sampe' loka, laju eontallagi ka lowar." 
Luke20:13 Dhi-budhina se andhi' kebbun jareya ngoca', ‘Baramma'a pole sengko' reya? Sengko' nyorowa tang ana' dibi' se ekataresnae bi' sengko'. Tanto tang ana' jareya eargai bi' reng-oreng se nyewa tang kebbun jareya!’" 
Luke20:14 Tape e bakto reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya nangale'e ana'na se andhi' kebbun jareya, laju padha ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Areya' ana'na se andhi' kebbun. Mara pate'e bai, me' olle sangkolla daddi andhi'na sengko' ban ba'na.’" 
Luke20:15 Daddi ana'na se andhi' kebbun jareya eeret ka lowar laju epate'e.” Isa laju mareksa, “Daddi, mon se andhi' kebbun jareya abali, ba' epabaramma'a kerana reng-oreng se agarap kebbun jareya bi' se andhi'?" 
Luke20:16 Tanto se andhi' kebbun jareya entar mate'e reng-oreng se nyewa kebbunna jareya, sarta massra'agi kebbunna ka reng-oreng laen se agaraba kebbun jareya.” Ngedhing parompama'an jareya, reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya mator ka Isa, “Bunten, ta' kera!”" 
Luke20:17 Isa ngoladi ka reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Mon bariya, apa maksodda ayadda Alketab reya? ‘Bato se ta' karaddu ka tokang bangonan, daddi bato se paleng otama.’" 
Luke20:18 Sakabbiyanna oreng se labu ka bato jareya bakal ancora; ban pa'-sapa'a se egaggari bato jareya bakal lejjara daddi abu.” 
Luke20:19 Ru-guru agama ban mam-imam kapala tao ja' parompama'an jareya etojjuwagi ka aba'na. Daddi reng-oreng jareya terro mega'a Isa e bakto jareya keya, tape padha tako' ka oreng se bannya'." 
Luke20:20 Daddi reng-oreng jareya nyare kasempadan se bagus. Ru-guru ban mam-imam kapala jareya nyogo' reng-oreng esoro lem-maalem, esoro ajebbak Isa bi' partanya'an-partanya'an sopaja Isa ekennenga passra'agi ka gubennor se neggu' kakobasa'an." 
Luke20:21 Reng-oreng se la esogo' jareya mator ka Isa, “Guru, abdina oneng ja' se edhabuwagi sareng se eburukkagi Panjennengngan lerres sadaja. Abdina oneng jugan ja' Panjennengngan morok kalaban rang-terrangan parkara ponapa se daddi kasokanna Allah ka manossa, sabab Panjennengngan ta' ada'-bida'agi oreng." 
Luke20:22 Daddi ngereng dhabuwagi, kadi ponapa menorot agamana abdina sareng Panjennengngan, ponapa kengeng majar pajek ka Kaisar otaba bunten?”" 
Luke20:23 Tape Isa ngagali ka maksodda reng-oreng jareya se saongguna, daddi laju adhabu," 
Luke20:24 “Kodda' duduwagi ka Sengko' pesse salaka settong. Gambarra ban nyamana sapa reya?” “Kaisar!” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. 
Luke20:25 “Mon bariya,” dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, “atorragi ka Kaisar apa se daddi kaagunganna Kaisar ban atorragi ka Allah apa se daddi kaagunganna Allah.”" 
Luke20:26 Daddi e adha'na oreng se bannya' jareya ru-guru agama ban mam-imam kapala gella' ta' nemmo salana Isa maske settonga. Reng-oreng jareya neng-enneng, ban arassa kasambu' ngedhing jawabanna jareya." 
Luke20:27 Badha reng-oreng dhari golongan Saduki entar ka Isa. (Reng-oreng Saduki reya andhi' panemmo ja' oreng se mate ta' bakal odhi'a pole.) Reng-oreng jareya atanya ka Isa," 
Luke20:28 “Guru, Mosa nyerrat hokom se amonye saka'dhinto: Manabi badha oreng lalake' mate, sarengngan oreng gapaneka ta' gadhuwan ana', taretan lake'epon kodu ngabine randhana sopaja apareng toronan ka oreng se mate gapaneka." 
Luke20:29 Oneng badha oreng lalake' sataretan kapetto. Se sareyang abine laju adinggal omor ta' kalaban gadhuwan ana'. 
Luke20:30 Taretanna se nomer dhuwa' ngabine randhaepon, tape oreng gapaneka jugan adinggal omor ta' kalaban gadhuwan ana'." 
Luke20:31 Sapaneka jugan taretanna se nomer tello' sareng saterrossa kantos ka se nomer petto'. 
Luke20:32 Dhi-budhina babine' gapaneka adinggal omor jugan. 
Luke20:33 E are e bakto reng-oreng mate padha epaodhi' pole, rajiepon pasera babine' gapaneka? Sabab se kapetto padha oneng ngabine babine' gapaneka.”" 
Luke20:34 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng se odhi' sateya reya abine," 
Luke20:35 tape reng-oreng se pantes epaodhi' pole saellana mate, ban odhi' e jaman se bakal dhateng, ta' kera abine." 
Luke20:36 Kabadha'anna reng-oreng jareya akantha malaekat, ban ta' bisa mate. Reng-oreng jareya tra-pottrana Allah, sabab la epaodhi' pole dhari matena." 
Luke20:37 Mosa dibi' ngoca' ce' terrangnga ja' oreng se mate bakal epaodhi'a pole. E dhalem tolesanna parkara ombut se rabbang rowa Mosa nyebbut Pangeran jareya ‘Allahna Ibrahim, Allahna Ishak ban Allahna Yakub.’" 
Luke20:38 Daddi, Allah jareya banne Allahna oreng mate! Allah jareya Allahna reng-oreng se odhi'. Sabab monggu ka Allah sakabbiyanna oreng reya odhi'.”" 
Luke20:39 Ru-guru agama se badha e jadhiya badha se padha ngoca', “Jawabanna Guru reya ce' saena.”" 
Luke20:40 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ta' bangal pole anya-tanya ka Isa. 
Luke20:41 Isa mareksane ka reng-oreng jareya, “Baramma me' Rato Panyalamet jareya ekoca' toronanna Daud?" 
Luke20:42 Mangkana Daud dibi' ngoca' e dhalem Ketab Jabur, ‘Pangeran adhabu ka tang Pangeran: Mara toju' e kanganna Sengko'," 
Luke20:43 sampe' so-mosona ba'na bi' Sengko' epatellok kabbi ka ba'na.’ 
Luke20:44 Daddi mon Daud nyebbut Rato Panyalamet jareya ‘Pangeran’, baramma se bisa'a Salerana jareya toronanna Daud?”" 
Luke20:45 Sabatara reng-oreng ngedhingngagi Isa abu-dhabu gella', Isa adhabu ka red-moredda," 
Luke20:46 “Pate-ngate ka ru-guru agama se dujan lan-jalanan ngangguy juba se lanjang, ban se lebur ehormat oreng e sar-pasar. Ru-guru agama jareya dujan mele kennengngan se tarhormat e kennengnganna kabakteyan ban e jang-onjangan." 
Luke20:47 Ru-guru agama jareya dujan co-ngoco dha-randha ban arampas bengkona. Ban dujan adu'a epalanjang, eduduwagi e adha'na oreng bannya'! Okomanna reng-oreng jareya bakal berra'a!”" 
Luke21:1 E Padalemman Socce, Isa ngoladi reng-oreng sogi mamaso' pesse ka dhalem petthe tor-ator." 
Luke21:2 Salerana ngoladi keya settong randha se ce' meskenna mamaso' pesse dimbaga dhadhuwa'. 
Luke21:3 Isa laju adhabu, “Edhingngagi: se epamaso' randha rowa abannya'an dhari se epamaso' reng-oreng laenna." 
Luke21:4 Sabab se eatorragi reng-oreng laenna rowa pesse bi-lebbina dhi'-andhi'na. Tape randha rowa, maske ce' meskenna, ngatorragi sakabbiyanna se ekaandhi' aba'na se ekaparlo kaangguy odhi'na.”" 
Luke21:5 Badha reng-oreng se acaca parkara kabagusanna Padalemman Socce se erengga bato se gus-bagus sarta rang-barang se eatorragi ka Allah. Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya," 
Luke21:6 “Se etangale'e ba'na kabbi reya e settong bakto bakal epagujura; sampe' tadha' bato settonga balakka' se gi' asosona e kennengnganna!” 
Luke21:7 Red-moredda Isa atanya, “Guru, bilaepon gapaneka se bakal kadaddiyana? Ban ponapa tandhaepon ja' ampon napa' baktona parkara gapaneka kadaddiyana?”" 
Luke21:8 Dhabuna Isa, “Pangastete, ja' sampe' ba'na ekenneng co-koco. Bannya' oreng se dhatengnga kalaban ngangguy Tang nyama sarta ngoca', ‘Sengko' reya Almasih!’ ban ‘La napa' baktona.’ Tape ba'na ja' noro' reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke21:9 Bariya keya ba'na ja' tako' mon ngedhing kabar parkara paperrangan ban pamberontagan. Jareya kabbi kodu kalakon gallu. Tape jareya ta' ekenneng arte'e ja' la baktona keyamat.” 
Luke21:10 Isa nerrossagi dhabuna, “Bangsa se settong bakal aperranga ban bangsa laenna; nagara se settong bakal nyerranga nagara laenna." 
Luke21:11 E man-dhimman bakal badha'a lendhu se nako'e, kalaparan ban wabah panyaket. Dhari langnge' bakal badha'a kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan se ane ban nako'e." 
Luke21:12 Tape sabellunna jareya kalakon kabbi, ba'na bakal etangkebba ban ekaneyaja'a. Ba'na bakal eadilana e kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan sarta emaso'agi ka penjara. Ba'na bakal eereda ka adha'na to-rato ban para pangobasa polana ba'na daddi Tang mored." 
Luke21:13 Jareya kasempadan ka ba'na kaangguy manapa' Kabar Bagus dhari Allah. 
Luke21:14 Ba'na patekat ja' ba'na ta' parlo tako' parkara apa se ekoca'agiya ba'na kaangguy abillai aba'na. 
Luke21:15 Sengko' dibi' se mala'ana ba'na ca'-oca' ban kabicaksana'an, sampe' tadha' settonga mosona ba'na se bisa'a alaban otaba nyala'agi pa-apa se ekoca'agi ba'na." 
Luke21:16 Ba'na bakal ekiyanadana bi' oreng towana ba'na, bi' tan-taretanna, la-balana ban bi' ca-kancana; sabagiyan dhari ba'na badha se epateyana bi' reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke21:17 Ba'na bakal ekabaji'ana bi' reng-oreng polana ba'na daddi Tang mored. 
Luke21:18 Tape maske obu' salambar e cethagga ba'na ta' kera elang. 
Luke21:19 Mon ba'na kowat ban sabbar, ba'na tanto salamet.”" 
Luke21:20 “Mon ba'na nangale'e Yerusalim ekeppong tantara, ba'na tanto tao ja' kottha jareya ta' abit pole bakal epamosna'a." 
Luke21:21 E bakto jareya oreng se badha e Yudea kodu buru ka pagunongan. Se badha e kottha kodu buru dhari kottha jareya, ban se badha e lowar kottha ja' maso' ka kottha." 
Luke21:22 Sabab re-are jareya iya areya ‘Re-are Kaangguy Ajalannagi Okoman,’ sopaja kalaban cara jareya pa-apa se etoles e dhalem Alketab kalakon kabbi." 
Luke21:23 Marenges onggu re-are jareya monggu ka babine'an se ngandhung ban ebu se nyosowe babaji'na! Nagara reya bakal nemmowa kasossa'an raja, ban Pangeran bakal ngokoma bangsa reya." 
Luke21:24 Badha se epateyana bi' peddhang, badha pole se egiba'a etawana ka ra-nagara laen; ban reng-oreng se ta' kennal ka Allah bakal nyek-ngenyegga Yerusalim sampe' bakto se la etantowagi bi' Pangeran la tadha'.”" 
Luke21:25 “E are, bulan ban tang-bintang bakal etangaleyana badha dha-tandha. E bume sa-bangsa bakal padha'a katako'en ban bingong ngadhebbi garudhu'na tase' ban omba'na se raja." 
Luke21:26 Manossa bakal tako'a satengnga mate ngadhebbi pa-apa se bakal kadaddiyana e sabingkerra bume reya, sabab para pangobasa e bang-abang bakal salbuda." 
Luke21:27 E bakto jareya Pottrana Manossa bakal rabuwa e dhalem ondhem kalaban kobasa ban kamolja'an se raja. 
Luke21:28 Mon jareya kabbi la molae kadaddiyan, ba'na jaga ban adhanga, sabab ta' abit pole saellana jareya ba'na bakal epasalamedda.”" 
Luke21:29 Isa laju nyareta'agi parompama'an reya ka red-moredda, dhabuna, “Abassagi bungkana ara ban ka'-bungka'an laenna." 
Luke21:30 Mon ba'na nangale'e dhaunna la molae nyelbi', ba'na tao ja' la para' mosem panas." 
Luke21:31 Bariya keya mon ba'na nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya la molae kabbi, ba'na tao ja' Allah bakal duliya marenta menangka Rato." 
Luke21:32 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya! Jareya kabbi bakal kadaddiyana sabellunna reng-oreng se odhi' sateya reya mate kabbi." 
Luke21:33 Langnge' ban bume bakal mosna'a, tape Tang oca' paggun saterrossa.”" 
Luke21:34 “Senga', aga-jaga, ja' sampe' ba'na repot bi' ta-pesta ban nom-enoman, otabana talebat mekkere parkara odhi'na ba'na, sampe' ba'na ta' asadhiya e bakto are jareya dhateng daksakala." 
Luke21:35 Sabab are jareya bakal dhatengnga akantha jebbak kaangguy sakabbiyanna oreng e bume reya. 
Luke21:36 Aga-jaga, ban adu'a terros, me' olle ba'na kellar ngadhebbi sabarang se bakal kadaddiyana ban ba'na bisa ngadhep Pottrana Manossa.”" 
Luke21:37 Isa morok e Padalemman Socce e baja seyang, ban e baja malem meyos ka Gumo' Jaitun sarta asare e jadhiya." 
Luke21:38 Sabban gi' laggu reng-oreng padha dhateng ka Padalemman Socce ngedhingngagiya Isa se morok. 
Luke22:1 Paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i se enyamae Paska la para'. 
Luke22:2 Mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama nyare jalan se mateyana Isa ta' kalaban asa'-kasa', sabab padha tako' ka oreng se bannya'." 
Luke22:3 Saellana jareya Iblis laju maso' ka dhalem Yudas se enyamae keya Iskariyot, iya areya sala settong dhari moredda Isa se dhubellas oreng." 
Luke22:4 Daddi Yudas pas entar aparembagan bi' mam-imam kapala sarta para pangawalla Padalemman Socce parkara baramma carana sopaja aba'na bisa'a massra'agi Isa ka reng-oreng jareya. 
Luke22:5 Mam-imam kapala ban para pangawalla Padalemman Socce jareya perak sarta ajanji aberri'a pesse ka Yudas. 
Luke22:6 Yudas mopakat keya, daddi laju molae nyare kasempadan massra'agiya Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, ta' kalaban etemmo oreng." 
Luke22:7 La napa' arena e dhalem Paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i kaangguy nyambelli dumba se ekagabaya dhadha'aran Paska. 
Luke22:8 Daddi Isa makon Petrus ban Yahya, ca'na dhabuna, “Kassa' paranta dhadha'aran Paska se ekakana Sengko' ban ba'na.”" 
Luke22:9 “Eparanta'agiya e ka'imma?” ca'na se kadhuwa jareya. 
Luke22:10 Dhabuna Isa, “Mon ba'na maso' ka kottha, ba'na bakal tatemmowa bi' oreng lalake' se ngeba gendhi aesse aeng. Toro' oreng jareya ka bengko se emaso'e," 
Luke22:11 pas ngoca' ka se andhi' bengko jareya: Guru adhabu sapaneka, ‘E dhimma kennengnganna Sengko' ban Tang red-mored se ngakana dhadha'aran Paska?’" 
Luke22:12 Se andhi' bengko jareya bakal noduwagiya ka ba'na settong kamar se raja e loteng, genna' ban pakakassa. Paranta kabbi e jadhiya.”" 
Luke22:13 Daddi Petrus ban Yahya laju mangkat, sarta nemmo sakabbiyanna se edhabuwagi Isa. Se kadhuwa jareya maranta dhadha'aran Paska jareya." 
Luke22:14 Saellana napa' baktona se adha'ara dhadha'aran Paska jareya, Isa alenggi apolong ban red-moredda ngadha'i meja se aesse dhadha'aranna." 
Luke22:15 Isa laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Sengko' ce' terrona ngakana kakanan Paska reya bi' ba'na sabellunna Sengko' nanggung kasangsara'an!" 
Luke22:16 Sabab, paparcaja, ya: Sengko' ta' ngakana reya pole sampe' artena dhadha'aran reya enyata'agi e Dunnyana Allah Se Anyar.”" 
Luke22:17 Saellana jareya Isa laju ngangka' piala se aesse anggur, laju asokkor ka Allah, sarta pas adhabu, “Mara kala' reya, du'um kambuli." 
Luke22:18 Sabab ba'na ebala'ana, ya, molae sateya reya Sengko' ta' ngenoma anggur reya pole sampe' Allah kobasa kalaban samporna.”" 
Luke22:19 Saellana jareya Isa mondhut roti. Saellana asokkor ka Allah roti jareya ethok-ketthok bi' astana, pas eparengngagi ka red-moredda sambi adhabu, “Areya' Tang badan [se epassra'agi kaangguy ba'na. Lakone reya kaangguy ngenga'e Sengko'.”" 
Luke22:20 Bariya keya saellana adha'ar Isa marengngagi piala se aesse anggur gella' ka red-moredda sarta adhabu, “Piala reya parjanjiyanna Allah se anyar, se eessa'agi bi' tang dhara – dhara se epangalocor kaangguy ba'na kabbi].”" 
Luke22:21 “Tape abas! Oreng se akiyanadi Sengko' badha e dhinna', apolong ban Sengko'!" 
Luke22:22 Pottrana Manossa pajat bakal mateya akantha se la etantowagi Allah; tape calaka' oreng se akiyanadi Salerana!” 
Luke22:23 Red-moredda Isa jareya laju padha saleng atanya sapa e antarana se bakal akiyanadi guruna jareya. 
Luke22:24 Red-moredda Isa jareya apadu parkara sapa e antarana se kodu eanggep paleng raja. 
Luke22:25 Isa adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “To-ratona bangsa se ta' kennal ka Allah nendhes ra'yadda, ban ja-pangrajana enyamae ‘Pangaobanna Ra'yat’." 
Luke22:26 Tape ba'na ta' olle kantha jareya. Sabaligga, se paleng raja e antarana ba'na kodu daddi akantha se paleng kene', ban se daddi pamimpin kodu daddi akantha abdi." 
Luke22:27 Sapa se araja'an: oreng se toju' ngakan e meja otaba se aladine oreng se ngakan jareya? Tanto bai se toju' jareya. Tape Sengko' badha e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na menangka abdi. 
Luke22:28 E dhalem sakabbiyanna Tang kasossa'an ba'na kabbi ros-terrosan apolong ban Sengko'. 
Luke22:29 Rama apareng ka Sengko' ha' kaangguy marenta, bariya keya Sengko' aberri'a ka ba'na ha' jareya." 
Luke22:30 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na olle noro' neng-sennengngan bi' Sengko' e bakto Sengko' daddi Rato. Ban ba'na bakal toju'a e tahta se dhubellas meggi' kaangguy marenta suku bangsa Isra'il se dhubellas.” 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon, edhingngagi, ya! Iblis la eedine ngoji ba'na kabbi, akantha gandum epesa dhari kole'na sopaja se bagus epalaen dhari se juba'." 
Luke22:32 Tape Sengko' la nyo'onnagi ba'na, Simon, sopaja imanna ba'na ja' sampe' lontor. Ban mon ba'na la abali ka Sengko', ba'na kodu makowat tan-taretanna.”" 
Luke22:33 Petrus nyambit, “Guste, abdidalem poron maso' penjara sareng mate asareng Junandalem!”" 
Luke22:34 “Ba'na ebala'ana bi' Sengko', Petrus,” dhabuna Isa, “sabellunna ajam akongko' e are teya, ba'na mongkere Sengko' sampe' tello kale.”" 
Luke22:35 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Sabbanna, e bakto Sengko' ngotos ba'na tape ta' ngedine ba'na ngeba dhompet, kanthong ban sapatu, apa ba'na kakorangan?” “Bunten!” saodda red-moredda jareya." 
Luke22:36 “Tape sateya,” dhabuna Isa, “sapa se andhi' dhompet ban kanthong, kodu giba; ban sapa se ta' andhi' peddhang, jubana kodu juwal kabelli peddhang." 
Luke22:37 Sabab paparcaja, ya, ayadda Alketab se amonye kantha reya, ‘Salerana eanggep akantha oreng jahat,’ kodu kalakon ka Sengko'. Sabab apa se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab parkara Sengko', sateya reya teppa'na kalakon.”" 
Luke22:38 Red-moredda Isa mator, “Guste, oladi ka'dhinto' badha peddhang dhadhuwa'.” “La cokop!” dhabuna Isa." 
Luke22:39 Isa meyos dhari kottha, ban akantha biyasana terros ka Gumo' Jaitun, red-moredda padha ngereng." 
Luke22:40 Sanapa'na ka jadhiya, laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Nyo'on ka Allah, sopaja ba'na ta' sampe' dusa mon ba'na ecoba.”" 
Luke22:41 Saellana jareya Isa maso' ka jang dhalemman jauna sampe' ra-kera sapangotebban dhari red-moredda," 
Luke22:42 laju asojud tor adu'a, “Rama,” dhabuna, “manabi kengeng, jauwagi dhari abdidalem kasangsara'an se kodu etanggung abdidalem ka'dhinto'. Banne menorot pangaterro abdidalem, namong kasokannepon Junandalem.” [" 
Luke22:43 Laju badha malaekat dhari sowarga nyander makowat Salerana. 
Luke22:44 Panggaliyanna Isa ce' rentegga sampe' sajan ngoso' se adu'a; pellona akantha dhara nyapcap ka tana.] 
Luke22:45 Samarena adu'a, Isa abali ka kennengnganna red-moredda. Red-moredda jareya etemmo tedhung polana ce' sossana." 
Luke22:46 Dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na me' tedhung? Mara jaga ban nyo'on ka Allah me' olle ba'na ta' sampe' dusa mon ecoba.”" 
Luke22:47 Teppa'na Isa gi' abu-dhabu, laju dhateng pan-barampan oreng se epimpin bi' Yudas, sala settong dhari moredda Isa. Yudas nyander ka Isa, Isa laju eseyom." 
Luke22:48 Tape Isa adhabu, “Yudas, apa ba'na akiyanadi Pottrana Manossa kalaban nyeyom kantha reya?”" 
Luke22:49 E bakto nangale'e apa se bakal kadaddiyana jareya, red-moredda se badha e jadhiya atanya, “Guste, eserranga sareng peddhang saos, enggi?”" 
Luke22:50 Sala settong dhari moredda jareya laju meddhang dunorra imam agung bi' peddhangnga sampe' kopeng kanganna kotthong. 
Luke22:51 Tape Isa adhabu, “Ella, ra!” Kopengnga oreng jareya laju egagap ban epabaras." 
Luke22:52 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu ka mam-imam kapala ban ra-parwirana pangawalla Padalemman Socce, sarta pin-pamimpin Yahudi se entar ka jadhiya nangkebba Salerana, “Apa Sengko' reya oreng jahat, me' ba'na sampe' ngeba peddhang ban thong-penthong se mega'a Sengko'?" 
Luke22:53 Sabban are Sengko' akompol ban ba'na e Padalemman Socce, tape bi' ba'na Sengko' ta' epega'. Tape sateya reya sa'adda ba'na nangkep Sengko', sa'adda kakowadanna papetteng neggu' kakobasa'an.”" 
Luke22:54 Isa etangkep pas egiba ka bengkona imam agung. Petrus noro' bunte' dhari jauna. 
Luke22:55 E nga'-tengnga'anna taneyan jareya badha kampowan se la epaodhi', ban Petrus entar ka jadhiya toju' akompol ban reng-oreng se toju' e sakalenglengnga kampowan jareya." 
Luke22:56 Sala settong dhari bareng bine'na imam agung jareya nangale'e Petrus toju' e seddi'na kampowan jareya; bareng babine' jareya ngabassagi Petrus, laju ngoca', “Oreng paneka gella' abareng bi' Isa jugan!”" 
Luke22:57 Tape Petrus mongker, oca'na, “Kaula ta' kennal sakale ka oreng ganeka!”" 
Luke22:58 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya badha oreng laen nangale'e Petrus. Oreng jareya ngoca', “Sampeyan sala settong dhari reng-oreng ka'issa' keya.” Tape Petrus nyaot, “Bunten, banne kaula!”" 
Luke22:59 Ra-kera saejjam saellana jareya, badha oreng laen se ngoca' epakaja, “Oreng reya pajat moredda Isa, sabab oreng reya oreng Galilea!”" 
Luke22:60 Tape Petrus nyaot, “Kaula ta' ngarte ponapa maksodda sampeyan!” E bakto jareya keya, teppa'na Petrus gi' acaca, ajam akongko'." 
Luke22:61 Isa atole sarta ngoladi ka Petrus. Petrus laju enga' ka dhabuna Guste Isa ka aba'na, “Sabellunna ajam akongko' ba'na tello kale mongkere Sengko'.”" 
Luke22:62 Daddi Petrus kalowar dhari jadhiya, laju nanges gut-sergudan." 
Luke22:63 Isa ekagabay en-maenan sarta epokole bi' reng-oreng se ajaga. 
Luke22:64 Socana etotobi, ban reng-oreng jareya laju atanya, “Kodda' tebbak, sapa se mokol Ba'na?”" 
Luke22:65 Gi' bannya' pole ca'-oca' laenna se eangguy ya-nyeya Isa jareya. 
Luke22:66 Kalagguwanna, pin-pamimpin Yahudi, mam-imam kapala, ban ru-guru agama padha akompol, dineng Isa laju egiba ka adha'na Mahkamah Agama." 
Luke22:67 “Mara ngoca',” ca'na reng-oreng jareya ka Isa, “ba'na reya Rato Panyalamet, ya?” Dhabuna Isa, “Mon Sengko' abala ka ba'na, ba'na ta' kera parcaja." 
Luke22:68 Ban mon Sengko' atanya ka ba'na, ba'na ta' kera nyaot." 
Luke22:69 Tape molae sateya, Pottrana Manossa bakal alenggiya e kanganna Allah Se Mahakobasa.”" 
Luke22:70 Reng-oreng e Mahkamah jareya padha ngoca', “Mon bariya, ba'na reya Pottrana Allah?” Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na dibi' se ngoca'.”" 
Luke22:71 Ngedhing jareya, reng-oreng buru padha ngoca', “Pon ta' parlo nyare sakse pole! Kaula ban sampeyan ampon mereng dibi' ponapa se ekoca'agi oreng paneka!”" 
Luke23:1 Reng-oreng se badha e sidhang jareya padha jaga kabbi, pas ngeba Isa epangadhep ka Pilatus." 
Luke23:2 E jadhiya reng-oreng jareya molae agugat Isa, oca'na, “Oreng ka'dhinto' epanggi ngajak ra'yat ka jalan se sala. Ra'yat ecacae sopaja ta' majar pajek ka Kaisar, sabab ca'epon oreng ka'dhinto' aba'epon Almasih, rato.”" 
Luke23:3 Ca'na Pilatus ka Isa, “Apa bendher ba'na reya ratona oreng Yahudi?” Dhabuna Isa, “Panjennengngan dibi' se adhabu.”" 
Luke23:4 Pilatus laju adhabu ka mam-imam kapala ban ka oreng se bannya', “Sengko' ta' nemmo salana oreng reya maske settonga, daddi sengko' ta' bisa ngokom.”" 
Luke23:5 Tape reng-oreng jareya sajan maksa, “Kalaban pangajaranna, oreng ka'dhinto' nas-manase ra'yat sa Yudea; dha'-adha'epon e Galilea, samangken ampon napa' ka ka'dhinto'.”" 
Luke23:6 E bakto Pilatus meyarsa oca'na reng-oreng jareya, laju mareksane, “Apa oreng reya dhari Galilea?”" 
Luke23:7 Saellana eatore oneng ja' Isa jareya asalla dhari dhaera se ekobasae Herodes, bi' Pilatus Isa laju esoro giba ka Herodes, se e bakto jareya badha e Yerusalim keya." 
Luke23:8 Herodes ce' peragga e bakto ngoladi Isa, sabab la abit se meyarsa parkara Isa sarta terro ngoladana orengnga. Herodes terro ngoladana Isa mabadha mo'jijat." 
Luke23:9 Daddi Herodes anya-tanya sabannya'na ka Isa, tape Isa ta' nyaot sakale." 
Luke23:10 Mam-imam kapala ban ru-guru agama ngadhep ka jadhiya keya sarta agugat Isa ce' berra'na. 
Luke23:11 Isa egabay en-maenan tor eya-seya bi' Herodes ban tantarana, epangagem rasogan kabessaran, saellana jareya pas epabali ka Pilatus." 
Luke23:12 E are jareya Herodes ban Pilatus se sabellunna amoso, pas akanca pole." 
Luke23:13 Pilatus makompol mam-imam kapala, pin-pamimpin, ban ra'yat," 
Luke23:14 sarta laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na ngeba oreng reya ka Sengko'; ca'na ba'na oreng reya ngeba ra'yat ka jalan se sala. Sateya e adha'na ba'na kabbi oreng reya bi' sengko' epareksa, tape sengko' ta' nemmo kajahadan settonga se earannagi ba'na." 
Luke23:15 Bariya keya panemmona Herodes, sabab oreng reya bi' Herodes epabali pole ka sengko'. Oreng reya ta' andhi' sala pa-apa se pantes eokom mate." 
Luke23:16 Daddi bi' sengko' epeccoda bai, samarena pas eocola.” [" 
Luke23:17 Sabban paraya'an Paska, Pilatus ngocol oreng tahanan kasorang kaangguy ra'yat.]" 
Luke23:18 Reng-oreng se akompol e jadhiya aera', “Pate'e! Ocol Barabbas!” (" 
Luke23:19 Barabbas reya epenjara polana e kottha badha pamberontagan ban polana mate'e oreng.) 
Luke23:20 Pilatus terro ngocola Isa, daddi laju adhabu sakaleyan aggi' ka reng-oreng se bannya' jareya." 
Luke23:21 Tape reng-oreng jareya padha aera', “Salib oreng gapaneka! Salib oreng gapaneka!”" 
Luke23:22 Pilatus adhabu katellokaleyanna ka reng-oreng jareya, “Tape apa salana? Sengko' ta' nemmo kasala'an settonga se pantes eokom bi' okoman mate! Bi' sengko' epeccoda, pas eocola.”" 
Luke23:23 Tape reng-oreng jareya atharat salar-kellarra sopaja Isa esalib. Dhi-budhina tharadda jareya ahasel. 
Luke23:24 Pilatus ngokom Isa bi' okoman mate menorot karebba reng-oreng jareya," 
Luke23:25 ban ngocol oreng se epenta bi' oreng se bannya' jareya, iya areya oreng se epenjara polana pamberontagan ban polana mate'e oreng. Saellana jareya Isa epassra'agi ka reng-oreng se bannya' jareya kaangguy epabaramma'a bai sakarebba reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke23:26 Isa egiba bi' reng-oreng jareya. E tengnga jalan reng-oreng jareya tatemmo bi' oreng se anyama Simon, se asalla dhari Kirene, teppa'na entara ka kottha. Simon jareya epega' bi' reng-oreng jareya, laju epaksa esoro mekollagi salib jareya sambi ngerengngagi Isa." 
Luke23:27 Bannya' oreng se noro' bunte' e budhina Isa – e antarana badha keya babine'an. Babine'an jareya nangese Isa. 
Luke23:28 Tape Isa atole ka reng-oreng jareya, laju adhabu, “Babine'an Yerusalim! Ja' nangese Sengko'. Tangese aba'na dibi' ban na'-ana'na ba'na." 
Luke23:29 Sabab bakal napa'a baktona oreng ngoca'a, ‘Ontong onggu babine'an se ta' tao ngandhung, se ta' tao rembi' ban se ta' tao nyosowe babaji'!’" 
Luke23:30 E bakto jareya oreng bakal ngoca'a ka nong-gunong, ‘Mara cecce'e sengko'!’ Ban ka mo'-gumo', ‘Mara tembugi sengko'!’" 
Luke23:31 Sabab mon kaju se gi' odhi' la epakantha jareya, apa pole kaju se la kerreng!”" 
Luke23:32 Badha keya oreng kadhuwa – padha panjahat – se egiba eokoma mate epabareng bi' Isa. 
Luke23:33 Sanapa'na ka kennengngan se enyamae “Galunthonganna Cethak”, Isa ban panjahat se kadhuwa jareya laju padha esalib; panjahat se settong esaba' e kanganna, settonganna esaba' e kacerra Isa." 
Luke23:34 Isa laju adu'a, “Rama, parenge sapora reng-oreng ka'dhinto'! Sabab reng-oreng gapaneka padha ta' oneng ponapa se elakone aba'na.” Rasoganna Isa egi-bagi, elottre e antarana reng-oreng se alalakon e jadhiya." 
Luke23:35 Reng-oreng padha manjeng nenggu e jadhiya, sabatara pin-pamimpin Yahudi ya-nyeya Isa sambi ngoca', “Oreng laen epasalamet; kodda' sateya pasalamet aba'na dibi', mon pajat bendher ja' aba'na Rato Panyalamet peleyanna Allah!”" 
Luke23:36 Rit-parjurit padha co-ngoco keya. Reng-oreng jareya nyander ka Isa. Isa eatore anggur se celo'," 
Luke23:37 sambi ngoca', “Mon ba'na pajat ratona oreng Yahudi, kodda' pasalamet aba'na dibi'!”" 
Luke23:38 E attasanna salibba Isa epobuwi tolesan kantha reya, “Areya' Ratona Oreng Yahudi!”" 
Luke23:39 Panjahat se esalib e jadhiya se settong ya-nyeya Isa, oca'na, “Ba'na gu ta' Rato Panyalamet ta' iya? Sateya mara pasalamet Ba'na dibi' ban sengko' se kadhuwa reya!”" 
Luke23:40 Tape panjahat settonganna maenga' kancana jareya, oca'na, “Ba'na reya me' ta' tako' ka Allah? Ba'na ban sengko' eokom mate akantha oreng rowa." 
Luke23:41 Coma, okomanna ba'na ban sengko' pajat la sabandhing ban kasala'anna. Tape oreng reya ta' andhi' sala pa-apa!”" 
Luke23:42 Saellana jareya panjahat jareya laju ngoca', “Isa, kaemodi abdina, manabi Panjennengngan rabu menangka Rato!”" 
Luke23:43 “Paparcaja ba'na, ya,” dhabuna Isa ka oreng jareya, “e are teya keya ba'na bakal akompola bi' Sengko' e Firdaus.”" 
Luke23:44 Ra-kera pokol dhubellas e baja beddhuk are ta' nyonar, sanagara ce' pettengnga sampe' pokol tello' asar." 
Luke23:45 Bir-tabir se agantong e Padalemman Socce sebbit madhuwa. 
Luke23:46 Isa laju aera' epakaja, “Rama! Abdidalem massra'agi aba' Abdidalem ka Junandalem!” Samarena adhabu kantha jareya Isa laju seda." 
Luke23:47 E bakto nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya, parwirana pasukan laju amolja'agi Allah, sarta ngoca', “Oreng reya ta' sala onggu!”" 
Luke23:48 Reng-oreng se bannya' se entar nengguwa ka jadhiya, nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya. Kabbi laju padha mole sambi los-ngellos dhadha, atena ce' manyessella." 
Luke23:49 Sakabbiyanna kennalanna Isa, tamaso' babine'an se noro' bunte' Isa molae dhari Galilea, manjeng dhari jauna ngabassagi jareya kabbi." 
Luke23:50 Badha oreng se anyama Yusup, se asalla dhari kottha Arimateya e nagara Yudea. Yusup jareya oreng becce' ban ehormadi oreng, te'-nante'an baktona Allah se mola'ana marenta menangka Rato. Maske Yusup jareya anggotana Mahkamah Agama, tape ta' cocok ka potosan ban ka pa-apa se elakone mahkamah jareya." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Yusup jareya ngadhep ka Pilatus sarta nyo'on sopaja jinazana Isa eparengngagi ka aba'na. 
Luke23:53 Jinaza jareya epatoron dhari kaju salib, sarta laju ebundu' bi' kaen kapan dhari linen. Saellana jareya pas esaba' e koburan se ekagabay e dhalem gumo' bato – koburan jareya gi' ta' tao eangguy." 
Luke23:54 Are jareya are Juma'at; ban are Sabat la para' mola'ana. 
Luke23:55 Babine'an se noro' bunte' Isa molae dhari Galilea laju noro' Yusup sarta nangale'e koburan jareya. Reng-oreng jareya nangale'e keya baramma jinazana Isa se esaba' e dhalem koburan. 
Luke23:56 Saellana jareya kabbi padha mole, laju nyadhiya'agi racegan ban mennya' ro'om se emennya'agiya ka jinazana Isa. E are Sabat reng-oreng jareya ambu ta' alalakon, kaangguy atoro' ka atoranna agamana." 
Luke24:1 E are Ahad gi' petteng, babine'an jareya entar ka koburan ngeba racegan se la esadhiya'agi sabellunna." 
Luke24:2 Sanapa'na ka koburan jareya, bato panotobba etemmo la agulu'." 
Luke24:3 Daddi babine'an jareya maso' ka koburanna, tape ta' nemmo jinazana Isa e jadhiya." 
Luke24:4 Teppa'na babine'an jareya manjeng e jadhiya, pekkeranna bingong mekkere parkara jareya, o-tao laju badha oreng kadhuwa kalambina arap-galirap manjeng e seddi'na aba'na." 
Luke24:5 Reng-oreng jareya ce' tako'na, laju asojud ka tana sabatara se kadhuwa gella' adhabu kantha reya, “Arapa ba'na me' nyare oreng odhi' e antarana oreng mate?" 
Luke24:6 Isa la tadha' e dhinna'. Isa la odhi' pole! Ba' enga'a ba'na apa ca'na dhabuna ka ba'na e bakto gi' badha e Galilea? 
Luke24:7 Ca'na dhabuna, ‘Pottrana Manossa kodu epassra'agi ka oreng dusa, laju esalib, ban e are se kapeng tello' bakal odhi'a pole.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Babine'an jareya laju enga' ka dhabuna Isa. 
Luke24:9 Sabalina dhari koburan parkara jareya kabbi laju ecareta'agi ka rasulla se sabellas oreng ban ka red-moredda se laen. 
Luke24:10 Babine'an se ngabarragi parkara jareya iya areya: Miriyam Magdalena, Yohana ban Miriyam ebuna Yakobus, sarta babine'an laenna se abareng ban babine'an jareya." 
Luke24:11 Tape sul-rasul jareya nyangka babine'an jareya abay-gabay, daddi padha ta' parcaja." 
Luke24:12 Tape Petrus jaga, pas berka' ka koburan. Sambi ngendha' Petrus nyongngo' ka dhalem, tape se etangale'e pera' kaen kapan se dhari linen rowa, tadha' pa-apa laenna. Petrus laju mole, e atena anya-tanya mekkere kadaddiyan jareya." 
Luke24:13 E are jareya keya badha moredda Isa kadhuwa teppa'na ajalan entara ka settong disa se anyama Emaus, se ra-kera sabellas kilo jauna dhari Yerusalim." 
Luke24:14 Sambi ajalan se kadhuwa jareya acaca parkara pa-apa se la kadaddiyan jareya. 
Luke24:15 Teppa'na acaca sarta saleng aberri' panemmo bang-sebang, Isa dibi' rabu, laju alomampa abareng ban se kadhuwa jareya." 
Luke24:16 Se kadhuwa jareya nangale'e Isa tape ta' enga' ja' jareya Isa. 
Luke24:17 Isa laju adhabu, “Apa se ekacaca ba'na e tengnga jalan reya?” Se kadhuwa jareya ambu se ajalan, abasanna katon sossa." 
Luke24:18 Se settong, se anyama Kleyopas, ngoca' ka Isa, “Ngara'a Sampeyan paneka malolo oreng manca e Yerusalim se ta' oneng parkara se kadaddiyan e dhalem pan-saponapan are paneka.”" 
Luke24:19 “Kadaddiyan apa?” dhabuna Isa. “Pa-ponapa se kadaddiyan ka Isa, oreng dhari Nazaret ka'issa',” saodda se kadhuwa jareya. “Isa ganeka nabbi. Menorot anggebbanna Allah, sapaneka jugan anggebbanna sadajana oreng – sadajana dhabuna sareng lalakonna Isa gapaneka ce' kobasana." 
Luke24:20 Sareng mam-imam kapala tor pin-pamimpinna bangsa kaula Isa gapaneka epassra'agi kaangguy eokom mate; Isa laju esalib. 
Luke24:21 Mangkana kaula ngarep Isa ganeka se mabebasa Isra'il! Samangken paneka are se kapeng tello' saamponna kadaddiyan ganeka. 
Luke24:22 Sarengngan pole, badha babine'an se matakerjat kaula sadaja. Gi' petteng babine'an ganeka entar ka koburan," 
Luke24:23 tape ta' manggi'i jinazana Isa e ka'issa'. Babine'an ganeka abali, laju acareta, ca'epon nengale kat-malaekat, dineng kat-malaekat ganeka adhabu ja' Isa odhi'." 
Luke24:24 E antarana kaula sadaja badha se laju padha entar ka koburan, sareng manggi'i ja' se ekoca'agi babine'an ka'issa' pajat lerres, nangeng reng-oreng ganeka ta' nengale Isa.”" 
Luke24:25 Isa laju adhabu ka se kadhuwa jareya, “Ba'na pajat budhu! Ba'na me' ta' duli parcaja ka pa-apa se ekoca'agi para nabbi!" 
Luke24:26 Rato Panyalamet jareya gu ta' kodu nanggung sangsara gallu sabellunna maso' ka dhalem kamolja'anna?” 
Luke24:27 Saellana jareya Isa nerrangngagi ka se kadhuwa jareya pa-apa se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab parkara Salerana, molae dhari tab-ketabba Mosa ban tab-ketabba para nabbi." 
Luke24:28 Sabatara jareya Isa ban se kadhuwa buru la para' napa'a ka kennengngan se etojju. Isa tha-kantha terrosa," 
Luke24:29 tape eandhek bi' se kadhuwa jareya. Atorra, “Ngereng kelem e compo' kaula saos; samangken ampon para' malemma, ban are ampon molae petteng.” Daddi Isa laju kelem e kennengnganna se kadhuwa jareya." 
Luke24:30 E bakto alenggi adha'ar bi' se kadhuwa jareya, Isa mondhut roti, asokkor ka Allah, rotina ethok-ketthok bi' astana, laju eparengngagi ka se kadhuwa jareya." 
Luke24:31 Se kadhuwa jareya laju apangrasa ja' jareya Isa. Tape Isa laju mosna ta' etangale'e. 
Luke24:32 Ca'na se kadhuwa jareya, “E bakto Isa abu-dhabu e tengnga jalan, sarta nerrangngagi essena Alketab ka sengko' ban ba'na, tang ate rassana akantha apoy se rabak. Tantona ba'na kantha jareya keya, ta' iya?”" 
Luke24:33 E bakto jareya keya se kadhuwa jareya laju jaga, terros abali ka Yerusalim. E jadhiya se kadhuwa nemmo moredda Isa se sabellas oreng akompol ban en-laenna." 
Luke24:34 Ca'na reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Guste Isa pajat la odhi' pole! Salerana ngaton ka Simon!”" 
Luke24:35 Moredda Isa se kadhuwa se buru dhateng jareya laju nyareta'agi pangalamanna e dhalem parjalananna, ban baramma se kadhuwa jareya enga' ka Isa e bakto Isa thok-ngetthok roti." 
Luke24:36 Teppa'na se kadhuwa jareya acareta, o-tao Isa dibi' etemmo ngadek e nga'-tengnga'anna red-moredda se badha e jadhiya, laju adhabu, “Salam ka ba'na kabbi!”" 
Luke24:37 Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha takerjat ban katako'en kabbi, sabab Isa esanggu din-dadin." 
Luke24:38 Tape Isa adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' padha tako'? Arapa atena ba'na me' mangmang?" 
Luke24:39 Mara abas Tang tanang ban Tang soko. Abas, reya Sengko' dibi'! Mara gagap, ba'na tanto tao, sabab din-dadin ta' adaging ban ta' atolang, ta' akantha Sengko' se etangale'e ba'na reya.”" 
Luke24:40 Isa adhabu kantha jareya sambi noduwagi asta ban padana. 
Luke24:41 Ban sabatara reng-oreng jareya gi' ta' parcaja, polana ce' peragga sarta heran, Isa laju adhabu, “Apa ba'na andhi' kakanan e dhinna'?”" 
Luke24:42 Bi' reng-oreng jareya Isa eatore juko' guring sakerra'. 
Luke24:43 Bi' Isa epondhut, laju edha'ar e adha'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke24:44 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu pole, “E bakto Sengko' gi' apolong ban ba'na, Sengko' la malae: Pa-apa se etoles parkara Sengko' e dhalem Tab-ketab Mosa, Para Nabbi ban Jabur, kodu kalakon kabbi.”" 
Luke24:45 Saellana jareya pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya bi' Isa epatabukka' sopaja ngarte ka maksodda Alketab. 
Luke24:46 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu, “E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi ja' Rato Panyalamet jareya kodu nanggung sangsara gallu, ban kodu odhi' pole saellana seda olle tello are." 
Luke24:47 Bariya keya ja' bit asmana Rato Panyalamet jareya kodu eberta'agi ka sakabbiyanna bangsa ja' manossa reya kodu atobat, ban ja' Allah reya nyapora oreng se dusa. Kabar jareya kodu eberta'agi molae dhari Yerusalim." 
Luke24:48 Ba'na kabbi saksena parkara jareya. 
Luke24:49 Ban Sengko' dibi' ngeremmagiya ka ba'na apa se ejanjiyagi Rama. Tape ba'na kodu paggun anante' e kottha reya sampe' kobasana Allah toron ka ba'na.” 
Luke24:50 Saellana jareya reng-oreng gella' bi' Isa egiba kalowar kottha sampe' gan Betania. E jadhiya Isa ngangka' astana, laju aberkadi reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke24:51 Sabatara aberkadi jareya, Isa epaongga ka sowarga, pas tapesa dhari reng-oreng jareya." 
Luke24:52 Reng-oreng jareya kabbi padha asojud nyemba Salerana, laju abali ka Yerusalim; atena ce' peragga," 
Luke24:53 sarta padha amolja'agi Allah e Padalemman Socce. 
John1:1 Dhabu jareya apolong ban Allah ban Dhabu jareya padha bi' Allah. 
John1:2 Dhari dha'-adha'na Salerana apolong bi' Allah. 
John1:3 Sakabbiyanna ecepta'agi kalaban parantara'anna, ban dhari sakabbiyanna se badha reya, tadha' settonga se epabadha ta' kalaban Salerana." 
John1:4 Dhabu jareya somberra odhi', ban odhi' jareya aberri' terrang ka manossa." 
John1:5 Terrang jareya nyonar e pettengnga, ban papetteng ta' bisa mamate terrang jareya." 
John1:6 Rabu oreng se eotos Allah, Yahya asmana." 
John1:7 Yahya rabu ngabarragi parkara terrang jareya, sopaja oreng padha'a parcaja." 
John1:8 Yahya dibi' banne terrang jareya, salerana coma aberta'agi parkara jareya." 
John1:9 Terrang se saongguna se nera'e sakabbiyanna manossa, rabu ka dunnya." 
John1:10 Dhabu jareya badha e dunnya, dunnya ecepta'agi kalaban parantara'anna, tape dunnya ta' kennal ka Salerana." 
John1:11 Salerana rabu ka nagarana dibi' tape ta' etarema bi' bangsana. 
John1:12 Tape badha keya oreng se endha' narema ban parcaja ka Salerana; reng-oreng jareya eparenge ha' daddi pottrana Allah. 
John1:13 Se elahirragi banne dhari manossa, sabab odhi' se anyar jareya dhari Allah asalla." 
John1:14 Dhabu jareya la daddi manossa, alenggi e antarana sengko' ban ba'na. Sengko' ban ba'na la nangale'e kaagunganna. Kaagungan jareya etarema Salerana menangka Pottrana Rama se nonggal. Kalaban parantara'anna Salerana sengko' ban ba'na nangale'e Allah ban kataresna'anna ka sengko' ban ba'na." 
John1:15 Yahya rabu menangka saksena, se aberta'agi kantha reya: “Areya' Salerana se ekamaksod sengko' e bakto sengko' ngoca', ‘Salerana rabuwa jang budhiyan dhari sengko', tape araja'an dhari sengko', sabab sabellunna sengko' badha Salerana la badha kaadha'.’ ”" 
John1:16 Salerana possa' ban kataresna'an; tadha' ambuna, Salerana aberkadi sengko' ban ba'na." 
John1:17 Hokomma Allah etarema sengko' ban ba'na kalaban parantara'anna Mosa. Tape kataresna'an ban kaestowanna Allah enyata'agi kalaban parantara'anna Isa Almasih. 
John1:18 Tadha' se tao nangale'e Allah, kajabana Pottrana Rama se nonggal, se padha ban Rama, ban ce' rapedda bi' Salerana. Salerana se anyata'agi Rama ka sengko' ban ba'na." 
John1:19 Para pangobasa Yahudi e Yerusalim nyoro mam-imam ban reng-oreng Lewi entar ka Yahya sarta atanya kantha reya, “Sampeyan paneka pasera?”" 
John1:20 Yahya ngako rang-terrangan, “Sengko' reya banne Rato Panyalamet.”" 
John1:21 “Daddi pasera sampeyan paneka?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. “Ponapa sampeyan paneka Eliya?” “Banne,” saodda Yahya. “Ponapa sampeyan paneka Nabbi?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya pole. “Banne,” sambidda." 
John1:22 “Manabi sapaneka, ngereng dhabuwagi pasera sampeyan paneka,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “me' olle kaula bisa ngatore jawaban ka reng-oreng se ngotos kaula. Ponapa se edhabuwagiya sampeyan parkara sampeyan dibi'?”" 
John1:23 Dhabuna Yahya, “Sengko' reya se bi' Nabbi Yesaya ekoca': ‘Oreng se aera' e sagara beddhi: Parampa'agi jalan kaangguy Pangeran.’ ”" 
John1:24 Reng-oreng se eotos bi' reng-oreng Farisi jareya 
John1:25 atanya, “Manabi sampeyan banne Rato Panyalamet, banne Eliya, banne sang Nabbi, aponapa sampeyan me' abaptis oreng?”" 
John1:26 Dhabuna Yahya, “Sengko' reya abaptis oreng ngangguy aeng. Tape badha oreng se apolong ban ba'na tape ba'na ta' kennal." 
John1:27 Salerana rabu jang budhiyan dhari sengko', tape mokka' talena kateteyanna bai sengko' reya ta' pantes.”" 
John1:28 Jareya kabbi kadaddiyan e Betania, e temorra Songay Yordan kennengnganna Yahya se abaptis oreng." 
John1:29 Kalagguwanna, Yahya ngoladi Isa rabu sarta nyander ka Salerana. Yahya laju adhabu, “Abas, wa, arowa' Cacempena Allah se matadha' dusana dunnya." 
John1:30 Salerana jareya se bi' sengko' ekoca' se rabuwa jang budhiyan dhari sengko', tape araja'an dhari sengko', sabab sabellunna sengko' lahir, Salerana la badha." 
John1:31 Sabellunna, sengko' ta' tao sapa Salerana jareya. Mangkana sengko' dhateng abaptis oreng ngangguy aeng sopaja oreng Isra'il kennal ka Salerana.”" 
John1:32 Yahya nyakse'e kantha reya: “Sengko' nangale'e Errohna Allah toron akantha dara dhari langnge' enneng e attasanna. 
John1:33 E bakto jareya sengko' gi' ta' tao sapa Salerana jareya, tape Allah se makon sengko' abaptis oreng ngangguy aeng, la adhabu ka sengko', ‘Mon ba'na nangale'e Errohna Allah toron, pas enneng e attassa settong oreng lalake', oreng jareya se bakal abaptisa oreng bi' Errohna Allah.’" 
John1:34 Sengko' la nangale'e dibi' Erroh jareya,” ca'na dhabuna Yahya, “ban sengko' nyakse'e ja' oreng jareya Pottrana Allah.”" 
John1:35 Kalagguwanna Yahya badha e kennengngan jareya pole abareng bi' moredda kadhuwa. 
John1:36 E bakto Yahya ngoladi Isa, laju adhabu, “Abas, wa! Arowa' Cacempena Allah.”" 
John1:37 Moredda Yahya se kadhuwa ngedhing dhabuna Yahya jareya, laju ngereng Isa." 
John1:38 Isa atole ka budhi, ngoladi se noro' bunte' jareya, laju adhabu, “Ba'na nyareya apa?” Saodda se kadhuwa jareya, “Rabbi, e ka'imma kalenggiyanna panjennengngan?” (Oca' ‘Rabbi’ reya artena ‘Guru’.)" 
John1:39 “Mara noro', tenggu dibi',” dhabuna Isa. Se kadhuwa jareya noro', laju nangale'e e dhimma kalenggiyanna Isa. E bakto jareya pokol empa' asar. Saare jareya se kadhuwa buru enneng bi' Isa." 
John1:40 Sala settong e antarana oreng se kadhuwa se ngedhing apa se edhabuwagi Yahya jareya sarta pas noro' Isa, nyamana Andreyas, taretanna Simon Petrus." 
John1:41 Andreyas duli nyare'e Simon, taretanna, sarta laju abala kantha reya, “Kaula ampon atemmo ban Mesiyas!” (Mesiyas reya artena padha ban Almasih, iya areya Rato Panyalamet.)" 
John1:42 Saellana jareya bi' Andreyas Simon laju egiba ka Isa. Isa mandeng Simon, laju adhabu, “Ba'na reya Simon, ana'na Yonas, tape ba'na esebbuda Kefas.” (Kefas reya padha ban Petrus, artena: gunong karang.)" 
John1:43 Kalagguwanna Isa motossagi meyosa ka Galilea. E jadhiya tapanggi ban Filipus, laju adhabu ka Filipus jareya, “Mara, noro' sengko'!”" 
John1:44 Filipus reya asalla dhari Betsaida, kennengnganna bengkona Andreyas ban Petrus." 
John1:45 Filipus tatemmo ban Natana'el, laju ngoca', “Sengko' la tatemmo ban oreng se esebbut bi' Mosa e dhalem Ketab Hokomma Allah, ban se eberta'agi bi-nabbi. Jareya Isa dhari Nazaret, pottrana Yusup.”" 
John1:46 Tape Natana'el nyaot, “Ba' badha'a barang se bagus dhari Nazaret?” “Mara tenggu dibi',” saodda Filipus." 
John1:47 E bakto Isa ngoladi Natana'el dhateng, laju adhabu parkara oreng jareya, “Abas, arowa' oreng Isra'il se saongguna. Tadha' se palsu e dhalem aba'na.”" 
John1:48 “Kadi ponapa Panjennengngan me' ngagali ka abdina?” ca'na patanyana Natana'el ka Isa. Dhabuna Isa, “Sabellunna Filipus ngolok ba'na, Sengko' la nangale'e ba'na e babana bungkana ara jarowa.”" 
John1:49 “Guru,” ca'na Natana'el, “Panjennengngan paneka Pottrana Allah! Panjennengngan Ratona Bangsa Isra'il!”" 
John1:50 Dhabuna Isa, “Apa ba'na parcaja ka Sengko' jareya pera' polana Sengko' ngoca' nangale'e ba'na e babana bungkana ara rowa? Ba'na bakal nangaleyana rang-barang se araja'an dhari jareya!”" 
John1:51 Isa laju adhabu pole, “Ongguwan, paparcaja, ya, ba'na bakal nangaleyana langnge' abukka', ban kat-malaekadda Allah ongga toron ka Pottrana Manossa.”" 
John2:1 Saellana olle dhu are dhari jareya, badha jang-onjangan e kottha Kanna e Galilea, ban ebuna Isa badha e jadhiya." 
John2:2 Isa ban red-moredda eatore keya ka jang-onjangan jareya. 
John2:3 E bakto anggurra la tadha', ebuna adhabu ka Isa, “Anggurra ta' mendhang.”" 
John2:4 Dhabuna Isa, “Kaula ja' kon-pakon, Bu. Gi' ta' dhapa' baktona Kaula anyata'agiya pasera salerressa Kaula paneka.”" 
John2:5 Tape ebuna Isa adhabu ka para pangladin, “Toro' apa se esorowagi ka ba'na.”" 
John2:6 E jadhiya badha kelmo' nem-ennem, se esadhiya'agi e jadhiya kaangguy maccowe soko menorot adad Yahudi. Kelmo' jareya essena ra-kera saratos liter." 
John2:7 Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng se aladine jang-onjangan jareya, “Mo'-kelmo' jareya esse'e aeng.” Bi' reng-oreng se aladine jang-onjangan jareya kelmo'na eesse'e aeng kabbi epapossa'." 
John2:8 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Sateya kala' aeng jareya sakone', pas giba ka katowana jang-onjangan reya.” Reng-oreng se aladine jang-onjangan jareya ngala' aeng e kelmo' jareya, laju egiba ka katowana jang-onjangan;" 
John2:9 katowana jang-onjangan jareya nyepcep aeng jareya, se la aoba daddi anggur. (Oreng jareya ta' tao olle dhari dhimma anggur jareya, coma reng-oreng se nyelen aeng jareya se tao.) Daddi katowana jang-onjangan jareya laju nyander ka seddi'na pangantan lake'," 
John2:10 sarta pas ngoca', “Biyasana se eangka'agi kaadha' anggur se paleng bagus; mon tamoy ampon tobuk se ngenom, buru epakalowar anggur se biyasa. Tape anggur se bagus bi' sampeyan eerrep sampe' samangken!”" 
John2:11 Jareya mo'jijadda Isa se dha'-adha', se epabadha Isa neng e Kanna, Galilea. Kalaban tandha jareya Isa noduwagi kamolja'anna. Daddi red-moredda parcaja ka Salerana." 
John2:12 Saellana jareya, Isa meyos ka Kapernaum asareng ban ebuna, tan-taretanna ban red-moredda. Kabbi padha neng e jadhiya sampe' pan-barampan are abidda." 
John2:13 E bakto Are Raja Paska Yahudi la para', Isa meyos ka Yerusalim." 
John2:14 E Padalemman Socce Isa manggi reng-oreng se padha ajuwal sape, dumba ban dara; bariya keya reng-oreng se nyadhiya'agi poroban pesse padha toju' ngadhebbi meja e jadhiya." 
John2:15 Isa laju abadhi peccot dhari tale, terros ngagga sakabbiyanna keban se badha e jadhiya, iya areya dumba ban sape, epakalowar dhari Padalemman Socce. Ja-mejana reng-oreng se nyadhiya'agi poroban pesse epajungkelang sampe' pessena car-kalacer san-kassannagi." 
John2:16 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng se ajuwal dara, “Pakalowar kabbi dhari dhinna'. Dalemma Rama ja' kagabay kennengnganna adagang!”" 
John2:17 Red-moredda laju enga' ka ayat e dhalem Alketab se amonye kantha reya, “Pangabakte abdidalem ka Dalemmepon Junandalem ekarassa rabbang e dhalem ate abdidalem.”" 
John2:18 Ja-pangrajana Yahudi nangtang Isa, oca'na, “Kodda' Sampeyan mabadha kaajiban menangka tandha ka kaula sadaja ja' Sampeyan andhi' ha' alako sapaneka!”" 
John2:19 Dhabuna Isa, “Pagujur Padalemman Socce reya, e dhalem tello are bi' Sengko' la epamanjengnga pole.”" 
John2:20 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Padalemman Socce paneka epaddek pa' polo ennem taon abidda, buru mare. Bi' sampeyan e paddegga e dhalem tello are?”" 
John2:21 Tape Padalemman Socce se ekamaksod Isa jareya badanna dibi'. 
John2:22 Daddi e bakto Isa odhi' pole saellana seda, red-moredda laju enga' ja' Isa la tao adhabuwagi parkara jareya. Daddi laju padha parcaja ka pa-apa se etoles e dhalem Alketab ban pa-apa se edhabuwagi Isa." 
John2:23 Sabatara Isa badha e Yerusalim e bakto Paraya'an Paska, bannya' oreng se parcaja ka Salerana polana nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban se ebadha'agi sengko'." 
John2:24 Tape Isa ta' parcaja ka reng-oreng jareya, sabab Isa ngagali ka sakabbiyanna oreng." 
John2:25 Ta' parlo Isa eatore oneng sapa reng-oreng jareya, sabab Isa dibi' la ngagali apa se badha e dhalem atena manossa." 
John3:1 Badha pamimpin agama Yahudi dhari golonganna oreng Farisi se anyama Nikodemus. 
John3:2 E settong malem Nikodemus nyabis ka Isa, laju mator, “Guru, abdina oneng ja' Panjennengngan eotos Allah. Sabab tadha' oreng se onenga mabadha kaajiban akadi se epabadha Panjennengngan manabi ta' esarengnge Allah.”" 
John3:3 Dhabuna Isa, “Paparcaja, ya, tadha' settonga oreng se bisa'a daddi anggotana ommadda Allah mon oreng jareya ta' elahirragi pole.”" 
John3:4 “Kadi ponapa oreng se ampon dibasa kengenga lahir pole?” ca'na Nikodemus ka Isa. “Kadi ponapa se kengenga maso'a ka dhalem gandhu'annepon ebuna sarta laju elahirragi pole.” 
John3:5 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' ngoca' sabendherra: mon oreng ta' elahirragi dhari aeng ban Errohna Allah, oreng jareya ta' kera daddi ommadda Allah." 
John3:6 Manossa badanna elahirragi bi' oreng towana, tape sacara rohani elahirragi bi' Errohna Allah." 
John3:7 Daddi ja' heran mon Sengko' ngoca': ba'na kabbi kodu elahirragi pole. 
John3:8 Angen ajalan dha' emma'a bai noro' sakarebba; ba'na ngedhing monyena, tape ta' tao dhari dhimma padhatengnga ban dha' emma jalanna. Bariya keya oreng se elahirragi Errohna Allah.”" 
John3:9 “Me' kadi ka'dhinto'?” ca'na Nikodemus. 
John3:10 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na reya guru e Isra'il. Masa' ba'na ta' tao?" 
John3:11 Paparcaja, ya: Sengko' ban Tang red-mored reya acaca pera' parkara pa-apa se la ekataowe Sengko' ban tang red-mored reya, sarta nyaksene pera' parkara pa-apa se la tao etangale; tape ba'na ta' endha' narema kasakseyanna Sengko' ban Tang red-mored reya." 
John3:12 Ba'na ta' parcaja mon Sengko' nyareta'agi ka ba'na parkara pa-apa dhari dunnya reya; baramma ba'na se parcaja'a mon Sengko' nyareta'agi pa-apa se dhari sowarga? 
John3:13 Ban tadha' oreng se tao ongga ka sowarga, kajabana Pottrana Manossa, se toron ka dunnya dhari sowarga." 
John3:14 Padha ban Mosa se maongga olar dimbaga ka kaju e sagara beddhi, bariya keya Pottrana Manossa kodu epaongga," 
John3:15 sopaja oreng se parcaja ka Salerana olle odhi' se sabendherra tor langgeng.” 
John3:16 Sabab Allah reya talebat raja taresnana ka manossa e dunnya reya, sampe' marengngagi Pottrana se nonggal, sopaja pa'-sapa'a se parcaja ka Salerana ta' sampe'a mate, tape olle odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng." 
John3:17 Sabab Allah ngotos Pottrana banne kaangguy nyare salana dunnya reya, tape kaangguy masalamedda." 
John3:18 Oreng se parcaja ka Salerana ta' kera eokom. Tape se ta' parcaja la eokom bi' Allah, sabab ta' parcaja ka Pottrana Allah se nonggal." 
John3:19 Oreng jareya egugat adhasar ka parkara reya: Terrang jareya la rabu ka dunnya, tape manossa asennengngan ka petteng etembang ka terrang, sabab lalakonna reng-oreng jareya juba'." 
John3:20 Sakabbiyanna oreng se alako jahat, baji' ka terrang, ta' endha' ka terrang, sopaja lalakonna se jahat ta' etangaleyana oreng." 
John3:21 Tape oreng se ngalakone kasokanna Allah, entar ka terrang sopaja nyata'a ja' apa se elakone aba'na jareya menorot kasokanna Allah." 
John3:22 Saellana jareya Isa ban red-moredda meyos ka Yudea. Isa alenggi e jadhiya sakejja' ban red-moredda sarta abaptis oreng. 
John3:23 E bakto jareya Yahya gi' ta' epamaso' ka penjara. Yahya jareya abaptis e Ainon, ta' jau dhari Salim, sabab e jadhiya bannya' aengnga. Reng-oreng padha entar ka jadhiya, ban Yahya laju abaptisa oreng." 
John3:24  
John3:25 Red-moredda Yahya badha se molae atokar ban oreng Yahudi parkara atoranna oreng abacco noro' hokomma agama. 
John3:26 Red-moredda jareya laju entar ka Yahya, sarta ngoca', “Guru, panjennengngan ba' emoda ka oreng se asareng panjennengngan e temorra Songay Yordan ka'issa', se sareng panjennengngan eduduwagi ka abdina sadaja gi' bakto ganeka? Samangken oreng gapaneka abaptis oreng jugan, ban sadajana oreng entar ka oreng gapaneka!”" 
John3:27 Dhabuna Yahya, “Manossa reya ta' kera andhi' pa-apa mon ta' eparenge Allah." 
John3:28 Ba'na dibi' la ngedhing sengko' ngoca', ‘Sengko' reya banne Rato Panyalamet. Sengko' eotos dhateng kaadha', ajangadha'i Salerana.’" 
John3:29 Pangantan bine' reya andhi'na pangantan lake'. Bat-sobadda pangantan lake' pera' manjeng e seddi'anna sambi ngedhingngagi, ban arassa senneng mon ngedhing sowarana pangantanna lake'. Bariya keya sengko'. Sateya sengko' ce' sennengnga." 
John3:30 Salerana se kodu atamba penting, ban sengko' sajan korang penting.”" 
John3:31 Se rabu dhari attas ngalebbi'i sakabbiyanna. Se dhateng dhari dunnya tamaso' golonganna oreng dunnya, ban acaca parkara rang-barang dunnya. Salerana se rabu dhari attas ngalebbi'i sakabbiyanna." 
John3:32 Salerana abu-dhabu parkara apa se la eoladi ban epeyarsa, tape tadha' oreng settonga se parcaja ka kasakseyanna." 
John3:33 Oreng se parcaja ka kasakseyanna jareya, ngakone ja' Allah reya lerres." 
John3:34 Sabab oreng se eotos Allah manapa' dhabuna Allah, sabab Errohna Allah la eparengngagi sacara samporna ka Salerana." 
John3:35 Rama taresna ka Pottrana, ban la massra'agi sakabbiyanna kobasa ka Salerana." 
John3:36 Oreng se parcaja ka Pottra jareya bakal olleya odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng. Tape oreng se ta' ta'at ka Pottra jareya ta' narema odhi', ban eokom bi' Allah saterrossa." 
John4:1 Reng-oreng Farisi ngedhing ja' Isa abannya'an olle ban abaptis mored etembang bi' Yahya. ( 
John4:2 Sabendherra Isa dibi' ta' abaptis oreng, se abaptis pera' red-moredda.)" 
John4:3 Daddi e bakto ngagali ja' reng-oreng Farisi la ngedhing parkara jareya, Isa laju meyos dhari Yudea ka Galilea." 
John4:4 E dhalem parjalanan jareya Isa kodu lebat e Samaria. 
John4:5 E Samaria jareya Isa napa' ka settong kottha se anyama Sikhar, ta' jau dhari tana se lamba' eparengngagi Yakub ka Yusup pottrana." 
John4:6 E jadhiya badha somorra Yakub. Isa ce' lessona polana parjalanan jareya, daddi alenggi e seddi'na somor jareya. E bakto jareya are ra-kera pokol dhubellas dhuk-beddhuk," 
John4:7 red-moredda padha entar ka kottha melleya kakanan. E bakto jareya pas badha oreng babine' Samaria entar nemba aeng. Dhabuna Isa ka babine' jareya, “Mara, ra, Sengko' berri'i aengnga, Sengko' ngenoma.”" 
John4:8  
John4:9 Saodda babine' jareya, “Sampeyan oreng Yahudi, kaula oreng Samaria; aponapa Sampeyan me' nyo'on aeng enom ka kaula?” (Sabab oreng Yahudi ta' endha' apolongan ban oreng Samaria.)" 
John4:10 Dhabuna Isa, “Ja' sakenga ba'na tao ka paparengnga Allah ban tao sapa se menta aeng enom ka ba'na, tanto ba'na dibi' se menta aeng enom ka oreng jareya, ban oreng jareya tanto apareng ka ba'na aeng kaodhi'an.”" 
John4:11 Ca'na babine' jareya, “Sampeyan ta' kaagungan temba, ban somor paneka ce' dhalemma. Dhari ka'imma Sampeyan se olleya aeng kaodhi'an?" 
John4:12 Somor paneka paparengnga Yakub bangatowa bangsa kaula. Yakub dibi' manabi adha'ara aeng mondhut dhari somor paneka; Sapaneka jugan tra-pottrana sareng ebinna. Ponapa Sampeyan apangrasa araja'an dhari Yakub?” 
John4:13 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng se ngenom aeng reya gi' pelka'a pole." 
John4:14 Tape oreng se ngenom aeng baberri'na Sengko' ta' kera pelka' salanjangnga. Sabab aeng baberri'na Sengko' jareya bakal daddiya somber e dhalem aba'na se nancel kalowar ban madhateng odhi' se sabendherra tor langgeng ka aba'na.” 
John4:15 Ca'na babine' jareya, “Towan, tore kaula parenge aeng ganeka, sopaja kaula ta' pelka' pole, sareng ta' parlo abali ngala' aeng ka ka'anja.”" 
John4:16 “Kassa' olok lakena ba'na, pas abali dha' enna',” ca'na dhabuna Isa." 
John4:17 “Kaula ta' gadhuwan lake,” saodda babine' jareya. “Teppa' ca'na ba'na,” dhabuna Isa." 
John4:18 “Sabab ba'na la alake lema kale, ban lalake' se apolong ban ba'na sateya banne lakena ba'na.”" 
John4:19 “Samangken kaula oneng, Panjennengngan paneka nabbi,” ca'na babine' jareya." 
John4:20 “Bangatowana bangsa Samaria abakte ka Allah e gumo' paneka, namong bangsaepon Panjennengngan ngoca' ja' namong e Yerusalim kennengngannepon oreng abakte ka Allah.”" 
John4:21 “Ba'na paparcaja, ya,” dhabuna Isa ka babine' jareya, “E settong bakto oreng abakteya ka Rama, banne e gumo' reya, ban bariya keya banne e Yerusalim." 
John4:22 Ba'na, reng-oreng Samaria nyemba ka se ta' ekennal bi' ba'na dibi', tape Sengko' kabbi, oreng Yahudi, nyemba ka Salerana se ekennal bi' oreng Yahudi, sabab kasalameddan dhari oreng Yahudi dhatengnga." 
John4:23 Tape bakal napa'a baktona, la'-mala' sanyatana la napa' baktona, ja' kalaban kobasana Errohna Allah oreng bakal abakteya ka Rama menangka Allah se saongguna akantha se ekasokane Rama." 
John4:24 Sabab Allah reya Erroh, ban pera' kalaban kobasana Errohna Allah reng-oreng bisa abakte ka Rama menorot kodradda Rama.”" 
John4:25 Babine' jareya ngoca' ka Isa, “Abdina oneng ja' Rato Panyalamet (se esebbut Almasih) bakal rabuwa. Manabi Salerana ampon rabu, abdina sadaja bakal eparengngana oneng ponapa'a saos sareng Salerana.”" 
John4:26 “Sengko' reya Rato Panyalamet jareya,” dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' se acaca bi' ba'na sateya reya.”" 
John4:27 E bakto jareya red-moredda Isa la padha dhateng. Kabbi padha heran nangale'e Isa abu-dhabu ban oreng babine'. Tape tadha' settonga se atanya ka babine' jareya, “Sampeyan aponapa'a?” otabana atanya ka Isa, “Aponapa Panjennengngan me' abu-dhabu sareng babine' paneka?”" 
John4:28 Babine' jareya laju berka' ka kottha, kelmo'na edina. Ca'na babine' jareya ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya," 
John4:29 “Tore mon nengalana oreng se apareng oneng ka kaula sabarang se oneng elakone kaula. Pola oreng ganeka me' Rato Panyalamet?” 
John4:30 Daddi reng-oreng jareya padha mangkat dhari kottha jareya entar ka Isa. 
John4:31 Sabatara jareya bi' red-moredda Isa eajak adha'ar. “Guru,” oca'na, “eatore adha'ar.”" 
John4:32 Tape Isa adhabu, “Sengko' la andhi' kakanan, ba'na ta' tao.”" 
John4:33 Daddi red-moredda padha saleng atanya, “Pola badha oreng ngatore kakanan ka Salerana.”" 
John4:34 Isa laju adhabu, “Tang kakan iya areya atoro' ka kasokanna se ngotos Sengko', ban mamare lalakon se epassra'agi ka Sengko'." 
John4:35 Ba'na ngoca', ‘Pa' bulan aggi' mosem anye.’ Tape Sengko' ngoca'a ka ba'na: abassagi pateppa' gal-teggal rowa; gandumma la koneng, la ekenneng anye!" 
John4:36 Oreng se anye la molae narema opana ban makompol hasella kaangguy odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng. Daddi oreng se nabur ban se anye olle anga-bunga areng-bareng. 
John4:37 Pajat bendher ca'-oca'an reya: ‘Se settong namen, se laen anye.’" 
John4:38 Bi' Sengko' ba'na esoro anye e teggal se ta' egarap ba'na; oreng laen se agarap, ban ba'na se narema kaontongan dhari lalakonna reng-oreng jareya.”" 
John4:39 Bannya' oreng Samaria e kottha jareya parcaja ka Isa polana babine' jareya ngoca', “Oreng jareya nyebbuttagi ka sengko' sabarang se la elakone sengko'.”" 
John4:40 Daddi e bakto tatemmo ban Isa, reng-oreng jareya laju padha nyo'on sopaja Isa kasokana alenggi bi' reng-oreng jareya. Daddi Isa alenggi e jadhiya dhu are abidda." 
John4:41 Saellana jareya sajan bannya' pole se parcaja ka Isa polana apa se eajarragi dibi' ka reng-oreng jareya. 
John4:42 Ban reng-oreng jareya ngoca' ka babine' gella', “Samangken kaula parcaja, banne polana se ekabala sampeyan ka kaula, tape polana kaula dibi' ampon ngedhing, ban oneng ja' Isa ganeka pajat Panyalamedda Dunnya.”" 
John4:43 Saellana dhu are se alenggi e Sikhar, Isa laju meyos ka Galilea." 
John4:44 Isa dibi' la adhabu, “Nabbi ta' eargai e nagarana dibi'.”" 
John4:45 Tape sanapa'na ka Galilea reng-oreng e jadhiya narema Isa kalaban senneng ate, sabab reng-oreng jareya badha e Yerusalim e Are Paska, ban la nangale'e pa-apa se elampa'agi Isa." 
John4:46 Saellana jareya Isa abali ka Kanna e Galilea, iya areya kennengnganna Salerana se ngoba aeng epadaddi anggur. E kottha jareya badha ponggabana pamarenta, ana'na teppa'na sake' e Kapernaum." 
John4:47 E bakto ngedhing ja' Isa la rabu ka Galilea dhari Yudea, ponggabana pamarenta jareya laju nyabis ka Isa sarta nyo'on sopaja Isa kasokana rabu ka Kapernaum kaangguy mabaras ana'na se para' mateya." 
John4:48 Isa adhabu ka ponggabana pamarenta jareya, “Mon ba'na ta' nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban, ba'na ta' kera parcaja.”" 
John4:49 “Towan,” ca'na ponggabana pamarenta jareya, “ngereng duli alenggi ka compo' sabellunnepon ana' abdina mate.”" 
John4:50 Dhabuna Isa, “Kassa' le-mole, ana'na ba'na la baras.” Oreng jareya parcaja ka dhabuna Isa, laju mole." 
John4:51 E tengnga jalan tatemmo ban di-abdina se padha entar abala ka lorana, oca'na, “Pottrana panjennengngan ampon sae.”" 
John4:52 Ponggabana pamarenta jareya atanya pokol barampa ana'na jareya se molae baras. Ca'na di-abdina jareya, “Ba'ari' ra-kera pokol settong dhuk-beddhuk panassepon elang.”" 
John4:53 Eppa'na kana' se sake' jareya laju enga' ja' e bakto jareya Isa se adhabu ka aba'na, “Ana'na ba'na la baras.” Daddi oreng jareya sabala padha parcaja ka Isa." 
John4:54 Jareya kaajiban se kapeng dhuwa' se epabadha Isa e Galilea saellana rabu dhari Yudea. 
John5:1 Saellana jareya badha paraya'an Yahudi, daddi Isa meyos ka Yerusalim." 
John5:2 E Yerusalim, e seddi'na “Labang Dumba” badha settong taman, se e dhalem oca' Ibrani enyamae Betesda. E jadhiya badha amperra lalema'." 
John5:3 E per-amper jareya bannya' oreng sake' epadhung-tedhungan; badha se buta, badha se dippang, ban badha se empon. (Reng-oreng sake' jareya anante' gulina aeng e taman jareya." 
John5:4 Sabab dhang-kadhang malaekadda Pangeran toron ka taman jareya, makocak aengnga. Ban oreng sake' se dha'-adha' kadibi' maso' ka dhalem taman jareya e bakto aengnga akocak bakal barasa dhari panyakedda.)" 
John5:5 E kennengngan jareya badha oreng lalake' kasorang se sake' la tello polo ballu' taon abidda. 
John5:6 Isa ngoladi oreng jareya dhung-tedhungan e jadhiya, ban tao ja' oreng jareya sake' la ce' abidda. Daddi Isa laju adhabu, “Ba'na terro barasa, ya?”"
