John5:7 Oreng se sake' jareya nyambit, “Pa', e ka'dhinto' tadha' oreng se mamaso'a kaula ka dhalem taman e bakto aengnga akocak. E bakto kaula aehteyar maso'a, ampon badha oreng laen se ajangadha'i.”" 
John5:8 Dhabuna Isa ka oreng jareya, “Mara jaga, kala' tekerra, pas ajalan.”" 
John5:9 E bakto jareya keya oreng buru laju baras. Tekerra ekala', laju ajalan. Kadaddiyan jareya teppa' are Sabat." 
John5:10 Daddi ja-pangrajana Yahudi ngoca' ka oreng se buru epabaras jareya, “Sateya are Sabat. Ba'na ta' olle ngeba teker.”" 
John5:11 Tape oreng jareya nyaot, “Oreng se mabaras abdina se makon abdina ajalan ngeba teker paneka.”" 
John5:12 “Sapa se nyoro ba'na kantha jareya?” ca'na reng-oreng gella'. 
John5:13 Tape oreng se la baras jareya ta' tao sapa orengnga, sabab e bakto jareya ce' bannya'na oreng ban Isa la maelang." 
John5:14 Saellana jareya Isa tapanggi ban oreng jareya e dhalem Padalemman Socce. Dhabuna Isa, “Sateya ba'na la baras. Ja' agabay dusa pole, mon enja' ba'na bakal lebbiya palang dhari dha'-adha'na.”" 
John5:15 Oreng jareya laju abala ka om-kaom oreng agungnga Yahudi ja' se mabaras aba'na iya areya Isa. 
John5:16 Daddi ja-pangraja jareya molae la-nyala ka Isa, sabab Isa mabaras oreng gella' e are Sabat." 
John5:17 Tape Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Tang Rama ros-terrosan tan-ngastane sampe' sateya, ban Sengko' kodu alalakon keya.”" 
John5:18 Dhabuna Isa jareya andaddiyagi om-kaom oreng agung Yahudi sajan aehteyar mateyana Isa. Kan cara jareya, banne pera' polana Isa ta' atoro' ka atoranna agama parkara are Sabat, tape badha parkara laenna pole, iya areya Isa adhabu ja' Allah Ramana; jareya andhi' arte Isa mapadha Salerana bi' Allah." 
John5:19 Isa adhabu kantha reya ka reng-oreng gella', “Ba'na paparcaja, ya; Pottra ta' bisa alako pa-apa kalaban kobasana dibi'. Apa se eoladi eastane Ramana, jareya se elakone. Sabab apa se eastane Rama, jareya se eastane Pottra." 
John5:20 Sabab Rama taresna ka Pottra ban noduwagi ka Pottra jareya pa-apa se eastane Salerana dibi'. La'-mala' Rama bakal noduwagiya ka Pottrana kon-lalakon se araja'an dhari jareya, sampe' ba'na tanto heran." 
John5:21 Rama maodhi' oreng se la mate, ban apareng odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng ka oreng jareya; bariya keya Pottra apareng odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng ka oreng se ekasokane eparengngana odhi' jareya." 
John5:22 Rama dibi' ta' ahakime sapa'a bai. Sakabbiyanna kakobasa'an kaangguy ahakime la epassra'agi ka Pottrana. 
John5:23 Rama alampa'agi kantha jareya sopaja Pottra ehormat oreng padha akantha Rama. Pa'-sapa'a se ta' ngormadi Pottra padha ban ta' ngormadi Rama se ngotos Pottra jareya. 
John5:24 Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra: Oreng se ngedhingngagi Tang oca' kalaban gu-onggu, ban parcaja ka se ngotos Sengko', andhi' odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng. Oreng jareya bakal lopoda dhari okoman; aba'na la lopot dhari pate ban la olle kaodhi'an." 
John5:25 Paparcaja, ya: Bakal dhapa'a baktona, la'-mala' la dhapa' baktona, oreng mate bakal ngedhinga sowarana Pottrana Allah, ban oreng se ngedhing sowara jareya bakal odhi'a." 
John5:26 Akantha Rama se daddi somberra odhi', Pottrana epadaddi somberra odhi' keya." 
John5:27 Pottrana la eparenge ha' kaangguy ahakime, sabab Salerana jareya Pottrana Manossa." 
John5:28 Ba'na ja' heran mon ngedhing jareya; sabab bakal dhapa'a baktona oreng mate kabbi padha ngedhinga sowarana," 
John5:29 laju kalowar dhari koburanna. Oreng se alako becce' bakal jaga'a kaangguy odhi'a, tape se alako juba' bakal jaga'a kaangguy narema'a okoman.”" 
John5:30 “Sengko' ta' bisa apa-rapa noro' Tang karep dibi'. Sengko' pera' ahakime menorot se epakonnagi Allah. Ban tang potosan adil, sabab Sengko' ta' noro' Tang karep dibi', tape atoro' ka kasokanna Rama se ngotos Sengko'." 
John5:31 Saompamana Sengko' aberri' kasakseyan ka Tang aba' dibi', kasakseyan jareya ta' ekenneng tarema menangka bukte." 
John5:32 Tape badha oreng laen se aberri' kasakseyan parkara Sengko', ban Sengko' tao ja' kasakseyanna jareya pajat bendher." 
John5:33 Ba'na nyoro oreng entar ka Yahya, ban Yahya aberri' kasakseyan sabendherra parkara Sengko'." 
John5:34 Sengko' ngoca'agi parkara jareya banne polana Sengko' marlowagi kasakseyanna manossa, tape sopaja ba'na epasalamedda." 
John5:35 Yahya padha ban damar se odhi' ban tera'. Kaangguy sabatara abidda ba'na senneng narema sonarra. 
John5:36 Tape kasakseyan Sengko' araja'an dhari kasakseyanna Yahya. Pa-apa se elakone Sengko' sateya reya, iya areya lalakon se bi' Rama epakon lakone ka Sengko', abukteyagi ja' Sengko' reya pajat eotos Rama." 
John5:37 Ban Rama se ngotos Sengko' apareng kasakseyan keya parkara Sengko'. Ba'na gi' ta' tao ngedhing sowarana otaba nangale'e Salerana. 
John5:38 Dhabuna bi' ba'na ta' esempen e atena sabab ba'na ta' parcaja ka Sengko' otosanna. 
John5:39 Ba'na ajar Alketab sabab ba'na nyangka kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na bakal olleya odhi' se saongguna ban se langgeng. Ban Alketab jareya dibi' aberri' kasakseyan parkara Sengko'. 
John5:40 Tape ba'na ta' endha' nyander ka Sengko' sopaja olleya odhi' se langgeng. 
John5:41 Sengko' ta' terro ealemma manossa. 
John5:42 Sengko' tao sapa ba'na reya. Sengko' tao ba'na e dhalem atena ta' andhi' kataresna'an ka Allah. 
John5:43 Sengko' dhateng kalaban kobasana Tang Rama, tape ba'na ta' endha' narema Sengko'. Tape mon oreng dhateng kalaban kobasana dibi' bi' ba'na etarema." 
John5:44 Baramma ba'na se parcaja'a ka Sengko', mon ba'na terro ealemma sasamana, ban ta' aehteyar sopaja ealemma Allah Se Settong?" 
John5:45 Ba'na ja' nyangka bi' Sengko' esala'agiya e ajunanna Rama. La'-mala' se nyala'agiya ba'na iya areya Mosa, se daddi pangarebbanna ba'na." 
John5:46 Ja' sakenga ba'na parcaja ka Mosa tanto ba'na parcaja ka Sengko', sabab se etoles Mosa nerrangngagi parkara Sengko'." 
John5:47 Tape mon ba'na ta' parcaja ka se etoles Mosa, baramma ba'na se parcaja'a ka se ekoca'agi Sengko'?”" 
John6:1 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Isa meyos ka temorra Talaga Galilea, se enyamae keya Talaga Tiberiyas." 
John6:2 Sanapa'na ka jadhiya laju etoro' bunte' oreng sabannya'na sabab reng-oreng jareya la nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban se mabaras reng-oreng sake'. 
John6:3 Isa ongga ka gumo', pas alenggi e jadhiya ban red-moredda." 
John6:4 E bakto jareya la para' Are Raja Paskana Yahudi. 
John6:5 E bakto ngoladi ka sakalenglengnga, Isa laju ngagali ja' bannya' oreng anyo-ronyo noro' Salerana ka jadhiya. Daddi Isa laju adhabu ka Filipus, “E dhimma melleya roti, sopaja reng-oreng rowa bisa'a ngakan?” (" 
John6:6 Isa adhabu kantha jareya terro ngojiya Filipus, sabab sanyatana Salerana la ngagali apa se bakal elampa'agiya.)" 
John6:7 Filipus mator, “Sanare ngobangana roti kantos dhu ratos pesse salaka ta' kera cokop eteddha reng-oreng ka'dhinto', sanare rang-sorangnga namong eparenge bil-satembil.”" 
John6:8 Badha moredda Isa se laen, se anyama Andreyas, iya areya taretanna Simon Petrus, mator," 
John6:9 “E ka'dhinto' badha na'-kana' lalake' kasorang se gadhuwan roti lalema' sareng juko' dhadhuwa'. Namong ponapa artena monggu ka oreng se saka'dhinto bannya'epon.” 
John6:10 “Reng-oreng jareya soro toju',” dhabuna Isa. E kennengngan jareya bannya' rebbana, daddi reng-oreng jareya toju' e rebba, bannya'na ra-kera badha lema ebu oreng lalake'an." 
John6:11 Isa mondhut roti gella', laju asokkor ka Allah. Saellana jareya rotina egi-bagi ka oreng se sabannya'na jareya. Bariya keya juko'na egi-bagi. Reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya padha ngakan sanyang-kennyangnga." 
John6:12 Saellana kabbi padha kennyang se ngakan, Isa adhabu ka red-moredda, “Kassa' pakompol lebbina kakanan jareya; ja' sampe' badha se tabuwang.”" 
John6:13 Red-moredda laju makompol bin-lebbinna roti se ekakan reng-oreng jareya, bannya'na gi' kare dhubellas karanjang." 
John6:14 E bakto nangale'e kaajiban se epabadha Isa jareya, oreng se bannya' jareya laju padha ngoca', “Oreng reya pajat Nabbi se earep rabuna ka dunnya!”" 
John6:15 Isa ngagali ja' reng-oreng jareya nyanderra maksa'a Salerana epadaddiya ratona. Daddi Isa laju nyengla ka kennengngan se amo'-gumo'. 
John6:16 E bakto la molae malem, red-moredda Isa toron ka talaga." 
John6:17 Saellana jareya laju ongga ka parao, entas talaga entara ka Kapernaum. Are la malem, tape Isa gi' ta' rabu." 
John6:18 Sabatara jareya angenna laju tandhes ban omba'na raja. 
John6:19 Saellana se alajar olle ra-kera lema' otaba nem kilometer, red-moredda Isa jareya nangale'e Isa alomampa e attas aeng nyander ka paraona. Red-mored jareya ce' tako'na." 
John6:20 Tape Isa adhabu, “Ella, ta' osa tako', areya Sengko'!”" 
John6:21 Red-moredda ce' sennengnga, Isa eatore maso' ka dhalem paraona, ban e bakto jareya keya parao buru la napa' ka kennengngan se etojju." 
John6:22 Kalagguwanna reng-oreng se bannya' se gi' badha e penggirra talaga tao ja' gella'na e jadhiya pera' badha parao settong. Reng-oreng jareya tao ja' red-moredda Isa la mangkat nompa' parao jareya, tape Isa ta' meyos abareng. Bi' red-moredda jareya Isa edina'agi." 
John6:23 Saellana jareya badha o-parao dhari Tiberiyas alabbu e seddi'na kennengnganna reng-oreng jareya ngakan roti saellana Isa asokkor ka Allah. 
John6:24 E bakto reng-oreng jareya tao ja' Isa ban red-moredda tadha' e o-parao jareya, kabbi laju padha ongga ka o-parao jareya, terros alajar ka Kapernaum nyare'e Isa." 
John6:25 E bakto atemmo bi' Isa e bara' dhajana talaga, reng-oreng jareya laju padha atanya, “Guru, bilaepon Panjennengngan se tanduk dha' ka'dhinto'?”" 
John6:26 Dhabuna Isa, “Saongguna, ba'na reya padha nyare'e Sengko' polana ba'na ngakan sampe' kennyang, banne polana ba'na ngarte apa maksodda kaajiban-kaajiban jareya." 
John6:27 Ba'na ja' alako polana terro olleya kakanan se bisa tadha' ban bucco'. Ba'na kodu alako sopaja ba'na olleya kakanan se ta' bisa bucco' ban se madhateng odhi' se saongguna ban se langgeng. Ba'na bakal narema'a kakanan jareya dhari Pottrana Manossa, sabab Pottrana Manossa jareya la elanti' bi' Allah Rama.”" 
John6:28 Reng-oreng jareya laju atanya ka Isa, “Ponapa se elakonana abdina sopaja kengenga ajalannagi kasokanna Allah?”" 
John6:29 Dhabuna Isa, “Se daddi kasokanna Allah iya areya sopaja ba'na parcaja'a ka Salerana se eotos Allah.”" 
John6:30 “Manabi saka'dhinto,” ca'na atorra reng-oreng jareya, “ponapa bukte se eduduwagiya Panjennengngan me' olle abdina sadaja parcaja ka Panjennengngan? Ponapa se elampa'agiya Panjennengngan?" 
John6:31 Bangatowa abdina sadaja adha'ar manna e ra-ara, kadi se ampon esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab, ‘Allah apareng roti dhari sowarga se ekakana reng-oreng jareya.’ ”" 
John6:32 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Paparcaja, ya: Banne Mosa, tape Tang Rama se apareng ka ba'na roti se saongguna dhari sowarga." 
John6:33 Sabab roti paparengnga Allah iya areya Salerana se toron dhari sowarga ban apareng odhi' ka manossa e dunnya reya.” 
John6:34 “Pa',” ca'na atorra reng-oreng jareya, “ngereng abdina sadaja parenge roti gapaneka salanjangnga.”" 
John6:35 “Sengko' reya Roti se aberri' kaodhi'an,” dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya. “Oreng se nyander ka Sengko' ta' kera lapar salanjangnga. Ban oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' ta' kera pelka' salanjangnga.”" 
John6:36 “Tape akantha se la ekoca'agi Sengko' ka ba'na, maske ba'na nangale'e Sengko', ba'na ta' parcaja." 
John6:37 Sengko' ta' nolaga sapa'a bai se nyander ka Sengko'. 
John6:38 Sabab Sengko' toron dhari sowarga, banne polana ajalannagiya Tang karep dibi', tape ajalannagiya kasokanna Salerana se ngotos Sengko'." 
John6:39 Dineng kasokanna Salerana se ngotos Sengko' jareya iya areya: sopaja sakabbiyanna oreng se eparengngagi ka Sengko' ja' sampe' badha settonga se elang; tape sopaja Sengko' maodhi' pole reng-oreng jareya e Are Keyamat. 
John6:40 Sabab se daddi kasokanna Tang Rama iya areya: Sopaja sakabbiyanna oreng se la nangale'e Pottrana Allah ban parcaja ka Salerana andhi' odhi' se saongguna ban langgeng. Ban bi' Sengko' epaodhi'a pole e Are Keyamat.” 
John6:41 Reng-oreng Yahudi molae pek-ngacepek ka Isa, sabab Isa adhabu: “Sengko' reya roti se toron dhari sowarga”." 
John6:42 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Jarowa gu ta' Isa, ana'na Yusup ta' iya? Sengko' kennal ka rama ebuna! Baramma me' pas ngoca' ja' aba'na toron dhari sowarga?”" 
John6:43 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ella ja' pek-ngacepek terros." 
John6:44 Tadha' oreng se bisa nyander ka Sengko', kajabana ebakta ka Sengko' bi' Rama se ngotos Sengko'; ban sapa se nyander ka Sengko' jareya bi' Sengko' epaodhi'a pole e Are Keyamat." 
John6:45 E dhalem Ketab Bi-nabbi esebbuttagi kantha reya, ‘Sakabbiyanna oreng bakal eburuga bi' Allah.’ Daddi sakabbiyanna oreng se ngedhing dhabuna Rama ban olle pangajaran dhari Salerana, nyander ka Sengko'." 
John6:46 Maksod Sengko' banne nerrangngagiya ja' badha oreng se la nangale'e Rama. Coma Salerana se asalla dhari Allah se la nangale'e Rama. 
John6:47 Ba'na ebala'ana, ya: Oreng se parcaja, andhi' odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng." 
John6:48 Sengko' reya roti se aberri' kaodhi'an. 
John6:49 Bangatowana ba'na ngakan manna e ra-ara tape padha mate keya. 
John6:50 Tape roti se toron dhari sowarga ta' kantha jareya; oreng se ngakan roti jareya ta' kera mate. 
John6:51 Sengko' reya roti se toron dhari sowarga – roti se aberri' kaodhi'an. Oreng se ngakan roti reya bakal odhi'a salanjangnga. Roti se bi' Sengko' ebagiya kaangguy odhi'na manossa e dunnya reya iya areya Tang daging.” 
John6:52 Ngedhing parkara jareya, reng-oreng Yahudi se badha e jadhiya laju padha apadu sampe' ramme. “Baramma oreng reya se bisa'a aberri' dagingnga se esorowa kakan ka sengko' ban ba'na?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
John6:53 Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Paparcaja, ya. Mon ba'na ta' ngakan dagingnga Pottrana Manossa ban ta' ngenom dharana, ba'na ta' kera odhi' ongguwan." 
John6:54 Oreng se ngakan Tang daging ban ngenom Tang dhara, andhi' odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng; sarta'anna bi' Sengko' epajaga'a pole e Are Keyamat." 
John6:55 Sabab Tang daging reya kakanan onggu ban Tang dhara nom-enoman onggu. 
John6:56 Sapa se ngakan Tang daging ban ngenom Tang dhara daddi settong bi' Sengko', ban Sengko' bi' aba'na." 
John6:57 Rama se odhi' rowa ngotos Sengko', ban Sengko' reya odhi' dhari Rama keya. Bariya keya sapa se ngakan Tang daging bakal odhi'a dhari Sengko'." 
John6:58 Areya' roti se toron dhari sowarga: banne roti akantha se ekakan bangatowana ba'na. Sabab saellana ngakan roti jareya bangatowana ba'na mate keya. Tape oreng se ngakan roti reya bakal odhi'a salanjangnga.” 
John6:59 Jareya kabbi edhabuwagi Isa e bakto Salerana morok e kennengnganna kabakteyan e Kapernaum. 
John6:60 Saellana ngedhing dhabuna Isa se kantha jareya, bannya' moredda se padha ngoca', “Pangajaran reya taberra' gallu. Sapa se bisa'a narema!”" 
John6:61 Isa dibi' ngagali ja' red-moredda ngacepek parkara jareya. Daddi laju adhabu, “Apa polana Tang ca'-oca' jareya ba'na ta' noro'a Sengko' pole?" 
John6:62 Baramma mon ompamana ba'na dhaggi' nangale'e Pottrana Manossa ongga abali ka kalenggiyanna se asal? 
John6:63 Se maodhi' manossa iya areya Errohna Allah. Kakowadanna manossa dibi' tadha' gunana. Pa-apa se ekoca'agi Sengko' reya dhabuna Errohna Allah se aberri' kaodhi'an. 
John6:64 Tape gi' badha e antarana ba'na se ta' parcaja.” (Dhari dha'-adha'na Isa la ngagali pa-sapa se ta' endha' parcaja ban sapa se bakal akiyanat ka Salerana.) 
John6:65 Isa laju adhabu pole, “Jareya sababba arapa Sengko' me' ngoca' ka ba'na ja' ta' kera badha oreng settonga se nyander ka Sengko' mon banne kasokanna Rama.”" 
John6:66 Molae dhari jareya bannya' moredda Isa se ta' endha' ngereng Isa pole. 
John6:67 Isa laju mareksane ka moredda se dhubellas, “Apa ba'na ta' nyengga'a keya?”" 
John6:68 “Guste,” ca'na atorra Petrus, “Nyengga'a ka pasera abdidalem? Dhabuepon Junandalem apareng kaodhi'an se saongguna sareng se langgeng." 
John6:69 Abdina ampon parcaja sareng yakin Junandalem ka'dhinto' otosan se socce dhari Allah.” 
John6:70 Isa adhabu, “Gu ta' Sengko' se mele ba'na se dhubellas oreng reya, ta' iya? Tape settong e antarana ba'na erroh jahat!”" 
John6:71 Se emaksod Isa iya areya Yudas ana'na Simon Iskariyot. Sabab maske Yudas reya tamaso' sala settong dhari moredda Isa se dhubellas, tape Yudas jareya se akiyanada ka Isa." 
John7:1 Saellana jareya Isa meyos san-kassannagi e Galilea. Salerana ta' kasokan meyos e Yudea sabab om-kaom oreng agungnga Yahudi e jadhiya andhi' maksod mateyana Salerana. 
John7:2 E bakto jareya la para' Are Raja Bengko Un-dhaunan. 
John7:3 Daddi tan-taretanna Isa ngoca' ka Salerana, “Kassa' ba'na entar ka Yudea, me' olle red-moredda ba'na nangale'e keya lalakonna ba'na." 
John7:4 Mon oreng terro kalonta'a ta' kera alako tek-ngetek. Mon ba'na ngalakone parkara se kantha jareya, oreng sadunnya kodu tao kabbi!” (" 
John7:5 Sabab tan-taretanna dibi' ta' parcaja keya ka Salerana.) 
John7:6 “Gi' banne baktona sateya,” dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, “tape kaangguy ba'na bila'a bai bisa." 
John7:7 Ba'na ta' kera ekabaji'i bi' oreng e dunnya reya. Tape Sengko' ekabaji'i bi' dunnya, polana Sengko' ros-terrosan ngoca' ja' lalakonna reng-oreng e dunnya reya juba'." 
John7:8 Kassa' ba'na dibi' entar ka paraya'an jareya. Sengko' ta' entara sabab gi' banne baktona monggu ka Sengko'.” 
John7:9 Kantha jareya dhabuna Isa ka tan-taretanna, daddi Salerana laju paggun alenggi e Galilea." 
John7:10 Saellana tan-taretanna entar ka paraya'an jareya, Isa laju meyos keya ta' asa'-kasa', ta' etemmo oreng." 
John7:11 E dhalem paraya'an jareya om-kaom oreng agung Yahudi nyare'e Isa sambi anya-tanya, “E dhimma oreng rowa?”" 
John7:12 Bannya' oreng ato'-koto' arasane Isa. Badha se ngoca', “Arowa oreng becce'.” Se laen badha se ngoca', “Enja'! Oreng jareya ngajari oreng barang se sala.”" 
John7:13 Tape tadha' oreng se bangala acaca rang-terrangan sabab kabbi padha tako' ka para pangraja Yahudi. 
John7:14 E nga'-tengnga'anna paraya'an jareya, Isa maso' ka dhalem Padalemman Socce, laju molae morok." 
John7:15 Ja-pangraja Yahudi ce' gettonna, laju padha ngoca', “Baramma oreng reya me' tao ce' bannya'na, mangkana ta' tao asakola?”" 
John7:16 Dhabuna Isa, “Se eajarragi Sengko' reya banne pangajaranna Sengko', tape pangajaranna se ngotos Sengko'." 
John7:17 Oreng se endha' ngestowagi kasokanna Allah, tanto tao apa Tang pangajaran reya asalla dhari Allah otabana dhari Sengko' dibi'." 
John7:18 Oreng se aberri' pangajaranna dibi' pera' nyareya nyama. Tape oreng se nyare kahormadan kaangguy se ngotos aba'na, oreng jareya jujur, ta' kera nepo oreng." 
John7:19 Mosa gu ta' manapa' papakonna Allah ka ba'na, ta' iya? Tape e antarana ba'na tadha' se ngestowagi papakon jareya. Arapa ba'na me' mateyana Sengko'?”" 
John7:20 Oreng se bannya' jareya nyaot, “Sampeyan gila! Pasera se mateyana sampeyan?”" 
John7:21 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' pera' ngalakone settong lalakon e are Sabat, ban ba'na getton." 
John7:22 Mosa aberri' parenta ka ba'na sopaja padha esonnat, maske sanyatana parkara sonnat jareya banne dhari Mosa asalla, tape dhari para bangatowana ba'na sabellunna Mosa. Daddi e are Sabat ba'na endha' nyonnat oreng keya." 
John7:23 Mon ba'na ngalakone jareya polana tako' nerrak hokomma Mosa parkara sonnat, arapa ba'na me' peggel ka Sengko' polana mabaras oreng dhari sakabbiyanna panyakedda e are Sabat?" 
John7:24 Ba'na ja' ahakime oreng pera' dhari se etangale'e mata, tape kodu adhasar kaadilan.”" 
John7:25 Saellana jareya badha reng-oreng Yerusalim se padha ngoca', “Areya gu ta' oreng se esare polana epateyana rowa, ta' iya?" 
John7:26 Abas, ra, rowa', se acaca e adha'na oreng bannya' tadha' sengkana sakale, ban tadha' oreng se endha' ca'-ngoca'e! Pola om-kaom oreng agung rowa me' la apangrasa ja' oreng reya Rato Panyalamet?" 
John7:27 Tape mon Rato Panyalamet rowa rabu, tadha' oreng se taowa dhari dhimma asalla. Mangkana sengko' ban ba'na tao dhari dhimma asalla oreng reya.”" 
John7:28 Teppa'na morok e Padalemman Socce jareya, Isa adhabu epakaja, “Daddi ba'na tao sapa Sengko' reya ban dhari dhimma Tang asal? Sengko' dhateng banne dhari Tang karep dibi'. Sengko' eotos bi' se kaagungan ha' kaangguy ngotos Sengko', ban Salerana ekenneng parcaja. Ba'na ta' kennal ka Salerana," 
John7:29 tape Sengko' kennal, sabab asalla Sengko' reya dhari Salerana, ban Salerana se ngotos Sengko'.”" 
John7:30 E bakto jareya reng-oreng se terro mateyana Isa jareya terro nangkebba Salerana, tape tadha' se bangala nyandhak, sabab gi' banne baktona." 
John7:31 E antarana reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya bannya' se molae parcaja ka Isa, laju padha ngoca', “Mon Rato Panyalamet rowa rabu, ba' bisa'a mabadha kaajiban abannya'an dhari oreng reya?”" 
John7:32 Reng-oreng Farisi ngedhing reng-oreng se padha ato'-koto' acaca parkara Isa jareya. Daddi, reng-oreng Farisi jareya, abareng ban mam-imam kapala nyoro wal-pangawalla Padalemman Socce nangkep Isa." 
John7:33 Isa adhabu ka oreng se bannya' se badha e Padalemman Socce jareya, “Pera' kare sakejja' Sengko' se apolonga ban ba'na. Saellana jareya Sengko' abaliya ka se ngotos Sengko'." 
John7:34 Ba'na bakal nyareya Sengko', tape ta' kera tatemmo, sabab ba'na ta' bisa entar ka Tang kennengngan.”" 
John7:35 Ja-pangraja Yahudi pas padha saleng atanya, “Entara dha' emma ba'nengan oreng jareya me' sampe' ta' etemmowa bi' ba'na ban sengko'? Pola me' entara ka kennengnganna reng-oreng Yahudi e nagarana oreng Yunani ban ngajara oreng Yunani?" 
John7:36 Apa maksodda se ngoca' ja' sengko' ban ba'na bakal nyareya aba'na tape ta' kera tatemmo, ban ja' sengko' ban ba'na ta' bisa entar ka kennengnganna?”" 
John7:37 E are dhi-budhina e dhalem paraya'an jareya, iya areya e are se paleng penting, Isa ngadek e Padalemman Socce, laju adhabu epakaja, “Oreng se pelka' mara nyander ka Sengko', bi' Sengko' eenommana." 
John7:38 Monggu ka oreng se parcaja ka Sengko', e dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi, ‘Dhari atena agili aeng se aberri' kasalameddan.’ ” (" 
John7:39 Se edhabuwagi Isa jareya parkara Errohna Allah, se etarema'a reng-oreng se parcaja ka Salerana. E bakto jareya oreng gi' ta' narema Errohna Allah, sabab Isa gi' ta' emolja'agi kalaban sedana.)" 
John7:40 Bannya' oreng se ngedhing apa se edhabuwagi Isa jareya, ban e antarana badha se ngoca', “Oreng reya tanto Nabbi rowa!”" 
John7:41 Se laen ngoca', “Jareya Rato Panyalamet!” Tape badha keya se ngoca', “Dhu e dhimma se badha'a Rato Panyalamet dhari Galilea?" 
John7:42 E dhalem Alketab esebbuttagi ja' Rato Panyalamet jareya toronanna Daud ban dhatengnga dhari Betlehem, kampong asalla Daud.”" 
John7:43 Daddi dhi-budhina reng-oreng jareya laju apadu polana Isa. 
John7:44 Badha se amaksod nangkebba Isa, tape tadha' se bangala nyandhak." 
John7:45 E bakto wal-pangawalla Padalemman Socce se esoro nangkep Isa abali, mam-imam kapala ban reng-oreng Farisi atanya, “Arapa Isa me' ta' egiba dha' enna' bi' ba'na?”" 
John7:46 Wal-pangawal jareya nyaot, “Adhu, ta' oneng badha oreng se abu-dhabu akadi oreng gapaneka!”" 
John7:47 “Apa ba'na la ekenneng giba ka jalan se sala keya bi' oreng jareya?” ca'na reng-oreng Farisi jareya. 
John7:48 “Apa badha e antarana ja-pangraja Yahudi otabana reng-oreng Farisi se parcaja ka oreng jareya? 
John7:49 Tape oreng se bannya' reya ta' tao ka hokomma Mosa, daddi maske baramma'a reng-oreng jareya la ekenneng babaston.”" 
John7:50 Sala settong dhari oreng Farisi jareya nyamana Nikodemus, se la tao entar ka Isa. Nikodemus ngoca' ka reng-oreng Farisi laenna," 
John7:51 “Menorot Hokom, oreng ta' kengeng eokom sabellunna parkarana epeyarsa'agi sareng manabi gi' ta' epareksa kasala'anna.”" 
John7:52 “Ponapa sampeyan dhari Galilea jugan?” sambidda reng-oreng gella'. “Pareksa saos Alketab! Sampeyan oneng ja' tadha' nabbi se asalla dhari Galilea!” [ 
John7:53 Reng-oreng laju padha mole ka bengkona kabbi. 
John8:1 Tape Isa meyos ka Gumo' Jaitun. 
John8:2 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Isa meyos ka Padalemman Socce. E jadhiya bannya' oreng se nyander ka Salerana. Isa alenggi, laju molae morok reng-oreng jareya." 
John8:3 Sabatara jareya ru-guru agama ban reng-oreng Farisi nyander ka Isa, ngeba babine' se etemmo azina. Bi' reng-oreng jareya babine' buru esoro manjeng e adha'na oreng se bannya' jareya." 
John8:4 Reng-oreng Farisi ban ru-guru agama jareya laju mator ka Isa, “Guru, babine' paneka epanggi kalerressan azina." 
John8:5 E dhalem Hokomma Mosa badha atoran se nyebbuttagi babine' se kadi paneka kodu egarujuk sareng bato kantos mate. Samangken kadi ponapa pamanggina Panjennengngan?” 
John8:6 Reng-oreng jareya atanya kantha buru kalaban maksod ajebbaga Isa, me' olle bisa nyala'agi Salerana. Tape Isa pera' dhu'-nondhu', sarta nyerrat bi' rajunganna e tana." 
John8:7 E bakto reng-oreng se manjeng e jadhiya jareya terros maksa se atanya, Isa adhanga laju adhabu ka reng-oreng buru, “Sapa e antarana ba'na se ta' tao andhi' dusa, olle ngoteppagi bato dha'-adha' ka babine' reya.”" 
John8:8 Saellana jareya Isa nondhu' sarta rat-nyerrat pole e tana. 
John8:9 Saellana ngedhing dhabuna Isa se kantha jareya, reng-oreng jareya padha ondur gan settong, molae dhari se paleng towa. Dhi-budhina Isa kare bi'-dibi'an e jadhiya; tadha' oreng laen kajabana babine' gella' se gi' manjeng e kennengnganna." 
John8:10 Isa adhanga, laju adhabu ka babine' jareya, “Dha' emma reng-oreng rowa kabbi? Apa tadha' se ngokom ba'na?”" 
John8:11 “Tadha',” saodda. “Iya ella,” dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' ta' ngokoma ba'na keya. Sateya kassa' mole, ban ja' alako dusa pole!”]" 
John8:12 Isa adhabu pole ka oreng se bannya', dhabuna, “Sengko' reya terrangnga dunnya. Sapa se noro' Sengko' ta' kera ajalan e pettengnga, tape andhi' terrang se nera'e odhi'na.”" 
John8:13 “Samangken Sampeyan aberri' kasakseyan parkara aba'na dibi',” ca'na reng-oreng Farisi; “kasakseyan ganeka ta' lerres.”" 
John8:14 Isa adhabu, “Maske Sengko' nyakse'e Tang aba' dibi', ca'-oca' Sengko' jareya bendher, sabab Sengko' tao Sengko' reya dhari dhimma ban entara dha' emma. Ba'na ta' tao Sengko' reya dhari dhimma ban entara dha' emma." 
John8:15 Ba'na ahakime oreng ngangguy carana manossa; Sengko' ta' ahakime pa-sapa. 
John8:16 Tape saompamana Sengko' ahakime oreng, Tang potosan jareya adil, sabab Sengko' ta' kadibi'an; Sengko' ebarengnge Rama se ngotos Sengko'." 
John8:17 E dhalem Hokomma Mosa esebbuttagi ja' kasakseyan se bendher iya areya kasakseyanna oreng kadhuwa. 
John8:18 Se nyakse'e Sengko' badha kadhuwa iya areya Sengko' dibi' ban Rama se ngotos Sengko'.” 
John8:19 “Badha e ka'imma Ramana Sampeyan?” ca'na reng-oreng Farisi jareya. Dhabuna Isa, “Ba'na ta' kennal ka Sengko', bariya keya ka Tang Rama. Ja' sakenga ba'na kennal ka Sengko', tanto ba'na kennal keya ka Tang Rama.”" 
John8:20 Jareya kabbi edhabuwagi Isa e bakto teppa'na morok e Padalemman Socce e seddi'na the-petthe baddhana pesse tor-ator. Tape tadha' oreng se nangkep Salerana, sabab gi' ta' napa' ka baktona." 
John8:21 Isa adhabu pole ka reng-oreng se bannya' jareya, “Sengko' nyengla'a, dhari dhinna', ban ba'na bakal nyareya Sengko', tape ba'na bakal mateya e dhalem sa-dusana ba'na. Ba'na ta' bisa entar ka kennengngan se eentarana Sengko'.”" 
John8:22 Daddi om-kaom oreng agung Yahudi ngoca', “Pola oreng jareya aradda'a, sabab ngoca', ‘Ba'na ta' bisa entar ka kennengngan se eentarana Sengko'.’ ”" 
John8:23 Dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na dhateng dhari baba; tape Sengko' dhateng dhari attas. Ba'na dhari dunnya, Sengko' banne dhari dunnya." 
John8:24 Jareya sababba arapa Sengko' me' ngoca' ja' ba'na bakal mateya e dhalem sa-dusana. Ban pajat ba'na bakal mateya e dhalem sa-dusana mon ba'na ta' parcaja ja', ‘Sengko' reya se enyamae SENGKO' BADHA’.”" 
John8:25 “Pasera Sampeyan paneka?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. Dhabuna Isa, “Arapa'a Sengko' me' acaca'a bi' ba'na pole!" 
John8:26 Gi' bannya' parkara ba'na se bi' Sengko' ekoca'agiya ban ehakimana. Tape se ngotos Sengko' ekenneng parcaja. Ban Sengko' abala ka dunnya pa-apa se ekaedhing Sengko' dhari Salerana.” 
John8:27 Reng-oreng jareya padha ta' ngarte ja' se ekadhabu Isa jareya parkara Rama. 
John8:28 Daddi Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Dhaggi' mon ba'na la matenggi Pottrana Manossa, ba'na tanto tao ja', ‘Sengko' reya se enyamae SENGKO' BADHA’. Ban ba'na tanto tao ja' tadha' se elakone Sengko' dhari Sengko' dibi'. Se ekoca'agi Sengko' pera' se edhabuwagi Rama ka Sengko'." 
John8:29 Ban se ngotos Sengko' jareya asarengnge Sengko'. Sengko' ta' tao edina kadibi'an, sabab Sengko' ros-terrosan ngalakone pa-apa se ekasokane Salerana.”" 
John8:30 Saellana Isa adhabuwagi jareya kabbi, laju bannya' oreng se parcaja ka Salerana." 
John8:31 Saellana jareya Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng se parcaja ka Salerana, “Mon ba'na atoro' ka Tang pangajaran, ba'na pajat Tang mored onggu," 
John8:32 ba'na bakal taowa ka Allah se teppa', ban lantaran jareya ba'na bakal epabebasa.”" 
John8:33 “Kaula paneka toronanna Ibrahim,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. “Kaula gi' ta' oneng ekadunor pasera'a saos! Ponapa maksottepon Panjennengngan se adhabu, ‘Ba'na bakal epabebasa?’ ”" 
John8:34 “Sengko' ngoca' sabendherra ka ba'na,” dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng jareya. “Oreng alako dusa, jareya dunorra dusa." 
John8:35 Ban oreng se daddi dunor ta' andhi' kennengngan se teptep e dhalem kalowarga, dineng ana' salanjangnga andhi' kennengngan e dhalem kalowarga." 
John8:36 Daddi, mon ba'na epabebas bi' ana', ba'na bebas ongguwan." 
John8:37 Pajat Sengko' la tao ja' ba'na reya toronanna Ibrahim. Tape ba'na aehteyar mateyana Sengko' polana ba'na ta' endha' narema Tang pangajaran. 
John8:38 Se ekoca'agi Sengko' pa-apa se etangale'e Sengko' e Tang Rama. Dineng se elakone ba'na iya areya se eajarragi eppa'na ba'na ka ba'na.” 
John8:39 Saodda reng-oreng jareya, “Rama kaula sadaja Ibrahim.” “Ja' sakenga ba'na ana'na Ibrahim onggu,” dhabuna Isa, “tanto ba'na ngalakone pa-apa se elakone Ibrahim." 
John8:40 Sengko' ngabala ka ba'na sabarang se bendher se ekaedhing Sengko' dhari Allah, tape bi' ba'na Sengko' epateyana. Ibrahim ta' kantha jareya!" 
John8:41 Ba'na ngalakone pa-apa se elakone eppa'na ba'na dibi'.” Saodda reng-oreng jareya, “Kaula banne ana' jada. Rama kaula namong settong, enggi paneka Allah dibi'.”" 
John8:42 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ja' sakenga Allah reya Ramana ba'na, ba'na tanto taresna ka Sengko', sabab Sengko' dhateng dhari Allah. Sengko' dhateng banne sajjana Sengko' dibi', tape Salerana se ngotos Sengko'." 
John8:43 Apa sababba me' ba'na ta' ngarte ka se ekoca'agi Sengko'? Tadha' laen kajabana polana ba'na ta' kellar ngedhing Tang pangajaran. 
John8:44 Eppa'na ba'na se bendher iya areya Iblis, ban ba'na norodi karebba eppa'na. Dhari lamba' Iblis jareya tokang mate'e, ta' tao noro' ka se bendher, sabab Iblis jareya ta' andhi' barang se bendher. Mon Iblis jareya acaca lecek, jareya pantes, sabab pajat cara jareya babategga. Iblis jareya lecegan, ban asalla sakabbiyanna kalecegan." 
John8:45 Tape se ekacaca Sengko' pera' barang se bendher, ban jareya lantaranna arapa ba'na me' ta' parcaja ka Sengko'." 
John8:46 Sapa e antarana ba'na se bisa abukteyagi ja' Sengko' andhi' dusa? Mon se ekoca'agi Sengko' bendher kabbi, arapa ba'na me' ta' parcaja ka Sengko'?" 
John8:47 Oreng se asalla dhari Allah, ngedhingngagi ka dhabuna Allah. Tape ba'na banne dhari Allah, jareya sababba ba'na ta' endha' ngedhingngagi.”" 
John8:48 Reng-oreng Yahudi jareya nyaot ka Isa, “Gu ta' la bendher ca'na sengko' ja' ba'na reya oreng Samaria se kasosoban setan?”" 
John8:49 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' ta' kasosoban setan. Sengko' hormat ka Tang Rama, tape ba'na ya-nyeya Sengko'." 
John8:50 Sengko' ta' nyare kahormadan kaangguy Tang aba' dibi'. Badha se ngehteyarragi sopaja Sengko' olleya kahormadan, ban jareya se ahakime." 
John8:51 Tang oca' bendher, ja' oreng se atoro' ka Tang oca' salanjangnga ta' kera mate.”" 
John8:52 Reng-oreng Yahudi jareya laju ngoca', “Sateya sengko' yakin ja' ba'na reya pajat kasosoban setan ongguwan! Ibrahim la seda, bariya keya sakabbiyanna nabbi. Tape ba'na ngoca', ‘Oreng se atoro' ka Tang oca' salanjangnga ta' kera mate.’" 
John8:53 Mon Ibrahim dibi' la seda, ban bi-nabbi la padha seda kabbi, sapa ba'na reya? Apa ba'na apangrasa araja'an dhari Ibrahim?”" 
John8:54 Dhabuna Isa, “Ja' sakenga Sengko' nyare kahormadan kaangguy Tang aba' dibi', kahormadan jareya tadha' artena. Se ngormadi Sengko' Tang Rama, se bi' ba'na eanggep Allahna ba'na," 
John8:55 mangkana ba'na ta' kennal ka Salerana. Tape mon Sengko' kennal. Ja' sakenga Sengko' ngoca' ta' kennal ka Salerana, Sengko' lecegan, akantha ba'na. Sengko' kennal ka Salerana, ban esto ka dhabuna." 
John8:56 Ramana ba'na Ibrahim ce' sennengnga polana nangaleyana Tang are. Ibrahim la nangale ka Tang are jareya, ban Ibrahim senneng.”" 
John8:57 Ca'na reng-oreng Yahudi jareya, “Omorra ba'na gi' ta' napa' saeket taon, me' ngoca' la nangale'e Ibrahim?”" 
John8:58 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra ka ba'na: Sabellunna Ibrahim lahir, Sengko' la badha.”" 
John8:59 Reng-oreng Yahudi jareya laju ngala' bato egarujukkagiya ka Isa, tape Isa ngetek, terros kalowar dhari Padalemman Socce jareya." 
John9:1 E bakto Isa alomampa, laju ngoladi badha oreng se buta molae lahir." 
John9:2 Ca'na red-moredda ka Isa, “Guru, aponapa oreng ka'issa' me' elahirragi buta? Se dusa ponapa aba'na dibi', ponapa ebu otaba eppa'na?”" 
John9:3 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng rowa buta banne polana dusana dibi' otabana dusana oreng towana, tape me' olle oreng nangale'e kobasana Allah se alako e dhalem oreng buta jareya." 
John9:4 Mon gi' seyang, ba'na kodu terros ngalakone lalakonna Salerana se ngotos Sengko' reya. Are bakal malemma, ban tadha' oreng settonga se bisa'a alalakon." 
John9:5 Saabidda Sengko' badha e dunnya reya, Sengko' terrangnga dunnya.”" 
John9:6 Saellana adhabu kantha jareya Isa laju aedu ka tana; eduna jareya egulek ban tana, laju ebuliddagi ka matana oreng se buta jareya," 
John9:7 sarta adhabu, “Kassa' araop ka Taman Siloam.” (Siloam artena “eotos”). Daddi oreng jareya entar araop ka taman buru. E bakto abali, matana la nangale'e." 
John9:8 Ga-tatanggana ban reng-oreng se sabellunna jareya nangale'e oreng jareya ngemmes, padha ngoca', “Arowa gu ta' oreng se biyasana toju' ngemmes rowa, ta' iya?”" 
John9:9 Badha se ngoca', “Iya, bendher.” Tape badha pole se ngoca', “Banne, oreng jareya coma merep oreng ngemmes se buta jarowa.” Tape oreng jareya dibi' ngoca', “Lerres, kaula oreng ngemmes se buta ganeka.”" 
John9:10 “Baramma dha'-adha'na me' ba'na pas nangale'e?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya ka oreng ngemmes gella'. 
John9:11 Saodda oreng jareya, “Oreng se anyama Isa ka'issa' abadhi cellot sakone', laju ebuliddagi ka tengal kaula sambi adhabu, ‘Kassa' araop ka Taman Siloam.’ Kaula entar ka taman ganeka; e bakto araop ganeka kaula laju nengale.”" 
John9:12 “Badha e dhimma oreng jareya?” ca'na reng-oreng jareya. Saodda oreng ngemmes jareya, “Ta' oneng.”" 
John9:13 E bakto Isa agulek tana bi' eduna kaangguy mamella' matana oreng se buta rowa teppa'na are Sabat. Daddi oreng se dha'-adha'na buta jareya egiba ka reng-oreng Farisi. 
John9:14  
John9:15 Reng-oreng Farisi jareya atanya baramma dha'-adha'na oreng jareya me' pas nangale'e. Saodda oreng jareya, “Mata kaula ebulidi cellot, bi' kaula eberse'e, kaula laju nengale.”" 
John9:16 Reng-oreng Farisi jareya badha se padha ngoca', “Oreng se ngalakone jareya ta' kera dhari Allah asalla, sabab oreng jareya ta' marduli ka are Sabat.” Tape se laen ngoca', “Dhu e dhimma badha oreng se dusa ngalakone kaajiban se kantha reya?” Daddi reng-oreng Farisi jareya pas padha apadu." 
John9:17 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi jareya atanya ka oreng gella', “Mon ca'na ba'na, oreng apa se mabaras ba'na sampe' nangale'e jareya?” “Oreng ganeka nabbi,” saodda oreng jareya." 
John9:18 Tape pin-pamimpin Yahudi jareya ta' endha' parcaja ja' oreng jareya pajat buta sabellunna, ban sateya nangale'e. Daddi oreng towana laju eolok, esoro ka jadhiya," 
John9:19 pas etanyae, “Bendher reya ana'na ba'na, ya? Ca'na ba'na ana'na reya buta dhari dhalem tabu'. Baramma sateya me' laju nangale'e?”" 
John9:20 Eppa' ban ebuna oreng jareya nyaot, “Lerres ka'dhinto' ana' abdina, se pajat buta dhari dhalem tabu'." 
John9:21 Namong abdina ta' oneng kadi ponapa me' laju nengale. Sapaneka jugan pasera se mabaras me' kantos nangale'e, abdina ta' oneng. Pareksane saos ka orengnga dibi', sabab ana' abdina ka'dhinto' ampon dibasa; tanto oneng nyaot dibi'.”" 
John9:22 Eppa' ban ebuna oreng jareya ngoca' kantha jareya polana tako' ka para pamimpin Yahudi jareya; sabab reng-oreng jareya la amopakat ja' pa'-sapa'a se ngakone ja' Isa jareya Rato Panyalamet, ta' olle maso' ka kennengnganna kabakteyan pole." 
John9:23 Daddi eppa' ban ebuna oreng jareya ngoca', “Pareksane saos ka orengnga dibi', sabab ana' abdina ka'dhinto' ampon dibasa.”" 
John9:24 Oreng se asalla buta gella' eolok pole bi' reng-oreng Farisi jareya; oca'na, “Mara ba'na asompa ja' ba'na acaca'a sabendherra. Sengko' kabbi tao oreng jareya oreng se dusa.”" 
John9:25 “Abdina ta' oneng ponapa oreng ganeka dusa ponapa bunten,” ca'na oreng jareya, “se abdina oneng namong settong: gi' dhimen abdina buta, samangken nengale.”" 
John9:26 Reng-oreng Farisi jareya pas ngoca' ka oreng jareya, “Ba'na epabaramma bi' oreng jarowa? Epabaramma ba'na me' pas nangale'e?”" 
John9:27 “Abdina ampon mator,” ca'na oreng jareya, “panjennengngan ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi. Aponapa me' gi' mareksane pole? Ponapa panjennengngan terro daddiya red-moredda jugan?”" 
John9:28 Reng-oreng Farisi jareya apesowan, laju ngoca', “Ba'na moredda; sengko' banne!" 
John9:29 Sengko' moredda Mosa. Sengko' tao ja' Allah la abu-dhabu ka Mosa. Tape sengko' ta' tao dhari dhimma asalla oreng jareya.” 
John9:30 Saodda oreng jareya, “Me' ce' anena! Panjennengngan ta' ngagali dhari ka'dhimma asalla oreng ka'issa', mangkana sareng oreng ka'issa' abdina epabisa nangale'e." 
John9:31 Sadajana oreng oneng ja' Allah ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi oreng se dusa; se epeyarsa'agi namong oreng se hormat ka Salerana sareng ajalannagi sadajana kasokanna. 
John9:32 Ngabidi dunnya gi' buru ecepta'agi gi' ta' oneng badha oreng mereng ja' badha oreng mamella' matana oreng se buta dhari tabu'. 
John9:33 Manabi oreng ka'issa' banne dhari Allah asalla, oreng gapaneka ta' kera bisa apa-ponapa.”" 
John9:34 Saodda reng-oreng Farisi gella', “Apa? Ba'na se possa' ban dusa dhari dhalem tabu' ngajarana sengko' kabbi?” Daddi molae dhari bakto jareya oreng jareya ta' ebagi maso' ka kennengnganna kabakteyan." 
John9:35 Isa meyarsa ja' oreng se dha'-adha'na buta gella' ta' ebagi maso' ka kennengnganna kabakteyan. Oreng jareya esare; saellana etemmo laju adhabu, “Apa ba'na parcaja ka Pottrana Manossa?”" 
John9:36 Saodda oreng jareya, “Pasera oreng gapaneka, Guste? Ngereng abdina parenge oneng me' olle abdina parcaja ka Salerana.”" 
John9:37 “Ba'na la nangale'e oreng jareya,” ca'na dhabuna Isa, “iya areya oreng se sateya teppa'na abu-dhabu ban ba'na.”" 
John9:38 “Abdidalem parcaja, Guste,” ca'na oreng jareya, laju asojud e ajunanna Isa." 
John9:39 Isa adhabu, “Sengko' dhateng ka dunnya reya kaangguy ahakime, sopaja oreng se buta nangale'e, ban oreng se nangale'e me' olle buta.”" 
John9:40 Reng-oreng Farisi se teppa'na badha e jadhiya badha se padha ngedhing Isa adhabu kantha jareya, laju padha atanya ka Isa, “Ponapa bi' Sampeyan kaula eanggep buta jugan?”" 
John9:41 Dhabuna Isa, “Ja' sakenga ba'na buta, ba'na ta' kera andhi' dusa. Tape sabab ba'na ngoca' ja' ba'na ta' buta, jareya artena ba'na gi' dusa.”" 
John10:1 “Bendher onggu Tang oca' reya: Oreng se maso' ka dhalem kandhangnga dumba ta' lebat e labangnga, tape alonca' e pagar, jareya maleng ban bigal." 
John10:2 Tape oreng se maso' lebat e labangnga, jareya oreng se ngowan." 
John10:3 Oreng jareya tanto pas ebukka'e labang bi' panjagana; ba-dumba se eolok nyamana gan tong-settong ban etonton kalowar padha noro' sowarana. 
John10:4 Saellana ba-dumba jareya egiba kalowar, se ngowan gella' laju ajalan e adha', ba-dumbana noro' bunte' e budhiyanna sabab kennal ka sowarana." 
John10:5 Ba-dumba jareya ta' kera noro' oreng laen, la'-mala' mon badha oreng laen laju buru ajauwi oreng jareya sabab ta' kennal ka sowarana.”" 
John10:6 Isa nyareta'agi parompama'an jareya, tape reng-oreng jareya ta' ngarte apa maksodda." 
John10:7 Daddi Isa laju adhabu pole, “Bendher onggu Tang oca' reya: Sengko' reya labang se elebadana dumba." 
John10:8 Se dhateng sabellunna Sengko' jareya maleng ban bigal, tape sowarana ta' kera eedhingngagi ban ba-dumba jareya." 
John10:9 Sengko' reya labang. Sapa se lebat e Sengko' tanto salamet, mon kalowar maso' e jadhiya nemmo kakanan." 
John10:10 Mon maleng maso' maksodda pera' co'-ngeco'a, mateyana otaba ararosaga. Tape Sengko' dhateng sopaja manossa padha'a odhi' – odhi' ta' kakorangan pa-apa." 
John10:11 Sengko' reya oreng ngowan se becce'. Oreng ngowan se bagus, ehlas mate kaangguy ba-dumbana." 
John10:12 Oreng opa'an se banne oreng ngowan ban banne se andhi' dumba jareya, mon nangale'e pate' alas nyander laju padha buru, ba-dumbana edina'agi. Daddi ba-dumbana jareya laju eceppa' ban epasalebbudan bi' pate' alas jareya." 
John10:13 Oreng opa'an jareya buru, sabab se alako nyare opa; ta' parduli ka ba-dumbana." 
John10:14 Sengko' reya oreng ngowan se becce'. Akantha Rama se ngagali ka Sengko' ban Sengko' tao ka Tang Rama, bariya keya Sengko' reya kennal ka Tang ba-dumba ban Tang ba-dumba jareya kennal ka Sengko'. Sengko' ehlas mate kaangguy Tang ba-dumba jareya." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Gi' badha ba-dumba laenna, Tang andhi' keya, tape ta' tamaso' e dhalem kompolanna ba-dumba reya. Ba-dumba jareya bi' Sengko' masthe egiba keya ban ba-dumba jareya bakal ngedhingngagiya Tang sowara. Ba-dumba jareya kabbi bakal daddiya settong ambalan ban settong se ngowan." 
John10:17 Rama taresna ka Sengko' sabab Sengko' massra'agi Tang nyaba, se bakal etarema'a pole." 
John10:18 Sapa'a bai ta' bisa ngala' Tang nyaba dhari Sengko'. Sengko' massra'agi Tang nyaba jareya dhari karep Sengko' dibi'. Sengko' kobasa massra'agiya Tang nyaba jareya, ban kobasa keya ngala' balina. Jareya lalakon se etarema Sengko' dhari Tang Rama.”" 
John10:19 Polana dhabuna Isa se kantha jareya, reng-oreng Yahudi se badha e jadhiya molae apadu pole." 
John10:20 Bannya' se ngoca', “Oreng jareya kamaso'an setan! Gila! Arapa'a me' ngedhingngagi oreng kantha jareya?”" 
John10:21 Tape badha keya se ngoca', “Oreng se kamaso'an setan ta' kera acaca kantha rowa! E dhimma badha setan mamella' matana oreng buta?”" 
John10:22 E Yerusalim reng-oreng teppa'na araya'agi Are Raja Paresmeyanna Padalemman Socce. E bakto jareya mosem cellep. 
John10:23 Isa teppa'na alomampa e Amperra Sulaiman e dhalem Padalemman Socce," 
John10:24 pas badha reng-oreng Yahudi nyander akompol e sakalenglengnga Isa. Oca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Gi' saponapa pole abidda kaula paneka bi' Panjennengngan epanya'-tanya'ana e dhalem ate? Ngereng dhabuwagi rang-terrangan manabi Panjennengngan paneka Rato Panyalamet.”" 
John10:25 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' la abala ka ba'na, tape ba'na ta' parcaja. Pa-apa se la elakone Sengko' kalaban kobasana Tang Rama, daddi bukte parkara Sengko'." 
John10:26 Ba'na ta' parcaja polana ba'na ta' tamaso' golonganna Tang ba-dumba. 
John10:27 Tang ba-dumba ngedhingngagi Tang sowara. Sengko' kennal ka ba-dumba jareya, ban ba-dumba jareya noro' Sengko'." 
John10:28 Bi' Sengko' ba-dumba jareya eberri'i odhi' se saongguna ban se langgeng, ban salanjangnga ba-dumba jareya ta' kera mate. Tadha' oreng se bisa arampas dumba jareya dhari Tang tanang." 
John10:29 Tang Rama, se marengngagi ba-dumba jareya ka Sengko', alebbiyan dhari apa'a bai. Ban tadha' oreng se bisa'a arampas jareya dhari Rama." 
John10:30 Sengko' ban Rama reya settong.” 
John10:31 Reng-oreng Yahudi jareya laju padha ngala' bato pole agarujuga Isa. 
John10:32 Tape Isa adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na la nangale'e Sengko' ngalakone bannya' lalakon se becce', se epakonnagi Rama ka Sengko'. Dhari sakabbiyanna Tang lalakon jareya se kemma se andaddiyagi ba'na agarujuga Sengko' sateya reya?”" 
John10:33 Reng-oreng Yahudi jareya nyaot, “Ba'na egarujuga ban bato banne polana lalakonna ba'na se becce', tape polana ba'na ya-nyeya Allah. Ba'na pera' manossa, tape ba'na madaddiya aba'na dibi' Allah.”" 
John10:34 Isa laju adhabu, “Neng e Buku Hokomma ba'na gu ta' esebbuttagi kantha reya: ‘Ba'na reya la'-alla'an?’" 
John10:35 Ba'na tao ja' se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab eangguy salanjangnga. Daddi, mon Allah nyebbut ‘la'-alla'an’ ka reng-oreng se narema dhabuna," 
John10:36 arapa bi' ba'na Sengko' me' ekoca' ya-nyeya Allah polana Sengko' ngoca' ja' Sengko' reya Pottrana Allah? Mangkana Sengko' reya epele bi' Rama sarta eotos ka dunnya. 
John10:37 Mon Sengko' ta' ajalannagi lalakon se epakonnagi Rama ba'na ja' parcaja ka Sengko'. 
John10:38 Tape sarrena dhabuna Rama jareya bi' Sengko' ejalannagi, paparcaja ba'na ka apa se elakonnagi Sengko' jareya, maske ba'na ta' endha' parcaja ka Sengko'. Kalaban cara jareya ba'na tao ban ngarte ja' Rama teptep daddi settong bi' Sengko', ban Sengko' daddi settong bi' Rama.”" 
John10:39 Reng-oreng jareya aehteyar pole se mega'a Isa, tape Isa lopot dhari reng-oreng jareya." 
John10:40 Isa abali pole ka temorra Songay Yordan, e kennengnganna Yahya abaptis lamba'na, laju alenggi e jadhiya." 
John10:41 Bannya' oreng se nyabis ka Salerana. Oca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Yahya ta' mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban, tape pa-apa se edhabuwagi parkara oreng reya teppa' kabbi.”" 
John10:42 Reng-oreng jareya laju bannya' se parcaja ka Isa. 
John11:1 Badha oreng se anyama Lazarus, enneng e Betania bi' taretanna se anyama Miriyam ban Marta." 
John11:2 Miriyam jareya se nyelene mennya' ka padana Guste Isa, se pas ekessot bi' obu'na. E settong bakto Lazarus jareya sake'." 
John11:3 Taretanna se kadhuwa nyoro oreng ngabarragi ka Isa, “GUSTE, taretan kaula, kanca kakasena Panjennengngan, nganglo.”" 
John11:4 E bakto Isa meyarsa kabar jareya, laju adhabu, “Panyaket jareya ta' kera daddi talajana Lazarus. Kadaddiyan reya emaksottagi sopaja Allah eagungngagi, ban sopaja Pottrana Allah emolja'agiya keya.”" 
John11:5 Isa reya taresna ka Marta, Miriyam ban Lazarus." 
John11:6 Tape e naleka meyarsa kabar ja' Lazarus sake' jareya, Isa gi' terros enneng e kalenggiyanna dhu are aggi'." 
John11:7 Saellana jareya pas buru adhabu ka red-moredda, “Mara ja' abaliya ka Yudea.”" 
John11:8 Saodda red-moredda jareya, “Guru, gi' buruwan saos Panjennengngan egarujuga ban bato sareng reng-oreng Yahudi e ka'issa', me' samangken abaliya ka ka'issa' pole?”" 
John11:9 “Saare gu ta' badha dhubellas ejjam, ta' iya?” dhabuna Isa. “Oreng se ajalan e baja seyang, ta' tatandhung sabab nangale'e tera'na dunnya reya." 
John11:10 Tape oreng se ajalan e baja malem tatandhung, sabab tadha' tera' e aba'na.”" 
John11:11 Kantha jareya dhabuna Isa. Saellana jareya laju adhabu pole, “Tang kanca Lazarus la tedhung; tape Sengko' entara ajaga'ana.”" 
John11:12 Red-moredda Isa mator, “GUSTE, manabi Lazarus tedhung, tanto badhi barasa.”" 
John11:13 Maksodda Isa iya areya ja' Lazarus jareya la mate. Tape red-moredda nyangka Lazarus tedhung biyasa. 
John11:14 Daddi Isa laju adhabu rang-terrangan ka red-moredda jareya, “Lazarus la mate." 
John11:15 Tape pojur Sengko' teppa'na tadha' e dhissa', sabab jareya lebbi becce' kaangguy ba'na, me' olle ba'na parcaja. Mara sateya ja' entara ka Lazarus.”" 
John11:16 Tomas se enyamae “Se Kembar”, ngoca' ka ca-kancana, “Mara la ngereng, me' olle sengko' ban ba'na mate abareng ban GUSTE!”" 
John11:17 Sanapa'na Isa ka kennengngan jareya, Lazarus la olle pa' are se ekoburragi." 
John11:18 Betania reya ma'-semma' ka Yerusalim, ra-kera tello kilo jauna." 
John11:19 Bannya' oreng Yahudi se la entar alalabat ka Marta ban Miriyam. 
John11:20 E bakto ngedhing ja' Isa rabu, Marta laju kalowar ngamba' Isa, tape Miriyam paggun enneng e bengkona." 
John11:21 Atorra Marta ka Isa, “GUSTE, ja' sakenga e bakto gapaneka Panjennengngan badha e ka'dhinto', tanto taretan abdina ta' kera mate." 
John11:22 Namong abdina oneng, sanare samangken tanto Allah marenge ponapa'a saos se eso'on Panjennengngan, ka Salerana, GUSTE.”" 
John11:23 “Taretanna ba'na bakal odhi'a pole,” dhabuna Isa ka Marta." 
John11:24 Saodda Marta, “Lerres, abdina oneng ja' Lazarus badhi odhi'a pole manabi oreng mate padha epajaga'a e Are Keyamat.”" 
John11:25 Dhabuna Isa ka Marta, “Sengko' reya se aberri' kaodhi'an ban se majaga oreng se la mate. Oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' bakal odhi'a, maskeya la mate." 
John11:26 Ban oreng se odhi' se parcaja ka Sengko' salanjangnga ta' kera mate. Ba' parcaja'a ba'na ka parkara jareya?” 
John11:27 “GUSTE,” saodda Marta, “abdina parcaja Junandalem Pottrana Allah, Rato Panyalamet se badhi rabuwa ka dunnya ka'dhinto'.”" 
John11:28 Saellana mator kantha jareya, Marta laju entar ngolok Miriyam, taretanna, ato'-koto' kantha reya, “Guru badha e dhinna'; ba'na etanya'agi.”" 
John11:29 Ngedhing jareya, Miriyam duli jaga, pas entar ngamba' Isa." 
John11:30 E bakto jareya Isa gi' ta' maso' ka disa, gi' badha e kennengnganna se tapanggi bi' Marta." 
John11:31 Reng-oreng Yahudi se alalabat ka Miriyam, e bakto nangale'e Miriyam jaga ban kalowar ru-kaburu, kabbi padha noro' bunte', sabab nyangka Miriyam entara ka koburan, nangesa e jadhiya." 
John11:32 E bakto napa' ka kennengnganna Isa sarta nangale'e Isa e jadhiya, Miriyam laju asojud e ajunanna sarta mator, “GUSTE, ja' sakenga e bakto gapaneka Panjennengngan badha e ka'dhinto', tanto taretan abdina ta' kera mate.”" 
John11:33 E bakto Isa ngoladi Miriyam nanges, ban reng-oreng Yahudi se entar ka jadhiya abareng ban Miriyam jareya nanges keya, panggaliyanna arassa ngennes." 
John11:34 Daddi Isa laju mareksane ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ekoburragi e dhimma Lazarus jareya?” “Ngereng manabi ngoladana, GUSTE,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
John11:35 Isa pas molar. 
John11:36 Daddi reng-oreng Yahudi padha ngoca', “Abas, wa, Isa jareya ce' taresnana ka Lazarus!”" 
John11:37 Tape badha keya se padha ngoca', “Oreng buta epamella', arapa Lazarus me' ta' etolong me' olle ta' sampe' mate?”" 
John11:38 Isa arassa ce' ngennessa pole, daddi laju meyos ka koburan. Koburanna jareya settong guwa se etotop ban bato se raja." 
John11:39 “Pangalle batona,” ca'na dhabuna. Ca'na Marta, taretanna oreng se mate jareya, “Adhu, GUSTE, Lazarus se ekoburragi ampon kengeng pa' are. Tanto bauepon baceng!”" 
John11:40 Isa adhabu ka Marta, “Sengko' gu ta' la ngoca' ka ba'na, mon ba'na parcaja, ba'na bakal nangaleyana rajana kobasana Allah!”" 
John11:41 Daddi bato totobba koburan jareya bi' reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya laju ealle. Saellana jareya Isa adhanga ka langnge', laju adhabu, “Mator sakalangkong, Rama, Junandalem ampon meyarsa'agi Abdidalem." 
John11:42 Abdidalem oneng ja' Junandalem salanjangnga meyarsa'agi abdidalem, namong Abdidalem ngoca' kadi ka'dhinto' kaangguy reng-oreng se badha e ka'dhinto', me' olle padha parcaja ja' Junandalem se ngotos Abdidalem.”" 
John11:43 Saellana mare se adhabu kantha jareya, Isa laju aera' epakaja, “Lazarus, kalowar!”" 
John11:44 Lazarus se la mate jareya laju kalowar dhari koburanna. Tanang ban sokona gi' ebetbet ban kaen kapan, bariya keya mowana gi' etotop ban kaen totobba mowa. “Bukka' kaen kapanna me' olle bebas ajalan,” dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya." 
John11:45 Bannya' reng-oreng Yahudi se alalabat ka Miriyam, parcaja ka Isa e bakto nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya." 
John11:46 Tape badha keya se padha entar ka oreng Farisi, ngabala pa-apa se elampa'agi Isa." 
John11:47 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi ban mam-imam kapala padha arapat ban Mahkamah Agama. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Samangken kadi ponapa? Oreng paneka mabadha kaajiban sabannya'na." 
John11:48 Manabi epanneng terros cara paneka oreng tanto padha parcaja kabbi ka Isa ganeka. Dhi-budhina tantara Roma tanto pas dhateng maancora Padalemman Socce paneka ban sadajana bangsa Yahudi.” 
John11:49 E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha se anyama Kayafas, se e taon jareya teppa'na daddi imam agung. Oca'na Kayafas jareya, “Sampeyan paneka me' ta' oneng pa-ponapa!" 
John11:50 Ponapa sampeyan ta' oneng ja' bit kasalameddanna ra'yat langkong sae oreng settong se mate etembang bangsana sampeyan ban kaula ancor sadaja?” 
John11:51 Sanyatana Kayafas ngoca' kantha jareya banne dhari pekkeranna dibi'. Tape menangka imam agung e taon jareya Kayafas anobuwaddagi ja' Isa seda'a kaangguy bangsa Yahudi. 
John11:52 Ban banne kaangguy bangsa Yahudi malolo, tape kaangguy makompol tra-pottrana Allah se acar-pencar." 
John11:53 Molae dhari jareya ja-pangraja Yahudi asakongkel mateyana Isa. 
John11:54 Daddi Isa ta' tao ngaton pole e adha'na oreng bannya' e kalanganna bangsa Yahudi. Salerana meyos dhari Yudea ka kottha se anyama Efraim e seddi'na ra-ara. E jadhiya Isa apolong ban para moredda. 
John11:55 E bakto jareya la para' Are Raja Paskana Yahudi. Bannya' oreng dhari sa-disa la entar ka Yerusalim ajalannagiya opacara aberse'e aba' sabellunna paraya'an jareya. 
John11:56 Reng-oreng jareya padha nyare'e Isa, ban e bakto padha akompol e Padalemman Socce, padha saleng atanya kantha reya, “Baramma ca'na ba'na? Olle daddi Salerana ta' kera meyos ka paraya'an reya.”" 
John11:57 Reng-oreng jareya ngoca' kantha jareya polana mam-imam kapala ban reng-oreng Farisi la marenta'agi ja' pa'-sapa'a se tao ka kennengnganna Isa, kodu areppot sabab Isa jareya etangkebba." 
John12:1 Nem are sabellunna Are Raja Paska, Isa meyos ka Betania. E jadhiya bengkona Lazarus se bi' Isa epaodhi' pole saellana mate." 
John12:2 E bengkona Lazarus jareya Isa eka'-angka'e, eladine Marta. Lazarus ban moy-tamoyya toju' ngakan abareng ban Isa." 
John12:3 Saellana jareya Miriyam nyander, ngeba mennya' ro'om narwastu, bannya'na satengnga liter, se argana ce' larangnga. Mennya' jareya eselen ka padana Isa, laju ekessot bi' obu'na. Ro'omma mennya' jareya daddi sabengko." 
John12:4 Sala settongnga moredda Isa se anyama Yudas Iskariyot – iya areya se e budhi arena akiyanat ka Isa – ngoca'," 
John12:5 “Aponapa mennya' ro'om paneka me' ta' ejuwal bai, mon gun tello ratos pesse salaka paju; pessena ekenneng bagi ka oreng mesken.”" 
John12:6 Yudas ngoca' kantha jareya banne polana aba'na mekkere oreng mesken, tape polana aba'na maleng; pesse andhi'na se sabarengngan se epateggu' ka aba'na seggut ekala'e." 
John12:7 Tape Isa adhabu, “Dina, ra, panneng babine' jareya! Sengko' emennya'e polana eparanta'a se ekoburragiya." 
John12:8 Oreng mesken salanjangnga badha e antarana ba'na, tape Sengko' enja'.”" 
John12:9 Bannya' oreng Yahudi se ngedhing ja' Isa badha e Betania, daddi laju padha entar ka jadhiya. Banne pera' terro tatemmowa ban Isa, tape terro nangaleyana keya Lazarus se epaodhi' pole bi' Isa." 
John12:10 Jareya sababba mam-imam kapala amaksod mateyana Lazarus keya; 
John12:11 sabab daddi dadalanna bannya' oreng Yahudi ta' endha' noro' reng-oreng jareya pole sarta laju parcaja ka Isa. 
John12:12 Kalagguwanna reng-oreng se bannya' se entar araya'agiya Are Raja Paska padha ngedhing ja' Isa teppa'na badha e dhalem parjalanan meyosa ka Yerusalim. 
John12:13 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ngala' dhaunna palma, laju entar ngamba' Isa sambi rak-soragan, “Molja'agi Allah! Moga Allah aberkadi se rabu bit asmana Pangeran. Moga Allah aberkadi Rato Isra'il!”" 
John12:14 Isa manggi hemar se gi' ngodha, laju etetene. Daddi kalakon apa se etoles e dhalem Alketab:" 
John12:15 “Ta' osa tako', pottre Siyon! Rowa' abas Ratona rabu, netene hemar se gi' ngodha!”" 
John12:16 E bakto jareya red-moredda Isa gi' ta' ngarte ka jareya kabbi. Tape saellana Isa emolja'agi kalaban sedana, reng-oreng jareya buru padha enga' ja' Isa se epakantha jareya bi' reng-oreng gella' la badha e dhalem Alketab." 
John12:17 Reng-oreng se hadir teppa'na Isa adikane Lazarus sopaja kalowar dhari koburanna ban epajaga saellana mate, nyaksene kadaddiyan jareya." 
John12:18 Jareya sababba bannya' oreng entar ka Isa, sabab reng-oreng jareya ngedhing ja' Isa jareya se mabadha kaajiban jareya." 
John12:19 Daddi reng-oreng Farisi padha saleng ngoca', “Sampeyan ban kaula ta' bisa apa-ponapa. Oladi saos, ka'issa', oreng sadunnya ngereng Isa ganeka!”" 
John12:20 E antarana reng-oreng se entar ka Yerusalim abakteya ka Allah e bakto paraya'an jareya badha keya pan-barampan Yunani. 
John12:21 Reng-oreng jareya nyander ka Filipus, se asalla dhari Betsaida e Galilea, laju ngoca', “Taretan, manabi kengeng, kaula terro apanggiya sareng Isa.”" 
John12:22 Daddi Filipus entar abala ka Andreyas, ban se kadhuwa jareya laju mator ka Isa." 
John12:23 Dhabuna Isa ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “La napa' baktona Pottrana Manossa eagungngagiya." 
John12:24 Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra: Gandum sabuter tanto paggun sabuter, kajabana mon gandum jareya etamen e dhalem tana laju mate. Mon gandum jareya la mate, buru ngasellagi gandum sabannya'na." 
John12:25 Sapa se ngaemane odhi'na bakal kaelangana odhi'na. Tape sapa se baji' ka odhi'na e dunnya reya bakal pagguna meyara odhi'na jareya kaangguy odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng. 
John12:26 Oreng se aladinana Sengko' kodu noro' Sengko', sopaja Tang pangladin bisa'a apolong ban Sengko' neng e Tang kennengngan. Ban sapa se aladine Sengko' bakal ehormadana bi' Tang Rama.”" 
John12:27 “Sateya Tang ate arassa ketter; apa se ekoca'agiya Sengko' sateya? Apa Sengko' kodu ngoca', ‘Rama, nyo'ona palopot abdidalem dhari sa'at ka'dhinto'?’ Tape Sengko' dhateng parlo ngadhebbana sa'adda kasangsara'an reya." 
John12:28 Rama, agungngagi asmaepon Junandalem!” E bakto jareya pas badha sowara dhari langnge', “Bi' Sengko' Salerana la eagungngagi, ban gi' eagungngagiya pole.”" 
John12:29 Oreng se bannya' se badha e jadhiya ngedhing sowara jareya. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Arowa galudhuk!” Tape badha keya se ngoca', “Banne, arowa malaekat se abu-dhabu ka Isa jareya!”" 
John12:30 Isa laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Sowara jarowa ekaedhing banne kaangguy kaparlowanna Sengko', tape kaangguy kaparlowanna ba'na." 
John12:31 Sateya la napa' ka baktona dunnya reya ehakime, sateya se neggu' kobasa e dunnya bakal epagulu'a." 
John12:32 Tape Sengko' reya, mon Sengko' la epatenggi e attassa bume, sakabbiyanna oreng bi' Sengko' etarega ka Sengko'.”" 
John12:33 Se adhabu kantha jareya noduwagiya baramma carana se seda'a. 
John12:34 Ca'na reng-oreng se bannya' jareya ka Isa, “Menorot Buku Hokom kaula, Rato Panyalamet badhi odhi' salanjangnga. Panjennengngan me' adhabu Pottrana Manossa kodu epatenggi e attassa bume? Pasera Pottrana Manossa gapaneka?”" 
John12:35 Dhabuna Isa, “Pera' kare sakejja' terrang jareya se badha'a e antarana ba'na. Daddi, mara terros ajalan pongpong terrang jareya gi' badha, me' olle ba'na ta' ekenneng papetteng. Oreng se ajalan e pettengnga ta' tao ja' entara dha' emma." 
John12:36 Paparcaja ka terrang jareya, saabidda terrang jareya gi' badha e ba'na, me' olle ba'na daddi na'-ana'na terrang.” Samarena adhabu kantha jareya, Isa laju nyengla dhari jadhiya ban ta' kasokan ngaton pole ka reng-oreng jareya." 
John12:37 Maske la bannya' kaajiban se epabadha Isa e adha'na reng-oreng jareya, tape reng-oreng jareya ta' parcaja ka Salerana." 
John12:38 Daddi bendher se edhabuwagi Nabbi Yesaya, “Adhu, GUSTE, pasera se parcaja ka berta se etotorragi abdidalem? Ka pasera eduduwagiya kobasana Pangeran paneka?”" 
John12:39 Daddi reng-oreng jareya ta' bisa parcaja, sabab Yesaya la adhabu keya, “Allah adhabu," 
John12:40 ‘Bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya epabuta matana, epatopo pekkeranna; sopaja matana ta' nangale'e, ban pekkeranna ta' ngarte. Sopaja reng-oreng jareya ta' abali ka Sengko', saellana jareya bi' Sengko' pas epabaras.’ ”" 
John12:41 Yesaya adhabu kantha jareya polana la ngoladi kaagunganna Isa, ban abu-dhabu parkara Salerana." 
John12:42 Maske kantha jareya, bannya' oreng, la'-mala' e antarana para pangobasa Yahudi, se padha parcaja ka Isa. Tape reng-oreng jareya ta' bangal ngako rang-terrangan, sabab tako' ta' ebagi maso' ka kennengnganna kabakteyan bi' reng-oreng Farisi." 
John12:43 Reng-oreng jareya asennengngan ealem manossa etembang eargai bi' Allah. 
John12:44 Isa laju adhabu epakaja, “Oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' banne parcaja ka Sengko', tape parcaja ka se ngotos Sengko'." 
John12:45 Ban oreng se nangale'e Sengko', nangale'e se ngotos Sengko'." 
John12:46 Sengko' dhateng ka dunnya reya menangka terrang me' olle oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' ta' sampe' neng e pettengnga. 
John12:47 Oreng se ngedhing ka Tang pangajaran tape ta' atoro' ka pangajaran jareya, banne Sengko' se ahakimana. Sabab Sengko' dhateng banne ahakimana dunnya, tape masalamedda." 
John12:48 Oreng se nolak Sengko' ban ta' ngedhingngagi Tang oca' la badha se ahakime. Apa se ekoca'agi Sengko', jareya se ahakime oreng jareya e Are Keyamat." 
John12:49 Sabab Sengko' ca'-ngoca' banne dhari Tang karep dibi'; Rama se ngotos Sengko', jareya se makon ka Sengko' apa se kodu ekoca'agi Sengko'." 
John12:50 Ban Sengko' tao ja' papakonna jareya madhateng odhi' se saongguna tor langgeng. Daddi Sengko' notorragi apa se eajarragi Rama ka Sengko'.” 
John13:1 Saare sabellunna Are Raja Paska Isa la ngagali ja' la napa' baktona Salerana abali ka Ramana. Salerana taresna ka reng-oreng se daddi kaagunganna e dunnya reya, ban teptep taresna ka reng-oreng jareya sampe' ka aherra." 
John13:2 Isa ban red-moredda teppa'na adha'ar lem-malem. Iblis la mamaso' pekkeran juba' e dhalem atena Yudas ana'na Simon Iskariyot, kaangguy akiyanat ka Isa." 
John13:3 Isa ngagali ja' sakabbiyanna kakobasa'an la epassra'agi ka Salerana bi' Rama. Salerana ngagali keya ja' Salerana asalla dhari Allah ban bakal abaliya ka Allah. 
John13:4 Daddi Isa laju ngadek, mokka' jubana, ban naleyagi andhuk ka tengngana." 
John13:5 Saellana jareya laju nyelen aeng ka jembung, pas molae maccowe sokona red-moredda, saellana laju epakerreng bi' andhuk se etaleyagi ka tengngana." 
John13:6 Sanapa'na ka giliranna Petrus, Petrus mator, “Adhu, Guste, masa' Panjennengngan maccowana soko abdina?”" 
John13:7 Dhabuna Isa, “Sateya ba'na ta' ngarte apa se elakone Sengko' reya, tape e budhi are ba'na tanto ngarte.”" 
John13:8 “Ampon, Guste,” ca'na Petrus ka Isa, “Ampon ja' maccowe soko abdina!” Tape Isa adhabu, “Mon ba'na ta' ebaccowe bi' Sengko', ba'na tadha' hubunganna ban Sengko'.”" 
John13:9 Simon Petrus mator, “Manabi kadi ka'dhinto', Guste, ngereng baccowagi tanang sareng cethak abdina jugan, ja' namong soko malolo.”" 
John13:10 “Oreng se la mandhi, la berse kabbi,” dhabuna Isa ka Petrus. “Ta' osa eberse'e pole kajabana sokona. Ba'na kabbi la padha berse, kajabana se kasorang.” (" 
John13:11 Isa la ngagali sapa se akiyanadana Salerana. Jareya sababba arapa me' adhabu, “Ba'na kabbi la padha berse, kajabana se kasorang.”)" 
John13:12 Saellana maccowe sokona red-moredda, Isa masang jubana laju alenggi pole. Saellana jareya laju adhabu ka red-moredda jareya, “Ba'na ba' ngarteya apa se elakone Sengko' ka ba'na gi' buru jareya?" 
John13:13 Bi' ba'na Sengko' esebbut Guru ban Pangeran. Ban jareya pajat bendher. 
John13:14 Mon Sengko' reya, Guru ban Pangeranna ba'na, maccowe sokona ba'na, ba'na wajib keya saleng maccowe sokona." 
John13:15 Sengko' aberri' conto jareya ka ba'na, sopaja ba'na nerowagi apa se la elakone Sengko' ka ba'na." 
John13:16 Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra ka ba'na: tadha' dunor se araja'an dhari lorana, ban tadha' otosan se araja'an dhari se ngotos." 
John13:17 Mon ba'na la tao jareya kabbi, pojur onggu mon ba'na ajalannagi jareya kabbi." 
John13:18 Se ekacaca Sengko' reya banne parkara ba'na kabbi. Sengko' tao pa-sapa se epele Sengko'. Tape se esebbuttagi e dhalem Alketab kodu kalakon, iya areya se nyebbuttagi ‘Oreng se ngakan apolong ban Sengko', jareya se ngamoso ka Sengko'.’" 
John13:19 Parkara jareya bi' Sengko' ekabala ka ba'na sateya reya, sabellunna kadaddiyan jareya kalakon, me' olle mon jareya la kalakon dhaggi' ba'na parcaja ja' Sengko' reya se esebbut SENGKO' BADHA." 
John13:20 Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra: Sapa se narema oreng se eotos Sengko', nyamana narema Sengko'. Ban sapa se narema Sengko', narema se ngotos Sengko'.”" 
John13:21 Saellana adhabu kantha jareya, Isa arassa ce' ngennessa. Laju adhabu, “Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra: E antarana ba'na badha settong se akiyanadana Sengko'.”" 
John13:22 Red-moredda padha saleng pandeng, kabbi padha heran sapa se ekamaksod." 
John13:23 Mored se ekaase'e Isa toju' e seddi'na Isa. 
John13:24 Simon Petrus aberri' tandha ka mored jareya, esoro atanya sapa se ekamaksod." 
John13:25 Daddi mored jareya ngengsek ka seddi'na Isa, laju atanya, “Pasera, Guste?”" 
John13:26 Isa adhabu, “Oreng se bi' Sengko' eberri'ana roti se ecabbur ka piala reya, jareya orengnga.” Daddi Isa mondhut roti sakerra', ecabbur ka piala, laju eparengngagi ka Yudas ana'na Simon Iskariyot." 
John13:27 Gi' buru nampane roti jareya Yudas laju emaso'e Iblis. Dhabuna Isa ka Yudas, “Duli lakone apa se ekakarep ba'na.”" 
John13:28 Reng-oreng se toju' ngakan e jadhiya tadha' settonga se ngarteya arapa Isa me' adhabu kantha jareya ka Yudas. 
John13:29 Badha se nyangka ja' Yudas epakon le-melle kaangguy kaparlowan e pesta jareya, otabana aberri' pesse sakone' ka oreng mesken, sabab Yudas se neggu' pesse ekkassa Isa ban red-moredda." 
John13:30 Saellana narema roti gella' Yudas laju kalowar. Are la malem. 
John13:31 Saellana Yudas kalowar, Isa adhabu, “Sateya Pottrana Manossa eagungngagi, ban Allah eagungngagi kalaban parantara'anna." 
John13:32 Mon Allah eagungngagi kalaban parantara'anna, Pottrana Manossa jareya bakal eagungngagiya Allah kalaban parantara'anna Salerana dibi'. La'-mala' bi' Allah bakal duliya eagungngagi." 
John13:33 Na', Sengko' ta' abida pole se apolonga ban ba'na kabbi. Ba'na bakal nyareya Sengko', tape Sengko' la abala ka ba'na akantha se la ekoca'agi Sengko' ka ja-pangraja Yahudi. Ba'na ta' bisa entar ka kennengngan se eentarana Sengko'." 
John13:34 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana parenta se anyar: Ba'na kodu saleng taresna. Akantha Sengko' se taresna ka ba'na, bariya keya ba'na kodu saleng taresna." 
John13:35 Mon ba'na saleng taresna, sakabbiyanna oreng bakal taowa ja' ba'na Tang mored.”" 
John13:36 “Meyosa ka ka'dhimma Junandalem, Guste?” ca'na Simon Petrus ka Isa. Dhabuna Isa, “Sateya reya ba'na ta' bisa noro' Sengko' ka kennengngan se eentarana Sengko'.”" 
John13:37 “Guste, aponapa abdidalem me' ta' kengeng ngereng Junandalem samangken?” ca'na Petrus pole. “Abdidalem ehlas mate kaangguy Junandalem!”" 
John13:38 Dhabuna Isa, “Ba' ongguwa ba'na reya ehlas mate kaangguy Sengko'? Ba'na bi' Sengko' ebala'ana se sabendherra, ya: sabellunna ajam akongko' dhaggi', ba'na la tello kale ngoca' ta' kennal ka Sengko'!”" 
John14:1 “Ba'na ta' osa kobater otaba ngalengsang,” ca'na dhabuna Isa ka red-moredda. “Paparcaja ka Allah, ban paparcaja keya ka Sengko'." 
John14:2 E kalenggiyanna Tang Rama bannya' kennengngan. Sengko' dha' essa'a nyadhiya'agiya kennengngan kaangguy ba'na. Sengko' ta' kera ngoca' kantha jareya ka ba'na mon pajat enja'. 
John14:3 Saellana entar nyadhiya'agi kennengngan kaangguy ba'na, Sengko' abaliya ngoneyana ba'na, sopaja ba'na badha'a e kennengngan se ekennengnge Sengko'." 
John14:4 Ba'na tao jalan ka kennengngan se eentarana Sengko'.” 
John14:5 Tomas laju mator ka Isa, “Guste, abdidalem sadaja ta' oneng meyosa ka ka'dhimma Junandalem; kadi ponapa se onenga ka jalanna?”" 
John14:6 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' reya jalan mon terro kennala ka Allah ban terro olleya kaodhi'an. Tadha' oreng se bisa entar ka Rama mon ta' lebat Sengko'." 
John14:7 Ja' sakenga ba'na kennal ka Sengko', tanto ba'na kennal ka Rama keya. Sateya ba'na la kennal ka Salerana, ban la nangale'e Salerana.”" 
John14:8 Daddi Filipus mator ka Isa, “Guste, ngereng duduwagi Rama ka abdidalem sadaja, me' olle abdidalem sadaja senneng.”" 
John14:9 Tape Isa adhabu, “La ce' abidda Sengko' apolong ban ba'na, tape ba'na gi' ta' kennal ka Sengko', Filipus? Oreng se la nangale'e Sengko', la nangale'e Rama. Baramma ba'na me' ngoca', ‘Ngereng duduwagi Rama ka abdidalem sadaja?’" 
John14:10 Filipus! Apa ba'na ta' parcaja, ja' Sengko' reya badha e dhalem Rama, ban Rama badha e dhalem Sengko'? Se ekoca'agi Sengko' reya banne dhari Sengko' dibi'. Rama se salanjangnga badha e dhalem Sengko' se alampa'agi jareya kabbi." 
John14:11 Ba'na kodu parcaja ka Sengko' ja' Sengko' badha e dhalem Rama ban Rama badha e dhalem Sengko'. Mon enja', paleng sakone'na ba'na kodu parcaja polana pa-apa se la elakone Sengko'." 
John14:12 Bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana sabendherra: Oreng se parcaja ka Sengko' bakal ngalakonana apa se la elakone Sengko', la'-mala' bakal ngalakonana se araja'an, sabab Sengko' entara ka Rama." 
John14:13 Ban apa'a bai se epenta ba'na kalaban Tang nyama, bi' Sengko' elakonana, sopaja Rama eagungngagi lebat Pottra." 
John14:14 Apa'a bai se epenta ba'na kalaban Tang nyama, bi' Sengko' elakonana.”" 
John14:15 “Mon ba'na taresna ka Sengko', ba'na tanto ajalannagi pa-apa se eparenta'agi bi' Sengko'." 
John14:16 Sengko' nyo'ona ka Rama, ban Rama bakal marengana laenna ka ba'na, iya areya Se Nolong, se asarengngana ba'na salanjangnga." 
John14:17 Jareya Errohna Allah se anyata'agiya pa-apa se bendher parkara Allah. Dunnya ta' bisa narema Errohna Allah jareya polana ta' nangale'e ban ta' kennal. Tape ba'na la kennal ka Salerana, sabab Errohna Allah jareya apolong ban ba'na ban bakal daddiya settong ban ba'na." 
John14:18 Bi' Sengko' ba'na ta' edina'agiya kadibi'an. Sengko' abaliya ka ba'na. 
John14:19 Kare sakejja' aggi', ban dunnya reya bakal ta' nangaleyana Sengko'. Tape ba'na bakal nangaleyana Sengko'. Ban sarrena Sengko' odhi', ba'na bakal odhi'a keya." 
John14:20 Mon are jareya la napa', ba'na bakal taowa ja' Sengko' badha e dhalem Rama, ba'na badha e dhalem Sengko' ban Sengko' badha e dhalem ba'na." 
John14:21 Oreng se narema Tang ta-parenta ban ajalannagi ta-parenta jareya, oreng jareya taresna ka Sengko'. Oreng se taresna ka Sengko' bakal ekataresnae Tang Rama. Bariya keya Sengko' bakal taresna'a ka oreng jareya, ban Sengko' anyata'agiya Tang aba' ka oreng jareya.”" 
John14:22 Yudas (banne Yudas Iskariyot) atanya ka Isa, “Guste, aponapa Junandalem me' anyata'agiya Salerana ka abdidalem sadaja, namong ta' kasokan anyata'agi Salerana ka dunnya?”" 
John14:23 Dhabuna Isa, “Oreng se taresna ka Sengko', bakal atoro' ka Tang pangajaran. Oreng jareya tanto ekataresnae bi' Tang Rama. Rama ban Sengko' bakal entara ka oreng jareya ban apolonga bi' oreng jareya." 
John14:24 Oreng se ta' taresna ka Sengko' ta' atoro' ka Tang pangajaran. Pangajaran se la ekaedhing ba'na rowa banne dhari Sengko', tape dhari Rama se ngotos Sengko'." 
John14:25 Kabbi jareya bi' Sengko' ekabala ka ba'na pongpong Sengko' gi' apolong ban ba'na. 
John14:26 Tape Errohna Allah, Se Panolong se bakal eotosa Rama kalaban Tang nyama, jareya se ngajarana ba'na parkara apa'a bai ban maenga' ka ba'na pa-apa se la ekabala bi' Sengko' ka ba'na." 
John14:27 Ba'na edina'ana kataremtemman bi' Sengko'. Tang kataremtemman dibi' se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na. Se ebagiya bi' Sengko' reya ta' padha ban baberri'na dunnya ka ba'na. Ja' ngalengsang, ja' tako'." 
John14:28 Ba'na la ngedhing Sengko' ngoca', ‘Sengko' mangkada, tape Sengko' abaliya ka ba'na.’ Mon ba'na taresna ka Sengko', tanto ba'na perak Sengko' entara ka Rama, sabab Rama araja'an dhari Sengko'." 
John14:29 Ba'na ebalai parkara jareya bi' Sengko' sateya, sabellunna jareya kabbi kalakon, sopaja mon kalakon dhaggi', ba'na parcaja." 
John14:30 Sengko' ta' acaca'a nya'-bannya' pole ka ba'na, sabab la baktona pangobasana dunnya dhateng. Tape pangobasana dunnya jareya ta' kobasa ka Sengko'." 
John14:31 Tape jareya kabbi kodu kalakon sopaja dunnya reya tao ja' Sengko' taresna ka Rama ban ngalakone pa-apa se epakonnagi Rama ka Sengko'. Ella, mara sateya ja' mangkada dhari dhinna'.”" 
John15:1 Dhabuna Isa, “Sengko' reya bungkana anggur se saongguna, ban Tang Rama tokang kebbunna." 
John15:2 Sakabbiyanna Tang ranca' se ta' abuwa bi' Rama eketthok, dineng ca'-ranca' se abuwa ekorange dhaunna sarta eberse'e me' olle buwana atamba lebba'." 
John15:3 Ba'na la berse polana Tang pangajaran se etarema ba'na dhari Sengko'. 
John15:4 Mara ba'na papaggun badha e dhalem Sengko', ban Sengko' pagguna badha e dhalem ba'na. Ranca' dibi' ta' kera abuwa kajabana mon cekka' ka bungkana. Bariya keya ba'na pera' bisa abuwa mon ba'na paggun cekka' ka Sengko'." 
John15:5 Sengko' reya bungkana anggur, ban ba'na ca'-ranca'na. Oreng se paggun badha e dhalem Sengko' ban Sengko' badha e dhalem aba'na bakal bannya'a buwana; sabab mon tadha' Sengko' ba'na ta' kera bisa apa-rapa." 
John15:6 Oreng se ta' paggun badha e dhalem Sengko', bakal ebuwanga akantha ranca', laju kerreng. Ca'-ranca' se kantha jareya bakal epakompola ban ebuwanga ka dhalem apoy, laju eobbar." 
John15:7 Mon ba'na paggun badha e dhalem Sengko' ban Tang pangajaran badha e atena ba'na, nyo'on ka Rama apa'a bai se ekaterro ba'na; parnyo'onanna ba'na tanto ekabbuli." 
John15:8 Mon ba'na lebba' buwana, Tang Rama eagungngagi; mon kantha jareya ba'na daddi Tang mored ongguwan." 
John15:9 Akantha Rama se taresna ka Sengko', bariya keya Sengko' taresna ka ba'na. Ba'na kodu teptep odhi' menangka oreng se ekataresnae Sengko'." 
John15:10 Mon ba'na ajalannagi Tang ta-parenta, ba'na paggun esto ka Tang kataresna'an, akantha Sengko' teptep esto ka kataresna'anna Rama polana ajalannagi kon-papakonna." 
John15:11 Kabbi reya bi' Sengko' ekabala ka ba'na sopaja Tang kagumbira'an badha e dhalem atena ba'na, ban kagumbira'anna ba'na daddi samporna." 
John15:12 Areya' Tang parenta: ba'na pasaleng taresna, akantha Sengko' se taresna ka ba'na." 
John15:13 Oreng se paleng taresna ka bat-sobadda iya areya oreng se ehlas mate kaangguy bat-sobadda jareya. 
John15:14 Ba'na reya Tang bat-sobat mon ba'na ngalakone apa se eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na. 
John15:15 Bi' Sengko' ba'na ta' esebbuda dunor pole, sabab dunor reya ta' tao apa se teppa'na elakone lorana. Bi' Sengko' ba'na esebbuda Tang sobat sabab pa-apa se ekaedhing Sengko' dhari Rama, bi' Sengko' la ekabala ka ba'na kabbi." 
John15:16 Banne ba'na se mele Sengko', tape Sengko' se mele ba'na, ban nyoro ba'na entar man-dha'emman sopaja ba'na abuwa lebba', iya areya buwa se ta' bisa mate. Daddi bi' Rama ba'na bakal eparengngana apa'a bai se epenta ba'na kalaban Tang nyama." 
John15:17 Areya' Tang parenta ka ba'na: ba'na kodu pasaleng taresna.” 
John15:18 “Mon ba'na ekabaji'i dunnya, kaenga'e ja' Sengko' la ekabaji'i kaadha' bi' dunnya." 
John15:19 Ja' sakenga ba'na reya andhi'na dunnya, tanto ba'na ekaase'e bi' dunnya menangka andhi'na. Tape ba'na epele Sengko' dhari dunnya reya, daddi ba'na banne andhi'na dunnya reya. Jareya sababba ba'na ekabaji'i bi' dunnya reya." 
John15:20 Kaenga'e apa se la ekoca'agi Sengko' ka ba'na, ‘Abdi ta' kera alebbiyan dhari lorana.’ Mon Sengko' ekaneyaja, tanto ba'na ekaneyaja keya. Mon reng-oreng e dunnya reya atoro' ka Tang pangajaran, pangajaranna ba'na tanto etoro' keya." 
John15:21 Ba'na kabbi bakal epakantha'a jareya bi' reng-oreng dunnya reya polana ba'na Tang mored, sabab reng-oreng dunnya jareya ta' tao ka se ngotos Sengko'." 
John15:22 Reng-oreng jareya ta' kera dusa ja' sakenga Sengko' ta' dhateng ban bi' Sengko' ta' ebalai parkara jareya kabbi. Tape sateya reng-oreng dunnya reya ta' andhi' alasan pole kaangguy dusa. 
John15:23 Oreng se baji' ka Sengko' baji' ka Tang Rama. 
John15:24 Ja' sakenga e adha'na reng-oreng dunnya reya Sengko' ta' tao ngalakone pa-apa se gi' ta' tao elakone oreng laen, reng-oreng dunnya jareya ta' dusa. Tape sateya reng-oreng dunnya reya la nangale'e apa se elakone Sengko', ban reng-oreng jareya baji' ka Sengko' ban ka Rama." 
John15:25 Tape pajat kodu kantha jareya sopaja kalakon se esebbuttagi e dhalem Ketab Hokomma reng-oreng jareya, iya areya: ‘Sengko' ekabaji'i reng-oreng dunnya reya ta' kalaban badha margana.’" 
John15:26 Sengko' ngotosa ka ba'na Panolong se dhari Rama asalla. Iya areya Erroh se anyata'agiya pa-apa se bendher parkara Allah. Mon la rabu, Erroh jareya bakal aparenga kasakseyan parkara Sengko'." 
John15:27 Ban ba'na kodu aberri' kasakseyan keya parkara Sengko', sabab ba'na la abareng ban Sengko' dhari dha'-adha'na." 
John16:1 Bi' Sengko' jareya ekabala kabbi ka ba'na sopaja ba'na ta' sampe'a mortad. 
John16:2 Ba'na bakal epakalowara dhari kennengngan-kennengnganna kabakteyan. Ban e settong bakto oreng se mate'e ba'na bakal apangrasa'a ngalakone jareya menangka pangabdiyanna ka Allah. 
John16:3 Ba'na epakantha jareya bi' reng-oreng jareya sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' tao ka Rama ban ta' tao ka Sengko'. 
John16:4 Tape sateya bi' Sengko' ba'na la ebalai parkara jareya, sabab mon jareya kadaddiyan e budhi are, ba'na bakal enga'a ja' jareya kabbi bi' Sengko' la ekabala ka ba'na.” “Parkara reya bi' Sengko' ta' ekabala ka ba'na dhari dha'-adha'na sabab Sengko' apolong ban ba'na." 
John16:5 Tape sateya Sengko' entara ka se ngotos Sengko'; tape e antarana ba'na tadha' settonga se atanya dha' emma'a Sengko'. 
John16:6 Sateya saellana jareya kabbi bi' Sengko' ekabala ka ba'na, ba'na la'-mala' laju sossa atena." 
John16:7 Tape Sengko' ngoca'a sabendherra ka ba'na: Ka ba'na lebbi bagus mon Sengko' mangkat; sabab mon Sengko' ta' mangkat, Panolong rowa ta' kera rabu ka ba'na. Tape mon Sengko' mangkat, Sengko' ngotosa Erroh jareya ka ba'na." 
John16:8 Erroh jareya mon la rabu bakal anyata'agiya ka dunnya reya se sabendherra artena dusa, pa-apa se bendher, ban parkara okomanna Allah." 
John16:9 Erroh jareya bakal anyata'agiya ja' ta' parcaja ka Sengko' reya dusa; 
John16:10 ja' Sengko' bendher, sabab Sengko' entara ka Rama ban ba'na bakal ta' nangaleyana Sengko' pole;" 
John16:11 ban ja' Allah reya la molae ngokom sabab se ngobasae dunnya reya la eokom. 
John16:12 Gi' bannya' se ekoca'agiya Sengko' ka ba'na tape sateya reya ba'na gi' ta' sanggup narema. 
John16:13 Tape mon Erroh jareya la rabu, iya areya Erroh se anyata'agi barang se bendher parkara Allah, ba'na bakal etontona sopaja ba'na tao ka sakabbiyanna barang se bendher. Erroh jareya ta' adhabuwa dhari Salerana dibi' tape adhabuwagiya pa-apa se la epeyarsa Salerana, sarta bakal aparenga oneng ka ba'na apa se kadaddiyana e budhi are." 
John16:14 Erroh jareya bakal ngagungngagiya Sengko', sabab apa se epanapa'a ka ba'na etarema Erroh jareya dhari Sengko'." 
John16:15 Pa-apa se badha e Rama Tang andhi'. Jareya sababba arapa Sengko' me' ngoca' ja' se epanapa' Erroh jareya ka ba'na etarema Salerana dhari Sengko'.” 
John16:16 “Sakejja' aggi' ba'na bakal ta' nangaleyana Sengko' pole, ban sakejja' aggi' keya ba'na bakal nangaleyana Sengko'.”" 
John16:17 Red-moredda Isa badha se saleng atanya kantha reya, “Apa maksodda Salerana adhabu, ‘Sakejja' aggi' ba'na bakal ta' nangaleyana Sengko' pole, ban sakejja' aggi' keya ba'na bakal nangaleyana Sengko'?’ Bariya keya Guru tao adhabu, ‘Sengko' entara ka Rama.’ Apa maksodda, ya?”" 
John16:18 Red-moredda jareya padha saleng atanya terros, “Apa maksodda ‘sakejja' aggi'?’ Sengko' ban ba'na me' ta' ngarte apa se ekadhabu Salerana rowa!”" 
John16:19 Isa ngagali ja' red-moredda jareya atanya'a ka Salerana, daddi laju adhabu, “Gella' Sengko' ngoca', ‘Sakejja' aggi' ba'na bakal ta' nangaleyana Sengko' pole, ban sakejja' aggi' keya ba'na bakal nangaleyana Sengko'.’ Jareya, ya, se padha ekacaca ba'na?" 
John16:20 Ba'na paparcaja, ya: ba'na bakal nangesa tape dunnya bakal gumbira'a. Ba'na bakal sossa'a tape kasossa'anna ba'na jareya bakal aoba'a daddi kagumbira'an." 
John16:21 Mon oreng babine' para' rembi'a, atena sossa, sabab la napa' baktona se nanggunga sangsara. Tape mon ana'na la lahir, babine' jareya loppa ka kasangsara'anna sabab atena perak polana badha babaji' se lahir ka dunnya." 
John16:22 Bariya keya ban ba'na: Sateya ba'na sossa atena, tape Sengko' tatemmowa pole ban ba'na, daddi atena ba'na bakal peraga; ban tadha' oreng se bisa'a ngala' kaperagan jareya dhari atena ba'na." 
John16:23 E are jareya ba'na ta' kera nya'-tanya'an pa-apa pole ka Sengko'. Ba'na paparcaja, ya: Apa se epenta ba'na ka Rama kalaban Tang nyama, tanto bi' Rama eparenge." 
John16:24 Sampe' sateya ba'na gi' ta' tao menta pa-apa kalaban Tang nyama. Mara menta, ba'na tanto eparenge, me' olle kagumbira'anna ba'na samporna.”" 
John16:25 “Kabbi jareya bi' Sengko' etotorragi ka ba'na ngangguy parompama'an. Tape mon la napa' baktona Sengko' ta' ngangguya parompama'an pole, tape Sengko' rang-terrangana notorragiya parkara Rama."
